E: Universal Merchant

C: 被波涛藏匿的世界起点，寄宿十二泰坦原初神性的伟大圣所，亦是神谕中，创世奇迹降临的应允之地。
E: The starting point of the world, hidden by the waves. A grand sanctuary that houses the primal divinity of the Twelve Titans. It's also the promised land that will see the descent of the Miracle of Genesis, as prophesized by the oracles.

C: dev_跟踪卢卡
星核猎手 - ？？？
E: Stellaron Hunter — ???

C: 完成比赛并进入前#1名
E: Complete the race and place in the top #1

C: 很多宾客回到家乡后会被要求重考驾照——凡是在黄金的时刻待过的人都能明白，这相当合理。
E: Upon returning to reality, many guests are required to retake their driver's license test. For those who have experienced the Golden Hour, they can easily understand the reasoning behind this requirement.

C: 游泳池在十四层，欢迎您前来体验溺水的感觉。
E: The swimming pool is on the fourteenth floor. You're welcome to experience the sensation of drowning.

C: 「忘记你曾学习过的任何表演，将身心彻底投入无我的时空。莫摆出做作的神情，令无瑕的同谐蒙羞。」
E: "Forget all the performances you've learned and give yourself to this space bereft of self. Paint your face with no artificial expressions, and such will dishonor the perfection of the Harmony."

C: 参观艾迪恩公园
E: Visit Aideen Park

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 银枪
E: The Silver Lance

C: 一位白发少年从天而降，将怪物清理干净。与你错身之际，白发少年夺走了你的球棒，并格挡将丹恒的长枪击断。
E: A young person with white hair came down from above, defeating all monsters. While passing by you, this white-haired youth grabbed your bat and deflected Dan Heng's spear and broke it.

C: 可可利亚诘问你们的来意。丹恒称雅利洛的寒潮由星核造成，而银轨被星核阻塞，列车会在封印星核后离开。可可利亚愿意谈判合作。
E: Cocolia questioned your intentions. Dan Heng stated that the blizzard on Jarilo-VI was caused by the Stellaron, and that the silver rail was blocked by it. He explained that the Astral Express would depart after sealing the Stellaron. Cocolia expressed willingness to negotiate and cooperate.

C: 你们与布洛妮娅紧张对峙，三月七呼请丹恒使出隐藏的力量。剑拔弩张之际，桑博突然出现。
E: Tensions between your team and Bronya's rose as March 7th urged Dan Heng to unleash his hidden power. Just as conflict was about to erupt, Sampo suddenly appeared.

C: 你们发现在高处等候的卡芙卡，她使用言灵术控制了一队云骑军士兵阻拦你们，随后潇洒离去。为继续追击卡芙卡，你们必须速战速决。
E: You found Kafka, waiting at an elevated location. Using Spirit Whisper, she manipulated a company of Cloud Knights to hinder you, then left fashionably. You must finish this fight quickly to catch up to Kafka.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝誓言接过「门径」的命运，为世人解读神谕，以灵魂碎作千片为代价，为濒毁的世界开辟万千道路。
E: Tribios vowed to take on Janus's fate. She would become the witness, announcer, and listener of prophecies. She would see her soul shattered into a thousand fragments to open a myriad of paths for this imperiled world.

C: 白厄在创世涡心遭遇来古士。来古士称其将逐火的历程尽收眼底，以及世界至深至暗的命运。<color=#f29e38ff>昔涟</color>出现，称故事即将进入新的篇章。
E: At the heart of Vortex of Genesis, Phainon came face-to-face with Lygus, who claimed to have seen every step of the Flame-Chase Journey and the darkest fate awaiting the world. <color=#f29e38ff>Cyrene</color> appeared, declaring that the story was about to enter a new chapter.

C: 昔涟坐在秋千上，悠闲地哼着歌。你与白厄上前与昔涟交谈。
E: Cyrene sat gently swaying on a swing, humming to herself. You and Phainon approached her for a chat.

C: 黑塔与螺丝咕姆为模拟宇宙的存废而争论。螺丝咕姆认为模拟宇宙项目难达预期，提议终止，黑塔对其提议表示强烈反对，愤然离去。
E: Herta and Screwllum argued over the future of the Simulated Universe. Screwllum suggested shutting the project down due to its underperformance, but Herta vehemently opposed the idea and stormed off in frustration.

C: 三月七向你展示她的礼服。好不容易有参加节庆的机会，三月七想要好好打扮一番。
E: March 7th showed you her dress. With a rare chance to attend a festival, she wanted to look her best.

C: 你们看到一整排金人陈列架。公输师傅称这是这是工造司造来镇守各处的帮手，但这一批还没上色完毕，不能出战。
E: You discovered rows of unfinished aurumaton guards. Master Gongshu explained they're assistants designed to secure key areas, but this batch was still unpainted and could not be deployed.

C: 女性的声音称，古海之水可以涤荡身心，完纳善缘，净空恶业。
E: A female voice claimed that the waters of the ancient sea can cleanse the mind and body, bring in good karma, and purge evil.

C: 你遇到「莎塔娜」，她向你诉说「垃圾之王」塔塔洛夫对众垃圾桶的压迫。「莎塔娜」请你取得垃圾桶们的信任，并率领它们反抗恶王。
E: You encountered Shatana. She explained that Tatalov the Garbage King had been oppressing the trashcans, and implored you to obtain their trust and lead them against the overlord.

C: 在钟表把戏的作用下，筑梦师的心情变为「欢欣」。筑梦师沉浸在绝妙的灵感中，创作出拼图碎片。
E: Under the effects of Clockwork, the Dreamweaver's feelings turned to "joy." The Dreamweaver was then immersed in exquisite inspiration and created a jigsaw piece.

C: 砂金与真理医生进入前厅。真理医生称打开通路的机关藏在这些雕像里，可以去<color=#f29e38ff>侧面的房间</color>里寻找控制雕像朝向的线索。
E: Aventurine and Dr. Ratio entered the front hall. Dr. Ratio claimed that the mechanism to open the path was hidden in these statues, and they could enter the <color=#f29e38ff>room by the side</color> to search for clues on how to turn the statues.

C: 砂金找到一幅画，标注着<color=#f29e38ff>六只朝向各不相同的隐夜鸫</color>。真理医生称这是显而易见的提示。
E: Aventurine found a painting, indicating <color=#f29e38ff>Six Nightingales facing in different directions</color>. Dr. Ratio commented that it was an obvious hint.

C: 瓦尔特与黄泉谈论匹诺康尼本身。黄泉认为美梦正在崩溃，这是人性使然。当人沉溺于只有享乐的梦境时，便是向死亡无可避免的坠落。
E: Welt and Acheron discussed Penacony itself. She believed that sweet dream was on the brink of collapse, a result of human nature. When one is immersed in a dreamscape of pure indulgence, that was their inevitable descent into death.

C: 「知更鸟」安抚皮皮西宾客，称从天空中洒落的筹码是鸢尾花家系筹备已久的「拟梦技术」。作为赔礼，「知更鸟」送给客人一个按钮。
E: "Robin" comforted the Pepeshi guests, saying that the chips falling from the sky were part of the Iris Family's long-prepared "DreamSim Tech." As an apology, "Robin" gave the guests a button.

C: 波提欧来到吧台，索要预留于此的「阿斯德纳白橡木」。酒保称没有这款酒预定记录，波提欧决定与丹恒边喝酒边等候黑天鹅联络。
E: At the drink lounge, Boothill requested the pre-arranged "Asdana's White Oak." However, the drinksmith said there was no reservation for that particular drink. Boothill decided to wait for contact from Black Swan while sharing drinks with Dan Heng.

C: 你战胜雨伞行业对手甜猿泰山，成功再现逐梦商战冲突，为通关第二阶段战斗关卡奠定基础。
E: You defeated Sweet Gorilla, your rival in the umbrella business. Through that, you successfully reenacted the business rivalry of the dreamchasers, setting a foundation for clearing the second combat stage.

C: 米沙回忆全数觉醒，坦言梦泡即为故乡，自己是只有无名客可以看见的忆域迷因。
E: Misha's reawakened all his memories and acknowledged the dream bubbles to be his home. He was a Memory Zone Meme that only the Nameless could see.

C: 你以「压力魔王」的角色出演宣传片，然而谐乐蕉师对你的台词设计十分不满。谐乐蕉师叫停了拍摄，要对你们加强*蕉学*。
E: You starred in a promotional video as the Devil of Stress, but Charmony BananAdvisor was extremely dissatisfied with your line delivery. The BananAdvisor halted the shoot to give you all an intensive banacademic training.

C: 波提欧为知更鸟展示音乐台，这是唯一能在流梦礁举办大合唱的法子。危急存亡的时候，可以用一场派对来拯救世界。
E: Boothill showed Robin the music station, which was the only way to get everyone at Dreamflux Reef to sing together. When everything was at stake, sometimes a party was just what you needed to save the world.

C: 三位停云就送礼之道展开激烈讨论，星期日指出她们各自代表记忆面相。
E: Three Tingyuns engaged in an intense discussion regarding the right manners to give gifts. Sunday pointed out that they each represented a facet of memory.

C: 静谧星夜下，知更鸟默念对兄长的祝福，星期日悄然离去，留下一场无言的道别。
E: Under the silent sky, Robin recalled her wishes to her brother. Sunday wordlessly departed, leaving behind a quiet farewell.

C: 在经历如此多的变故之后，你与丹恒暂时得以放下心来休息。在返回私人浴宫前，你提议给三月七拍几张创世涡心的照片。
E: After all the surprises and challenges, you and Dan Heng could finally take a breather. Before heading back to your private bath chamber, you suggested snapping some photos of the Vortex of Genesis for March 7th.

C: 在当下突如其来的攻击后，白厄觉得「纷争」眷属的行为毫无逻辑可言。万敌则认为这一切的疯狂即将结束，只要击败尼卡多利。
E: After a surprise attack, Phainon said the Strife Titankins were acting completely irrationally. Mydei believed they could end all this madness by defeating Nikador.

C: 在缇安的带领下，你与白厄回到奥赫玛。缇安回去休息，而你与白厄前去寻找阿格莱雅商量对策。
E: Trianne led you and Phainon back to Okhema. She went to get some rest, while you and Phainon looked for Aglaea to plan your next move.

C: 阿格莱雅向缇宁询问神谕的启示。缇宁称神谕一如既往地清晰，但对于白厄一行是否胜利却缄口不言。
E: Aglaea asked Trinnon for insight into the prophecy. Trinnon replied that the prophecy remained as clear as ever. Yet she remained silent on whether Phainon's group would prevail.

C: 悬锋祭典需要三人组队进行试炼。你与遐蝶在报名处再次遇到沉默的斗士，于是与其组成队伍，并得知斗士的名字是「格奈乌斯」。
E: The Kremnos Festival required teams of three to take part in the trial. At the registration point, you once again ran into that silent warrior and formed a team with him. That was when you finally learned his name: Gnaeus.

C: 遐蝶与亡灵对话，得知尼卡多利的神性被分割为五份。勇气、荣耀、坚韧、牺牲俱在于此，唯有<color=#f29e38ff>「理智」</color>不知所踪。
E: Castorice spoke with the spirit, learning that Nikador's divinity had been fractured into five. Courage, Honor, Tenacity and Sacrifice were still present, but the fifth, <color=#f29e38ff>"Reason"</color>, was nowhere to be found.

C: 大黑塔在「通信区」放置了许多黑塔人偶。第四面镜发现有一个人偶不太正常，经检查发现人偶的「无差别攻击模块」被打开。
E: Among the many Herta puppets deployed in the Communications Zone, the Fourth Mirror observed one behaving oddly. Closer inspection revealed its "Attack Anything Everything Module" had been activated.

C: 黑潮蔓延的树庭的消息此前并不为你们所知。遐蝶勘察战斗痕迹，认为学者们付出巨大代价，挡住了怪物的第一波进攻。
E: Until now, you didn't know that the black tide had reached the Grove. Examining the battle's aftermath, Castorice concluded that the scholars had paid dearly to repel the first wave of monsters.

C: 白厄提议借助你与迷迷的力量打开往日之门，引诱盗火行者深入。只要从其手中夺回「岁月」火种，盗火行者就会被封印在过去。
E: Phainon proposed using your and Mem's power to open a passage to the past, luring the Flame Reaver into it. Once the Coreflame of "Time" was reclaimed from the Flame Reaver's grasp, they would be sealed there forever.

C: 万敌将悬锋印戒交给克拉特鲁斯，令其领导悬锋族人融入奥赫玛。而万敌将独自回到悬锋城，履行「纷争」神职，对抗吞噬世界的黑潮。
E: Mydei gave the Signet of Kremnos to Krateros, and instructed him to lead the Kremnoans to adapt to life in Okhema. As for Mydei, he returned alone to Castrum Kremnos to fulfill his divine duty of "Strife" by standing against the world-devouring black tide.

C: 你在浴宫醒来。经历一夜休憩，现在到了与赛飞儿会合的时间。
E: You woke up in the bath chamber. After a night of rest, it was time to meet with Cipher.

C: 风堇尝试启动浑象仪，但她需要一些前人智慧的帮助。风堇拜托你和迷迷，收集散落周围的记忆碎片。
E: Hyacine tried to reactivate the celestial globe, but needed the wisdom of her ancestors. She asked you and Mem to help her collect the fragments of memory scattered around.

C: 艾格勒的印记飞向穹顶，塞涅俄丝曾在那里带给泰坦致命一击。「天空」的陨落令众生恐惧，而此后之事，与世界历史的记载截然不同。
E: The Mark of Aquila flew towards the dome where Seliose had once dealt the Titan a fatal blow. The fall of "Sky" drove the people mad with terror, and what followed was strangely different from what was recorded in the history of the world.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>警告：实验过程异常，对象卡厄斯兰那未正常载入缓冲区！</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>Warning: Anomaly detected. Subject Khaslana failed to load into buffer zone!</color>

C: 你与昔涟联系天外。黑塔称来古士确实位于当前时间线上，而其来历与天才俱乐部脱不了干系。你与昔涟决定在宴会上进一步搜集情报。
E: You and Cyrene reached out to the world beyond the sky. Herta confirmed that Lygus did exist in the current timeline and that his origins were inextricably linked to the Genius Society. You and Cyrene decided to gather more intel during the banquet.

C: 离开这里，就意味着《如我所书》将就此搁笔，迎来结局。再看看周围的伙伴们吧，千万别留下遗憾。
E: Leaving this place means As I've Written will conclude here and reach its final chapter. Take one last look at your companions and make sure you have no regrets.

C: 「记忆」星神尚未诞生，祂只会在时间的尽头飞升成神，而祂的「记忆」将贯穿过去，成为人们眼中的浮黎。昔涟作为可能成为浮黎的<color=#f29e38ff>无漏净子</color>，有两种选择：一是挣脱翁法罗斯，走向群星；二是以自我为代价完成收梢，闭合翁法罗斯的因果，成为贯穿世界的「记忆」。
E: The Aeon of Remembrance had not yet been born. THEY will only ascend to godhood at the end of time, and THEIR "memory" will stretch through the past, becoming what people now call "Fuli." As a <color=#f29e38ff>Pure Child of Anāsrava</color> who could potentially become Fuli, Cyrene had two choices: either escape Amphoreus and journey toward the stars, or offer herself as a sacrifice and draw a close to the cycle of causality in Amphoreus, becoming the "memory" that pierced through the world.

C: 丹恒感谢你安慰大家。姬子称，列车在「开拓」中总会遇到各种各样的困难，在面对挑战的过程中，大家才会获得历练与成长。
E: Dan Heng thanked you for comforting everyone. Himeko said that the Express would face all kinds of difficulties during the Trailblaze, but it was through facing these challenges that everyone would gain experience and grow.

C: 你与三月七、希儿来到矿区，在此发现托帕的宠物扑满「账账」。你们尝试与账账交流。
E: You, March 7th, and Seele arrived at the mines, where you stumbled upon Topaz's pet Trotter, "Numby." Together, you attempted to strike up a conversation with it.

C: 收集到众人的意见之后，你们发现同意与反对的票数正好持平。还有一个人尚未给出看法，你们前往大矿区寻找希儿。
E: After hearing everyone's views, you found the votes evenly split. With one opinion still missing, you made your way to the Great Mine in search of Seele.

C: 你们成功解决公司的威胁，找到托帕离开铆钉镇的道路，前去向其传达布洛妮娅的决定。
E: After eliminating the threat from the IPC, you located a path for Topaz to leave Rivet Town and set out to deliver Bronya's decision to her.

C: 保姆称自己在案发时间只是出门透透气，除此之外什么也没干。
E: The helper claimed that he just went out for some fresh air at the time of the incident and did nothing else.

C: 拍卖师将镶有黑宝石的手工玩偶向众人展示，引起踊跃竞价。虎克拿到一大笔冬城盾，然而「地髓矿脉探针」的竞拍却因未知原因延后。
E: The Auctioneer showcased a handcrafted doll adorned with erebus gems, sparking a flurry of competitive bids. Hook scored a hefty sum of shields, but the auction for "Geomarrow Probe" was postponed for unknown reasons.

C: 玲可找到一处合适的露营地，和佩拉一起搭建帐篷。玲可尝试启动暖炉，却发现炉具无法正常工作。

C: 在分别聆听三面镜子中传来的雪衣话语后，凭借自己对雪衣的了解，藿藿认为没有一面镜子是真的。幻境中一定还存在第四面镜子。
E: After listening to Xueyi's words from the three mirrors, Huohuo, relying on her understanding of Xueyi, believed that none of them were real. There had to be a fourth mirror hidden somewhere in the fantasia.

C: 三月七对即将参与的庆典兴致勃勃。丹恒认为举办演武仪典是为了对外彰显仙舟罗浮的安定，于情于理，都该去看看老朋友。
E: March 7th was excited about the upcoming ceremony. Dan Heng believed that the event was a way for the Luofu to demonstrate peace and order, and a good chance to reconnect with old friends.

C: 为避免被神秘狐人们发现，彦卿提醒大家赶紧躲起来。

C: 椒丘向一位执勤的云骑士兵搭话，同时敏锐地感到不远处有一道目光盯着自己。椒丘称自己是被步离人劫持的曜青使节，需要帮助。

C: 貊泽称呼雷计划袭击仙舟罗浮上的闹市，以此向飞霄宣战。飞霄将坐镇星槎海应对地面袭击，彦卿则增援竞锋舰。你与貊泽搜寻椒丘。

C:
「走吧，你自由了，妄图超越本分的神选者。把自己的羽翼折断，到人间去，走在大地上，看看这人世真正的模样。」

自那以后，他常常回味公司高管话语中的含义。他走进喧嚷的街头，他走在谧静的海边，他始终都在行走，却一步也未曾出发…他从未怀疑过自己拥有百折不挠的品质，也从不怀疑自己拥有坚决执行的能力。在下一次站起来之前，他打算停下来，体味理想坠地时的坚硬触感——

「斑驳的石片上，浸过兽血和人汗，却始终冰冷，始终粗粝，始终坚硬如故……」

作为家系主理人，他曾开导过太多迷途的羔羊，赐之以正道。但面对自己时，那些轻柔的宽慰似乎褪去失去了魔法，再产生不了效力——他并不需要数落，更不需要同情。

「只有泥泞才会诞生跋涉苦行的人，走下去，我将从失败之中学到比成功更多。」

在真正的再出发开始之前，他有充足的时间放缓脚步，整理思绪，再继续徘徊。

「行走从没有复杂的哲学，当一条路走不通时，便换一条路，仅此而已。」
E:
"Go now. You are free — O chosen one, who dared to exceed his bounds. Sever your wings, descend to the mortal realm, and walk their lands. See what this world is truly like."

Since then, the IPC executive's words often echo in his mind. He traverses bustling streets and quiet shores, always in motion yet rooted in place... He never doubts that he has the determination to remain unwavering or that he has the capacity to execute the plan with devotion, but before rising again, he intended to pause and savor the hard touch of ideals crashed to the ground...

"The fragmented stones, steeped in beast blood and human sweat, forever cold, rough, and unyielding..."

As the head of the Oak Family, he had shepherded numerous lost souls onto the right path. Yet, when it concerns himself, those gentle reassurances seem to lose their charm — He does not need rebuke, guidance, or sympathy.

"Only from the mire arise those who trudge and toil. I shall press forward, learning more from my stumbles than my triumphs."

Before truly embarking on his new journey, he has enough time to slow down, reflect and rearrange his thoughts, then continue to wander at the same spot.

"Walking has no intricate philosophy. If one path proves impassable, simply veer onto another."

C:
「要记得我们的约定哦！每当你们吹起手里的祈愿笛哨，无论有多遥远，我们都会听到。」

那时是哀丽秘榭的小男孩和小女孩第一次来到迷路迷境，和妖精们相遇。他们在院子里和伙伴们玩着捉迷藏，一不小心就掉进了乱草深处的树洞。树洞里好深好深，像不见底的滑滑梯，一直滑到最底端时，没有摔成预想中眼冒金星的样子，却冲进了妖精堆里……
「一二三四五六七，好多小狗，呃…小兔子？」
「不对不对，是哆徕咪发嗦啦嘻。我们分别叫哆啦迷、嗦啦迷、徕啦迷…啦！」

孩子们和妖精们的友谊像一千颗流星一样来得又快又闪闪亮亮，他们一起度过了愉快的一天，但很快，分别的时候也要到了，再不回去，老爸老妈就要着急了。
「分别以后，我们还能再见吗？」小男孩有点忧伤地问。
分别…再见…妖精们不太懂，迷路迷境从来没有分别，也从来没有再见。但看孩子们的表情，那一定是让人难过的东西，紫色的「徕啦迷」想了想，「小白小涟，等等我，我有一样东西给你们！」

小男孩和小女孩把「徕啦迷」的礼物捧在手心里。那是一只小妖精耳朵形状的笛哨，「徕啦迷」亲手做的，上面有七个孔，只要吹奏就会发出悦耳的声音，分别代表着：哆、徕、咪、发、嗦、啦、嘻。「徕啦迷」认真地说道，「如果你们下次想再来迷路迷境玩，只要吹起这个笛哨，无论我们是在睡觉，唱歌还是盖树叶房子，一定会听到，然后为你们打开通往迷境的树洞。」

「是唤醒妖精们的迷之笛呀！」小女孩调皮地笑着，「拉钩约定好，我们会再回来的。」
从那以后，「徕啦迷」最开心的时候就是笛哨被吹起来的时候，它总会大声喊道——听到了，两只耳朵都听到了！

一直到后来，离开哀丽秘榭的小白和小涟记得童年的所有东西。生锈的铁皮玩具，谷仓里缺胳膊少腿的小兵人，钩针编织的花朵毛毡，所有没能落下的雨、干涸已久的血和被焚烧到焦枯的麦田。
却忘记了掩埋在泥土里的笛哨，和一份不再兑现的约定。
E:
"Don't forget our promise! Whenever you blow your Wishing Whistle, no matter how far away you are, we'll hear you."

That was the first time the small boy and girl from Aedes Elysiae had stumbled into the Membrance Maze and met the fairies. They'd been playing hide-and-seek in the yard with their friends when they accidentally fell into a tree hole hidden in the tall weeds. It was deep — so, so deep — like a bottomless slide. But instead of crashing in a daze at the bottom, they tumbled right into a crowd of fairies...
"One two three four five six seven! So many puppies — wait, no, rabbits?"
"No no no! We're do re mi fa sol la ti! I'm Dolimem, that's Solimem, and that one's Relimem!"

Their friendship with the fairies was like a thousand shooting stars — sudden, sparkling, and unforgettable. They spent a day full of laughter together. But soon, it was time to go. If they didn't head back, Mom and Dad would start to worry.
"Will we get to see each other again?" the boy asked, a little sad.
Farewell... See you again... The fairies didn't quite understand those words. In the Membrance Maze, no one ever left, so there was no need to say goodbye. But judging from the look on the children's faces, they realized it must be something upsetting. The purple Relimem thought for a moment. "Wait, Snowy, Reney! I have something for you!"

The boy and girl held Relimem's gift in their palms. It was a tiny whistle shaped like a fairy's ear, handmade by Relimem itself. It had seven holes, and when blown, each note rang clear and sweet — Do, Re, Mi, Fa, Sol, La, Ti. Relimem said earnestly, "If you ever want to come back and play in the Membrance Maze again, just blow this whistle. No matter if we're sleeping, singing, or building leaf houses... we'll hear you. And we'll open the tree hole to the maze for you."

"A mystery flute that wakes up fairies!" the girl giggled. "Pinky promise — we'll come back again."
From then on, Relimem's happiest moments were when the whistle sounded. It would always shout with joy — "I hear it! I hear it with both ears!"

As time passed, Snowy and Reney, who had left Aedes Elysiae behind, remembered everything about their childhood: The rusted tin toys, the armless toy soldiers in the barn, the crocheted felt flowers, the rains that never came, the dried-up blood, the wheat fields burned down to brittle husks...
But they forgot the little whistle buried in the dirt... And a promise they could no longer keep.

C: 狰狞的钥匙圈，如结绳记事般记录下主人的每一次死里逃生。跟随「终末」的呢喃，猎人一遍又一遍奔向那些危险的未来，红柑橘星域的超新星爆炸，多蒙顿的虫群入侵，星际悍匪纳罗的飞船大劫案…他坚信自己的命运不会断绝于此，因而享受每一个与死亡擦肩而过的瞬间。最后，他成了一名葬仪知宾，所到之处也只剩下遍地死亡。
E: A grotesque keychain that recorded, like a knotted-string device, its master's every brush against death. Following the murmurs of the Finality, the hunter galloped towards those dangerous futures time and time again. The supernova explosion in the Red Mandarin Star Zone, the Swarm invasion at Dormonton, the grand starship heist by the interstellar bandit Naro... He firmly believed that his destiny would not end here, and therefore enjoyed every second during which he brushed against death. In the end, he became a Creed Exequy, and the only thing he left in his wake was death.

C: 在登上星际和平公司的押送船前，传奇骇客「零号」曾公开向全球宣告，自己在以太网络的深处留下了一串作弊代码，只要把它输入游戏文档，再白痴的玩家也能让朋克洛德的秩序崩盘瓦解。虽然几大企业多次联合声明，作弊代码已被他们销毁，但直到今天，你仍能在数据边缘看到一艘艘即将深潜的航船，载着意气风发的骇客们踏上寻宝之旅——「朋克洛德是个平衡性极差的垃圾游戏，所以，我做了点修改。」
E: Before they boarded the IPC escort ship, the legendary hacker Zero once publicly announced to the whole planet that they had left a cheat code hidden deep within the Aether Network, and that even the newest of newbie players needed only to insert it into the game files to overturn Punklorde's order completely. Although various major companies have announced that the cheat codes have been eliminated, you can still see at the brink of the data a fleet of ships ready at all times to make a deep dive, taking groups of high-spirited hackers setting off on a treasure hunt in high spirits. "Punklorde is a game with trash balance, so I've made some adjustments."

C: 在一些被强制开发的边缘星域，承担廉价劳力的土著会误以为，公司使用的货币是某种植物的果实，因此，他们总会留下最光鲜亮丽的一张钞票埋进土里，希冀种出自己的信用点树。好事的假面愚者从误会中采撷灵感，模仿分裂金币的原理制作出信用点树，将它们的种子大肆传播。惧怕通货膨胀的公司紧急封锁了各大边星地区，可当他们急匆匆地赶到果园，却发现，土著们真的只是把信用点当果子吃。
E: In certain brink quadrants that were forced into development, a number of the natives that were responsible for the cheap labor would mistakenly believe that the credit currency used by the IPC was the fruit of a certain plant. So, they would retain the freshest-looking notes and bury them in the ground, with the hopes of growing their very own credit trees. The meddlesome Masked Fools gained inspiration from this misunderstanding and imitated the concept of the Gold Coins of Discord to create a credit tree, spreading the seeds far and wide. Fearing inevitable inflation, the IPC immediately set blockades across large borderland areas and rushed to the fruit fields to investigate. What they found on arrival, however, was that the locals had taken to simply eating the credits as fruits instead.

C: 这颗形似心脏的果实来自于某株被药师赐福的大树，据说已有五十琥珀纪的历史。虽然不知它是否能使食用者长生不死，但显然它本身已是一种不死孽物。
E: This heart-shaped fruit comes from a tree blessed by Yaoshi and is supposedly <unbreak>50</unbreak> Amber Eras old. It is unclear whether the fruit would give immortality to those who eat it, but the tree itself is definitely an immortal abomination.

C:
若是说有什么值得你唾弃，那便是弱肉强食的野蛮法理。倘若知识的高度无法企及天上的烈火，再伟大的文明也将沦为可怜的附庸。在公司和那些大家伙看来，这些懵懂的生命，不过是原料产地的廉价劳力。

你将知识带往繁星，以拔苗助长的方式，任稚子们尽情吮吸。从茹毛饮血，到冲入银宇，文明以无法刹车的步调行进。如同牙牙学语的孩童，在日落后便学习奔跑，破壳的湮厄鹰，在第一声鸣叫后便开始飞行。

在险象环生的时代，只有不顾一切地奔跑，才能保护自己的文明。
E:
If there is one thing that should be despised by you, it is the barbaric concept that the weak are no more than prey to the strong. No matter how great a civilization may be, if their knowledge cannot reach the great heights of the sun in the sky, then it's doomed to be reduced to no more than a vassal. In the eyes of the IPC and other great forces, these nascent lifeforms are no more than cheap labor at the location of raw material extraction.

You bring knowledge to the stars and attempt to force this knowledge on its inhabitants, letting these children suckle on wisdom as much as they want. From savage hunting to taking to outer space, the wheels of civilization are moving too fast to be stopped now. Much like a babbling child learns to run after sunset, a Torment Eagle that just breaks out of its shell takes flight immediately after its first call.

In a generation where danger lies at every turn, the only way to ensure the safety of your civilization is to run forward at all cost.

C: 从冰冷的病床上醒来，甜腻的餐点令你几欲作呕。反式克斯替综合征，从免疫系统开始的全线崩溃。眼睛瞥向床沿，不久以前，那里还停留着普尔郎的头足纲病号，它在水缸里一刻不停地呢喃，让你彻夜难眠。新闻里的学者向观众展示装填黑洞的玻璃瓶，可黑洞离你那么遥远，你走不出病房，立方体外，与你而言是不存在的空间。\n\n生存就像是一场漫无边际的战斗，有人胜利，有人失败，也有人选择了放弃。尽管死亡永远耐心地等待在终点，你仍旧坚信，自己会在见到它前，赢得第一场胜利。
E: You awaken in your cold hospital bed as the sweet smell of food makes you nearly sick. Trans-Kersti Syndrome is a complete breakdown of the body starting with the immune system. As you look over to the side of your bed, you see the water tank that held Purlang's cephalopod patient not long ago, whose non-stop mumbling in the tank would keep you awake all night. The scholars on the news are showing viewers bottles that load black holes, but black holes are so far from you and you cannot leave your hospital room. Anything outside of this cube is a space that may as well not exist to you.\n\nSurvival is like an endless struggle. Some win, some lose, and some choose to quit. Even though death is always patiently waiting at the end, you remain resolute that you will take your first victory before you meet it.

C:
这是刻录在石板上的巡猎时刻，天谴之矛尼卡多利的神迹。
无数人都曾见证过，征服者追猎天空的身形，
雷电扫过它的肩膀，双翼的眷属撕咬它的手臂，
无畏的纷争之神无暇擦拭金血，
以百支洞穿云翳的长矛作为回应。
于是天穹的百眼巨鸟尖啸着逃离，
胜利父跋涉过山峦和沟谷，
追猎那霸占了天空的，傲慢的仇敌。
从翁法罗斯的起点到终点，
如倒转的雨滴落入天空的长矛照亮黑夜，
刺入大地的雷枪亦永恒轰鸣。
模仿着神明，天空的祭司与悬锋的战士相向而对，
直到将另一方消灭殆尽，这场猎杀都绝不会止息。
E:
This is an instance of the hunt inscribed on a stone tablet. This is the miracle of Nikador, the Lance of Fury.
Countless witnesses had beheld the conqueror's heroic bearing as they fought in the sky.
Lightning swept across their shoulders, and the winged Titankin gnawed at their arms.
The fearless God of Strife spared no time to wipe away the golden blood.
In response, a hundred lances pierced through the dark clouds.
Wounded, the many-eyed giant bird of the sky dome shrieked and fled.
The Father of Victory traversed mountains and valleys
To relentlessly hunt the arrogant foe that usurped the sky.
Across Amphoreus, from north to south,
Lances like inverted raindrops pierced the sky, illuminating the night.
Thunder spears roared eternally as they struck the earth.
Imitating the divine, the sky priests and the warriors of Kremnos clashed head-on.
This hunt would never cease until one side was utterly annihilated.

C:
何人如此大胆？在众目睽睽下盗取王冠，
他还在国王光秃秃的头顶上，写下一则令人捧腹的笑话。
这就是我们沃辛尼什的神偷，
拿走宝物，赠予笑话。
贵族穿金戴银招摇过市，只为他的光顾，
可吸引来的，却多为蹩脚的模仿者。
你看这座历史古城，如今已成为小偷和喜剧家的天堂，
却没有人再去追查神偷的真身。
如果你是商人，请小心绕过这座城，
但你若是想开怀大笑，我会为你打开城门。
E:
What audacity! To pilfer the crown before gawping crowds,
then deface the king's bald head with uproarious graffiti.
This is Worthinnis' Master Thief—
swiping treasures and bestowing jests.
Ostentatious nobles don prized jewelry in the city, just to anticipate their arrival,
but only attract third-rate copycats.
Now, this historic citadel teems with pickpockets and pranksters,
yet none pursue the true identity of the Master Thief.
Merchants? Detour far and wide.
But to those who seek mirth — enter! I will open the gates for you.

C: 被美蒂罗人圈养在天空中的大气浮游生物，经过长期选育，味道已经和牲畜肉类相差无几。因其极高的烹饪难度成为了高档餐厅桌上常见的食材。据星空生态学派考察，这些生物与穹桑的刺胞动物在基因上具有显著的相似性，更有激进观点称其与造翼者同源共祖，但受到了星际美食协会的集体抵制。
E: An atmospheric floating organism herded in the air by the Merito people. After prolonged selective breeding, the taste of their meat is now indistinguishable from normal farmed species. The intense difficulty involved in cooking their meat meant they became an ingredient that frequently appeared in high-end culinary establishments. Based on observations by the Astral Ecology School, these creatures have significant genetic similarities with the Cnidaria organisms in Muldrasil. There are even radicals who claim that these animals share a common ancestor with the wingweavers, but this idea faced universal rebuttal from the Interastral Culinary Association.

C: 新的一天开始了。 他踏上另一艘飞船，那艘飞船上的人们戴着不同的面具。他差点被人窃夺记忆，被迫听取如妄语一般的演讲。 他知道这条途径的航道上盘亘着巨兽，但他只有走上最险的道路，才有可能求得一条生路。 他击退了巨兽，然后在下一个港口下了船。他自认为藏匿于如星星一般不知其数的舰船中，不会被人察觉，却被一个红发的女子叫住，她恭敬地向他致意，说他们也是被他拯救的舰船之一。 他原本想转身便走，却看到红发女子身旁，停泊着一辆列车。 「你接下来去哪儿？」 「…没想好。」 「那你愿意来列车么？」 「……」 「我们在重走过去的航道，有太多的内容要重新来过，我们需要一个护卫…和记录员。」 「……」 「等你想好了要去哪儿，可以随时下车。」 「好。」
E: A new dawn begins. He boards another spaceship, and the passengers are all wearing different masks. He nearly has his memory stolen, and is forced to listen to a lecture that sounded like mad ramblings. He knows that huge monsters prowl upon this route, but he could only find a way toward survival by traveling along the most dangerous of roads. He defeats the huge monsters and disembarks at the next port. He thinks he could remain undetected among the countless ships, but he is stopped by a redhead woman. She salutes him in thanks, saying she is with one of the ships he had rescued. He is about to turn and leave when he sees a parked train beside the redhead woman. "Where's your next stop?" "...Haven't decided yet." "Then would you like to board our Express?" "..." "We're retracing our previous journey. There's so much to see all over again. We need a guard... And an archiver." "..." "You can get off any time once you made up your mind on where to go." "Alright."

C: 「…这个女人叫『卡芙卡』，是新的猎人，没有注册信息，无所属组织。她持有被称为『言灵术』的能力，能够使用语言进行催眠。最近一次出现在新巴比伦的河间地，与大领主示德交谈后带走了他，在场者143人；随后绕路前往成衣定制店，取得黑色大衣一件，白色衬衫两件，红色连衣裙一条，在场者6人；接着前往旧货唱片店，未购买任何商品，在场者28人；在她前往河间地警备局领赏前，最后被目击于中央公园，在场者2695人。我们要『卡芙卡』的首级，因为杀债必以血偿。」\n——天衣五的恶魔所颁之通缉令
E: "...This woman's name is Kafka, a new Hunter without any information on file, and belongs to no particular organization. She has an ability called Spirit Whisper that allows her to hypnotically manipulate others through language. Recently, she has appeared in Riverland, New Babylon. She was seen communicating with its overchief, Shilde, and absconded with him in witness of 143 people. She then made an appearance at a clothing store and stole a black jacket, two white shirts, and a red dress with 6 witnesses. After that, she was seen by 28 people at an old music record store where she purchased nothing. Before she emerged at the Riverland Guard Station to claim her rewards, she was spotted at the central park with 2695 citizens present. We want Kafka's head, as her lethal crimes cannot go unpunished."\n— Wanted Order by the Pteruges-V Devils

C: 乐观阳光、不拘小节的机械臂自由格斗家，「地火」成员之一。\n从拳台到战场，从拳击手到战士，卢卡用这份力量去守护下层区的人们。\n正因为自己曾经体会过绝望，所以他更渴望将希望带给其他人。
E: An optimistic and carefree fighter with a mechanical arm. Skilled in mixed martial arts and is a Wildfire member.\nFrom the fight cage to the battlefield, and from a fighter to a warrior, Luka uses his strength to protect the people of the Underworld.\nHe wishes to bring hope to others precisely because he had experienced despair himself.

C: 他只能见一片殷红，嘴里腥甜，四肢绵软 ——自己应是死了。 黑发的少年浑身颤抖着，却仍紧紧攥着手中的长枪。 他没有龙角，反应也比记忆中更为稚嫩—— 但他不会认错这把长枪，不会认错那双眼睛，那静如湖面的青绿下是怎样的残酷。 伤口开始愈合，他转了转眼珠，看向少年。 少年毫不犹豫地再次挥动长枪—— 「就是这样。」 对敌斩尽杀绝的人，是你。 一手葬送挚爱的人，是你。 差点引致故乡毁灭的人，还是你。 他再次倒了下去。 少年捂着身上的伤口，步步后退，直至离开他的视线。 「███，在亲眼见证你的死期之前，我们会再见面的。」
E: The only thing he could sense was a splotch of crimson in his sight and the taste of iron in his mouth. His limbs were unresponsive. — He must have died. The black-haired young man shivered violently all over, but still clutched onto the spear in his hands. He had no dragon horns, and his reaction was slightly less mature than he remembered... But he would never forget this spear, these eyes, and how cruelty burst out from beneath the mirror-like emerald calmness. His wounds began to heal. His irises flickered and fixed their gaze at the boy once more. Without hesitation, the boy made another flourish with the spear... "That's it." The one who showed no mercy to enemies - was you. The one who single-handedly buried the beloved - was you. The one who almost led the place called home to its destruction - was also you. He fell down again. The teen pressed his hand against his own wounds and retreated, until he was no longer in the man's sight. "Before I witness your death in person, we will meet again, ███."

C: 那一日，玉阙仙舟的瞰云镜下，符玄拜见业师。但她无法置信眼前之人就是族中长辈奉若神人的太卜：男人穿着半旧的飞行士短打，行止无仪地箕坐在地，专注望向投影阵列里不断变化交织的光点。 「末学符玄，向太卜大人问安。」犹豫半天，少女开口。 男人目不稍动，只是竖起一指，示意她看向图示。符玄留意到他的手不知为何被换成了木制机巧。「玉阙的鸣珂卫正在塔拉萨布防，策应曜青舰队围剿孽物。你应该有所耳闻吧？不过，命中注定他们赢不了这一战。」 「哦？曜青舰队武德昭昭，罕逢敌手。按战报所示，我军人数和战舰倍于步离人的猎群。怎么会有攻而不克的道理？」 「问得好。看来你不是一个轻易认命的学徒。」男人起身拍了拍沾灰的衣摆。「卜者知命而不认命，尝试在不同的可能中寻求最优的选择，这很好。不过有时候，无论你怎么选，命运都只有摆在面前的一条道路。当推占完毕时，面前只剩下凶与大凶两个不同结果时，你会怎么选？」 「…两害相权，自然是取其轻者。这是卜筮学的第一课。」 「但若以人类的眼界，无法权衡轻重呢？」男人转过身来。 「这次推占，是由新布成的阵法『十方光映法界』演算所得。结果有二：借调曜青仙舟的鹤羽卫，或是改调方壶仙舟的玄珠卫，二者可择其一。取鹤羽卫，固然能仗其兵势，强攻一时，但此后再无告捷之机。取玄珠卫，则必须忍受方壶所处之地间关迢迢，要将战期拖延六个月之久，忍受敌人多次反扑，损兵折卒自不必提。但能坚持守势直至援军到来，便有胜利的可能。」 「想来他们选了前者。」 「是啊。卜算结果只能参赞谋略，却不能代替将军下决定。他选了眼前损害最小的方案。但我也没算错，这场失败是命中注定的结果。」 「按兵书倍则战之的原则，调用曜青的军力也未必是下下之选。何况，世无定事，太卜怎么就能如此肯定，说的好像一切必然会发生？」 「世无定事？」男人重重叹了口气。「我原本也这么想…最初得出占卜结果时，以为是计算出了差错，但重演之后，结果并无变化。于是我决心亲自上场求证。 「这几周以来，我深入塔拉萨，与孽物作战，取得当地的水居者文明的信任。得到了一条惊人的消息：受其月亮扰动，一个月后，被塔拉萨人称为『恶魔潮』的大潮汛即将降临。 「若无方壶持明的云吟师相助，无人能在那般恶劣的环境下与怪物持续战斗。这条情报不见载于任何博物志，也不载于我军的智库。而为了多此一举地证实它，我付出了这只手作为代价。」 男人苦笑着高举木手晃了晃。「有时候，命运的道路自始至终只有一条。一切都是命中注定的。」 「对了，不必叫我太卜。从今天起，你应当称我为『师傅』。」
E: On that day, Fu Xuan sought her master beneath the Cloudpeer Telescope of the Xianzhou Yuque, but found herself unable to believe that the man before her was the master diviner her elders had so reverently regarded. He wore a somewhat aged pilot's outfit and was unceremoniously seated on the ground, his attention dedicated entirely to the shifting of the interwoven light rays in the matrix. "Your humble student, Fu Xuan, comes bearing her respects, Master Diviner." Such were the words spoken by the girl after a period of hesitation. The man's gaze remained unwavering, as he simply raised a finger, beckoning her to look at the show. Fu Xuan noticed that his hand had, inexplicably, morphed into a wooden ingenium. "The Yuque's Echojade Fleet are currently laying out a defense at Thalassa in coordination with the Yaoqing's encirclement and eradication of abominations. You should have heard of this, yes? However, they are fated to lose this battle." "Huh? The Yaoqing is noted for its martial prowess and is rarely rivaled. According to intelligence, our forces outnumber and outmatch the borisin. How can victory be denied if an attack is commenced?" "Well asked. You don't seem like an apprentice that just accepts things." The man stood up and patted down his dust-coated sleeves. "A diviner knows fate without resigning to it. Treading through varied possibilities to find the best choice is indeed wise. But, sometimes, no matter how you choose, destiny will only grant you a single path forward. When the finalized divination presents you with only two outcomes, the bad and the worse, what will you choose?" "...Naturally, the choice should be the lesser of two evils. This is the first lesson of divination." "But what if it's humanly impossible to judge matters at hand?" The man turned. "This divination is gleaned from the newly arranged 'Deca-Light Reflection Barrier' matrix. There are two outcomes: To temporarily transfer the Heroncrest Fleet of the Xianzhou Yaoqing, or to draw from the manpower of the Ebonpearl Fleet of the Fanghu. Only one choice can be made. To use the Heroncrest Fleet means being able to press a strong offense for some time but losing any hope of victory thereafter. To use the Ebonpearl Fleet, we must endure the vast distances between us and the Fanghu and have the conflict drag on for six months. During this time, we must also withstand multiple counterattacks from the enemy, not to mention the losses that are certain to come. But should the defense hold until reinforcement arrives, then victory may well become possible." "They went with the first option, I presume?" "Correct. Divination can provide counsel and guidance, but only the general can make the final decision. He chose the path that would lead to the smallest loss. This didn't invalidate my divination, of course — defeat was the predetermined outcome." "The treatises on the art of war state that an advantage in numbers speaks favorably for initiating battle, and calling on the aid of Yaoqing's forces may not be the worst possible decision. Moreover, nothing is ever certain in this world. How can you be so sure, master diviner? How can you speak as if all have been predestined?" "Nothing is ever certain in this world?" The man sighed heavily. "I thought the same thing when the divination results appeared... I thought there must have been an error in the calculations. However, the results did not change after the re-analysis. I therefore resolved to head to the battlefield and seek evidence myself." "I had ventured deep into Thalassa the past few weeks, fought the abominations, and gained the trust of the local water dwellers. That was how I received a shocking piece of news: Within a month's time, a great tide known to the Thalassans as the 'Devil's Tide' — caused by the gravitational influence of their moon — will arrive." "None will be able to keep fighting the abominations in such abyssal conditions without the help from the Fanghu Vidyadhara's cloudhymn magi. This piece of intel does not exist on any guide, nor is it recorded in our army's data bank. Only that, in order to validate my results in a moment of superfluous effort, I gave my hand as the price." The man smiled bitterly and lifted his wooden hand in a wave. "Sometimes there is only ever one path in destiny. Everything is predetermined." "By the way, you don't need to address me as master diviner. You should call me 'Teacher' from today onward."

C: 万敌：王音希声
E: Mydei: Remnants of Regal Sounds

C: 黑塔原来不止一个……仔细想想，倒也合理。这位黑塔要求你前往她的办公室。\n原来，黑塔联合天才俱乐部的几位会员开发了一个「模拟宇宙」，用来探求宇宙的真理。\n体验一下试试吧。
E: So, there's more than one Herta... It makes sense now that you think about it. This Herta wants you to head to her office.\nLooks like Herta developed a Simulated Universe together with a few other members of the Genius Society to explore the truth of the universe.\nLet's give it a try.

C: 你们历经千辛万苦，终于搞定了大门的认证，却不曾想此处大门环环相扣，开了一道又来一道。这使你怒火中烧，甚至产生了想要直接翻过大门的念头…\n——可堂堂无名客怎么能随意跳起来呢？这也太不优雅了。\n没办法，去看看那边的电梯能不能正常工作，或者问问门旁的机器人对此有什么看法吧。
E: After tedious labor, you've finally completed the certifications the gate requires. But little did you know, there are even more gates after the one you just opened. This infuriated you. The thought of directly climbing over the gate crossed your mind...\nHowever, a Nameless can't just jump without discretion, it'd be inelegant of you.\nLooks like you'll have to see if the elevator over there is still working or ask what the robot by the door thinks of this.

C:
你的首次「开拓」之旅至此已近尾声。从此处阶梯再向上攀登，便是一切的肇端——星核之所在。
移除星核，贝洛伯格便能从摇摇欲坠的虚伪安宁中彻底解脱，这颗星球亦将迎来新生。
然而，结束不过是另一种开始——你们的列车也会重回轨道，向下一个目的地进发。
若已做好万全准备，就登上阶梯、前往见证这颗行星与这趟旅途的结局吧。
E:
Your first Trailblaze journey is nearing its end. At the top of these steps is the original of it all — it is where the Stellaron lay.
Remove the Stellaron and Belobog will be completely freed from the instability and fabricated peace, and the planet will welcome a new life.
However, an ending is but a new beginning — your Express will also return to its rails and head towards the next destination.
Once you are ready, mount the steps and witness the ending to this planet and journey.

C: 告别风雪转霁的贝洛伯格，列车再次驶向星穹深处。\n下一次启航前，乘客们暂得片刻闲暇。有人冲泡咖啡，有人眺望远星，还有人辗转旧梦…\n不如趁这当口，向姬子打听下一趟旅程的目的地了。
E: The Express gallops into the depths of the interstellar sea after bidding farewell to Belobog, where snow had given way to sunshine.\nThe passengers share a rare moment of respite before embarking on the next stage of the journey. Some make coffee, some gaze toward the stars, and some mull over old dreams...\nUse this free time to ask Himeko about your next destination.

C: 终于，你们与太卜司的使者青雀顺利会合。此刻的她确实「坐困围城」，正愁着怎么出牌呢。令你们不禁感叹太卜识人用人真是别出心裁。\n你们一到，青雀牌风大顺，心满意足地开始履行自己接引的职责。
E: You finally meet up with Qingque, the messenger from the Divination Commission. She is indeed "trapped in place" as she ponders how to play her tiles in hand. You can't help but think the master diviner has interesting tastes in hiring staff.\nQingque's luck in the game drastically improves as soon as you arrive, and she happily starts to fulfill her duty as your guide.

C: 黄泉引领你在瑰丽的梦境中穿行。出口似乎近在眼前了。
E: Acheron guides you through a magnificent dreamscape. It seems that the exit is just ahead.

C: 你们发现沙盘模型上有一道明显的缺口——或许这就是前往家族议事厅的关键线索。根据拉帝奥教授的回忆，能够契合这道缺口的积木就在不远处的珍品室里。\n不愧是教授，多么可靠啊！
E: There is a noticeable gap in the sandpit model, which might just be the key clue to unlocking the council chamber. As far as Dr. Ratio can remember, the block that can fit the gap is kept in the treasure room nearby.\nThe professor is as reliable as always!

C: 砂金似乎已在克劳克影视乐园中央的舞台上等候多时……\n…与这位疯狂的赌徒为全匹诺康尼带来一场震撼人心的完美共演吧。
E: Aventurine seems to have waited for quite some time on the stage in the center of Clock Studios Theme Park...\n...Join this crazed gambler for a perfect collaborative performance that will blow everyone in Penacony away.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•动作派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「动作」的考验……\n你可太熟悉「动作」了——但在这样一个人人都无法欢跳的世界里，你真的能够施展真正的「动作」吗？
E: The first choice! Firefly and you arrive at the stage for Dreamplay Fantasia: Action Challenge. According to the guide, you'll face the trial of "action" here...\nYou can't possibly be more familiar with "action" — However, in a world where no one can jump, can you really perform real "action"?

C: 匹诺康尼的故事已经——接近——告一段落，你终于得以和伙伴们共同度过一段清闲的时光。\n列车组在舒翁的酒吧齐聚，并准备以调饮的方式纪念逝去的伙伴、同时也合庆新生的希望。
E: The story of Penacony has (nearly) drawn to a conclusion, and you can finally spend some of your free time with your friends.\nThe Crew members gather at Siobhan's establishment and get ready to mix a few drinks in memory of those who lost their lives — while also celebrating the promise of new life.

C: 你终于找到了线索——一群把猴子当祖宗供起来的小可爱。这年头，什么东西都能当祖宗，这次是猴子，下次是香蕉，搞不好有一天你也会成为他们的祖宗。\n想办法进他们的地盘看看。想不到办法？你腰上别的可不是玩具。
E: You have finally discovered some clues: A bunch of lil' fudgeheads worshiping monkeys as their ancestors. Now, anything can be an ancestor... monkeys, bananas, heck, even you might end up in their family tree someday.\nFigure out a way to infiltrate their turf. Struggling? Don't sweat, the pistols in your pockets aren't no playthings.

C: 叆叇馆主成为了新的宗师…然而她并不像苦茶大师所说的那样恪守忍理，你不明白她的行为，或许…这便是最严酷的试炼吧。\nAK-A-3，你知道这是什么情况，你也知道自己能捏死飞蝇一样捏死眼前的愚人…但你还要继续忍者的游戏，对吗？
E: Umbra Headmistress has assumed the mantle of new grandmaster... However, she doesn't follow the ninja tenets like Master Kucha. Her actions elude your comprehension... Perhaps this serves as the most cruel trial.\nAK-A-3, you know what is happening here. You know you can easily crush those fools before you like insects... Yet you opt to continue your ninja games, right?

C: 最终的壮绝•狩猎已经开始！踏入狩猎场的众忍，握紧手中的忍法帖，挥洒那些你们曾见过的血泪——那不只是缭乱•忍侠的血泪，而是成万上亿被御猿•邪忍迫害之人的血泪！此战并非为忍义，而是为往日那些遮蔽银河群星的仇恨，以及断绝未来的仇恨的种子而战！化作大岚神的箭矢，照亮黑夜，唤醒众生，刺穿邪祟吧！\n唤醒迷惘的小猴，追猎逃窜的蕉授，不死不休，不死不休！
E: The final Grand Hunt has begun! The ninjas, who have entered the hunting grounds, grasp their ninjutsu talisman tight, and shed blood and tears that they have seen — It's not just the blood and tears of the Dazzling Ninja Hero, but the blood and tears of the billions of victims ruined by Evil Ninja Osaru! This battle is not fought for ninja honor, but for the vengeance that had covered the very stars in the past, and to uproot the seeds of hatred in the future once and for all! Transform into the arrows of the Great Lan, lighting up the night, awakening those affected, and piercing through the fiendish foes!\nAwaken the bewildered monkeys and pursue the fleeing Profnana! To the death! TO THE DEATH!

C: 没有任何告别能一帆风顺——按照猎犬家系成员的说法，这里似乎发生了一些异常，并且，很可能与某种被扭曲过的余音有关…\n就让他们给万维克一个面子，进入艾迪恩公园调查此事吧。
E: No farewell ever goes smoothly... According to the Bloodhound Family members, something unusual has occurred here. What's more, it is likely connected to some kind of distorted Afterechoes...\nLet's have Wonweek pull some strings and head to Aideen Park to investigate.

C: 「粉霞天女」风波差点闹出人命。我们以暴露天外来客身份为代价救下了执着的达米亚诺斯，只是，如此一来…便违背了对阿格莱雅的承诺。
E: The "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco almost caused someone their life. We rescued the persistent Damionis at the cost of exposing our identities as guests from beyond the sky. But in doing so... we broke our promise to Aglaea.

C: {NICKNAME}与白厄、万敌来到了悬锋城。曾经兵戈作响的尚战之邦，如今已成了一座阴森的荒墟。疯溃的尼卡多利就身在这座移动堡垒的深处。
E: {NICKNAME}, Phainon, and Mydei arrive at Castrum Kremnos. What was once a fierce city filled with the clamor of armaments has become a haunting ruin. Deep within this mobile fortress lies the maddened and fallen Nikador.

C: 自重渊归来，我们再次兵分两路。我与白厄前去援助死战多时的万敌，而{NICKNAME}则利用欧洛尼斯赋予的力量，收集记忆碎片，想办法前往悬锋城的往世，与遐蝶一同破解尼卡多利的不死神躯。
E: After returning from the Abyss, we split into two groups. Phainon and I headed to assist the battle-worn Mydei, while {NICKNAME} planned to harness Oronyx's power to gather the memory fragments. Once this was done, we would devise a plan to journey into Castrum Kremnos' past, where we would join forces with Castorice to destroy Nikador's immortal body.

C: 尼卡多利一战，以黄金裔的胜利作结。我们返回奥赫玛，经过休整，将一同见证泰坦火种的归还与火种试炼的开启。
E: The battle with Nikador ends with the Chrysos Heirs' victory. We return to Okhema to rest and recover. Together, we will witness the return of the Titan's Coreflame and the start of the Coreflame's trial.

C: 与此同时，奥赫玛城中，阿格莱雅也开始着手处理尼卡多利渗透一事。但奥赫玛的政局似乎并没有我们所预想的那么稳定。
E: Meanwhile, in the city of Okhema, Aglaea has begun addressing Nikador's infiltration. However, the political situation in Okhema appears far less stable than we had anticipated.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 为了医救城外的无名伤者，风堇暂时驻留奥赫玛，缇安、遐蝶与{NICKNAME}三人先行前往树庭——信仰{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的学术圣地。
E: With Hyacine remaining in Okhema to treat the unnamed wounded person, Trianne, Castorice, and {NICKNAME} head to the Grove — the academic sanctuary dedicated to {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

C: 对于我们伸出援手击败尼卡多利一事，阿格莱雅表现出真挚的谢意，诚备厚礼、邀我与{NICKNAME}前往英雄浴池一叙。
E: Aglaea shows sincere gratitude for our help in defeating Nikador, preparing generous gifts and inviting {NICKNAME} and I to the Hero's Bath for a discussion.

C: 黑潮的造物在树庭四处游荡…这并不是个好消息，临此浩劫，树庭恐怕凶多吉少。向阿格莱雅报告后，{NICKNAME}他们继续向树庭深处前进调查。
E: Black tide creations roaming throughout the Grove... this doesn't bode well. In this calamity, the Grove's fate looks grim. After reporting to Aglaea, {NICKNAME}'s group continues deeper into the Grove to investigate.

C: 一场梦境，将*我们*带回那段早已为岁月所模糊的遥远回忆之中，而这场幻梦，印刻着*我们*内心最深处的不安。
E: A dream carries us back to memories long faded by time, and this dream mirrors the profound fears within our hearts.

C: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n遐蝶准备的礼物被翁法罗斯最有名的猫咪怪盗给偷走了，而她还留下了线索。
E: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to retrieve a certain item.\nThe gift that Castorice prepared was stolen by the famous Amphorean Kitty Phantom Thief. What's more, the thief left clues.

C: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…
E: Krateros brought word of Aglaea's death, and the Garmentmaker's message that followed confirmed it, I was stunned. After shaking off the "Cleaners," I returned to Okhema at once. Upon reuniting with {NICKNAME}, I sought out our companions to learn what had happened...

C: 在遐蝶权能的掩护下，万敌帮我们拖住了盗火行者的脚步，让我们得以从云崖脱身，抵达云石天宫附近。这里也同样是一片狼藉，好在奥赫玛的居民受到风堇的庇护，其时已无大碍。\n距离创世涡心只有一步之遥，得加快脚步了。
E: Shielded by Castorice's power, Mydei buys us time against the Flame Reaver, enabling our escape from Dawncloud to Marmoreal Palace. Though this place too lies in ruins, we're relieved to find Okhema's residents unharmed under Hyacine's protection.\nThe Vortex of Genesis awaits just a short distance away — we must hasten our steps.

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: 白厄与昔涟孩提时的游具——「神谕牌」，它所映照出的，是那熟悉而又陌生的，逐火英雄们的身姿。它是否象征着确凿无疑的命运之线？亦或只是舞台上的迷雾布景？其时，{NICKNAME}仍不得而知。
E: The "oracle cards," childhood toys of Phainon and Cyrene, reflect the figures of Flame-Chase heroes, both familiar and strange. Do they symbolize the unyielding threads of fate? Or are they merely foggy backdrops on this theatrical stage? At this moment, {NICKNAME} could not yet tell.

C: 据{NICKNAME}所述，这段「记忆」中的些许细节，与我们来到翁法罗斯的经历大相径庭。似乎来古士是想借此，将翁法罗斯的真相向{NICKNAME}托出。
E: According to {NICKNAME}, certain details in this "memory" seem at odds with our journey through Amphoreus. It appears Lygus intended to use this to reveal Amphoreus's true state to {NICKNAME}.

C: 哈努努…本来还以为能在圣杯战争里见到他的……
E: Hanunue... I thought I'd be able to meet him in the Holy Grail War...

C: 一场多么美的宴会，君王举起杯中的野心，令臣子与万民酣醉。但若细品蜜酿回味，甜中又夹杂了几分咸腥和苦涩，醉中难免伴着晕眩与痛楚——但在灵魂飞往高空的狂欢中，无人需要俯瞰大地。\n除非你飞到了最高、最高的地方，那里的寒风会让你清醒。\n继而咸腥、苦涩、晕眩、痛楚会如瀑布天降，抱着你下坠。
E: What a spectacle this banquet of power is, where the ruler's ambitious toast leaves everyone intoxicated with possibility. Beneath the sweet honey brew, though, salt and bitterness linger on the tongue.\nThe higher the revelry soars, the less anyone notices the world below. That's the trick of it all.\nOnly those who reach the absolute summit feel the sobering winds of truth. Then comes the inevitable fall. Salt, bitterness, vertigo, pain... all rushing up to embrace you as gravity collects its debt.

C:
那天，满载荣耀与五百位英雄的大船自斯缇科西亚启航，撞入了迷雾下的巨浪怀抱。数日之后，海面平歇，千年再无风浪。
无人知晓迷雾与浪中的故事。或许，只有海知道——
一颗灼热的野心，点燃满船的柴薪。余虚无的灰，落入海底。
去吧，感受那冰冷的火，滚烫的泪。
E:
That day, a grand ship, laden with glory and five hundred heroes, set sail from Styxia and plunged into the embrace of towering waves shrouded in mist. Days later, the ocean fell silent, and for a thousand years, no wave rose again.
No one knows the story hidden in mist and waves. Perhaps, only the ocean remembers —
A single burning ambition ignited all the timbers laden on that ship. Ashes of emptiness drifted slowly to the ocean floor.
Go now, and feel that chilling flame, and those burning tears.

C: 退场歌已经奏响，剧目将近尾声…但在此之前，沉默无言的观众将会为你献上掌声，庆贺你完成了这场悲剧，庆贺你将走向下一场悲剧。\n走向他渴望的悲剧。\n将观众逐出神话的剧场，或是让这场剧目成为万物的绝唱。
E: The music for the curtain call has begun to play, and the show nears its end... But before that, the silent audience will offer you their applause, celebrating your completion of this tragedy, commemorating your path toward the next tragedy.\nToward the tragedy he yearns for.\nEither banish the audience from this mythical theater, or let this performance become the swan song of all creation.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n收集泰坦符文，完成密钥封装。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nCollect the Titan runes to complete the encryption key encapsulation.

C: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…了吗？继续回到「开拓」之旅，弄清自己的现状。
E: The Era Nova ceremony has been successfully completed, and Amphoreus's journey is... over? Continue returning to the trailblazing expedition to understand your current situation.

C: 绝望，是救世主执念的另一部分。唯有同时卸下沉重的愿望与滚烫的绝望，白厄自己的心愿才能够得到解放。
E: Despair is another part of the Deliverer's obsession. Only by letting go of both the heavy wishes and burning despair can Phainon's own heart be set free.

C: 西风吹拂之地，有无垠的麦浪和蔺草的芬芳。这里就是少女的故乡，旅途开启的地方。如果觉得累了，就在这里好好睡一觉吧——一切珍贵的回忆，都会如温暖的毛绒，包裹着你进入梦乡。
E: Where the west wind blows, unending waves of wheat fields and the fragrance of rush grass stretch far and wide. This is the girl's homeland, where the journey began. If you feel fatigued, feel free to take a respite here. All your precious memories will wrap around you like warm fleece as you drift into dreamland.

C: 你看见一颗流星，如同最具创造力的笔尖，在回环的夜中刻下顿号。\n故事，在穹顶下收尾；未来，在星亮的远方。
E: A shooting star flashes by, like the most brilliant pen, carving staccatos into the endless loop of night.\nThe story ends beneath the dome. The future lies in the bright, distant stars.

C: 「军团」战役暂告息止，行进于茫茫星海中，来自「黑塔」的星声余音再度传来——在艾丝妲与全体科员的群策群力下，作为寰宇明珠的空间站，似乎正开展着名为「复兴计划」的行动，亟需有志之士加入。\n而阿兰认为，你是一等一的好选择。
E: The Legion's campaign has come to a temporary end. Traveling amongst the vast sea of stars, the star echo remnants from Herta Space Station are heard once again — with the combined strength of Asta and all the researchers, the peerless space station seems to be expanding and recruiting for an operation known as Project Revival.\nArlan believes that you are the most suitable candidate for this.

C: 位于最前线的基座舱段危险重重，守望此地的科员于孤独中等待着后方的援助。此刻，一位名叫亚伯拉罕的故人正要直面他的阿喀琉斯之踵……
E: The Base Zone on the frontline is engulfed in grave danger. The researchers are alone and waiting for support. At this moment, an acquaintance named Abraham is about to face his Achilles Heel...

C: 空间站的网络安全工程师认为军团入侵事件的背后另有隐情。你回想起自己苏醒时的遭遇，决定与他一同追踪星核猎手「银狼」的行迹。
E: The network security engineer of the space station thinks there is something else behind the invasion of the Legion. You recall what happened to you when you woke up and decide to join him in tracking down the Stellaron Hunter, Silver Wolf.

C: 虽然一度追上了冥火，但是穿梭空间的特性它又一次成功逃脱
E: Despite catching up to the infernal fire, its ability to shuttle through space allows it to escape again.

C: 空间站竟然有隐藏的秘密舱段？！这恐怕是很多科员都不曾知晓的事情。现在你要单独前去调查了……
E: The space station has a secret zone? This might just be something not even most the researchers know about. Now you need to investigate alone...

C: 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆——史无前例的天才集会！这场面可不多见！\n阮•梅单独把你叫走，看来你无法再听到更多天才们商议的只言片语了…现在你有更要紧的事情去做。
E: Herta, Ruan Mei, and Screwllum: A gathering of geniuses never seen across the span of history! Scenes like this don't happen every day!\nRuan Mei calls you aside. Looks like you won't be able to hear any more snippets of exchanges and proposals between the geniuses. You have more important things to do right now anyway.

C: 你从跃渊那儿得到了古海与漂流瓶的近况，不愧是罗浮，一切井然有序，而无名客的善举也得到了应有的嘉奖。
E: You received a message from Yueyuan about the recent goings-on with the ancient sea and the Drift Bottles. As expected of the Luofu, everything is in order and the good deeds of the Nameless have been duly rewarded.

C:
{NICKNAME}的开拓日报：
前情太复杂。总之：布洛妮娅&贝洛伯格，危。
先去找人收集意见。上层区收集完了。该去下层了。
帕姆注：到底发生了什么，倒是把细节说清楚啊帕！
E:
{NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:
Story leading up to this is too complicated. Basically, Bronya & Belobog = in danger.
Need to find people to get some ideas first. Finished in the Overworld. Time to go to the Underworld.
Pom-Pom's Notes: What exactly is happening! Write down the details first, at least!

C: 你们发现了矿民口中那位奋不顾身的姐姐，并成功为她与她那尚且年幼的弟弟断后，击倒了来犯的裂界怪物。\n矿民口中的落单者还剩一位，继续在这附近仔细寻找吧。
E: You found the selfless older sister matching the miners' descriptions and successfully defeated the invading Fragmentum monsters, protecting her and her younger brother.\nThere is only one more separated miner left. Keep looking for them around here.

C: 你应邀来到博物馆整理间，这才得知所谓神秘感不过又是希露瓦特有的一时心血来潮。\n朗道姐弟向你表明了请求——他们希望你能暗中照管朗道家的幺女玲可，并且千万不能被她发现。\n听起来有些微妙，但事已至此，你也只好照办——前往贝洛伯格行政区近城郊雪原的出入口，看看玲可究竟想要做什么吧。
E: You arrive at the Museum Finishing Room as invited, and only then learn that "sense of ceremony" was just something Serval came up with on the spot.\nThe Landau siblings express their request to you — They hope you can protect Lynx, the youngest Landau sibling, in secret. They also insist she must not discover you during the process.\nThis sounds rather odd, but you have no choice except to accept at this stage. Head to the Belobog Administrative District exit close to the Outlying Snow Plains and see what is Lynx trying to do.

C: 雪原极光观测之旅到这里就全部结束了，结局可谓是皆大欢喜，但两位女孩似乎还想让这趟旅行变得更加完美。\n玲可似乎已经准备完毕，并邀请你一同前往博物馆寻找佩拉。\n应她的要求前往博物馆，与二人会合吧。
E: The trip to observe the Snow Plains aurora is now over. You achieve a happy ending, but the two girls seem to want to make this trip even more special.\nLynx seems to have finished her preparations and invites to you to go to the museum together to find Pela.\nGo to the museum as per her request and meet up with the two of them.

C: 两位女孩意外获得了她们期待已久的地髓激活元件——现在是时候让佩拉大显身手，修好暖炉了。
E: What a surprise. The two girls receive the Geomarrow Activation Element they have been looking for. Now is the time for Pela to show off her skills and fix the heater.

C: 从经纪人那里得到了「高级会员资格」，这可能是帮助艾丝妲搞清楚「美丽狐仙聊天」的突破口，将这次罗浮之旅打听的情报汇报给她吧。
E: You got the premium membership from the manager, which may be a breakthrough to help Asta figure out the Foxian Beauty Chat. Report the information you gathered on this trip to the Luofu to her.

C: 铖杰师傅显然没有心思想做别的事情，他想看看星槎，那就一起去桥上看看仙舟罗浮的星槎吧。\n星槎海里每天都有大量的星槎在此往返，不知道铖杰师傅想看到的究竟是什么呢？
E: Chengjie evidently did not have the mood to do anything else other than watch starskiffs. So let's go starskiff-watching on the bridge of the Xianzhou Luofu.\nStarskiff Haven sees many starskiffs in a day. What kind of starskiffs does Chengjie want to see?

C: 留在这里也只剩下无言的沉默，走吧，离开太卜司，让太卜和判官忙她们该忙的事儿。\n其实你明白，你应该留给铖杰师傅一些自我消化的时间，他过几天会来再找你的。
E: Only an awkward silence hangs in the air now. Go, leave the Divination Commission and let the Master Diviner and the judge busy themselves with their own business.\nYou understand, you should allow Chengjie some time to digest what has transpired. He'll look for you in a few days anyway.

C: 鹤运物流需要一位机巧鸟操纵高手来帮他们寻找遗失的包裹。和鹤运物流专员文雯谈谈吧，她会告诉你该怎么做。
E: Heron Express needs an expert cycrane controller to find and retrieve the lost package. Speak with the Heron Express Specialist, Wenwen. She will tell you what to do.

C: 地衡司的勤务总是做一些鸡毛蒜皮之事，揭小广告不会是最后一件。收下了广大的奶茶，你就帮了这个忙吧。\n有时候，连你这样的化外民都不禁怀疑，地衡司真的是司部吗？
E: The duties of the Realm-Keeping Commission often involve trivial things, and taking down small advertisements will not be the last of them. Since you accepted Guangda's milk tea, help him out with this task.\nSometimes, even an outworlder like you can't help but wonder, is the Realm-Keeping Commission really a commission?

C: 很遗憾，事情总是在猝不及防间发生变化。弱小、可怜但恶毒的岁阳等待的正是所有人放下警惕的那一刻。\n拜托了！藿藿大人，快用你那无敌的尾巴大爷做点什么吧！
E: Unfortunately, things always change when you least expect it. The tiny, piteous but vicious heliobi are waiting for precisely the moment when everyone lets down their guard.\nPlease! Huohuo, please do something with that indomitable Mr. Tail of yours!

C: 黑天鹅开始收集线索，尝试解开花火留下的谜题。你不禁想，花火如此大费周章，究竟是为了什么？但对于花火这样的人来说，考虑「为什么」大概就落了下乘。不如先和黑天鹅一起，玩玩花火留下的推理游戏吧…也许这其中就隐藏着花火的真实目的。
E: Black Swan begins collecting clues, trying to solve the puzzle that Sparkle left behind. You can't help but wonder why Sparkle would go through all this effort. However, when it comes to people like Sparkle, asking "why" normally means you are on the wrong track. Why not play with Black Swan the logic game that Sparkle left behind... Perhaps Sparkle's true motive is concealed within.

C: 沦入狼爪，陈于刀俎之间，曜青医士椒丘正努力寻求拖延与分化步离人的良机……也许在这场狼与狐的周旋之间，他能找到救治其主的秘密，抑或逃出生天的机会？
E: Having fallen into the wolves' clutches and now at the mercy of their blades, the Yaoqing healer Jiaoqiu is trying his best to find an opportunity to stall for time and split up the borisin... Perhaps, in this battle between fox and wolf, Jiaoqiu will be able to find the secret to curing his superior or a way to escape his current predicament.

C: 眼前的芙洛拉竟然是莱斯利•迪恩生前的演员助理。\n追随她留下的影子，见证她和莱斯利之间的故事吧。
E: It turns out that the lady named Flora was Lesley Dean's former assistant during his lifetime.\nFollow her shadow and witness the stories between her and Lesley.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 名为查德威克的老人居然曾经是天才俱乐部的一员——他为何会在筑梦边境滞留？\n螺丝咕姆决定亲访匹诺康尼调查真相，并邀请你在白日梦酒店与他汇合。
E: Surprisingly, the old man named Chadwick was once a member of the Genius Society. Why is he stranded at the Dream's Edge?\nScrewllum decides to personally travel to Penacony to uncover the truth and invites you to meet at The Reverie.

C: 查德威克在现实中的肉身已经消失，只留下了一团忆泡。\n带着螺丝咕姆给你的信物回到筑梦边境，让查德威克想起他遗失的过去吧。
E: Chadwick's physical body has already vanished, leaving behind a cluster of Memory Bubbles.\nReturn to the Dream's Edge with Screwllum's keepsake to help Chadwick recall his forgotten past.

C: 英雄或罪人，民众会如何看待这位老者？他究竟是在为众人抱薪，还是在腐蚀圣城的墙垣？
E: Hero or sinner? How will the people view this old man? Is he willing to sacrifice himself for others, or is he deliberately corroding the foundations of the holy city?

C: 在开拓的旅途中，你已经见证了许多不同形式的「预言」，量子历史学派的卜算，穷观阵的推演…在翁法罗斯，命运又会向你展现何种模样？
E: You have already witnessed "prophecies" in many forms along your trailblazing expedition: Divinations of the Quantum History School, extrapolations of the Matrix of Prescience... Just what kind of fate will you be shown in Amphoreus?

C: 等到夜梦已不再喧嚣，等到我们在梦乡重逢。
E: Until the day our dreams fall quiet once more, until we meet again in the land of our dreams.

C: 华劳斯烦恼的原因是因为缺少真心朋友。\n为了交到朋友，他想出了一个策略——策略的第一步是为他拍摄一张照片。
E: Wallace is worried because he does not have many good friends.\nHe has a plan to make more friends, and the first step is to have a photo taken.

C: 铁卫禁区的后勤官老吉尔伯特似乎需要帮助。\n去看看他有什么需要吧。
E: Gilbert, the old logistics officer in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone, seems to want help.\nGo see if there's anything he needs.

C: 民间科学家雷金希望你能去帮他打探一下教育部的题库储备。\n去上层区找到贝洛伯格教育部的官员，看看对方有没有本事把你这个天才难住。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, wants you to test the Ministry of Education's question bank reserves.\nGo to the Overworld to find officials of the Belobog Ministry of Education and see if they are able to have you stumped.

C: 巡逻的银鬃铁卫在裂界中目击到了幻象回响，它们因夙愿未遂而不得解脱。向它们提供帮助吧。\n悠闲的老人似乎想要修好手机……
E: Some Silvermane Guard patrols spotted illusory echoes in the Fragmentum who are stuck inside due to unfinished businesses. Help them.\nThe leisurely senior wants to fix his phone...

C: 捉虫子有什么难的？是时候让阿格莱雅见识你的「开拓」天赋了。
E: What could be so hard about catching bugs? It's time to show Aglaea your talent as a "Trailblazer."

C: 你成功打开了火种匣。问问伊来内其中贮藏的是什么吧。
E: You successfully opened the Coreflame Casket. Ask Alain about its content.

C: 「仲裁官」的试炼再度到来。它的内容、形式、好处和损害你已经很清楚了，不是吗？去吧，为了「均衡」……
E: The Arbitrator's trial is here once again. You are already well aware of its content, format, pros, and cons, aren't you? Go then. For the sake of Equilibrium...

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 帕姆的纽扣丢了，帮帕姆找一下吧。
E: Pom-Pom lost their button. Help them find it.

C: 你听见附近有求救声，看来不止一个「阮•梅」造物在这个舱段徘徊，力能所及的情况下，还是去帮帮它吧。
E: You hear a nearby distress call. It seems that more than one Ruan Mei's creation is wandering in this section. If possible, it's better to go and help them.

C: 地衡司收到居民在丹鼎司洞天里发现近似「云吟术」的异象，并且在异象中遭遇了隐身怪物。\n广进根据异象的规律，在海滩上备好了饵食，希望借此找到引起异象的元凶……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission received reports that anomalies resembling cloudhymn magic have been spotted in the Alchemy Commission delve, and that invisible monsters were encountered within this phenomenon.\nBased on the patterns of anomalies, Guangjin has prepared bait on the beach in hopes of uncovering the true source behind the phenomenon.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 辩论的风气在奥赫玛流行已久，而你恰巧碰见了两位精通修辞学的教师，去听听他们会提出什么样有趣的观点吧。
E: The culture of debate has been popular in Okhema for a long time, and you just so happen to have met with two teachers that are proficient in the art of rhetoric. Go and see what kinds of interesting perspectives they put forward.

C: 你和瓦尔特救下的女孩，似乎是驭空的女儿。为表谢意，驭空希望你们能去司辰宫和她喝一杯茶。此前和驭空打交道时，氛围难免都有些尴尬，现在总算有机会平心静气的喝杯茶了…至少你和瓦尔特都是这样希望的。
E: The girl you and Welt rescued seems to be Yukong's daughter. To express her gratitude, Yukong hopes that you can go to the Palace of Astrum for a cup of tea with her. When you dealt with Yukong before, the atmosphere was inevitably rather awkward. Now you finally have a chance to have a cup of tea in peace... At least that's what you and Welt hope.

C: 让雷金「头皮发麻」的灵感…总觉得这次的异常不太一般呢？
E: This intuition that "makes Regin's scalp tingle"... It kinda feels different?

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往机械聚落，收集「自动机兵•战犬」的战斗数据，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to collect Automaton Hound combat data at the Robot Settlement to help the museum make a replica.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你根据藏宝图找到合适的藏品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to find an exhibit based on a treasure map.

C: 驭空告诉了你要「重组商会」的商户代表，如果能够说服霄老大，肯定能赢得不少商户的支持。\n霄老大是同功坊的店主，到那里去和霄老大聊聊吧。
E: Yukong told you that you need to "reassemble" the merchant guild's representatives. If you can convince Mr. Xiao, you'll win the support of many business owners.\nMr. Xiao is the owner of Artistry Hardware. Head there and speak with him.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说卖小吃的高阿姨和商会建立合作关系。但高阿姨此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Tall Auntie, who sells snacks, to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Tall Auntie has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 模拟宇宙的内存竟比黑塔想的还有限！数据封装已近上限，它快要停止运行了。黑塔准备跟你一起最后做个总结，赶紧把之前的星神数据都存储起来。给这次的测试成果收个尾——再次遍历祂们的光辉吧。
E: The Simulated Universe's storage was more limited than Herta expected! The data packs are at their limit and soon, the entire thing is going to stop working. Herta is prepared to see this thing through to the end by your side. Hurry and save all the previous Aeon data and ensure a proper end to this test before experiencing THEIR glory once more.

C: 经历了毫无波澜的冒险后，你们终于得到了挑战「魔王」的资格。但黑塔似乎没把对决的事放在心上，难不成只有你们在认真玩游戏吗？
E: After experiencing that uneventful adventure, you finally earned the right to challenge the "Demon Lord." But Herta doesn't seem to care much about the matches at all. Are you the only ones treating this game seriously?

C: 你们带着岁阳与阿月见面，在你们的见证下，完成了幽府武弁未竟的心愿……
E: You bring the heliobus to meet A-Yue. With you as the witness, the Wraith Warden's unfinished wishes are fulfilled...

C: 你们在鳞渊境中的冒险经历让宝烛向往不已，向它好好介绍一下吧。
E: Your adventures in Scalegorge Waterscape have sparked great curiosity in Arkeri. Introduce them to the wonders of this place.

C: 在仔细观察过后，你确认这个区域就是充当进食区的好地方。下面该喷上合适的涂鸦，为不识字的造物们指引回家吃饭的路。
E: Upon careful observation, you confirm that this is a good place to cordon off as the Dining Area. Time to spray the right graffiti on the ground to help these illiterate creations get back to their feeding spots.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n该重新开始营业了。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nTime to get back in business.

C: 为了重新获取怪物们的信任，舒翁邀请你进入她的心绪空间。\n在梦境酒店找到了黑桃，该带它回到酒吧了。
E: To regain the monsters' trust, Siobhan invites you into her Emoscape.\nYou found Spade in the hotel in the Dreamscape. Take it back to the lounge.

C: 因为与「钟表匠」的关系，你成为了克劳克影业的特邀导演，开始剪辑《美梦往事》的影片…\n先从先导片《钟表环游记》开始，练习一下剪辑的技巧吧！
E: Thanks to your relationship with the Watchmaker, you have been made a special guest director for Clock Studios and begun editing the Dreamjoy Memoir movie...\nStart with the pilot: Chronometer Chronicles to practice your editing skills!

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•动作派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「动作」的考验……\n你可太熟悉「动作」了——但在这样一个人人都无法欢跳的世界里，你真的能够施展真正的「动作」吗？
E: The first choice! Firefly and you arrive at the stage for Dreamplay Fantasia: Action Challenge. According to the guide, you'll face the trial of "action" here...\nYou can't possibly be more familiar with "action" — However, in a world where no one can jump, can you really perform real "action"?

C: 学剑自然是要确立目标的，即便是最后没能达到目标，学剑者也曾为了一个确切的目标努力过。三月七学剑的动力则是来自仙舟的小说和幻戏，想成为仗剑天涯的大侠。\n为了满足她的剑侠情怀，第一步便是敬茶拜师。
E: Those who pursue the art of swordplay know to set goals for themselves, for they would have worked toward these goals even if they are never achieved eventually. March 7th's interest in swordplay came about from the Xianzhou's novels and immersia, which nurtured her fantasy of roaming the world as a great swordswoman.\nTo fully play out the role of a swordswoman, she has to first be taken under the wing of a swordmaster.

C: 紧张刺激的比赛暂告一段落，可以暂时休息一下了。\n利用这段时间，为接下来的比赛做好准备吧。
E: The tense and exciting match draws to a temporary close. It's time to have a quick breather.\nUse this time to prepare for the upcoming match.

C: 完成「大衍万象」简单模式III
E: Complete Mutare Magnus Easy Mode III

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n乐队组建完毕，跟随乱破去看看演出舞台的情况吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nThe band has been created. Go check out the stage with Rappa.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n艾尔菲似乎有事情找你，先在校园里和她会合吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nArfey seems to have something to talk with you about. Meet up with her on campus.

C: 桑博即将在店里上架新的宝贝…不过在此之前，他还需要你的帮助。
E: Sampo is about to add some new treasures to the store... but before that, he still needs your help.

C: 又是星穹列车平静的一天。你在列车里百无聊赖，准备给自己找点事情做。
E: Another day of peace and quiet aboard the Astral Express. You are bored on the Express and are preparing to find something to do.

C: 不知不觉间，时间已经过去了这么久啊…如今回想起来，可真是令人怀念。\n什么？你说你根本不记得自己刚上车时经历过这段剧情？呃哈哈…你可真是贵人多忘事呀！
E: So much time has passed before we knew it... Thinking back, it's really quite nostalgic.\nWhat? You say you don't even remember experiencing this part of the story when you first boarded? Haha... You sure have a way of forgetting important things!

C: 拍摄告一段落，和三月七就作品谈谈吧。
E: With the photography session wrapped up, have a chat with March 7th about the work

C: 瞧瞧这是什么——「折纸小鸟对对碰」游戏公测邀请函？此情此景似曾相识，但发件人换成了公司。
E: Lookie here! An invitation to play Origami Bird Clash on its official launch? This scene feels a bit familiar, but the sender this time is the IPC instead.

C: 瞧瞧这是什么——「折纸小鸟对对碰」游戏公测邀请函？此情此景似曾相识，但发件人换成了公司。
E: Lookie here! An invitation to play Origami Bird Clash on its official launch? This scene feels a bit familiar, but the sender this time is the IPC instead.

C: 虽然意外错失了加入旅团的机会，但在负责人的推荐下，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大仍然接受了实习的邀约。值得开心的是，因为你的关心与照料，它已经不再感到迷惘了。那么，是时候见证驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大令人啧啧称奇的成长啦！
E: Although missing the chance to join the troupe by accident, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas still accepted the internship offer on the supervisor's recommendation. The good news is, thanks to your care and attention, it's no longer feeling lost. Now, it's time to witness Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's remarkable growth!

C: 完成第二次测试
E: Complete the second test

C: 感知训练
E: Acuity Training

C: 进行游历<color=#f29e38ff>「夜半探灵」</color>时获得的收益提高#1%
E: Increases the rewards gained from performing the <color=#f29e38ff>"Midnight Paranormal Hunt"</color> Excursion by #1%

C: 先读战略
E: Pre-Reviewed Strategy

C: 距离第一次试剑
E: Time to First Sword Trial

C: 漫卷空花
E: Petals Adrift

C: 萧瑟
E: Bleak Note

C: 银狼的协助效果提升，且每日可同时选择2个协助效果
E: Increases Silver Wolf's assist effects, and you can simultaneously select 2 assist effects every day

C: 金人未降灵成功，三月七却被降灵，得到新线索「阿休」。
E: The aurumaton was not successfully possessed by a spirit. Instead, March got possessed, and received a new clue in the form of A-Xiu.

C: 三月七烦恼着剑术精进的方法，也许太卜司书库会有剑谱……
E: March 7th is frustrated about how to improve her swordplay, but the Divination Commission's repository might have some texts that can help her...

C: 找回的金人毫无反应，在三月七的提醒，银狼决心尝试降灵……
E: The retrieved aurumaton was unresponsive. Prompted by March 7th, Silver Wolf tried to summon a spirit...

C: 跃迁是这样的。第一次看会觉得新奇，以后慢慢就习惯了。
E: Jumps are like this: They may feel novel the first few times, but you'll slowly get used to them after a few more.

C: 拿一般的陆地列车打比方，这就像前进的铁轨突然断裂，底下是坍塌的万丈深渊……
E: Take an ordinary train as an example: It's like the tracks up ahead have suddenly snapped, and the way forward leads straight into a collapsing abyss...

C: 我知道你很想去，不过总该让年轻人们单独走走，培养培养感情嘛。
E: I know you really want to go, but we should give the youngsters a chance to get out there on their own. It'll be a good opportunity for them to bond.

C: 因为我们不去不行。
E: Because we can't not go.

C: 这是黑塔女士，或各位更熟知的称号：天才俱乐部#83。她年少时即解开孤波算法难题、斯帕克模型猜想；青年时发现了西格玛重子的转化方法；中年时提出黑塔序列，发表关于返老还童的论文。
E: This is Madam Herta, or better known as member <unbreak>83</unbreak> of the Genius Society. In her childhood, she solved the solitary waves theory and the Spark model hypothesis. In her adolescence, she found the Sigma Baryons conversion method. In middle-age, she proposed the Herta sequence and published a paper on de-aging.

C: 星穹列车也停在那附近！所以不必担心怪物的袭击，我们会解决这次危机的！
E: Plus that's where we parked the Astral Express! Don't you worry, we'll protect you from the monsters and clear up this mess.

C: 防卫科的阿兰在这附近失去了联系，我得把他带回去。
E: Arlan from the Security Department lost contact in the vicinity. I need to find him first.

C: 不要自责。你伤了腿和惯用手，藏身在这里避开与军团正面交锋，这个判断十分冷静。
E: Don't be too hard on yourself. Your leg and dominant hand were injured. It was a wise decision to hide here and avoid a head-on encounter with the Legion.

C: …谢谢。
E: ...Thank you.

C: 这个数量…是不是有点不太妙？
E: This number... isn't good, is it?

C: 嘿，咱是年轻人！就该朝气蓬勃勇往直前嘛！{M#他}{F#她}这个人挺有眼光的，是吧丹恒？
E: Well, that's the joy of youth! We should take every step forward full of energy! {M#He's}{F#She's} a discerning one, isn't {M#he}{F#she}, Dan Heng?

C: 咳，我刚刚说的那些话，你别告诉艾丝妲站长。
E: Ahem, but don't tell Lead Researcher Asta what I just said.

C: 受伤？我都不在乎，也没有人在乎。你是谁，别挡我的路。
E: Injured? I don't care, see anyone else that cares? Who are you anyway, get out of my way.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>姐姐</color>，你在哪儿，我真的好害怕……
E: Oh <color=#dbc291ff>sis</color>, where are you? I'm so scared...

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着虎克：「6分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Hook: "6 points!" it announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着希露瓦：「<unbreak>67</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Serval: "<unbreak>67</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 「奇物编号<unbreak>021</unbreak>：勘星钎。这款是原型，再强调一遍，原型。」
E: "Curio No. <unbreak>021</unbreak>: Astro Rod. This is the PROTOTYPE. I repeat, PROTOTYPE."

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着海瑟音：「<unbreak>0.129</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Hysilens: "<unbreak>0.129</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 这破坏力…看来，它终于要动真格了。
E: Not good... It's ready to throw everything at us.

C: 你信任星穹列车吗？
E: Do you trust the Astral Express?

C: 合作很久的商业伙伴。
E: We've been business partners for a long time.

C: 你好像对我不满意。
E: I didn't think you approved of me.

C: 喔，是你呀。感觉怎么样？
E: Oh, it's you. How do you feel?

C: 不假思索地做出善举——这是英雄最重要的资质。
E: Helping others without a second thought — that is the most important quality of a hero.

C: 拥趸最多的是「宇宙之树」说。提出者是「智识」的令使：天才俱乐部第一位会员赞达尔。他认为银河是一棵虚数巨木，被阻隔的星系则是一片片树叶。
E: The most popular is probably the Cosmos Tree theory, proposed by Zandar, Emanator of Erudition and the first member of the Genius Society. He compared the galaxy to an enormous imaginary tree, with its leaves being individual universes.

C: 按螺丝咕姆的设计，模拟的是整个「宇宙」。不过现在这台终端机只开放部分场景，这就够用了。螺丝咕姆经常设计些大而无当的东西，那家伙有一整颗星球，所以毫无顾虑……
E: It is a simulation of the entire universe according to Screwllum's design. But right now, only limited locations are open for access in this terminal. It's enough for us. Screwllum likes to design big useless things. He has a whole planet to himself, so he doesn't care about spatial limitations...

C: 你们…有办法封印那个叫「星核」的东西？
E: You... know how to seal the "Stellaron"?

C: 屋里没准也有呢。
E: Maybe they have indoor heaters too.

C: 你…是谁？不对——你是什么？
E: Wh—Who are you...? ...What are you?

C: 果然，你也觉得不该现在去见杰帕德吧？
E: So you think we should avoid Gepard for the time being, right?

C: 啊，原来如此，我说布洛妮娅之前怎么没消息呢…她现在怎么样了？
E: Ah! So that's how it is, no wonder I haven't heard from Bronya... Is she alright?

C: （她好像还是一副气不过的样子…）
E: (She still seems very upset...)

C: 第二，茉莉——你和我其实没有什么区别。你看，咱俩的经历不是很类似吗？都是在军队里混不下去的天才技术人员，都被逼着逃出来自立门户……
E: Secondly, you and I are really not that different. You see, we actually have similar life experiences. We are both genius technicians who can't fit in with the military, and we are both forced to get out and work on our own...

C: 「天才」？不不，我跟希露瓦小姐不一样，根本算不上什么「天才」……
E: Genius? No, no, I'm not like you, Serval. I'm no genius...

C: （该回列车了，去找三月和丹恒吧。）
E: We should be getting back to the Express. Time to find March and Dan Heng.

C: 居然堆积了这么多？
E: How could there be so many?

C: 抱歉抱歉，是我不好…不过现在点也来得及，想喝什么随便点！
E: Sorry, my bad... but it's not too late! You can order anything you want!

C: 文劝还是武劝？
E: So, am I supposed to be the good cop here?

C: 你们的家务事，我不想掺和…
E: I try to stay out of family squabbles...

C: {NICKNAME}，你就在这里随便看看，休息一下吧。也辛苦你啦！
E: {NICKNAME}, you just need to make yourself at home. You've done plenty of work already!

C: 怎么了，老弟？啊…我懂了——难道是舍不得姐姐我了？
E: What's wrong, Gepard? Ahh, I see... Can't let go of your dear ol' sister, eh?

C: 那我们等下一起走吧。
E: We should get ready to head out.

C: 我稍后要和「地火」的首领进行交涉，这是今天行程的重中之重。虽然希露瓦那边稍微耽误了一阵，但不影响后续安排。我们出发吧。
E: The highest priority for today is establishing good negotiations with the chief of Wildfire — I'm about to get that process underway. Serval was a little delayed on the way over, but that doesn't affect our schedule. Let's set off.

C: 这是幻想剧《路边野餐》的宣传画。
E: This is a poster for the fantasy play Roadside Picnic.

C: 湿垃圾！
E: Wet garbage!

C: 抚摩桶身。
E: Stroke the trashcan.

C: 你喜欢别人送什么？
E: What do you like to give as a present?

C: 呣呣呣～就是…大人的鼹鼠党吧？
E: Umm, it's... The Moles for grown-ups...

C: 哦？这是…意外的情况出现了！两位观众闯入了八角笼！{F#她们}{M#他们}似乎想和「冷面小青龙」组队？
E: Oh-ho? Brothers and sisters, an unexpected turn of events... Two members of the audience have charged into the octagon! It looks like they want to team up with Cold Dragon Young!

C: …哎，真是不能指望你的情商。
E: ...*sigh* We need to work on your emotional intelligence.

C: 我听说有个银鬃铁卫跑到下层区来了…是你么？
E: I hear a Silvermane Guard is paying the Underworld a visit... is that you?

C: （糟了，得跟紧虎克才行……）
E: Agh, gotta stick close to Hook...

C: 将此前发生的事和寻找「星核」的诉求全部转述给了奥列格和希儿……
E: Telling Oleg and Seele about what happened and your mission to look for the Stellaron...

C: 无聊了？来，桑博哥哥陪你聊天。
E: Bored? Your big brother Sampo's always up for a chat.

C: 我回忆交涉内容，可能性大约有两个方向：「筑城者」或「星核」。我倾向于后者，但缺乏进一步的证据。
E: If I remember our discussion correctly, I think there are two main possibilities: The Architects, and the Stellaron. I'm inclined to think it's the latter, but we lack evidence.

C: 布洛妮娅，你跟那个奥列格聊完啦？他没故意刁难你吧？
E: Bronya, did you finish talking to Oleg? Hope he didn't make things difficult for you.

C: 完成你的宿命…完成一个「母亲」的愿望。
E: Fulfill your destiny... Fulfill a mother's wish.

C: …需要有个人管管你了。
E: ...You need someone to look after you.

C: 没问题，我们什么忙都帮。
E: No problem. We'll help with anything.

C: 不知多久没像这样散步了，想不到会在陌生的地方，跟刚认识不久的人一起。
E: I can't remember the last time I went for a walk like this. I never thought I'd take one through such a strange place, with someone I'd only just gotten to know.

C: 傲慢，无知…你令我失望，布洛妮娅。
E: Arrogant, ignorant... Oh you disappoint me, Bronya.

C: 我当时是得有多不小心，才会把这么值钱的石头缝到玩具熊身上？真是……
E: I think I must have been — it's not every day you sew precious gems into a teddy bear. Honestly...

C: 我只是不想和普通人打。
E: I just don't want to fight against ordinary people.

C: 嘿！你准备好打一场漂亮的比赛了吗？
E: Hey! Ready for a good one now?

C: 这事对你来说肯定轻而易举——只要你能带回一套怪物的盔甲，我就把奖金的尾款发给你。
