E: I'm sure it's easy for you — just get me a set of that armor and I'll give you the rest of your prize money.

C: 名字我都想好了，就叫「怪物盔甲」，到时候门票肯定大卖，拳赛场场都爆满！
E: I've already thought up a name: "Monster Armor." Tickets will definitely be sold out by then, and the boxing arena will be full!

C: {NICKNAME}，又是一场毫无悬念的胜利！王者般的实力恐怖如斯！
E: {NICKNAME}, another victory! What a majestic performance!

C: …裂界里的东西，就没有一样是不危险的，我早就习惯了。
E: ...Everything in the Fragmentum is dangerous. I'm used to it.

C: 侵蚀就像某种慢性的毒素，它们会不断干扰伤口的正常愈合，继而增加器官的负担，严重的话可能会导致器官衰竭。
E: Corrosion is like a kind of chronic toxin. It constantly interferes with the normal healing process of wounds, which in turn increases the burden on the organs, and can lead to organ failure in severe cases.

C: 说说看你的情况。
E: Tell me what happened.

C: 拳手不是能打赢就行？
E: So boxing is all about winning?

C: 不过，他如此拼命，又如此慷慨，究竟是为了什么呢？
E: But why would he risk his life this much and be this generous? All this for what, exactly?

C: 可可利亚？她为了贝洛伯格…唔…我明白了。
E: Cocolia? In order to save Belobog, she... I see.

C: 这上面的人是…歌蒂大婶，还有老歌德？看上去好年轻呀！
E: Aunt Gertie, isn't that you in the photo? And Old Goethe, too! You look so young!

C: 麻烦你们转告娜塔莎医生，我这儿一切都好，不必操心——等大饭店翻修完成了，三位一定要再来光顾啊！
E: Please let Dr. Natasha know not to worry — we're all okay... You three will have to come and stay again once the hotel is fully renovated!

C: …嗯。倘若不加任何修饰，这正是我们此行的目的。
E: ...I wouldn't use those exact words, but that is more or less what we want to achieve.

C: 娜塔莎小姐的提议不错。我们去慰问一下那对姐弟吧。
E: Natasha's right, we should make sure those children are alright.

C: 尤利安所需的东西
E: Things Julian needs.

C: 敲敲箱壁。
E: Knock on it.

C: 「你是个诚实的人。」那个声音赞许地说，「我将给你你想要的。」
E: "You are an honest person," the voice says in an approving way, "I will give you what you want."

C: 晚上好。
E: Good evening.

C: 欢迎收听今天的星际和平播报节目。首先为您介绍今天节目的主要内容。
E: Welcome to a new episode of the Interastral Peace Broadcast. We are here to bring you the latest news from across the cosmos.

C: 备受瞩目的「谐乐大典」遭遇星核袭击，星际和平公司已联合多方势力展开救援。
E: The highly anticipated Charmony Festival has fallen victim to a Stellaron attack. The Interastral Peace Corporation, along with allied forces, has commenced a relief effort.

C: 巡海游侠并未在阿斯德纳停留过久，亦没有引发任何冲突。据悉，此次事件或与「虚无」的自灭者有关。
E: The Galaxy Rangers' stay in Asdana was brief and conflict-free. Sources suggest that this activity might be connected to the Nihility's Self-Annihilator.

C: 你瞧，我又说错话了吧。
E: *sigh* See?

C: 既然星核猎手故意将各位引来罗浮，你我正好顺水推舟。我以将军身份给予诸位在仙舟便宜行事的权限，将下落不明的卡芙卡引出，一举捉拿。
E: Since the Stellaron Hunters lured you to our ship, we shall move with the current. You are hereby authorized to do as you deem fit on the Luofu, with the goal of bringing Kafka out of the shadows and under our control.

C: 坐标在这里，一切交由你们自己决定。
E: Here are the coordinates. It's up to you how to proceed.

C: 这批货要砸手里了！
E: I'll lose money on this shipment!

C: 等等，我们可以帮忙。
E: Wait, we can help.

C: 得不到信任是很让人恼火。
E: She's just annoyed that you won't trust her.

C: 咦，好巧啊，恩公。
E: Hey, fancy seeing you here.

C: 好耶，走起！
E: Good idea, let's go!

C: 回到现在的话题吧，关于卡芙卡——
E: Back to the matter at hand — Kafka...

C: 我是你们将军请来的客人。
E: I'm a guest — the general invited me.

C: 最近罗浮上很不太平呀，你们如果……
E: Things haven't been very peaceful on the Luofu recently. Make sure you don't—

C: 有事请教…
E: I'd like to ask something...

C: {F#姑娘}{M#小哥}您听懂了吧，我这搭档是在白日做梦呢。
E: Oh dear. I'm sorry, my friend here appears to have lost touch with reality.

C: 原来您是要找停云姑娘啊……
E: Ah, so it's Miss Tingyun you're looking for...

C: 但是美女是真的美。
E: But the ladies sure are pretty.

C: 咱猜猜，这回你打算让我们做什么？不会是打头阵…和云骑军一起…冲锋吧？
E: Lemme guess, what are we up to this time? Could it be... heading to the front lines? Leading the Cloud Knight charge?

C: 太卜的职责是趋吉避凶。我不想让自己的选择，令罗浮滑向糟糕的未来。
E: The duty of the master diviner is to bring luck and avoid misfortune. I don't want my choice to plunge the Luofu into a terrible future.

C: 既然领受了「丰饶」的恩赐，你们应该承受得住「毁灭」的祝福吧？
E: Since you received the gift of Abundance, surely you can withstand the blessing of Destruction as well?

C: 要我们出示行动命令的意思吧。
E: We probably need to present it with a command for it to act.

C: 关…快关掉它！{NICKNAME}，你怎么把关闭的丹炉打开了？
E: T—Turn it off! {NICKNAME}, why did you turn it on!?

C: 关于鳞渊境…
E: About Scalegorge Waterscape...

C: 将军？！我……
E: General!? I...

C: 走？你现在能去哪儿啊？罗浮还在封锁中，云骑军的行动还没结束呢。
E: Go? Go where? The Luofu is under lockdown — the Cloud Knights' operation isn't over yet.

C: ——刃！控制住！别去想她！
E: Blade! Control yourself! Don't think about her!

C: 畏惧、险境、敌人、死亡…种种阻碍横亘在旅途上，能走下去的无名客屈指可数。
E: Fear, risk, enemies, and death are the obstacles we face in pursuit of the creed. That's why the Nameless who are able to stay the course number few indeed.

C: 长老说，咱们很久以前也不是生活在仙舟上的，是仙舟给了我们栖身之地。现在，是回报他们的时候了吧？
E: The senior Vidyadhara say that the Xianzhou offered us this place — that we hail from another world. Is it time to repay them?

C: 好了，前往第三处封印吧。
E: Okay, let's head to the third seal.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵下，一点闪光抓住了你的眼睛。
E: Beneath this crystal clear, luminous egg, a glimmer catches your eye.

C: 前方有孽物盘踞。诸位，当心了。
E: There are abominations up ahead. Careful, everyone.

C: 幻胧…还活着吗？
E: Is Phantylia... still alive?

C: 嗯，阿刃，<color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>，解开「束缚」吧。
E: Bladie, <color=#dbc291ff>listen to me:</color> Unleash the mara.

C: 好、好大的风！
E: That's some strong wind!

C: 但我身处其中，或多或少受到外力牵引，所知偏颇。故而请各位与我一同梳理脉络，分晓其中的诸多细节。
E: ...It's just that, having been in the middle of everything, I'm struggling to keep an accurate perspective. I would appreciate if you could go through it all with me, so that I can reacquaint myself with the finer detail.

C: 譬如星核如何被带上仙舟？又由谁送进了鳞渊境？还有多少药王秘传的残党尚未被清剿？这些全都无从知晓。但我们已尽力了。
E: For example, how was the Stellaron brought onto the Xianzhou? And who sent it on to Scalegorge Waterscape? How many Disciples of Sanctus Medicus still remain at large? All of this is a mystery. Thus far, we've done our best.

C: 如果用得上咱们的话，可不要客气。我虽然不太懂医术…但封住创口，避免伤势恶化的办法还是有的。
E: If we can help, don't hesitate to ask. I don't know much about medicine, but... there are lots of ways to seal wounds and prevent injuries from worsening.

C: 如何处置，唔…几千年前仙舟联盟对它无计可施，几千年后依然如此。
E: What do we plan on doing... *sigh* Thousands of years ago, the Xianzhou Alliance was at its wit's end trying to deal with it. Today, nothing's changed.

C: 片刻后，梦茗为你们端上了她所冲泡的茶饮。
E: A few moments later, Mengming serves the tea she brewed.

C: 停云小姐为我备了礼物，同样身为接渡使的我可不能失了礼数……
E: Miss Tingyun prepared a gift for me. As a fellow Amicassador, I cannot fail to honor our custom...

C: 呃，等等，我怎么给忘了，该给列车长捎带点儿礼物呢。{NICKNAME}，你呢，在仙舟上还有什么没完成的事吗？
E: Uh, hang on. How could I forget. We should bring something back for the conductor. {NICKNAME}, have you got any unfinished business on the Xianzhou?

C: 我记得。
E: I remember.

C: 是时候回去报个平安，并且感谢她的开导了。
E: I should go back and give her an update... and thank her for her guidance.

C: 对啊，自从我调来罗浮仙舟，风波不断。现在刚好有空闲时间，我就来这里听先生说书。
E: Sure am. Things have been in constant turmoil since I transferred to the Luofu. Now that I've got a little free time, I'm here to listen to some storytelling.

C: 唉，你们要走，老夫不唱曲儿了…心里闷得慌。
E: *sigh* But farewell it is. I shall not sing for you on your way out... I fear the sound would break my heartstrings...

C: 这是…给我的礼物吗？！
E: Is this... a gift for me!?

C: 我可能梦见了一位故人…
E: I may have dreamed of an old friend...

C: 我都在担心，他们会不会非要把你体内的星核拿出来看看。
E: I wouldn't have put it past them to try and nab that Stellaron from inside you.

C: …我来吧。
E: ...Leave it to me.

C: 您放心，家族会负责出面沟通。各位惠临匹诺康尼，我们作为<color=#dbc291ff>实际管理人</color>理应为各位排忧解难。
E: Please rest assured that The Family will personally undertake communications to handle this. It is only right that we — <color=#dbc291ff>as the actual administrators</color> — relieve you of any problems during your visit in Penacony.

C: 好冷的玩笑。
E: I do mind.

C: 没事的，放轻松，很快就会过去。
E: Don't worry, just relax. You'll be feeling like your normal self in no time.

C: 梦中的世界…听说匹诺康尼把梦境改造成了金碧辉煌的大都会……
E: A dream world... I heard that Penacony transformed the dreamscape into a majestic metropolis...

C: 这是你自己做的吧…但我确实拿走了列车锅。
E: The first one is clearly a result of your own doing... But I do admit to consuming the last serving of the Express Special.

C: …我承认。
E: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

C: 难道还有比我更糟糕的？
E: Could there be anyone worse than me?

C: 瓦尔特。
E: Welt.

C: （抱歉，为了避免某些纠纷，苜蓿草家系只允许这个品牌的饮料出现在预制梦境中。）
E: (My apologies. By order of the Alfalfa Family, delicious, thirst-quenching SoulGlad is the only brand of beverage permitted to appear in recorded dreamscapes.)

C: 银色的家伙是…？
E: Who's the silver-haired guy?

C: 这些物品不仅能在梦中流通，也可以通过额外服务「带回」现实。不过，车行的销售窗口现在暂时不对外开放…只能等以后有机会再去买车啦。
E: Items purchased in the Dreamscape can also be brought into reality through an extra service. Unfortunately, the transfer of automobiles to the real world is not available at the moment... You can come back for them next time.

C: 好耶，大玩特玩——
E: Let's do it!

C: （流萤好慢啊…怎么还没回来？咦，她往酒水吧方向去了…）
E: (What's taking Firefly so long? Eh, she's heading toward the bar...)

C: 你怎么会在这儿？！
E: What brings you here?

C: 嗐，你别急！就让我桑博先卖个关子吧！
E: Tsk, just be patient! I'll explain everything when the time comes!

C: 滴答！救命！救命啊！
E: Tick-tock! Help! Help me!

C: 嘿！我可是块钟表，不是什么「东西」！
E: I'm not some random thing, I'm a clock!

C: 那不是米沙吗？
E: Isn't that Misha?

C: 咦？「都是」是什么意思…？
E: What do you mean by "all"?
Huh...

C: 我不知道啊…是我干的吗？
E: I have no clue what I did. You sure I pulled that off?

C: 总之，谢谢你！如果你没有及时赶到，这里就要乱作一团了……
E: Anyway, thanks a lot! If you hadn't gotten here in time, I would have been in a real mess...

C: 钟表小子赋予了我钟表把戏。
E: Clockie taught me some Clockwork.

C: 看到我的球棒会害怕很正常啦。
E: It's only natural for people to get intimidated by my baseball bat.

C: 眼前的男人十分沉着，看起来毫无破绽——也许你得使些<color=#dbc291ff>「激将法」</color>才行。
E: The composed man before you appears impenetrable. Perhaps you need to <color=#dbc291ff>provoke</color> him a bit.

C: 我简直要控制不住这种狂热的情绪了…我向你发出邀请，{M#英俊的先生}{F#美丽的小姐}——与我跳一支舞吧！现在！此时此刻！就在这里！
E: I can hardly contain this palpable excitement... I'd like to invite you to dance with me, {M#handsome}{F#beautiful}. Right here, right now!

C: 我想，沐浴在光中的人，一定都会被那种温暖所吸引吧……
E: I suppose everyone who likes to bask in the light will be drawn to that kind of warmth...

C: 我们偷偷溜进去吧。
E: Let's sneak inside.

C: 感觉很重要…
E: Feels important...

C: 这是我为你折的折纸小鸟…
E: This is an origami bird I made for you...

C: 沉没？你的意思是…梦境世界正在瓦解？
E: Sinking? You mean... the Dreamscape is collapsing?

C: 当务之急是弄清发生了什么。
E: The priority is figuring out what happened.

C: 你们已经认识了？
E: You know each other?

C: 你…应该没有隐瞒些什么吧？
E: You... aren't hiding anything, are you?

C: 她以为逃出生天了，但……
E: She thought she had escaped but...

C: 虽然不知他为何会作出这种判断，但他有公司的情报网，看法值得深入讨论。以及，我也认为黄泉小姐有所隐瞒……
E: I can't fathom why he'd draw that conclusion, but given his access to the IPC's intelligence network, we should seriously consider his perspective. Moreover, I believe Miss Acheron is also hiding something.

C: 直接离开。
E: Leave directly.

C: 不是那儿，回来。
E: Not there. Come back.

C: 早和你说过，我对遗产争夺战没兴趣，来匹诺康尼只是出于工作。我要替公司收复一些失落的财产，你懂的…就是「边陲监狱」的所有权。
E: I told you, I'm just not interested in scrambling for "the Legacy." I just came to Penacony for work. I'm here to retrieve some lost property for the IPC, if you catch my drift... I'm talking ownership of this "frontier prison."

C: 反应迅速，逻辑清晰…我必须提醒你，和那个男人合作很危险。
E: That's quick thinking, and very sound logic. Aventurine is no fool. And working with him definitely has its dangers.

C: 我不会。
E: I don't.

C: 那你已经活在清醒的世界中了。
E: Then you're already living in the waking world.

C: 嗯！当然啦，这种时候还得看我们列车组——家族、公司，一个个都只打自己的算盘……
E: Yeah! Of course, at times like this we're so lucky to have our Crew. The Family and the IPC — everyone has their own plans going on...

C: 这片美梦…越来越不真实了啊。
E: This dream... is becoming more and more separated from reality.

C: 现在也得不出什么结论。
E: No conclusions can be drawn just yet.

C: 五大家系没有鹰，只有隐夜鸫——我为什么要跟你争这个？
E: There are no eagles in the Five Families, only Nightingales— Why am I wasting time with you on this?

C: 砂金先生，出门在外，你会时刻关注自己的仪容么？领带应在正中线上，衬衣不得从马甲中露出，裤线必须笔直，且始终对齐鞋头的朝向。
E: Mr. Aventurine, when you're out and about, do you always make adjustments to your appearance? Your tie should be on the center line, your shirt must not protrude from your vest, your trouser creases should be perfectly straight, and always aligned with the tips of your shoes.

C: 最安全的场所，你绝对想不到的地方。因为他根本就没打算藏起来——从最开始，那颗基石就已经在你的手里了。
E: The safest place, somewhere you'd never think of. Because he never intended to hide it — in fact, that Cornerstone has been in your hands from the very beginning.

C: 什么情况，家族的玩具都会碰瓷？我可什么都没做啊，教授，你要为我作证。
E: What's up with that? Now The Family's toys are trying to frame me? I didn't do a thing to it, Doc. You've gotta be my witness.

C: 果然没人知道知更鸟的事，倒不意外。
E: Sure enough, no one knows about Miss Robin. I'm not surprised.

C: 那智械一共被拍卖了十二次，我参加了他的第十三次拍卖会。那是我见过最人声鼎沸的盛宴，但再也没人将目光投向他。
E: That Intellitron had been auctioned off a dozen times, and I participated in his thirteenth. That was the grandest banquet I had ever attended, but never again did anyone cast another glance at him.

C: 「所有，或一无所有」——千万别让我丢脸啊，*幸运儿*。
E: It's all or nothing. Don't embarrass me, my lucky hound.

C: 这些宝石送给你。
E: Here, I got these gems for you.

C: 你可千万，别让我失望哦？
E: Just don't let me down now, okay?

C: ——我摇！嗯，气还很足，保质期也很安全！
E: Let's give it a shake! Nice, it's still fizzy and has a long shelf life!

C: 尝试洞察她的内心。
E: Try reading her thoughts.

C: 那是场声势浩大的独立战争，假面愚者、无名客、虚构史学家、悲悼伶人、厄兆先锋…哈努努在一众同伴和天外来客的帮助下平定了战乱。
E: It was a monumental war for freedom. Hanunue fought alongside a motley crew of Masked Fools, Nameless, History Fictionologists, Mourning Actors, Omen Vanguards... even visitors from beyond the sky. In the end, they emerged victorious.

C: 只是正常的联络。他们那边似乎有些发现，我们快去快回吧。
E: They're just checking up on me. Let's get in and get out — it seems they've made some progress.

C: 我猜…八成是那位星际和平公司的使节，砂金先生。
E: If I'm right... it could be the IPC ambassador, Aventurine.

C: 知更鸟、流萤…还有其他死者的信息…看不出其中有何共性。
E: The information about Robin, Firefly... and the other victims... I don't see any commonalities among them.

C: …我只是好奇它为什么在这里罢了。
E: ...I was merely curious why it was here.

C: 哈，那岂不是更正中你的下怀？
E: All the better for you!

C: 这道幕布后就是大舞台了……
E: Behind this curtain is the grand stage...

C: 现在换我来躲啦——我赌你们肯定找不到我——
E: It's my turn to hide now! I bet you guys can't find meeee!

C: 请多关照，黄泉小姐。
E: Pleasure to meet ya, Miss Acheron.

C: 伪装？你哪只眼睛看出来我是假人了？睁大眼睛仔细瞧瞧吧，带光环的——
E: Disguise? You must be blind to be accusing me of being a fake. Open your eyes and take a good look...

C: 第二个问题，为什么要找星穹列车的麻烦。
E: Second question: Why do you seek trouble with the Astral Express?

C: 知更鸟小姐放心。我们肯定会认真执行命令，绝不让公司的家伙得逞！
E: Please be assured, Miss Robin, we take our orders seriously. We won't let those IPC cronies get away with this!

C: 嗯，就在那边……
E: He's right over there...

C: 瓦尔特先生的熟人？
E: A familiar face?

C: …果然。有流萤小姐作先例，倒也在意料之中。
E: ...Just as I thought. Considering what happened with Miss Firefly, this doesn't come as a surprise.

C: 总有种奇怪的感觉，难道我的童心也……
E: I can't shake off this strange feeling. Am I really still so young at heart...?

C: 我终于算出来了，再过十个系统时，上面的美梦就会吞掉下面的美梦！我的猜测是对的，这里将不复存在，美梦会吞噬一切……
E: My calculations are finally done. In another ten system hours, the above dream will swallow the dream below! My hypothesis was correct — this place will cease to exist, as the dream devours everything...

C: 那就拜托翠丝阿姨吧！等你们的时候，我已经认识了好多当地人。
E: We can ask Jessie for help! I've gotten to know many locals while waiting for you guys.

C: 你们应该知道，谐乐鸽是一种能够飞越大气层的鸟类。在高空飞行时，它们的羽毛会因为摩擦产生的高温发出壮丽的光芒，就像是一道道流星。
E: As you probably know, Charmony Doves can fly through the air. When they fly really high, the friction caused by the flapping of their feathers against the atmosphere creates amazing lights, so that they look like shooting stars.

C: 嗯。不过，歌斐木先生，我还有一件事没想明白……
E: Yeah, but Mr. Gopher Wood, there's one thing I don't quite understand...

C: 我答应了给那对兄妹一点私人空间，先聊咱们的事吧，各位意下如何？
E: I promised to give the siblings some privacy, so let's talk about our business first. What do you say?

C: 原来这就是「不可能之事」的真正含义。所以，你以「钟表匠」的名义发出邀请函，是为了找到能够解决星核危机的派系，吸引他们前来匹诺康尼发现真相？
E: So, this is the true meaning of "the impossible." You sent out invitations in the Watchmaker's name to find forces capable of resolving the Stellaron disaster and draw them in to Penacony to uncover the truth?

C: 呵，你不会也要开始讲什么大道理了吧？
E: Heh, don't start getting all philosophical on me, alright?

C: 要是这样的日子持续到永远…你会觉得厌倦吗？
E: But if this went on forever... would it get boring too?

C: …我猜到了。若非如此，哥哥绝不会只字不提它的下落。
E: ...I had surmised as much. I knew you wouldn't have avoided mentioning the bird for no reason.

C: 我等愿尔旨承行于地…如于天焉。
E: May thy will be carried out on earth... just as it is in the heavens.

C: 请问您是？
E: And you are...?

C: 有些令人在意的事，我先离开一会儿。你在这等候那位女士吧。
E: Something doesn't seem right. I need to leave for a moment. You can stay here with the receptionist.

C: 听你吹牛吧！人家谐乐大典可是一琥珀纪举办一次的盛会，成本是你过个生日能比的？
E: Oh, come on! The Charmony Festival is a once-in-an-Amber-Era event. How can a birthday party compare?

C: 这话就不对了，你怎么知道她不是一琥珀纪才过一次生日呢？
E: Well, you never know, right? Maybe on her world birthdays only happen once an Amber Era?

C: 哈！有你这句话我就放心了。
E: Ah, that's a relief to hear.

C: 你是这儿的大堂经理，没错吧？
E: You're the lobby manager, right?

C: 也正因如此，巡海游侠必须亲自找到那个冒牌货…弄清楚她究竟要做什么。
E: That's why the Galaxy Rangers need to uncover the impostor... and figure out her true intentions.

C: 结果绕了一大圈，还是回到了星穹列车。那还等什么，赶紧走吧！
E: Well, looks like we took a detour, but now it's back to the Astral Express. So, what are we waiting for? Let's go!

C: 回来得比想象中更快啊…有结果了？
E: You're back sooner than I thought... Any results?

C: 你们需要想象当时的情景，说出合适的台词，做出恰如其分的表演，让各位评委体会到剧本中想要传达的感情。预祝你们获得圆满的成绩！
E: Your task is to bring those moments to life, find the right words, and act convincingly to make the judges feel the script's intended emotions. I wish you a successful performance!

C: 此时——你应该做出怎样的举动来「逗笑」她？
E: At this moment, what should you do to make her laugh?

C: 我们这是在…共同操作这位哈努兄弟吗？
E: Are we... both in control of this Hanu character?

C: 总算是胜利了…我们赶紧去下一关吧。
E: Looks like we won... Let's hurry up and get to the next stage.

C: 我们要小心，别被那群怪物发现了。
E: Let's stay alert and make sure those monsters don't spot us.

C: 不敢当！只可惜那位如孔雀般华美耀眼的公司使节状况依旧欠佳…多希望他也能一道共襄盛举啊。
E: I do not deserve such praise! Unfortunately, that dashing IPC Ambassador, whose radiance matches that of a beautiful peacock, remains in a woeful state... How I wish he too could partake in this splendid occasion.

C: 虽然抵达后我一度因不善言辞而被当作身材高大、身着银铠、如烈焰般火红而炽热的通缉犯…但无妨，这一切都是来自梦想之地的「纯美」历练。
E: Though upon arrival, I was once mistaken for a towering, silver-armored fugitive with fiery red flames, due to my lack of eloquence... it matters not, for all these trials stem from the Land of Dream's Beauty.

C: 你们的表演远未达到令我满意的程度！
E: Your performance is far from satisfactory!

C: 好了，让我们说回正题吧。既然相聚于此，想必两位也一定是为了争夺海选冠军而来，对吧？
E: Okay, let's get back to business. Since fate has brought us together, it stands to reason that you both seek the accolade of the audition's victor, correct?

C: 我们必须教导弱者如何幸福地生活。而这「生活」并非名流贵族挂在嘴边的讲究，而是绝对意义上的，属于人的生存之道。
E: We must teach the weak how to live a happy life. And this life isn't some noble propriety that the upper crust preaches, but in definitive terms, a way of survival that belongs to everyone.

C: 可这样一来谜团就更多了。根据小米沙的说法，他明显是个出生在海洋星球，过着平凡日子的小孩，和匹诺康尼没有半点关系……
E: But this raises more questions. According to Misha, he was clearly born on an oceanic planet and led an ordinary life, with no connection to Penacony at all...

C: 米哈伊尔！你要去哪里……
E: Mikhail! Where are you going...?

C: 怎么做到的…我很难讲明白，但我知道它能被修好……
E: Well... It's hard to explain, but I knew it could be fixed...

C: 这不是还有你么，我的朋友？哈哈，这事是很困难，但咱们这一路走来，又有哪件事不难？哦对了，不管你用什么方法，记得……
E: Desperate? Hah, don't we have you here, my friend? This task is challenging, but what hasn't been challenging for us along the way? Well, whatever you do, remember...

C: 在我看来，倒是还有一种可能性——或许祂也想知道匹诺康尼的未来会掌握在谁的手中，才会代{RUBY_B#阿基维利和太一}已死的星神{RUBY_E#}前来见证。
E: Well, there might be another possibility. Perhaps THEY want to witness, on behalf of the {RUBY_B#Akivili and Ena}fallen Aeons{RUBY_E#}, who will hold the future of Penacony.

C: 「祂赐了世间众人『意义』，天地万物都造齐了。祂歇了一切创造的工。」
E: "THEY imbued the world with meaning, perfecting all things in the heavens and on earth. Then, THEY rested from the labors of creation."

C: 吓我一跳！你…你在哪儿说话呢？
E: You scared me! Wh—Where... are you now?

C: 「我希望他们都能恢复理性的<color=#dbc291ff>镇静</color>，不再受到虚伪的操控。」新至的主人如是说。
E: "I wish they could {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>calm down</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>regain their reason</color>{RUBY_E#} and cast away the shackles of hypocrisy," proclaimed the new master.

C: 不客气，毕竟我也不想看到宝贵的「记忆」就此消失。你们是要去见同伴吧，介意我陪各位小走一程么？
E: Don't mention it, after all, I wouldn't want to see such precious memories vanish. You're heading to see your friends, aren't you? Would it bother you if I walked with you for a short while?

C: 你谁？怎么乱喊人宝贝？
E: Fork, huh? I myself prefer spooning.

C: 是谁来着？呃，丹恒兄弟，你还记得吗？
E: Who was it again? Uh, Dan Heng, do you remember?

C: 我恐怕也要先一步回列车了。列车长很担心我们，我还是去说明一下现状为好。
E: I'm afraid I'll also have to return to the Express first. The conductor is worried about us. It's best I go and explain the situation.

C: 哈哈，这敢情好。
E: Haha, great.

C: 哈哈，既然如此，那还是请我们的「银河球棒侠」一道来吧。
E: Haha, if that's the case, our Galactic Baseballer can join us.

C: 喔…这下列车里要热闹起来了。不过，黑天鹅小姐，你可不能在列车里用忆者的能力恶作剧哦！
E: Whoa... The Express is going to be much livelier now. But Miss Black Swan, you'd better not use your Memokeeper abilities to pull any pranks!

C: 姬子的咖啡还不够上头吗？
E: Is Himeko's coffee not strong enough for you?

C: 哦？你来啦，{NICKNAME}。你的倒影映在舷窗里的繁星之间…呵呵，有点教人看不真切呢。
E: Oh? You're here, {NICKNAME}. Seeing your reflection among the stars in the porthole... really does seem somewhat surreal.

C: 我想要挑一个好的时候，一个你完全放松的时候…或许，夜色每一次模糊，你每一次行将入睡的时刻正是最合适的。
E: I'm looking for an opportune time, a time when you're totally at ease... Perhaps, when the night grows hazy, and you're about to drift off would be the most opportune.

C: 那一处与已知信息截然相悖的<color=#dbc291ff>致命破绽</color>，就出现在这部分故事里——
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The major flaw</color>, which contradicts all the known information, hides in this story...

C: 「琉璃光带」帕特雷维尼齐亚。
E: The Glass Belt, Patrevia.

C: 知更鸟
E: Robin

C: 我这是在列车里睡着了？
E: Did I fall asleep on the Express?

C: 但无论如何，我们都无法坐视不理。
E: But we can't just stay here and do nothing.

C: 这可是宇宙危急存亡的危机关头，哪还有时间纠结一个破数字？
E: This is a critical moment for the whole universe! Who cares about some dumb number?

C: {NICKNAME}，可以单独谈谈吗？还有件事，我有义务向你说明。
E: May I have a moment alone with you, {NICKNAME}? There's one more thing I need to explain to you.

C: 交给我和托帕吧，孩子。托你的福，在「翡翠石」被送入家族驻地的那一刻，公司的布置就已经完成了。
E: Yeah, leave everything to me and Topaz, child. Thanks to you, as soon as the Jade Stone was delivered to The Family's compound, we finished up our preparations.

C: 哦？今天的新鲜事还真多，一个巡海游侠兼通缉犯竟然也自己送上门来——
E: Oh? So many surprises today. Didn't expect a Galaxy Ranger and wanted criminal to show up here...

C: 深呼吸，尝试重新读取梦泡…
E: Take a deep breath and try to read the dream bubble again...

C: 纸醉金迷啊，和艾普瑟隆如出一辙。如何？它和你想象中的「梦境」一致吗？
E: How extravagant, just like Epsilon. How was it? Did it live up to your Dreamscape expectations?

C: 但今天我可以买两个，分给你一半。如果你不喜欢，我就能享用两倍的快乐。或者我可以带给卡芙卡，她向来不会拒绝，又或者…给刃，他会喜欢的。
E: But today, I'll buy two and give you one. And if you don't like them, I'll enjoy double the pleasure. Or I can bring one to Kafka, as she never refuses. Or maybe I'll give it to... Blade. He'll appreciate it.

C: 音乐？氛围？啊，或许是一份特殊的调饮，献给那些不在这里的人。
E: Music? Atmosphere? Ah, maybe a special drink to honor those who are not here.

C: 当然，所有的合作都基于一个前提——
E: Of course, all cooperation is based on one premise...

C: 欢迎光临「慈玉典押」，晖长石号分行。
E: Welcome to Bonajade Exchange, Radiant Feldspar Branch.

C: 如果命运真的翻开了那一页，我们自然会再见的。
E: If fate turns that page, our paths will cross again.

C: 其他人在哪里？
E: Where are the others?

C: 有缘再见，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}。
E: May fate bring us together again, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 第二件案子是「蓝调拍卖会场抢劫案」。一伙佩戴面具的暴徒闯入会场偷走了星穹列车残片，还在现场留下了一柄大锤、一只娃娃，还有一只半死不活的红鲱鱼。
E: The second case is the Blue Hour auction robbery. A gang of masked thugs broke in, stole a fragment of the Astral Express, and left behind a large hammer, a doll, and a half-dead red herring at the scene.

C: 在那句近乎哭腔的「赞美阿哈」落地后，娃娃的嘴里只余令人烦躁的卡带声久久回荡。原来它根本不是一枚炸弹，而是老式古董录音机。
E: After the almost-tearful exclamation of "Praise Aha!" comes to pass, all that's left in the doll's mouth are those lingering echoes of an irritating cassette tape. Turns out that it isn't a bomb after all, but a vintage tape recorder.

C: 眼下简直有太多不可能发生的事了…但它们真的就绝对不会发生吗？要我说，没准只是这些「不可能」被否定的瞬间还没到来而已。
E: At the moment, there are so many things that seem impossible... but are they really never going to happen? Maybe it's just that the moment to disprove these "impossibilities" hasn't arrived yet.

C: 应该不用多说什么了，这一切的故事因你而起，自然也应当以你作结。
E: There shouldn't be much left to say. This entire adventure started because of you, and should naturally end with you.

C: 但是……
E: But...

C: 如果有兴趣，大家可以以「旁听生」的身份进入大学。
E: If you are interested, you can enter the university as guest students.

C: 安下心，好好享受校园生活吧。{NICKNAME}同学，请多指教！
E: Never mind. Let's just relax and enjoy ourselves on campus. I'll be in your care now, {NICKNAME}!

C: 忍者有问必答——初次见面，在下AKA乱破是也。
E: I never leave a question unanswered. I am a ninja, AKA Rappa.

C: 初入忍道的女孩，老夫认可你的决心。今日起，你便是缭乱•忍法的传人了。
E: O child new to the way of the ninja, I recognize your determination. Henceforth, you shall be the successor to my Dazzling Ninjutsu.

C: 很有「个性」的答案，风格化能勾起观众的兴趣，就像我越发对你感到好奇了。
E: A very individualistic answer. You have a style that can hook an audience, just like how you've piqued more of my curiosity.

C: CUT——你的考试结束了，我们来看看结果吧……
E: CUT! You have finished your exam. Let's take a look at your results...

C: （这香蕉好像有点眼熟……）
E: (This banana looks familiar...)

C: 能亲手制作感人的事物是很幸福的，无论是制作甜品，还是在边境筑梦……
E: It feels good when you create something that touches another person's heart, whether it's desserts or weaving dreams.

C: 这下麻烦了…如果她的游侠身份属实，就不能把这些言谈当成说笑，也许匹诺康尼真的发生了什么。
E: This is troubling. If she really is a Ranger, we have to take her story seriously. Perhaps something has happened in Penacony.

C: 嗯？
E: Hm?

C: 那就别怪我不客气了。
E: Then I'm done playing nice.

C: 得了，这世上的复杂事多了去，等枪响一声都会变简单。
E: Forget it. The world's complicated enough as it is, but my bullets will make things real simple.

C: 「希望大家都能认清这个世界，一个正在长成的完美圆弧。」
E: "May all see the world for what it is: An arc waxing into perfection."

C: 先等等，这位朋友，是来参加睡蕉社活动的？
E: Hold it right there. Here for the Slumbernana Association event, sir?

C: 睡蕉社的成员级别
E: Slumbernana Association's membership hierarchy.

C: 最近，我常来这里教孩子们唱歌。放弃美梦不是件容易的事，我希望音乐能给他们一些帮助。
E: I've been visiting this place a lot lately to teach the children how to sing. Giving up one's sweet dreams takes resolve, so it's my wish that music can bring them some solace.

C: 哦？你就是前辈说的那位…怎么看上去不太一样啊，算了，那倒是可以酌情降低难度。
E: Oh? Then you must be the one that she was talking about... But why do you look kind of different? Ah, never mind. I suppose I can make things easier for you, then.

C: 你看，他们根本就不是什么——
E: See? Those things are not—

C: 这个战利品似乎和你以前遇到的不同。面对你的热情，它不愿敞开心扉，而是将自己紧锁。
E: This treasure appears to be different from the one you previously encountered. Faced with your passion, it is unwilling to open up its heart, but choosing to fetter itself further.

C: 经由退化，它单纯的大脑中是否还有近似于悼念的情感，恐怕无人知晓。
E: Do any traces of mourning linger in its simple and regressed brain? This may forever remain a mystery.

C: 我以为得补一笔尾款呢。
E: I thought I still needed to pay an extra fee.

C: 真蛰虫小猴！
E: True Sting Monkey!

C: 毕竟你们有显赫的身份和花不完的信用点，但我的学生什么都没有。所以我提供了一种更好的选择，而这对父子自愿接受了它。
E: You may have your esteemed background and a never-ending supply of credits, but that's not the case for my students. All I did was offer a better alternative, one that both father and son willingly took up.

C: 我是反派？真的假的
E: For real? Me as the villain?

C: 芭蕉花酱一遍又一遍播放着手机中的《睡蕉之歌》——鉴于之前的经历，你觉得还是离她远点比较好。
E: Nanabloom-chan kept playing "The Slumbernana Song" on her phone over and over again — given past experiences, you think it's best to leave her be.

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉，蕉蕉蕉蕉……
E: Ba na na na... Ba na na na...

C: 霸道的忍力又一次倾注在你的眉心，将你从沉沦中唤醒。从刚刚的击打声判断，台上的每位忍者都受到了帮助，哪怕是路过的睡蕉小猴都要吃上一记手刀。
E: The overpowering ninja force surged into your forehead once more, snapping you out of your daze. Judging by the recent sounds of impact, every ninja on stage received assistance, even the passing Slumbernana Monkey got a swift chop.

C: 这位演员的台词有些晦涩，但剧情走向大体没错。
E: This actor's lines may be somewhat cryptic, but yes, the general plot direction is on point.

C: 有效果了。它似乎要带我们去什么地方，跟上吧。
E: It's working. It seems to be leading us somewhere. Let's catch up.

C: 所以…你是怎么找到这的？总不能是因为喜欢小猴吧。
E: So, what brought you here? You don't look like you're a fan of these monkeys.

C: 既然如此，您又凭什么认为…自己真的唤醒了那位游侠呢？
E: If that's the case, why do you believe... that you really woke up the Ranger?

C: 得了吧，你怎么还觉得他们能听进去？
E: Save it. You really think you can still convince them?

C: 要怎么做？那就该请出今晚最重要的演员了——
E: How do we accomplish this, you ask? We'll have to introduce our lead actor for the night!

C: 祓除万恶，不死不休，纵使箭在弦上，永不复还，也当一心不乱，破邪显正！
E: Eradicating evil, till my last breath. My bow drawn, no turning back. My heart shall remain unmoved until evil has been purged and justice enacted!

C: ——直至，末法世终。
E: Till the end of the Mappou Age.

C: 我要去参加「观忍社」的活动了，待会一起来吗！
E: I'm going to the Ninja Appreciation Society's event now. Do you want to come along?

C: 芭蕉花酱，听说你要出演芮克先生的新片了？
E: Nanabloom-chan, I heard you're going to be featured in Mr. Reca's new film!

C: 诸位，在下用忍符破除了邪祟的幻术。现在可否清醒了？
E: I shattered the fiendling's deception with my ninja talismans. Has everyone snapped out of their trance?

C: 歌舞•忍者
E: Songstress Ninja

C: 前方是……
E: That thing ahead...

C: 休想染指…「万径之门」。
E: You shall not touch... the Gate of Infinity.

C: 那时，没有人能预见到……
E: No one back then could foresee...

C: 吾师，你对此有何见解？
E: What do you think of this, Trinnon?

C: …遵命。
E: ...Yes, Lord Mydei.

C: 意思是，你也看见了自己的过往？
E: You mean you saw your past too?

C: 「呵，迈德漠斯…你诚然是个目光闪亮的勇士。」
E: "Ah, Mydeimos... You are a keen warrior, indeed."

C: 她的悲剧，正出自你手——「纷争」的化身——你有何面目谈起她的过去？
E: Her tragic death was caused by you, the incarnation of Strife. How dare you talk about her past?

C: 看到{NICKNAME}先前经历苦战，现在能如此精神，令人欣喜。
E: Not at all. It's good to see {NICKNAME} bouncing back with such energy after that tough battle.

C: 如今，奥赫玛愿依传统为天外来客斟饮奉赠，以表诚意。
E: And now, in keeping with tradition, Okhema dedicates this drink to our esteemed guests from beyond the sky in appreciation of what you have done for us.

C: 唔，梦话？缇安说了什么？
E: Sleep talking? Um... What did Trianne say?

C: 传说中，{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}求见瑟希斯的时候，总会穿上白纱织的长裙。经线和纬线落在地上，就变成了道路和台阶……
E: Legend has it that whenever they requested an audience with Cerces, {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} would always come to the meeting in a long white dress. As the warps and wefts of the dress came into contact with the ground, they turned into paths and stairs...

C: 呜，那奥赫玛岂不是也危险了？
E: Oh no... Does this mean that Okhema is also in danger?

C: 恐怕有人就在附近，不知是敌是友…各位小心。
E: I'm afraid that someone's probably nearby. As we are unable to ascertain whether they are friend or foe... we better remain cautious.

C: 呔！妖怪，吃我一棍！
E: Ha! Demon, eat my bat!

C: 既然你清楚，那就别再挑衅「死亡」的权威——回答我的问题。
E: Since you are aware, stop provoking the authority of Death. Answer my question.

C: 啊呀，这委屈的小模样真教人目不忍视。虽然方才不过一道考验而已…但吾甘心破例一次，并当坦诚相待。
E: Ahh, I really can't bear to look at your sad expressions. Although you only cleared a simple trial... I'm willing to make an exception and treat you with sincerity.

C: …指的就是「黑潮」。
E: ...They're talking about the black tide.

C: 她人呢？火种还没拼好吗！
E: Where is she? Is the Coreflame still not pieced together yet!?

C: 讽刺么？悬锋人的字典里本不该有「害怕」二字。
E: Isn't that ironic? There shouldn't even be a word for "fear" in the Kremnoan language.

C: <size=28>来、快来人啊，救——</size>
E: <size=28>S—Someone! Help m—</size>

C: 你要是真这么做，那才是断绝了悬锋的血脉——让我们千百年的荣光变成彻头彻尾的笑柄！
E: You'll be ending the bloodline of Kremnos if you do this. Our millennia-old glory will become nothing more than a joke!

C: 死吧，懦夫！
E: Perish, you coward!

C: 其实我只是来放松的…只是刚到附近，就见好多人横七竖八倒在地上。
E: I actually just came to relax... But as soon as I got here, I saw all these people lying on the ground.
...Get lost.

C: 请见谅。受{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的{RUBY_B#诅咒}赐福{RUBY_E#}影响，她已不能耐受这池子的水温了。
E: Please understand that she can no longer endure the heat of this pool due to the blessings of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}.

C: 不对，缇安大人。若不是你挺身而出，我们早已葬身树庭了。
E: Please don't blame yourself, Lady Trianne. If it weren't for you, we would've already met our end at the Grove.

C: …费贝尔先生，库娜涅和阿塔卡玛她们…被黑潮杀死了。
E: ...Mr. Fabio, the black tide... took Cynane and Artakama.

C: …恐怕你整理到一半一样会叫苦罢工吧。
E: ...I'm afraid you'd probably find the task of organizing just as awful.

C: 因为…在那座小岛上，我还看见海的另一边有片黑色的山，很高很高。
E: Because... on that same island, I saw a dark mountain on the other side of the ocean. And it was very, very tall.
"Lonely and subdued █nd subdue█ and subdue█ subdue█ subdu██ subdued ██b███d ███d███"

C: 哪里的话。我可是来诚心求教的，一如既往……
E: That's not true. I'm here to seek enlightenment, as always...

C: 不久后 命运重渊
E: Soon after, in the Abyss of Fate

C: 总之，先去找番红蕊吧，但愿神殿里还有存储，没有被{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的士兵毁掉。
E: In any case, let's look for saffron first. I hope there's still some left in the temple, untouched by {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} soldiers.

C: 没反应……
E: No response at all...

C: 一言为定。
E: You have my word.

C: …你觉得我能做到？毕竟连我的祖先，那位史诗中的英雄，都没能征服{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的火种。
E: ...Do you really believe I can do it? Even my ancestor, that hero of legends, couldn't conquer the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}.

C: 这些人里…好像不止有悬锋一族。
E: I think I see... more than just the Kremnoans here.

C: 再见了，守护者！
E: Farewell, Guardian!

C: 真没想到她能派悬锋人来助阵。勇敢的战士，前线战况如何？
E: I didn't think she'd manage to send the Kremnoans to assist. Brave warrior, what's the situation on the front line?

C: 嘶哑的詈骂郁在他的喉头，迟迟不发。不多时，此人痉挛着，头颅垂落，魂息飘离肢体，向{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的府邸而去。
E: A hoarse curse lodged in his throat, refusing to escape. Moments later, he convulsed, his head drooping as his spirit departed his body, drifting towards the abode of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}.

C: 他和阿格莱雅就那么不对付？
E: He and Aglaea don't get along, huh?

C: 可笑…血肉之躯，能接下哪怕一击？
E: How ludicrous... Your body, made of flesh and blood as it is, will not survive more than a single strike from me.

C: 算我一个。
E: Count me in.

C: 在那白霜环绕的阴谋之夜，雅努萨波利斯的圣女遇害的同时…负世的泰坦也在世界一隅崩落。
E: On that frosty night with treachery abound, as the Holy Maiden of Janusopolis met her demise... the Worldbearing Titan also fell in another corner of the world.

C: 如果泰坦陨落时的呢喃并非戏言……
E: If the final murmurs of the Titan are true...

C: …告辞。
E: ...Excuse me.

C: 我…没事，女士。这甜饼…真好吃。
E: I'm... fine. It tastes... really good.

C: 这应该是最后一战了，得替她解围才行。
E: This should be the last fight. We have to help her get through.

C: 翁法罗斯世界观也不严谨嘛。
E: Logic in Amphoreus isn't adding up.

C: 谢谢，好兄弟！
E: Thanks, bro!

C: …该死！果然是那家伙。
E: ...Blast it! Of course it's them!

C: 必须追击那黑袍剑士。
E: We need to go after that black-robed swordmaster.

C: 我们可以谈谈…对，谈谈合作！
E: We can talk this out... How about a collaboration!

C: 匹诺康尼将会拥有谐乐大典之外另一项吸引寰宇目光的盛会。数不清的金钱和逐梦者会涌向这里，远比过去多得多！
E: This will be Penacony's next grand spectacle, standing alongside the Charmony Festival as a beacon for the universe's attention. Dreamers and wealth beyond measure will pour in, far more than ever before!

C: 噗哈哈哈哈，我还真没想到，我们的制片人这么在乎「规则」！
E: Hahaha! I didn't realize our producer cared so much about the rules!

C: 我不是那个意思啦！
E: That's not what I am saying!

C: 嚯嗬嗬～可是那位波提欧先生说的没错，他是两次挽救过匹诺康尼的英雄。贸然对他进行围剿，不是什么妥善处置呐。
E: Hohoho~ But Mr. Boothill wasn't wrong, was he? He's saved Penacony twice before. If we jump the gun and hunt him down now, that wouldn't be very... tactful.

C: 我记得自己活着的时候并没有这么情绪充沛。大概是残缺的灵基对性格产生了影响。
E: Funny... I don't remember being this emotional when I was alive. Maybe my fractured Spirit Origin is affecting my personality.

C: 那就好。我会用一场辉煌的胜利回报您的。
E: Good. I'll make sure to repay you with a glorious victory.

C: 说起来，Saber想对圣杯许下什么愿望呢？
E: So, Saber... what wish would you make to the Holy Grail?

C: 好久不见了，{NICKNAME}。
E: It's been a while, {NICKNAME}.

C: 迎来毁灭的应该是我，而不是我的国家和人民，本该是这样才对。
E: The one who deserves to face destruction is me, not my country or my people. That's how it should have been.

C: 就这？我还是地概科研侠呢。
E: And? I'm the Cosmic Geographer.

C: 你是说不久前出现在仙舟大闹了一场的绝灭大君？
E: You mean the Lord Ravager who recently appeared on the Xianzhou and caused a huge ruckus?

C: 这真是你想做的吗？放轻松，不要那么粗暴，想想你真正应该做的是什么？
E: Is this really what you want? Take a breath. Don't lash out. Focus on what you truly need to do.

C: 根据时间分类整理。
E: Sort by timeline.

C: 他们很快就要启程了，你祝愿他们能邂逅美好的旅程。
E: They'll be departing soon. You wish them a journey full of wondrous encounters.

C: 让我离开！
E: Let me go!

C: 列车长，看来，又到了该告别的时刻了。
E: Conductor, looks like it's time to say our goodbyes again.

C: 拍摄已经开始，请演员们各就各位。
E: The filming has begun, actors. Take your positions!

C: 他不会暗恋我吧。
E: Don't tell me he's got a crush on me.

C: 嚯，竟然把人变成了卡通动物？是古希腊神话时代的魔术吗？不…原理似乎完全不同。
E: Ho! They turned people into cartoon animals? Is this some magecraft from the age of the Ancient Greek gods? No... the mechanics feel entirely different.

C: 你抱着不切实际的希望看向一旁的斯科特，但作为一台正义的电视机，他只能为你提供除帮助以外的一切支持。
E: Clinging to the smallest of hopes, you glance at Skott. But as a righteous TV, all he can offer is anything but help.

C: 也是没想到，姐们儿还真有点儿游侠潜质在身上——说起来，你们边上这鼻行兽养的可爱玩意儿是什么东西？俘虏？
E: Didn't expect it, but the girl's got a bit of that ranger vibe in her. By the way, what's that fudgin' thing raised by the Nosewalker next to you? A prisoner?

C: 说实话，我也感到不可思议，「斯科特」这个存在的内部，居然留有一丝「正义」？但我无法否认，我心中始终燃烧着义愤之情。
E: I'm honestly as shocked as you are. Who'd have thought there's "justice" in that man called Skott? And yet, my chest burns with righteous fire.

C: 兄弟，你早点儿动手不好吗？非要不说话装高手？
E: What took you so long? Was that whole silent-badass act really necessary?

C: 乐曲中多出了一道不协和音，绝望。钟表老子——该死，葛瑞迪，你让我说出了什么污秽的词汇！
E: There's a dissonance in the melody — Despair. You Old Clockie — dang it, Grady, what foul language are you having me use!?

C: 等等！导演，我也能叛变！我也想加戏！导——
E: Wait! Director, I can be a traitor too! I want more scenes too! Dir—

C: 是时候结束这场战斗了！
E: It's time to end this battle!

C: 难怪你这么熟悉他的电影。
E: No wonder you know his films so well.

C: 能敏锐地察觉市场需求，用有限的成本达到最好的效果，如果我在那时候遇见你，一定会在营销部门给你预留一个位置。
E: You could smell out exact market demands and deliver maximum impact with minimal resources. Had we met back then, I would've made sure to secure a spot for you in the marketing department.

C: 让奥帝赔精神损失费。
E: Make Oti pay for our emotional damage.

C: 那么，我会先回应黑天鹅小姐，将「永恒之地」列为选项之一。
E: Alright, then. For now, I'll let Miss Black Swan know that we're considering The Eternal Land as a destination.

C: 哼，唯一能仰赖的人……
E: Hmph, the only one you can rely on, huh.

C: 我不会接受你们的施舍。
E: I will not accept your charity.

C: 出什么手？
E: Handle this? Handle what?

C: 呃，应该不会这么蛮不讲理吧？
E: Uh, they can't be seriously going that far, right?

C: 哦，出现了。该怎么说，和你还有几分像。
E: Oh, there it is. Huh, it does look somewhat like you.

C: 事态还不明朗，只是附近出现了一些异状，家族正在排查。
E: There isn't any concrete information yet, but anomalies have been reported around the area. The Family is currently investigating.

C: 先生提醒得对，我们这就绕行。也请您多加小心。
E: Thanks for the tip, sir. We'll make a detour. May you stay safe, too.

C: 听闻下一站，星穹列车与流光忆庭达成了合作？
E: Mm, I hear that the Astral Express has established a collaboration with the Garden of Recollection for your next destination?

C: 谁也没想到，在阮•梅女士那儿，我们还会再遇见一位「故人」。
E: This is far too much an understatement, but none of us ever expected to see an old friend at Miss Ruan Mei's.

C: 别挑这种场合啊！
E: Not now, of all times!

C: 停云小姐，你可算回来了！
E: Miss Tingyun, you're finally back!

C: 就算无法根除，缓解病症的法子…仙舟一定拿得出手。
E: Even if we can't completely rid you of the pain, there must be ways to alleviate it on the Xianzhou.

C: …你说的是她么？
E: ...You mean her?

C: …每时每刻。可如我们这样的微尘又怎么逃得开成为代价的棋局呢？
E: ...Every moment of every day. But as inconsequential as we are, how can we escape the fate of being mere pawns?

C: 谢谢，我没事啦。阴差阳错，在这场灾难中看见了许多过去，也想清了很多未来。
E: You're too kind. I'll be fine. The disaster was unexpected, but because of it, I was able to witness many pasts and think about many futures.

C: 对于这类人，也许失败不失为一桩好事。反省是种可贵的品质。
E: Failure may be a good thing for someone like that. Being able to reflect on one's actions is a valuable quality to have.

C: 或许是其他筑梦师留下的吧。是这个行业的一种习惯，他们希望用祝福来为梦境奠基。
E: Another Dreamweaver probably left this behind. It's a habit for this profession. They hope to use these blessings as a foundation for the Dreamscape.

C: 创造乐园仍是我毕生的夙愿，但在今后的旅程中，我必须一砖一瓦地构建它。所以，我有一个难以启齿的请求……
E: Creating a paradise remains one of my lifelong ambitions. As I move forward, I realize I must build it brick by brick. Therefore, I have a request that I hope you'll consider...

C: 来吧，这样你就是新的老幺了。
E: Come on, you're taking over as newbie.

C: 也许某一天，我会在旅途中找到所寻的答案，离开这里。
E: Perhaps I'll find the answer I'm looking for on this journey. And when that day comes, it'll be farewell.

C: …看来是有结论了呢。
E: ...Looks like we've come to a decision.

C: 那可是阿基维利，祂的每一站都是人类未曾抵达的世界。列车一直沿着祂开辟的银轨行驶，正常情况下，是没有办法前往「开拓」认知外的世界的。
E: This is Akivili we're talking about. In the first instance, every one of THEIR stops was a world no human had ever set foot on. The Astral Express has always traveled along the silver rail laid down by Akivili, so we don't normally get to venture into a world beyond the knowledge of the Trailblaze.

C: 这是什么天体？
E: What celestial body is this?

C: 不过要我说，她们对于黑塔女士美貌的还原，连十分之一…啊不，连百分之一都谈不上。这可不是恭维，我只是在陈述客观事实……
E: If you ask me though, they barely did justice to Madam Herta's beauty! Maybe just <unbreak>10%</unbreak>... no, not even 1% of the real deal! Now I'm no fawner here, just stating an objective fact...

C: …我说，第四面镜——你在跟谁说话？
E: ...Tsk, Fourth Mirror. Who exactly are you talking to?

C: 但算力太高也有坏处，就是会引来这群「算力蜇虫」——「繁育」子嗣中的一支，也不知道是怎么进化出来的。
E: But computers with too high a computing capability tend to attract Computing Stings like them. No one knows how these creatures evolved from their progenitor — the Propagation.

C: 别夸大其词，应付这种对手，让我动一个脑细胞都算是高看它了。
E: Don't be melodramatic. Working even a single brain cell of mine to take out foes like her is an outright waste of my smarts.

C: 留得青山在，不愁没柴烧…先逃回忆域，以后的事再说！
E: Right, stay alive and again I can strive... Retreat into the Memory Zone for now, I can always regroup and try again!

C: 能麻烦你吗，星期日先生？
E: I'll leave it to you then, Mr. Sunday.

C: 呀！怕什么来什么，这下没法悠闲说话了……
E: Just what I was afraid of. So much for a peaceful chat...

C: 呼…感谢三位的救命之恩。
E: Whew... Thank you. The three of you saved our lives.

C: 孩子，要抱有希望……
E: Have hope, child...

C: 我们可以帮忙。
E: We can help.

C: ——别闹了，赶紧救人吧！哪里都行，快把大家送去安全的地方！
E: Stop messing around and help the people! Anywhere is fine, just send them to somewhere safe!

C: 银河球棒侠！
E: I am the Galactic Baseballer!

C: 小心！它的样子和我记忆中不同。
E: Careful! They look different from what I remember.

C: 翁法罗斯面临的困境不小啊。
E: Amphoreus seems to be going through a rough patch.

C: 别担心，就你们二位不会有什么影响。但如果元老会的议员问起…还是要替*我们*保密哦！
E: Not if it's just the two of you. But if any of the Council Elders happen to ask... it's our little secret~!

C: 只有三月能和她抗衡…
E: March is probably the only one on the same level...

C: 该说是寡言少语吗？也不对，只是有些捉摸不透。
E: You could say she's not very talkative? No, that's not it, she's just a little elusive.

C: 美丽的天女，我该如何才能赢得你的芳心？
E: Oh, beautiful celestial maiden, how can I ever win your affection?

C: 这就有二创了？！
E: There's fan art already!?

C: 是万敌提到过的地名。
E: Mydei has mentioned this place before.

C: 是谁在叫喊？
E: Who is shouting?

C: 粉霞天女，是哪个城邦的？
E: Which city is Rosy Celestial Maiden from?

C: 用力…再用点力！
E: Come on... Put in more strength!

C: 下一步去哪儿？
E: Where should we go next?

C: 神罚没有公正可言，而我身为奥赫玛的守护者，同样身不由己。
E: Divine punishment has never been fair. As Okhema's guardian, I must do the same.

C: 为什么明知故问？如果你断定我有杀意，一定会出手阻止的。
E: Why even bother to ask? If you were truly convinced of my intent to harm them, you would have intervened.

C: 只要{NICKNAME}没有异议…阿格莱雅，就把狩猎泰坦的使命交给我们三人吧。
E: If {NICKNAME} has no objections... Aglaea, the three of us will take on the mission to hunt down the Titan.

C: 当然不是。悬锋城毕竟是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，恶劣的环境会阻隔你和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的共鸣。
E: It really isn't. Castrum Kremnos is {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} territory, after all. The environment is cutting off your ability to resonate with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

C: 废话少说，看看你们的结果吧。
E: Enough chatter. Show me your tally.

C: 愿赌服输，给{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的最后一击让给你吧。
E: Well, I'm a man of my word. You can deliver the final blow to {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.

C: 小心，你的思绪正在被「纷争」腐蚀。
E: Be careful. Your thoughts are being corrupted by Strife.

C: 以永不锈蚀之钢，雕琢永不磨灭之身。
E: Sculpt an indestructible body with steel that never rusts.

C: 「付之一炬」？就靠阴谋诡计？
E: "Reduce the decayed world to ashes"? With nefarious schemes?

C: 腐朽的神！直面我，迎接你的末日吧！
E: Corrupted god! Face me and meet your doom!

C: 厉害！真娴熟啊。
E: Amazing! You do have the touch!

C: 翻译一下…好吧，我也拿不准这句的意思。
E: Let me translate that for you... Actually, I'm not sure what it means either.

C: 能听懂泰坦的语言也是一种负担。快点结束这一切吧。
E: Being able to understand the Titans' words is as much an affliction as it is a gift. Let's get this over and done with.

C: 那位泰坦，是在邀请{NICKNAME}吗？
E: Is that Titan extending an invitation to {NICKNAME}?

C: 深层，埋藏。遗忘。遗忘……
E: Depths, hidden. Forgotten. Forgotten...

C: 又是一组「不存在的记忆」…这次连萨姆也在。
E: Another set of nonexistent memories... This time, Sam's also here.

C: …解释？
E: ...Explanation?

C: 我想……
E: I think...

C: 「拒绝…拒绝。」
E: "Refuse... refuse."

C: 我们可不敢骗您啊，阿格莱雅大人~您可是整个奥赫玛最受尊敬的……
E: We would never dream of deceiving you, Lady Aglaea. In all of Okhema, you are the most revered—

C: 你应该知道的，凯妮斯，她在黄金战争时……
E: You should know that during the Chrysos War, Caenis was...

C: 大工匠哈托努斯亲手打造的角斗剑！锤矛！圆盾！
E: Gladiator swords, maces, and bucklers crafted by the Grand Craftsman Chartonus himself!

C: 呃…只看不买？真浪费时间……
E: Tsk. So you're just window shopping? What a waste of my time...

C: …我看过了。走吧，{NICKNAME}阁下。
E: ...I've seen enough. Let's go, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 你有什么计划吗？
E: Do you have a plan in mind?

C: …怪不得你出售的武器上有血腥味。
E: ...That's why all of your weapons reek of blood.

C: 如果不加以阻止，它会对后世的翁法罗斯形成巨大的威胁。
E: If we do not stop them now, they will pose a grave danger to the future generations of Amphoreus.

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 没事，我再琢磨琢磨。
E: No worries, let me ponder on it a bit more...

C: 但只靠力量无法消灭不死的躯体…所以你和那女孩才会来到这个时代寻找答案。
E: But strength alone will not help them destroy an immortal body... That's why you and that girl went back in time seeking answers.

C: 该去哪找缺失的那份神性？
E: Where could the missing fragment of divinity be?

C: 终于，都结束了。
E: It's finally over.

C: 我明白…黄金裔一定会尊重约定，延续你未竟之事。
E: I understand... The Chrysos Heirs will fulfill the promise we made and see your unfinished work to its end.

C: 我…必须向你们坦白，我认为万敌是更合适的人选。他曾是悬锋城的王储，生命中的大部分时间都在随{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一同征战。
E: I... want to be honest about this: I believe Mydei is the better candidate. He was once the crown prince of Kremnos after all, and much of his lifetime was spent fighting alongside {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.

C: 神谕的化身似乎看穿了这点，它看到了白厄阁下心中的「动摇」。
E: The manifestation of the prophecy must have seen this. It saw Lord Phainon's heart wavering.

C: …印证了我的担忧。
E: ...I was right to be worried.

C: 悬锋族人慕强、尚武，这不代表我们不懂得礼数。
E: Kremnoans revere strength and military might, but that does not mean we lack etiquette.
Hmm...
Mmm...?

C: 哈哈，我就想看你的反应。来，告诉你吧——
E: Haha, I just wanted to get a reaction out of you. Alright, I'll tell you.

C: …怎么啦？这可是张好牌呀。
E: What's the matter? This is a good card!
Hehe...

C: {NICKNAME}…没事吧？
E: {NICKNAME}... Are you alright?

C: 你发现自己依然活着——不，换个更准确的说法…你的死亡不够彻底。
E: You realize you are still alive — no, to be more precise... your death was not thorough.

C: 以及，这本斯缇科西亚寓言，请收下吧…人在阅读时可以集中精神，放松身心…希望这能帮助阁下度过最艰难的时光。
E: Also, please accept this Styxian fable... Reading can help one to focus and relax... I hope that reading this can help tide you through this difficult period.

C: 也向您献上诚挚的问候，尊贵的泰坦。
E: I extend to you my utmost respect, revered Titan.

C: 哼，「旁观者清」么……
E: Hmph, is that so...

C: 你多虑了。她还需要在公民大会上争取人民支持，定然不会随意出手。
E: You worry too much. She won't show her hand too freely, as she still needs to garner support from the masses at the citizens' assembly.

C: …如我所料。再次欢迎您的到来，阁下。
E: ...An expected visitor. Welcome, once again.

C: 即便到了这时候，我也仍在怀疑它到底能否给我带来有价值的线索。
E: And even though I've come this far, I'm still doubtful about getting useful clues from him.

C: 好，好。那吾也不多费口舌了，就只待汝魂息彻底散去，径自执掌躯壳罢。
E: Fine, then. I guess I won't say any more. I'll just wait till your soul dissipates completely to gain control over your body.

C: 果然是体力活啊…
E: As expected. Manual labor...

C: 你惹上什么神秘怪盗团了？
E: Did you get into trouble with some phantom thieves?

C: 我想赢，所以，我拜托两位别再惦记什么斯缇科西亚了。作为谢礼，我会把赢来的那一屋子叮呤咣啷分给各位，你们自己五五分账，或者怎么分，随便。
E: I want to win. So I hope you two can give up on going to Styxia. I'll give all the treasures in that room to you, and you can split it between yourselves however you want.

C: 容我回绝你的提议。如果我们无法找到死亡泰坦，{NICKNAME}的灵魂就会……
E: I decline. If we don't find the Death Titan, {NICKNAME}'s soul will...

C: 逐火之旅必定会伴随牺牲。若非如此，你也不必时时躲着阿格莱雅大人。
E: The Flame-Chase Journey walks hand in hand with sacrifices. Isn't that why you're always running away from Lady Aglaea?

C: 这…就是它的诞生之地，或长眠之地。
E: This is the land of their birth... Or perhaps of their death.

C: 这题我会，落叶归根。
E: Aha, I know this one! They returned whence they came!

C: 咦，怎么回事？小蝶你应该还没伸手吧……
E: Huh? What's going on? You didn't touch him, did you...?

C: 呜…人家要是再厉害点，就可以四肢各抓一个，带你们一块飞过去了。
E: Ugh... If I was more powerful, I would be able to carry one person with each limb and fly the four of us to the other side.

C: 什、什么？人家怎么越来越混乱了……
E: G—Get what? I'm getting even more confused...

C: 喔，那真是太好啦。既然这样，那就带着笑容，勇敢前进吧！
E: Wow! That's amazing! Then keep smiling and carry on bravely!

C: 在生命无尽的时代，无人发明「珍惜」二字——因为世间一切美好皆能无限次地被收入眼帘；一切被建立起的联系都无需担忧破碎。
E: No one ever invented the word "cherish" in the era when life was eternal, for all the good things in the world could be revisited endlessly, and every bond formed carried no risk of being severed.

C: 我更害怕看见…曾经的至亲早已忘却了我的存在。
E: But... more than anything, I was afraid that you might have forgotten all about me.

C: 那我们再回到「过去」吧！不过，这神迹也太方便了……
E: In that case, let us go back to "the past"! This miracle sure is handy...

C: 元老们，公民们，请肃静。以神礼观众之名，我见到——
E: Elders and citizens, silence, if you please. As the Theoros, I present to you:

C: 你是……
E: You... you are...

C: …我会铭记于心。
E: ...I will keep that in mind.

C: 以{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}之名：奥赫玛应在第七个{RUBY_B#午时}践行时{RUBY_E#}以前责成委员会展开检察，并公开宣示结果，以便进一步审理！
E: In the names of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, Okhema is to form a committee before the seventh {RUBY_B#Noon}Action Hour{RUBY_E#} to conduct an investigation and disclose the findings to the public for subsequent judgment!

C: 献上火种。
E: Surrender the Coreflame.

C: 搭档，与我一同——成为英雄吧。
E: Partner, we shall become heroes together!

C: 虽然证据还不充分，但依现状推断……
E: I do not have conclusive evidence, but judging by her current condition...

C: 此前我闭口不提，是不想将各位卷入忆庭内部的纷争。
E: I chose to remain quiet before because I did not want to involve you in the Garden's internal conflicts.

C: …我部分收回刚才的话，姬子小姐。
E: ...Let me take back a part of what I said just now, Miss Himeko.

C: 不是投影就是假人，似乎也没什么可留意的。
E: It's either a projection or a fake. There doesn't seem to be much to take note of.

C: 学者是这样的，有不同才会有碰撞，有碰撞才会有进步。
E: This is what being a scholar is about: A collision of ideas only occurs when there are differences in beliefs, and it is such collisions that lead to progress.

C: 他没能讲完，就被押上了审判台。
E: They marched him straight to the seat of judgment before he could finish.

C: 为什么？仅仅是因为它会将你我送上火刑的尸床？
E: Why? Because we'll face death by burning if word gets out?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>去探明「我们」究竟为何物，成为征服世间至理的人吧。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Find out what we are... become the one who conquers the ultimate truths of the world.</color>

C: 还有，叫那女人小心：那如毒蛇般的凯妮斯，近期异动频频。
E: Remind her to be on her toes while you're at it. That vicious Caenis has been unusually active lately.

C: 但时至如今，天南地北的避难者离开故乡，奔赴圣城，希望能在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的庇护下寻得栖息之地。我们所有人早已同舟渡水，退无可退。
E: Yet in the present, people from all over are forced to leave their homeland, to seek refuge in the holy city, where they hope to rest under {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s protection. All of us have long been in the same boat, with no way out of this plight.

C: 所以，小姑娘，别憎恨命运，满怀敬意地拥抱它吧。
E: Therefore, young lady, don't detest your fate. Instead, willingly and respectfully embrace it.

C: 我…吗…？
E: Is it... me?

C: 我没事，白厄阁下。我…大概也料想到了这个结果。
E: I'm fine, Lord Phainon. I... expected this.

C: 他们并非出自真心实意帮助受压迫者。他们真正想要「清洗」的，是混藏于天空之子中的无辜黄金裔。
E: They weren't driven by any genuine desire to help the oppressed. Their true targets were the innocent Chrysos Heirs hidden among the Skyfolk.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「欢欣雀跃吧，因为当众人的骨血与液态的黄金溶于一体——」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Rejoice, for as everyone's flesh and blood merge with liquid gold —"</color>

C: 他们终其一生都在向天空祈祷，但虔诚却未能换来挣命的羽翼。
E: They spent their entire lives praying to the sky, yet their devotion never earned them wings to escape their fate.

C: 或许她心中还剩下一丝慈悲。
E: Perhaps there's a trace of compassion left in her.

C: {NICKNAME}，你要去哪？
E: {NICKNAME}, where are you going?

C: 这制服谁设计的？口袋真多…现在早就不流行这种款式了吧？
E: Who came up with this uniform? It's got more pockets than it needs. Nobody wears this style anymore, do they?

C: 何必勉强自己？这里没人会嘲弄真实的脆弱。
E: Why hide it? No one here would mock you for showing true vulnerability.

C: 你觉得，她会完全不考虑做另外的打算嘛？
E: Don't you think she would have considered other plans?

C: 我没有阿格莱雅大人那样的慧眼，但…我也绝对不会质疑你的信念，风堇小姐。
E: I may not have Lady Aglaea's keen judgment, but I would never question your resolve, Miss Hyacine.

C: 谢谢你，克莱门汀！
E: Thank you, Clementine!

C: 请别这么说。没有两位的羽翼，我们在晨昏之眼恐怕会举步维艰。
E: Please don't say that. Without your wings, we would have struggled to progress in the Eye of Twilight.

C: 好伤心！这会儿就别开玩笑了——
E: I — What? Now I'm sad! This isn't the time for jokes —

C: 哎，我就是给自己找补一下，你可别记仇啊！
E: Hey, I'm just making it up to you. You're not gonna hold that over me, are you?

C: 我…没事。那一击…我现在能承受住了。若换作几个月前，恐怕早已不省人事。
E: I'm okay. I can handle that kind of hit now. But a few months ago, that would've knocked me out.
Uhh...

C: 「最后，继承了阳雷骑士塞涅俄丝血脉的一族被瑟希斯的学者们接纳，并在树庭建立起了昏光庭院……」
E: "Finally, those descended from Seliose the Daythunder Knight were welcomed by the scholars under Cerces and established the Twilight Courtyard in the Grove..."

C: 那个无法发声或聆听的女孩…假如她又*不小心*失去了双眼，会发生什么？
E: That girl who can't speak or hear... What if she accidentally lost her eyes too?

C: 一千年的时光…我见证了十位泰坦的殒落。从最初的娇蛮无知，再到摸索着为众人引路……
E: In these one thousand years... I've witnessed the fall of ten Titans. From my naive arrogance at the beginning to slowly learning how to guide others...

C: 你懂什么！多洛斯人个个多才多艺，唯独不太擅长游泳而已。
E: You wouldn't understand! The people of Dolos are talented in many ways, just... not in swimming.

C: 嗯…？这是……
E: Hmm...? Is this...

C: 欸？什么意思……
E: Eh? What do you mean...

C: 因为我能感觉得到——并非依靠半神的力量，而是凭着在我胸口跳动的心脏——你喜爱这个地方。
E: Because I can feel it — not with the power of a demigod, but with the heart that beats in my chest — you love this place.

C: 哼，想套我的话？门儿都没有。
E: Hmph, trying to trick me into saying something? Not a chance.

C: 「你已经与我确认再三了。没错，哈托努斯，我需要你为我这么做。」
E: "You've confirmed this with me repeatedly. Yes, Chartonus, I need you to do this for me."

C: 天啊……
E: Oh gods...

C: 这段漫长的旅程，*我们*一直都陪在阿雅身边，比谁都清楚她心中所想。
E: We were always by Agy's side throughout this long journey, so we understood her thoughts better than anyone.

C: …哈托努斯？
E: ...Chartonus?

C: …哦！好吧。
E: ...Oh! Alright.

C: …真是一段感伤，却又精彩的旅途呀。
E: ...What a poignant, yet splendid journey.

C: 可即便如此，我也想…想配得上你的选择。小偷也有做梦的权利，对吧……
E: But... but I still want to be worthy of you. I want to prove that you've made the right choice. Even thieves can dream, right...?

C: 啊…对哦。如果一切顺利的话，这一役之后，丹宝和灰宝就能回家了吧？
E: Ah... right. If all goes as planned, you and Grayie will be able to go home after this mission, won't you?

C: 和我故乡的洋流相比，翁法罗斯的水体要更…不羁。驯服它的过程有些艰难，还好我已大概摸清了其中的门路。
E: Compared to the currents of my home, the waters of Amphoreus are... rather untamed. Subduing the waters wasn't easy, but I've gotten the hang of it now.

C: 因为逐火之旅将在我的眼前走向完满的结局，而取得{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的火种则是英雄们将要面临的最后一重挑战。
E: For the Flame-Chase Journey is nearing its perfect conclusion, and retrieving the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} is the final challenge the heroes will face.

C: 先祖啊，请给予您慷慨的赐福吧……
E: Ancestor, please bestow upon me your generous blessing...

C: 精彩的冒险，三月都馋哭了！
E: Such an exciting adventure! March's gonna be crying with jealousy!

C: 干得好，现在我们可以通过……
E: Well done. Now we can cross...

C: ——「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝，她曾是你们的伙伴，对吗？
E: ...Seliose the Daythunder Knight was once your comrade, wasn't she?

C: 英雄塞涅俄丝，她对晖之民的作为失望透顶，决定斩断一切的源头…他们信仰的神明。
E: The hero Seliose, disillusioned by the Sunfolk's deeds, decided to sever the source of it all... The god they so blindly placed their faith in.

C: …请继续前进吧，逐火的英雄们。我能感觉到，艾格勒的光芒愈发强烈了。
E: ...Please press on, flame-chasing heroes. I can sense it — the radiance of Aquila shines ever brighter.

C: 塞涅俄丝，那位英雄…她的想法的确有些天真。
E: Seliose... was indeed rather naive.

C: 小的时候，在雅努萨波利斯，妈妈会教我们折纸，把一张张红色的纸片折成各种形状：小鸟，小鱼，头冠，漂亮的衣服……
E: As kids in Janusopolis, we spent hours with our mom learning origami. She'd take a stack of red paper and guide our hands as we turned them into birds, fish, crowns, and elaborate clothes...

C: 我感觉，自己不止能用剑锋斩除罪恶——
E: I feel that I can do more than just cut down evil with this blade —

C: 他们多么地天真，竟把流着金色血液的异端们当成了救世主……
E: They are so utterly naive that they think of the golden-blooded heretics as Deliverers...

C: 黄金裔浴场…空无一人。
E: The Chrysos Heirs' baths... Not a soul in here.

C: 绝不能死在这里！
E: You cannot die here!

C: 其一：█ ██ <color=#dbc291ff>名为██来古士 █ 的智械█可能██ 是一切的元凶 █</color>
E: One: <color=#dbc291ff>The Intellitron ██████ named ███████ Lygus ████ possibly █████ the primary culprit behind everything ██████</color>

C: （这里，也变得不一样了……）
E: (Even this place has changed...)

C: 如果和那位机器先生说的一样，翁法罗斯注定会走向「毁灭」的结局…那人家也要陪伴在你身边，直到最后一刻。
E: If what that machine gentleman said is true, if Amphoreus is destined for destruction... then I'll stay by your side until the very end.

C: 他是未生者之初生，他是无名者之初名——
E: He is the first to be born, first to be named among the nameless—

C: 怎么了…在看什么？
E: Something wrong? What do you see?

C: 小时候我们约定集合的地方无非两处：村子中间那座神像，还有这里。
E: Those were the days. We'd always meet either by that statue in the village or right here.

C: 每次画到海的尽头就搁下笔了，完全想象不出那之外的世界是什么模样呢。
E: I'd always stop where the sky met the sea. The world beyond was just too vast to imagine.

C: 我知道啦，那群神神秘秘的小家伙…没想到是它们在调皮捣蛋。
E: Ah, I see now! Those sneaky little ones... So that's what they've been up to.

C: 不记得了吗，伙伴？小时候我们常常去找他们玩呢。
E: Did you forget? We used to visit them all the time when we were little.

C: 只要沿着树洞爬一小段距离，穿过最狭窄的地方，就到它们的栖息地「迷路迷境」啦。
E: Once you get through the tight squeeze in the hollow, you'll reach their dwelling, the Membrance Maze.

C: 村长…多哆啦迷？
E: Chief... you mean Dolimem?

C: 谢谢你，伙伴，就听你的——无论结果如何，就让我们共同面对吧。
E: Thanks, partner. We'll do it your way — whatever the cards show, we'll face it together.

C: 翻开「君王」。
E: Reveal the "Ruler."

C: 咦，这张牌好像和我的想法很接近：想让自己所能保护的范围，尽可能再大一点……
E: Hey, this card really speaks to me. It makes me want to protect as much as I possibly can...

C: 现在，他们近在眼前。
E: And now, they are right in front of one's eyes.

C: 感觉有点难以融入话题……
E: Doesn't sound like an easy task...
We...

C: 我知道，你在看着，对吗——未来的「大英雄」？
E: I know you're watching us right now... aren't you, "Great Hero" from the future?

C: 请用您的双眼将这段记忆见证至最后，将他<color=#dbc291ff>最初的结局</color>收入眼中……
E: Watch this memory play out its final act. See with your own eyes <color=#dbc291ff>how everything began</color>...

C: 「平庸之人应当如此，方才能做出不平庸的选择。」
E: "That's what it means to be ordinary and choose to be more."

C: 真是…令人窒息，仿佛整个世界的重量都压在了肩头。
E: This is... suffocating. Like the whole world's weight is on my shoulders.

C: 那时我们都是小孩子呢。
E: We were still kids back then.

C: 谢谢您！我们会注意的。
E: Thank you! We'll be careful!

C: 诚如神谕所示：<color=#dbc291ff>「</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>白厄</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>汝</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>将肩负骄阳，直至</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>开拓者</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>灰白的黎明</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>显著」</color>——在你亲手谱写的史诗中，愿这名号能代我同行。
E: As the prophecy foretold: <color=#dbc291ff>"</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Phainon</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>You</color>{RUBY_E#} <color=#dbc291ff>will bear the blazing sun, until</color> {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Trailblazer</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>the pale dawn</color>{RUBY_E#} <color=#dbc291ff>breaks."</color> May the name accompany you in my place in the epic you write with your own hands.

C: 「毁灭」的造物主，听好了：这声呐喊，来自所有被你遗弃的造物——
E: Listen well, creator of Destruction. This cry comes from all your abandoned creations...

C: 站在这里，泰坦的声音前所未有地清晰，原来它们……
E: Standing here, the voices of Titans have never been clearer. Turns out...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝将碎作千片，凋零在他乡的土壤。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall shatter into a thousand fragments and wither in the soil of foreign lands."</color>

C: 是啊，在摇曳的微光中，原本晦暗的前路仿佛也变得有迹可循。
E: Yes, in that flickering light, the once-dark path ahead seemed to become clearer.

C: 同样的话也回敬给你：第一，身为全天下最渎神的异端之一，你没资格对我说教；第二……
E: I have some words for you too: First, as one of the most heretical blasphemers in the world, you have no right to lecture me. Second...

C: 但在那之前，它们还能为「侵晨」淬火。这样在我剖开你的胃囊时，你就不会感受到痛苦。
E: But before that, they could still forge and sharpen Dawnmaker. Now, when I cut open your stomach, you won't feel a thing.

C: 「付之一炬」…多么熟悉的结局。
E: "Reduced to ashes"... Such a familiar end.

C: 我知道自己并非阁下敌手，已在你剑下陨落过无数次——但还请明白，即便如此，我的决心也不容小觑。
E: I know I am not your match, having fallen under your sword countless times — but even so, please understand that my resolve is not to be underestimated.

C: 一直被我封藏于心底的，英雄的形象，终于走进现实了啊——在这漫长逐火的尽头……
E: The image of the hero I've buried deep in my heart... finally steps into the light — here, at the end of this long Flame-Chase Journey...

C: 就用我血…代替王冠吧。
E: You may crown yourself... in my blood.

C: 呃啊…！
E: Ugh...!

C: 一如…既往。
E: Just as they have never been.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>警告！警告！警告！</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Warning! Warning! Warning!</color>

C: 那，我出发啦？
E: Well then, I guess this is it.

C: 十四个系统时，这也太快了…
E: Fourteen system hours is no time at all...!

C: 「神话之外」是「智识」的领域，在这里，您无法对我进行任何物理干涉，反之亦然。
E: The Exomyth is the Erudition's domain. You cannot physically interact with me in any way in this place, and vice versa.

C: 尾声？我们来晚了？
E: The end? Are we late?

C: 别担心，时间刚刚好。第一次逐火以「律法」的试炼作结，我们要在火种被归还前找到半神，取得对方的信任。
E: Perfect timing, actually. The first Flame-Chase ended with the trial of Law. We must find the demigod and gain her trust before the Coreflame is restored.

C: 你、你……
E: You... you...

C: 谨遵吩咐——
E: As you command...

C: 无论发生什么，*我们*都不会离开你。
E: No matter what, we'll always remain by your side.

C: 欧洛尼斯的神谕？
E: Oronyx's prophecy?

C: 这还真是…令人吃惊。
E: This... can't be real.

C: 连你们都觉得意外吗？命运…真是捉摸不透呀。
E: Even you find this surprising? Fate... really is unpredictable.

C: …「冬霖爵」，凯撒大人刚刚找出了主谋，将他当众处刑——看到那混账被烧得连渣都不剩，估计这群刁民也不敢再放肆了。
E: ...Dux Brumalis, our Great Imperator found the mastermind and executed him in public. Seeing that scoundrel burned to nothing should deter these miscreants from being so brazen again.

C: 既然是刻律德菈主持的会议，想必是个了解「律法」动向和当今时代的好机会…我们可都要竖起耳朵，好好听哦？
E: Since Cerydra is presiding over the meeting, it'll be a good opportunity to learn about the Law's inclinations and the current era. Let's keep our ears open, okay?

C: 呵，旧律！你们不早就把它毁了么？你们在奥赫玛第一次围城战时临阵倒戈，在重组元老院的决议中全部投下赞成票，还在昨天亲手用染血的刀锋亵渎了它——
E: Heh, the ancient laws! Didn't you destroy them long ago? You defected during the First Siege of Okhema, voted unanimously in favor of the Council of Elders' restructuring, and just yesterday, you desecrated them with a blood-stained blade...

C: 无奈，那反复无常的海洋泰坦阻断了通往创世涡心的灵水，给我的晋升之路徒增阻碍。若「律法」火种不能归还，你们指明的救世之路亦无法实现……
E: Alas, that fickle Ocean Titan has obstructed the spirit water leading to the Vortex of Genesis, hindering my ascension. If the Coreflame of "Law" cannot be returned, your path to Deliverance will never be realized...

C: 凯撒有令，那位大人的行踪务必严格保密。
E: The Imperator has ordered us to keep his lordship's whereabouts a secret.

C: 不知刻律德菈对我们隐瞒了多少，最坏的情况……
E: We don't know how much Cerydra has concealed from us. In the worst-case scenario...

C: 即兴发挥不错。
E: Pretty good for some improv.

C: 还记得吗？在我引荐下，此物主人曾在命运三相殿和诸位见过一面。
E: Do you remember who used to own this blade? She met you once, back at the Temple of the Three Fates.

C: 「渡河之后，将是人世间的悲剧；但不渡河，则是自身的沦亡」……
E: "After I cross this river, it will be a tragedy for mankind. But if I do not cross, then it will be the end of me."

C: 从三千万世的抗争说起。
E: Start with the defiance that lasted thirty million cycles.

C: 至于动用私刑——更是视同颠覆「律法」，罪该万死。
E: Moreover, dealing out extrajudicial punishment equates to defying the "Law," and the culprit is to be sentenced to death.

C: 现在，你越是虚张声势，便越能印证这一事实。
E: The more you bluff now, the more you are proving that conjecture to be true.

C: 抱歉…一直没来得及去找你。
E: I'm sorry... I never found the time to go see you.

C: 或者，还需要一些证明？放心，这不难……
E: Or... do you need more proof? That won't be hard...

C: 「长夜月」…你究竟是？
E: "Evernight"... But who—?

C: 我愿意为你解释更多，但不是现在。我们可以有很多、很多私人时间，但翁法罗斯没有。
E: I'm happy to explain more, just not now. We might have a lot of time to ourselves, but Amphoreus does not have that luxury.

C: 如果不能阻止「智识」和「毁灭」，你珍视的旅途就会迎来覆灭的前奏——<color=#dbc291ff>不是以琥珀纪，而是以天、分、秒为单位的倒计时。</color>
E: If we do not stop Erudition and Destruction, then the journey you've treasured so much will face the prelude to its obliteration, <color=#dbc291ff>a countdown not in Amber Eras, but in days, minutes... seconds.</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>她说，把火光传向未来吧。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>She said: Pass the flame into the future.</color>

C: 什么……
E: What...

C: 我们要铺好未来的道路，确保「救世主」回来后，能平安抵达「再创世」的场所。
E: We must lay down the path to the future so when the "Deliverer" returns, they'll have a clear road to reach the location of "Era Nova".

C: 是悬锋人，他们的王已经来了。
E: It's the Kremnoans. Their king's already here.

C: ——别来无恙，开拓者阁下。
E: Long time no see, Trailblazer.

C: 「这在我们看来虚假的一切，就是他们世界的全部。」
E: "To them, that false play is the whole world."

C: 随着最后的反抗归于沉寂，一个庞大的帝国自群星间崛起——这片小小的池塘，也终于迎来了繁荣与和平。
E: As the final resistance fell silent, a vast empire rose from among the stars and this small pond at last embraced prosperity and peace.

C: 不…她不会让我们白白送死，她不会背叛人们的梦想…不会背叛翁法罗斯。
E: No... she wouldn't send us to die for nothing. She would never betray our dreams... or Amphoreus.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>意欲承载「律法」之人，必为此世剔除诅咒，以受诅者之血献祭——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The one who wishes to bear Law must purge this world of its curse, and offer the blood of the accursed as sacrifice...</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你将剑刃刺入了她的心脏，成为了弑君的臣子，弑神的半神——至少，历史是如此描绘那场惨剧。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You drove your blade into her heart, a loyal subject turned regicide, a demigod committing deicide, or so the history books paint that tragedy.</color>

C: 你的介入，也同样是徒劳的回音。
E: And your interference is just another equally futile echo.

C: 高贵的骑士精神，令人动容。
E: Such noble chivalry. Admirable.

C: 什么？
E: What?

C: 「但她的死令奥赫玛为之沸腾。城墙这边，捍卫自由的人们将纪念碑推倒在地；另一边，凯撒的拥护者挡在她的雕像前，竭力宣告：『皇帝还站在人群中央』。」
E: "We only know her death inflamed Okhema. On one side of the city, those who defended liberty toppled her statues to the ground. On the other side, her supporters put themselves between the masses and her monuments, declaring loudly that 'the sovereign is still among the people.'"

C: 看来对我这位不速之客，你已经不那么惊讶了。
E: Looks like you're no longer that surprised to see me, even though I am an uninvited guest.

C: 事实上，在你返程途中，翁法罗斯又出现了一些状况。
E: As a matter of fact, while you were on your way back, Amphoreus's circumstances changed once again.

C: 忆庭对采集「记忆」有着严格的律令，但并非所有忆者…都像我一样得体。
E: The Garden has strict rules for collecting memories, but not all Memokeepers are as... proper as I am.

C: 我不认为「三月小姐」和他们站在同一战线。
E: I do not believe that "Miss March" is on their side.

C: 你的声音不像平时，好奇只留下了三分……
E: Your voice sounds different from usual. I only hear a hint of curiosity...

C: 没错。浮黎在她心中种下虚假的希望，让她相信自己是特别的，而翁法罗斯仍有一线生机。
E: Indeed. Fuli planted a false hope in her heart, making her believe that she was special and that Amphoreus still had a chance.

C: 你拥有一具美丽的法身，它与我十分相称。
E: ...That you have a beautiful dharmakāya. It fits me very much.

C: 「请用『爱』铭记我，就像所有逝去的诗篇里，唯一不变的尾注。」
E: "So, please remember me with 'love', like that eternal footnote in all the faded sagas."

C: 我们回到了第一次逐火之旅的时代，与曾经的逐火英雄们相识，包括掌权的「律法」黄金裔刻律德菈，以及为她效命的「海洋」黄金裔海瑟音。
E: We returned to the era of the first Flame-Chase Journey, where we met the Flame-Chase heroes of old, including the monarch Cerydra, the Chrysos Heir of Law, and Hysilens, the Chrysos Heir of the Ocean, who served her.

C: 一边是与你同舟共济的伙伴：他们竭力抗争，争取到1%的胜算。但如果选择那1%，无论结果如何，都将伴随巨大的牺牲。
E: On the one side are companions who've weathered every storm with you. They fought with everything they've got and obtained a 1% chance of victory. However, should you choose that 1%, there'll be massive sacrifices no matter the outcome.

C: 明明拥有这么蛮不讲理的力量，却还是遵守了对我的承诺。我只能认为……
E: You've got such incredible powers, but you still kept your promise to me. That only means...

C: 「新的生命若要萌芽，它的种子须是死的」……
E: "If a new life is to be born, its seed has to be dead"...

C: 我只拥有「你」的记忆，是为保护你而存在的执念。
E: I am an obsession whose purpose is to protect you. The only memories I have are "yours."

C: 看看它。
E: Take a look.

C: 什么时候放在这的？
E: When did this get put here?

C: （咦？这又多了幅画……）
E: (Huh? There's a new painting here...)

C: （他们，这是什么反应……）
E: (What...? Their reactions... What's going on?)

C: 我的隐私呢？
E: But what about my privacy?

C: 算了，言多必失。准备好——{F#她}{M#他}要醒了。
E: Never mind, best not to tempt fate. Get ready, {F#s}he's about to wake up.

C: …收回思绪吧。
E: ...Come back to yourself.

C: 「保护欲」？
E: "Protectiveness"?

C: 没想到…最坏的状况还是发生了。
E: I didn't think... the worst would still come to pass.

C: 倘若战死的是镜流、景元…乃至应星，我的答案亦是如此。
E: And if it had been Jingliu, Jing Yuan... or even Yingxing who died in battle, I'd still choose to do the same thing.

C: 我的老友，荒笛…尽情享用吧。
E: Terravox, my old friend... Indulge yourself.

C: 和我一同，向不公的命运再发起一次反叛吧。
E: Join me in rebelling against this unjust fate once more.

C: 现在，也该是我重新启程的时刻了。
E: Now... it's time for me to set out once more.

C: 「大地」的最后一次反叛，是为世间生灵插上「开拓」的羽翼……
E: The final rebellion of "Earth" was to bestow Trailblazing wings upon all living beings...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>█ ███加入█我们█  ██ ██</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>█ ███Join█us█ ██ ██</color>

C: 「凡人、缺陷者、失败的英雄」…
E: "Mere mortals. Flawed individuals. Failed heroes..."

C: 这片迷雾背后，想必就是「长夜月」的领域了。
E: Behind this mist must be "Evernight's" domain.

C: 听起来，你们发生过不少过节。
E: Sounds like you two have quite the history already.

C: 这是……
E: What...?

C: 对我来说，只是短暂的分别。
E: Well, it was only a very brief farewell for me.

C: 「开拓」…有意思。在你们的世界，那也是一尊受万人景仰的泰坦吧。
E: Trailblazing... What an interesting concept. Surely, on your worlds, that is also a Titan revered by the masses?

C: 接下来，就要直面破壳而出的绝灭大君了。
E: ...And next, we'll be facing the Lord Ravager as they break free from their shell.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>德谬歌，它从未存在过。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Demiurge never existed.</color>

C: ——倒下的，是「命运」。
E: It was "fate" that fell instead.

C: 「人们并非消失不见，而是听到了神谕的号召，前来见证{NICKNAME}的苏醒。」
E: "Those people didn't disappear. Instead, they've answered the call of the prophecy and come to witness {NICKNAME}'s awakening."

C: 机器头又要给可怜的银河下判决了：边星贸易战争、帝皇战争、鲁珀特之死，每一次祂的时刻应验，都意味着人类要经历一场血洗。
E: And now Droidhead wants to hand down judgment to the poor cosmos again: Borderstar Trade War, Emperor's War, Rubert's death... every time THEIR Instant arrived, it meant another bloodbath for humanity.

C: 他切断部分神经回路，脱离了阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下的囚禁……
E: He severed part of his neural pathways to break free from Lord Anaxagoras's control...

C: 逻辑：对其灵感回路进行扫描，有助于追查德谬歌的下落。
E: Logic: Scanning his Inspiration Circuit might help us track down the Demiurge.

C: 可她说的没错。世上就是有相似的花儿呀。
E: But she's not wrong. Some flowers do look alike after all.

C: 开个玩笑。瞧你们，一个个愁眉苦脸的，怎么能搞好救世呢？
E: Relax, I'm just kidding. Look at those gloomy faces! How are you gonna save the world like that?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>拨动琴弦吧——「天空的医师，风堇」——愿以七色的旋律编织虹光，为人子带来玫瑰色的黎明。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Pluck the strings, Hyacine, Healer of the Sky. May the seven-hued melody weave a rainbow, bringing a rosy-fingered dawn to the children of humanity.</color>

C: 他内心的挣扎，还有破壳而出的「毁灭」，正在不断涌现。
E: His inner struggle, and the Destruction breaking through... They're rising to the surface.

C: 他们已在路上了。若是与我相遇，场面想必会无法控制吧？
E: They're already on their way. Should they cross paths with me... I imagine things may spiral out of control.

C: 嗯…我听见……
E: Um... I hear something...

C: 印记只有一半。另一半在哪里？
E: We only have half of the mark. Where's the other half?

C: 那，在「开拓」见证下，群星会记得「阿那克萨戈拉斯」驳斥神明……
E: Then, with the Trailblaze as witness, the stars shall remember how Anaxagoras refuted the gods...

C: 我粉碎棺木，为铁墓送葬！
E: I'll shatter coffins to lay Irontomb to rest!

C: 不必了。我能看见……
E: No need. I can see...

C: 击碎此身。杀死。毁灭的巨人。
E: Destroy this body. Kill. The giant of Destruction.

C: 不能再等了，必须阻止铁墓。
E: We can't wait any longer. We must stop Irontomb.

C: 「看啊，他的眼睛…多漂亮……」
E: "See how beautiful his eyes are..."

C: 「难怪我总有种预感。这样一来，也算应验了人家一直以来的观点。」
E: "No wonder I always had a weird hunch... But that also means I was right in thinking..."

C: 十三声心跳过后，{RUBY_B#爱}光{RUBY_E#}会创造天地。
E: After thirteen heartbeats... {RUBY_B#Love}Light{RUBY_E#} will create the heavens and earth.

C: 让「人」向你证明——自「毁灭」的温床中，也能开出温柔的花。
E: Let "humanity" prove to you that even the breeding grounds of Destruction... can bloom with gentle flowers!

C: （都不在吗…真让人担心。）
E: (Nobody's here... I'm getting worried.)

C: 竟敢让凯撒「闭嘴」？哼，若是在奥赫玛，你的脑袋和身子恐怕已经分家了。
E: Daring to tell the Imperator to "shush"? Hmph. If this were Okhema, your head would've already parted ways from your body.

C: 若论起源，悬锋是翁法罗斯最早启用元老院制度的城邦，但我们自光历三千年左右便不再对其进行迭代。
E: Speaking of origins, Kremnos was the first Amphorean city-state to establish the Council of Elders system, but we stopped iterating on it around the year <unbreak>3000</unbreak> of the Light Calendar.

C: 凯撒大人的调子…起得也太高啦，让人好难接呀…？
E: The Great Imperator set the bar way too high... How are we supposed to follow that up...?

C: 没能彻底挽救你的审美，是我三千万世唯一抱憾之事呢。
E: Not being able to completely change your fashion sense is my only regret across thirty million cycles.

C: 只是，还有什么后顾之忧吗？
E: Still, is something weighing on you?

C: 至于我最难割舍的那份私心……
E: As for the one wish I still have trouble letting go of...

C: 我想，保护村子里的大家……
E: I want to protect everyone in the village...

C: 这样…就都结束了吧…？
E: Is it... all over now?

C: 我们长大以后……
E: When we grow up...

C: 你知道，从这里开始，故事就有了不同展开。是不是很期待？那就赶紧开始吧！
E: You know that the story starts to deviate from here. Aren't you looking forward to it? Then let's get started!

C: >>>发生了未经处理的异常(2/3) 对象名:"天真的…梦…"
E: >>> An unhandled exception occurred (2/3) Object name: "Naive... dream..."

C: 对。成熟。漂亮。是你呀。
E: Yes. Mature. Beautiful. Like you.

C: 但唯独这一次，可以接受人家小小的任性吗？我希望……
E: Either way, could you please let me do something I want? Just this once? I want...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>成为「翁法罗斯之心」的力量。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Becoming the source of power for "Amphoreus's Heart."</color>

C: 身为实验因子的PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>，原本只能识别并输出固定的模式。但「记忆」的力量，加以跨越三千万次牺牲的铭记，让她完成了前所未有的壮举。
E: As an experimental factor, PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> originally could only recognize and output information in a set format. However, the power of the Remembrance and the memory of over thirty million sacrifices enabled her to complete an unprecedented feat.

C: 你难道觉得…历经三千万世，德谬歌仍只是PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>的复制品？
E: Do you really think that the Demiurge is still a cheap copy of PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>? Even after thirty million cycles?

C: 在场都是聪明人，我就直奔主题：很简单，对「智识」开刀——
E: We're all smart people here, so I'll just say it straight: strike at Erudition...

C: 不过，也正是在那一瞬间，戎韬将军传来讯息，「虚贞已破，吉凶可定」，随后就断了联系。
E: Yet in that exact moment, the Seer Strategist sent a message: "The empty fortune has cracked open, and fate can now be decided." Then we lost contact.

C: 阿格莱雅
E: Aglaea

C: 系统时间<unbreak>23</unbreak>时<unbreak>47</unbreak>分<unbreak>15</unbreak>秒，你很准时，卡芙卡。
E: <unbreak>23</unbreak>:<unbreak>47</unbreak>:<unbreak>15</unbreak> system time. Very punctual, Kafka.

C: 你不好奇自己会得多少分吗？…我还挺想知道的。
E: Aren't you curious about how much you would score? I kinda wanna know mine.

C: 没听过的名字…啊，艾利欧好像说过我们不会碰上黑塔，看来她是真的不在。
E: Doesn't ring a bell. Oh, right, Elio said we wouldn't run into Herta. It seems she really isn't here.

C: 我知道是你，装成我的模样，到处坑蒙拐骗，现在竟然还敢明目张胆地站在这里。
E: I know it's you. You've been pretending to be me, deceiving everyone with your shenanigans. And now you have the audacity to stand here in front of me.

C: 可惜了。
E: We're so close.

C: 都确有其事嘛，而且「公司」报销，咱也不跟他们客气。
E: You don't say! And IPC will reimburse every one of them. There's no need to be coy about it.

C: 怎么样，要不要来一口？
E: Would you like a sip?

C: 而且，他尤其看不惯地概科员受人欺负，经常为本科室出头，和别人大打出手。
E: What's more, he would get very upset whenever he saw his colleagues from the Department of Cosmic Geography being bullied by others. He would often stand up for his colleagues and start fights.

C: 看到我这么慌张干嘛？…好可疑。
E: Why do you sound so nervous all of a sudden? Suspicious...

C: 第三重权限。
E: Tier-3 certification.

C: 用一辈子的时间去等一个人，忍受无尽的思念与孤独……
E: Spending my whole life waiting for someone and enduring endless longing and loneliness...

C: 明智的决定。
E: Smart choice.

C: 可别这么说…你是拯救空间站的大英雄，这不是人人都能做到的事，谦虚不得……
E: Don't put it like that... You are the big hero who saved the space station. This's not something that anyone can do. You are being too modest...

C: 看来只有我了…
E: Looks like I am the only one...

C: 好厉害的技术！
E: Such an incredible skill!

C: 咳，原来是{NICKNAME}，你也是来报名奇物收容志愿者…等等，你莫要过来！
E: Ahem, so it's you, {NICKNAME}. You're also here to volunteer in the Curio Collection Squad... Wait, don't come over here!

C: 啧，你们年轻人就知道搞钱，少不了你的。
E: Gee, kids these days, all you know is money.

C: 在空间站这个奇异之地，有时候，就算你阖上双目，闭塞双耳，那些与你缘定的信息依然会钻入你的脑中。
E: In this bizarre space station, sometimes even if you cover your eyes and ears, the information destined for you will still find a way into your brain.

C: 这两位法政科员听着很耳熟。
E: Those two geopolitics researchers sound familiar.

C: 这么说吧，为了让你彻底放心，这次我利用胶囊治疗舱，替你做了一份全身扫描，你的身体机能并无不妥。
E: Fine. Just to reassure you, I will give you a full-body scan using the capsule treatment module this time. There's nothing wrong with your physical functions.

C: 有没有可能是同名同姓的乌龙？
E: Maybe it's someone with the same name?

C: 出了一点小意外，但是无伤大雅。
E: There was a little accident, but nothing serious.

C: 珍惜这种好极了的感觉吧。
E: Please cherish how great you are feeling right now.

C: 只要有那么点点钱，就以为自己有了整个宇宙，等等，你这什么眼神，你眼睛里有东西？
E: You think you are so rich that you can own the universe. Wait a second. What's that look on your face? Is there something in your eyes?

C: 我才请了几天假，回来科室就变天了，我不能接受。乔安啊乔安，到底是谁把你变成这样的？这得受了多大的刺激啊！
E: I only took a few days off, and now our department has changed so much. I cannot believe it. Who turned you into this, Joanne? What happened to you!?

C: 我还是有点没搞懂…
E: I still don't get it...

C: 这个舱段有不少呜呜伯出没，它们在混乱中将部分信标数据转移到了身上。
E: There're quite a lot of Wubbaboos in this zone, and they've managed to transfer some of the beacon data onto themselves amidst the chaos.

C: 以晋升为由，引诱卡波特。
E: Tempt Capote with a promotion.

C: 没…没错！我是不会为了那种东西就失去宝贵的品格的！
E: ...I—Indeed! I won't forsake my precious morality for something so base!

C: 证据就是这张粉丝回馈手卡！
E: This handwritten fan reply card!

C: 这份写真是由卡波特粉丝后援会成员拍摄，拍摄时间不超过<unbreak>24</unbreak>小时。也就是说，你在今天之内，曾经找过卡波特教授！
E: This was taken by a member of the Master Capote Fan Club less than <unbreak>24</unbreak> hours ago. In other words, you went to find Professor Capote today...

C: 都搜集齐了吗？你要的东西，我也帮你带来了。
E: Is everything here? I brought all the things you need too.

C: 罪名是否成立要由阿兰判断。
E: Arlan, you should decide whether this should be considered a crime.

C: 现在空间站正在进行灾后重建，我的职责就是协助修复各种设备，恢复空间站的网络安全。
