E: Now that the station is being rebuilt, my job is to repair equipment and restore the space station's cybersecurity.

C: 一滴水。
E: A drop of water.

C: 她传送了自己？
E: She teleported herself?

C: 哎等下，有个说不通的地方。奇物是黑塔女士最爱惜的东西了，所有的访问申请都会通过主控室的电脑发送到她的办公室。
E: Hold on, though... Something doesn't add up. The curios are Madam Herta's most prized possessions. All the visit requests are sent to her office from the computer in the main control room.

C: 我大概是没法陪同了。但我会待在办公室里，帮螺丝咕姆先生一起监控系统内部的数据流。好紧张啊，我还是第一次接触这么大的工程。
E: I'm afraid I won't be able to accompany you — I'll be helping Mr. Screwllum monitor the system's internal data flow from the office. Ugh, I'm so nervous — this is the first time I've been involved in something so big.

C: 「黑塔这家伙，竟然在模拟宇宙里布置这种东西，她自己找资料时不会嫌麻烦吗？」
E: "Ugh, why would Herta put something like this inside the Simulated Universe? Doesn't she find it annoying when she has to find something herself?"

C: 已有之事，后必再有——这是在与她的接触中，我做出的推断。
E: What has happened is destined to happen again — that was my conclusion after having met her.

C: 漂亮…果然，最高难度的挑战也难不倒你，但我相信它已经足够了。
E: Remarkable... Sure enough, not even the highest difficulty challenge can faze you, but I believe it is enough.

C: 那它现在去哪儿了？怎么一下子这么安静。
E: Then where did it go? And why is it so quiet all of a sudden?

C: 太空里也会堵车？
E: It's a space traffic jam.

C: 不用谢，{NICKNAME}，这是我该做的。
E: You're welcome, {NICKNAME}. Just doing my job.

C: 漆黑的座椅底部，你想象黑暗中出现了一只眼睛，死死地盯住你不放。
E: You stare at the dark shadow cast by the car seat, imagining an eye staring back.

C: 嗯…真是一场奇妙的邂逅。但无法预知的「未来」才是星空下最迷人的事物，{NICKNAME}，就让我们期待一下接下来的展开吧。
E: What a fascinating encounter. There's nothing more captivating than an unpredictable future. {NICKNAME}, let's see what unfolds next.

C: 啊？都已经提前做好这种心理准备了吗……
E: Oh? So you're a mind reader now, too...?

C: 帕姆也这么想过…但很可惜不行！
E: That's what Pom-Pom used to think... but it's not that simple!

C: 的确。按照以往的时间来看，已经到了不得不开工的日子，因此帕姆才会如此着急。
E: Indeed — it's about that time. I guess that explains why Pom-Pom is in such a hurry.

C: 怎么样啦？{NICKNAME}乘客，你准备好我们就开始前往洗车星咯！
E: How is everything, {NICKNAME}? If you're ready, let's head to the Washtopia!

C: 螺丝咕姆？
E: Screwllum?

C: 对管理层的<color=#dbc291ff>不信任</color>情绪愈演愈烈，艾丝妲也相当头疼吧。
E: People are growing more and more <color=#dbc291ff>distrustful</color> of the management here. It's probably turned into a big headache for Asta too.

C: 能统一下口径吗…
E: Can you get your story straight first...?

C: 今天先到此为止吧，你等我联系。
E: Let's call it a day. Wait for me, I'll be in touch.

C: 出于好奇。逻辑：我做了和你一样的决定：同行，观察。
E: For curiosity's sake. Affirmation: I made the same decision as you. To accompany and observe.

C: 啊，真的吗？
E: Oh? Really?

C: 来这里，看，湛蓝的行星就在我们脚下，它如此充满活力。这甜点也很好吃，分你一半。
E: Come here. Look, the blue planet is directly below us. It is so full of life. This dessert is very delicious. Here, take half.

C: 我不希望让黑塔或艾丝妲介入这件事，所以…我希望你来帮我回收这些「小生命」。
E: I do not wish for Herta or Asta to be involved in this. Therefore... I'm hoping you can assist in recovering these little lifeforms.

C: 这就叫口味上的概念吞并。
E: This is called "conceptual annexation of tastes."

C: 狠心地开启异空间传送装置。
E: Callously activate the teleporter.

C: 见过。
E: Yes.

C: 是我谨小慎微了，习惯使然，抱歉。
E: I was simply being overly cautious. It is a habit of mine. Apologies.

C: 嗯，我答应你，我的助手{M#先生}{F#小姐}。
E: Mm, I promise I will, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Assistant.

C: （阮•梅…熟悉又陌生的名字……）
E: (Ruan Mei... a name that's both new... and familiar.)

C: （月台边有个人，莫非她就是……）
E: (There's someone next to the railway platform. Could she be...?)
(Meow...)

C: 它们同时拥有两种情绪体征：可爱、软弱、敏感、爱哭；凶悍、教唆、霸道、自信。
E: They simultaneously possess two sets of emotional traits. They are at once cute, weak, sentimental, and sensitive... yet are also fierce, instigating, demanding, and confident.

C: 检测到新访客。正在扫描…扫描成功！
E: New visitor detected. Scanning... Scanning complete!

C: 行，我这就出发。
E: Okay, I'll go now then.

C: 根据历史记录，当前区域无危险因素。无需开启远程通讯模式，请在附近区域内搜索目标人物行踪。
E: According to historical records, there are no threats to be found in the current domain. Remote communication mode is not required. Please locate the target's whereabouts within the current domain.

C: 老爸快看，这是之前帮助过我们的{NICKNAME}！
E: Dad, look! It's {NICKNAME} who helped us before!

C: 别这么说，塔米拉小姐才是大明星呢。
E: Don't say that. Miss Tamila is the real star here.

C: 当时发生了什么？我该找谁？
E: What happened back then? Who am I supposed to be looking for?

C: 尤利安哭得口齿不清，你实在听不清他在说什么。
E: Julian is crying so much you can barely make out what he is saying.

C: 这…我不确定。
E: I... I'm not sure about that.

C: 放心，我的配方和材料都是经过严选的，干净又卫生。
E: Fear not. My recipes and ingredients are all carefully selected with cleanliness in mind.

C: 她没问你。
E: She wasn't asking you.

C: 你别乌鸦嘴啊…
E: Stress-free for us, or stress-free for the planet?

C: 姬子！听我说听我说，雅利洛-Ⅵ的大守护者正在筹备一场节日庆典，她还邀请我们一起去感受下庆典的氛围。
E: Himeko! There's a celebration coming up on Jarilo-VI, organized by the Supreme Guardian, and we're invited to go take in the sights and sounds.

C: 只是贡献了一份小小的力量。
E: We may have helped out a little bit.

C: 这些外来者中就包括了一批「星际和平公司」的投资人。但他们在临走前做了一件大事——
E: Among those outsiders were several investors from the Interastral Peace Corporation. Before they departed, they did something noteworthy...

C: 你们俩，是之前在雪原里跟总监聊天的……
E: You two were talking to the director in the Snow Plains...

C: 矿民都聚在那边…这股强烈的既视感是怎么回事？
E: All the miners here huddled together... anyone else getting déjà vu?

C: 不行了，已经一发弹药都不剩了……
E: Darn it! I'm all out of ammo...

C: 托帕在信里的语气，感觉相当真诚啊…{NICKNAME}，你怎么看？
E: Her words do sound quite sincere... What do you make of it, {NICKNAME}?

C: 不愧是列车组的头号人物，真是过人的洞察力！
E: Haha, there's no fooling the Astral Express!

C: 那个…克拉拉觉得，如果还有选择余地的话…未来的路，还是应该由大家自己决定。
E: I... I think if we have a choice for the future, it should be everyone's decision.
I see...

C: 早知道就留几天假了…
E: If I'd known, I'd have saved some of my holiday.

C: 我的有些患者，自从参加了「疑难重症患者互助会」之后便开始拒绝治疗——很难不让人浮想联翩。
E: I've got a few patients who've started refusing treatment since joining the society... It certainly makes you wonder.

C: …少装蒜了，我的眼神不会骗人。
E: ...Don't play dumb. I might be sick but my eyes still work.

C: 该去哪里弄这种「特效药」呢？
E: Where can I go to get this wonder medicine?

C: 你还好吗？我真的不知道…
E: I'm afraid not. Are you okay?

C: 你问我她怎么了？这已经够明显了吧，先是遭遇了医疗事故，然后精神上又受了打击……
E: What's wrong with her? Isn't it obvious? Her family were the victims of improper medical treatment, then she had a nervous breakdown...

C: 推广这种药的人…是恶魔吗？
E: The people selling that stuff are devils.

C: 但你肯定不会坐视不管，对吧？
E: ...But it's impossible to sit on the sidelines, right?

C: 对，你没听错。那批药物存在严重的隐患，相关的供应链已经被「地火」切断了。
E: Correct. That medicine is a wolf in sheep's clothing — Wildfire has cut off the supply chain.

C: <size=36>「阿修」、以及他会放电的机器人搭档「哔•咔•啾」！</size>
E: <size=36>Ash and his electrifying robot partner Beet-Ka-Choo!</size>

C: 至于真正的罪犯，我也怀疑过另有其人，但无论是监控还是其他证据显示，卡波特先生的东西确实只有我一个人碰过。
E: I also suspected someone else, but everything showed that I was the only one who touched Mr. Capote's things.

C: 或许要等上一段时间，不如聊聊天打发打发时间吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: We may have to wait for a while. Why don't we have a chat to kill time, {NICKNAME}.

C: 既然「踏破不世」是一重限制条件，那么按照直觉，「三堂深处」就应该是第二重条件。
E: Since "worn out unearthly" is a condition, then "the three depths" should be the second condition.

C: 有点头绪了。
E: It's all coming together now.

C: 空间站的人会相信我。
E: People in the space station will believe me.

C: 不过…好像什么都没能改变呢。我还是被困在这里…走不出去。
E: But... nothing's changed though. I'm still stuck here... and can't get out.

C: 是啊，但我对这种属性确实没感觉……
E: Maybe, but I'm kinda agnostic about this.

C: （看来这步是错误的…重新开始操作吧。）
E: (This seems to be the wrong way... Needs a restart.)

C: 你应该知道如何解除制动吧？
E: I suppose you know how to release the brakes?

C: {NICKNAME}，我想出一次城，去寻找哥哥留下的研究成果。你愿意和我同去吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, I need to leave the city to recover my brother's research data. Are you willing to come with me?

C: 呵…温度越来越低了呢。但我可不想就这样半途而废。
E: *shivering* Gosh... The temperature keeps getting lower... but we can't give up halfway.

C: 我可以把体温借给你。
E: I can warm you up if you'd like.

C: 我们去查看一下那边的情况吧。我有预感，应该能找到和瓦赫有关的东西……
E: Let's have a look over there. My gut tells me we should find something connected to Vache...

C: 走吧，约好的时间快到了。可不能让老人家等太久。
E: Let's go, my mom will be there soon. Best not to leave old folks waiting!

C: 好得很，你呢？
E: Pretty good. How about you?

C: 对吧？而且还很有成就感。
E: I know, right? And it really gives you a sense of accomplishment.

C: 嗯，我同意，既然我们这趟都已经下来了……
E: *sigh* You're right. Since we're already here...

C: 叔叔阿姨们说，出现故障机器人的地方，大概在这个方位……
E: The grownups said that the spot where the malfunctioning robots appeared is in this direction...

C: 数量比我们找到的多得多…
E: They found way more parts than we did...

C: 这次的情况和之前类似——贝洛伯格博物馆的最后一个展区，历史馆，有一件重要的展品失窃了。说起来，这件展品和你还有些关系。
E: ...I'm afraid there's been another theft. Like the previous cases, a valuable item was stolen from our exhibit — this time in the History-Culture Hall. The item in question has a connection to you.

C: 我的手下…不是，铁卫！赶紧过来把这两个闯入者赶走！
E: Minions— I—I mean, Silvermane Guards! Get rid of these intruders immediately!

C: 我的人生…不会就这么毁了吧？呜……
E: I had my whole life ahead of me... is it all over? *whimper*

C: 然后…艾丽斯小姐，对吗？我听说志愿导览员申请表需要交到你这里……
E: Now then... Miss Eris, right? I heard that volunteer guide applications need to be submitted to you...

C: 想了解一下赫罗瓦夫妇。
E: Tell me more about the Harrowers.

C: 嗨呀，是博物馆！这不是荣誉队员你说的嘛，怎么连你也忘了呀！
E: A museum! Isn't that what you said? How could you forget!

C: 所以，面试到底是什么呀？我不能直接当那个志…志愿者吗？
E: So, what exactly is an interview? Can't I just become that vo—volunteer directly?

C: 欸…谢谢虎…不是，谢谢漆黑的虎克大人！
E: Eh... Thank you, Ho- Sorry — it should be Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!

C: 可以修改「姓名」这栏…
E: You may make changes to the "Name"...

C: 嘿，既然连你都这么说，那我就放心了。
E: Hee-hee, glad to hear that, your words give me confidence.

C: 别擅自把你的想法安在我头上啊？！
E: Don't pin the blame on me!

C: 那个史瓦罗是何方神圣？
E: What's so great about Svarog?

C: 他的行为就像是在说「只要把人都赶走了，就没有冲突了」。
E: His behavior says something about his thinking: "As long as everyone's been driven out, the conflict is over."

C: 没有，她确实身手了得，看得出经受了严格的训练。
E: No, no, she's got skill alright, I can tell she's got training.

C: 「家用寻物仪」？原来「公司」还有这种产品啊……
E: A Home-Use Object Finder? Who knew the IPC made these kinds of products...

C: 不行，这辆车的部件都锈蚀得很严重了。再在旁边找找吧。
E: No good, all the components here are rusted. Let's keep looking.

C: 老爹的宝贝…不会已经被卖掉了吧？
E: Has daddy's treasure been sold already?

C: 我相信桑博是清白的！
E: I'm sure Sampo is innocent!

C: 暂时还死不了。
E: I'll live.

C: 前些日子，我用矿脉探测器发现了一处地髓矿脉，然后把它的情报卖给了矿队工头安东尼娜。
E: *sigh* Well, a few days ago, I found a Geomarrow vein using a vein detector, and I sold this info to Antonia, a supervisor of the mining team.

C: 是我以前在矿坑里捡到的古代遗物，是专门用来探测地髓的非金属矿石，非常稀有，我从未见过有第二个。
E: It's an ancient relic that I found in a mine. People say it's a device that mining teams used for detecting Geomarrow veins long ago. It's very rare — I haven't seen a second one in my life.

C: 虎克老大，我们回去吧。
E: Boss, I think we should go.

C: 这就是你说的「宝藏」？
E: This is what you call "Treasure"?

C: 谢、谢谢…那孩子，还有我兄弟…拜、拜托你们了！
E: Thank you! Please bring them back to safety!

C: 躲在我身后，别出来…！
E: Quick, get behind me!

C: （还是先调查一下这处临时营地吧……）
E: (I'll just investigate this temporary camp for now...)

C: 包在我身上！
E: Leave it to me!

C: 难道…玲宝说的「好地方」，就是这里？
E: Lynxy, are you sure this is the place?

C: 嗯…应该是地髓燃料的激活元件坏掉了。你有备用的吗？
E: Hmm... The Geomarrow fuel activation component probably stopped working. Do you have a spare one?

C: 咦？这个树干里……
E: Huh? What's in this tree trunk...

C: 你想，极地探险专家和机械专家不都是专家嘛。在我看来，你和希露瓦一样厉害哦。
E: I'm serious! Outdoor explorer, mechanic — they're both experts in their field, right? I think you two are awesome.

C: 你老是这样——这次露营也是。从开始到现在，你就一直在揽活。
E: You're always like this. Even on this camping trip, you keep trying to do things.

C: 喔，原来如此……
E: Ah. I see...

C: 好啦好啦。说到底还是因为哥哥姐姐太爱操心，况且{NICKNAME}也救了我们……
E: Alright, alright. It's all because Serval and Gepard are worrywarts. Besides, you did save us...

C: 她在里面干什么？
E: What's she doing in there?

C: 小心周围的怪物。有必要的话，先把这片区域清理干净再说。
E: Watch out for monsters. They like to hide. If you need to, clear the area before you dig for the supplies.

C: 哈！你看，这都十几年了，这上面的牙印居然还在。
E: Ha! Look at this. After over ten years, the teeth marks are still here.

C: 你还当真了吗？虎克其实根本没有这个打算，再说了，玻璃珠子根本值不了钱。
E: ...Uhh, what? Hehehe, did you think I was serious? I wasn't actually planning on selling these marbles — besides, they aren't even worth much.

C: 好像也是哦…那就等<unbreak>50</unbreak>年以后再打开吧！我们先帮尤利安带回去，连着玻璃珠一起交给他。
E: I guess you're right... We should wait <unbreak>50</unbreak> years before opening it! Let's take it back to Julian along with the glass marbles.

C: 在他的消失处散落着私人物品，一个未能寄出的包裹上面清晰地写着：「送往磐岩镇，娜塔莎的诊所收」。
E: His personal belongings are scattered around where he has just disappeared. "To Natasha's Clinic, Boulder Town" was written clearly on the unsent parcel.

C: 老实说吧，是不是你带着小孩子们跑来铆钉镇上的？
E: What about your integrity, huh? You brought the other kids out here to Rivet Town, didn't you?

C: 是、是我漆黑的虎克没错！找我有事吗？
E: Th—That's right! It's me, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great! What do you want?

C: 寒风吹过，银光闪烁，难以强撑的意识渐弱
E: Howl of the wind, silvery light, hold on to sanity keep up the fight

C: 回答错误。认证结果——失败。
E: Incorrect answer. Certification result: Failure.

C: 准备清除威胁，战斗模组启动。
E: Threat elimination activated. Initializing combat module.

C: 录音调取结束。继续执行克拉拉的命令。
E: Recording recovery complete. Resuming execution of Clara's commands.

C: …这些铁皮罐头不都一个模样吗，你怎么认出来的？
E: ...These can openers all look the same. How can you tell them apart?

C: 检测到外来人员。是否放行？
E: Outsiders detected. Do you wish to permit access?

C: 当然，这点你我都心知肚明。所以，我想让我最信赖的人和你们同去。
E: Of course, there's no doubt about that. So, I'll be sending someone I trust to go with you.

C: 开个玩笑～桑博永远乐意为你效劳。
E: Hahaha~ you see? Gotcha! Hah, seriously though — Sampo will always be happy to assist you.

C: 那可多了——比如奥列格首领用过的拳套，还有菲多拉小姐制造的家居机器人……
E: Oh plenty! Gloves used by Chief Oleg, the domestic robot that Miss Fidora built...

C: 这玩偶其实还挺值钱的。
E: Actually, this bear is worth quite a lot of money.

C: 其实我们是那个玩偶的卖家。
E: We are, in fact, the bear's sellers.

C: 是我们打倒了那台坏机器人，帮你把「胡同」抢回来了！
E: We defeated the evil robot and got your "contact" back!

C: 哟，还真有人来见义勇为了。大哥，我看{F#她们}{M#他们}像是有钱人，抢{F#她们}{M#他们}吧！
E: Huh, looks like someone's trying to be a hero. Boss, they look rich. We should rob them, too!

C: （多一事不如少一事）
E: (We should avoid unnecessary conflict.)

C: 奶奶，拍卖会上有一个大熊玩偶，我们能买下来吗？
E: Can we buy the teddy bear at the auction, grandma?

C: 嘿，我可没说，但你这么理解也没毛病。
E: Well, I didn't say that, but you could certainly interpret it that way.

C: 老爹和虎克的生日会就快开始了，快帮虎克包装一下礼物吧！虎克想给老爹一个惊喜！
E: Mine and daddy's birthday party is starting soon! Can you help me wrap up this gift! I wanna surprise daddy!

C: 嘿嘿，这是我和{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}在拍卖会上买下的探针！竞价用的钱就是卖掉「菌菌」才拿到的哦！
E: Hehe, {NICKNAME} helped me to bid for it at the auction! I bought it with the money I got from selling Junjun!

C: 您还好吗，叔叔？听说您昨晚撞见了那个零件小偷…可以跟我们说说昨天夜里发生的事吗？
E: Sir, how are you? I heard you saw the thief who stole the parts last night. Can you tell us what happened?

C: 可假如它是宠物的话…为什么要自己收集零件呢？
E: But if it's a pet... then why would it gather parts itself?

C: （之后再来找克拉拉吧。）
E: (I should come back to Clara later.)

C: 其实，我们要做的事情和之前一样——找到新的外壳，把帕斯卡的核心安装进去，看看硬件是否兼容。
E: Let's begin by doing exactly what we did before. Find a new shell, put Pascal's core in it, and see if the hardware is compatible.

C: 嘿咻、嘿咻……
E: Argh...

C: 原来如此…克拉拉还想知道，在史瓦罗先生的机械网络中，有发生过类似的事件吗？
E: I see... Has Mr. Svarog ever witnessed a similar incident anywhere in the network?

C: …克拉拉明白，做错事就要受到惩罚。可是…我觉得帕斯卡值得一个改正的机会。
E: I understand that crimes should be punished, but I think Pascal deserves another chance.

C: 克拉拉不敢想象…不知道被遗忘了很多次之后，自己还能以什么样的情感面对帕斯卡……
E: I can't imagine it... How will I feel when I have to face Pascal after being forgotten so many times?

C: 就按史瓦罗说的做吧。
E: Let's just do what Mr. Svarog suggested.

C: 没有，帕斯卡！克拉拉，说，错误，偷窃！
E: No, Pascal! Clara, say, wrong, stealing!

C: 见鬼，我都两天没洗澡了——我身上有味道吗？
E: ...You gotta be kidding me, I haven't showered in two days... do I smell?

C: 情商终于上线了？
E: Is this a brainwave? This feels like a brainwave.

C: 想继续向北方进发，要穿过一整片完全被侵蚀的裂界，才能到达另一头的雪原。
E: If you want to advance further northward, you must traverse an area entirely corroded by the Fragmentum. It's the only way to get to the Snow Plains on the other side.

C: 他们…我联系过了，不管我怎么说，他们都只说是技术部验收结果不牢靠，和他们没半点关系。意思是让我们自己想办法处理……
E: Well... I've contacted them but no matter what I say, they just blame it on the Technology Division, saying that they're unreliable and the Garrison had nothing to do with it. Which means we have to deal with it ourselves...

C: 你是来回收它的？我们已经把「核心模组」拆下来了，你们好好研究一下哪儿出问题了吧。以后可别再出现这种事故了，怪吓人的……
E: Are you here to retrieve it? We have already removed the Core Module. Please look into this matter and don't let this happen again! It was so scary...

C: 嗯…情况我都了解了，和我推理的结果基本一致——既然那位茉莉小姐和你都参与到了这次事件里，那一切都说得通了。
E: Ah... I understand now. It is more or less as I surmised... Since Miss Molly and you are involved in this incident, then everything makes sense now.

C: 我欣赏你的勇气和责任感…但你缺少对当前状况作出准确评估的能力，还经常把自己置于险境。
E: I do admire your bravery and sense of duty... but you're still lacking in situational judgment and thus often end up putting yourself in harm's way.

C: （保持沉默，继续聆听。）
E: (Stay silent and keep listening.)

C: 谢谢你，陌生人。
E: Thank you, stranger.

C: …别无他法，唯有置之死地而后生。
E: ...There's no other way. Desperate times call for desperate measures.

C: 可可…利亚…威胁…渐进……
E: Danger... approaches...

C: 我们是由普通人选出的守护者，母亲！我们的职责是「存护」由人类建立的世界！我们不是神明，不是裁判！
E: We are guardians, mother! Chosen from among the masses! Our duty is to preserve the world built by humanity! We are not gods! We are not arbiters!

C: 过去的七百年，裂界每分每秒都在持续扩张。我们留给接替者的…没有信念或财富，唯有漫无边际的绝望。
E: The Fragmentum had been expanding for the past <unbreak>700</unbreak> years. There is no faith nor wealth left for our successors... only despair.

C: 你为何在此徘徊？
E: Why do you linger around here?

C: 呵呵，这就是我们「开拓」的意义所在了。
E: Hehe. That's where our Trailblaze comes in.

C: …真是个不屈不挠的人。这次调查任务可真是难为{NICKNAME}你了。
E: ...You're truly the very definition of indomitable. This investigation must've been quite the chore for you, {NICKNAME}.

C: （去找艾丝妲问问好了……）
E: (I'll just go and ask Asta about it...)

C: 我需要你找到受伤乘客后联系亲属，协助丹鼎司医者完成医疗转运。
E: I need you to look for injured passengers, contact their families, and help the Healers from the Alchemy Commission with the medevac.

C: 她有时连最基础的口齿清楚都做不到，一句话通常要重复好几遍才能给她说明白。被星槎追尾了，她自己一个人糊里糊涂地肯定搞不定赔偿的事情。
E: Sometimes she can't even communicate on a basic level, and I would have to repeat the same sentence a few times before she understood it. Being the way she is, she won't be able to handle the compensation on her own after getting into an accident like this.

C: 你这是什么态度嘛，本来就是一个超速星槎，人家也不会停下来等我看清楚了再走啊。
E: What kind of attitude is that? It was a speeding starskiff. It's not like it'd slow down and wait for me to see it before driving away.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>它朝右边拐过去了！</color>我记得很清楚。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>It made a right turn there!</color> I remember that very clearly.

C: 放心，我们不会索要赔偿的。
E: Don't worry. We won't ask for compensation for you.

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}…好吧，听你的。
E: {F#Young lass}{M#Young fella}... Okay, I will do what you want me to do.

C: 事故是怎么发生的呢？
E: How did the collision happen?

C: 没想到你还有点儿眼力价嘛，你要是想在它面前拍张照也是可以的。
E: You do have some taste. If you want to take a photo with my starskiff, that's fine.

C: …哎，你说的没错，她就像是家人一样，我才会这样理所当然。
E: You're right. She's like family. That's why I took her for granted.

C: 怪我多嘴，您也会有觉得家人的关怀是理所当然的时候，可别像我一样习以为常。
E: Forgive me if I'm being nosy. But whenever you feel that being taken care of by a dear family member is a given, please don't take it for granted like I did.

C: 胡闹！到了这儿自会有医士为你看诊的，你想自个照着医书胡来可不行。
E: How preposterous! Since you're already here, a healer will attend to you sooner or later. You can't treat yourself with a medical textbook.

C: 只听过「瓮中捉鳖」的，倒没听说过瓮中捉「书」，但这种稀奇事儿竟被你碰上了！
E: People talk about shooting fish in a barrel, but never about getting books out of one. You're lucky to encounter such a rare occurrence!

C: 听说你又在找朋友了？
E: I heard you're looking for friends again?

C: 这好像跟我没有什么关系…
E: This really doesn't have anything to do with me...

C: 为什么想要一朵蘑菇回家？
E: Why would he want a mushroom to go back home?

C: 哀哉哀哉，未经战场金铁交鸣的洗礼，老夫创制的句子实不敢妄称「边塞诗」。这「灵感玉兆」没有价值啦！老夫要把它毁掉！
E: Alas, without being baptized in the flames and steel of war, I daren't call any poetry I write true "borderland poems." This Inspo Jade Abacus of mine is worthless! I shall destroy it!

C: 条件：「边塞诗」需要体验「战斗」。输出结果：你们打一架呗。
E: Condition: [Borderland Poet] needs to experience [Combat]. Output Result: You two fight each other.

C: 此去一别，恐再无相会之日。届时我身归尘，还劳您远渡我故里，将骨灰带回仙舟，登临高处，洒将出去。
E: Let us say our goodbyes, then, for I fear we ne'er shall meet again. When the time comes, I'll return to the dust, whence I'll task you with a traveling quest. Please bring my ashes back to the Xianzhou, and spread far and yonder wherever you may go.

C: 我在拍「感人的离别情景」。
E: I'm taking pictures of emotional parting scenes.

C: 走吧，我们去找小聪主人。
E: Let's go and find Master Cong.

C: 如果我猜的没错……
E: If my guess is right...

C: 去玲珑斋买最新的玉兆。
E: Go to the Iridescent Parlor to buy the latest jade abacus model.

C: …我有一种不祥的预感。
E: ...I have a bad feeling about this.

C: 给我说点好听的。
E: Don't jinx it.

C: 你怎么又变回蘑菇了？
E: Why are you a mushroom again?

C: 按公司货运的双倍…不，三倍价格！还有，小姐姐们的<color=#dbc291ff>会员邀请链接</color>，没人能拒绝这样的条件吧！
E: I'll pay you double— no, triple the amount the delivery service company charges! I'll also share with you the lady's <color=#dbc291ff>membership invitation link</color>, you won't refuse this, will you?

C: 进展这么快！温符瑞让你把礼物带到仙舟，寄给狐仙小姐姐…这么说来，只要顺着这条线，就能直接找到对方了。
E: What rapid development! Wen Furui asked you to bring gifts to Xianzhou and deliver them to the foxian beauty... That means, as long as we keep up with this, we'll be able to find the person directly.

C: 尘寰相见，好礼相送。
E: Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond.

C: 您知道「美丽狐仙聊天」吗？
E: Do you know about the Foxian Beauty Chat service?

C: 也许她没有告诉经纪人。
E: Maybe she didn't tell her manager.

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 那好啊，我就把你带到地衡司去，看看你到底是不是经纪人！
E: Is that so? How about I take you to the Realm-Keeping Commission and let them decide whether you're really Ms. Daiqing's manager?

C: 你可真是残忍。
E: That's pretty brutal of you.

C: 啊，当然了，你可以想想再答复我。这一回我不打算再说什么优厚的报酬之类的屁话，我明白，开出这市侩的条件就是在侮辱一个无名客。
E: Of course, you can take some time to think it over. This time, I won't promise you a handsome pay, as I understand the offer is humiliating to a Nameless.

C: 我收下照片时，学会的处理程序自动进行了辨识，竟然能有这样意外的收获，哈哈。
E: It was automatically detected by the processing program of the Guild when I received the pictures. What an unexpected and pleasant surprise, haha.

C: 谢啦，{NICKNAME}…真是辛苦你了。
E: Thanks, {NICKNAME}... I owe you a big one.

C: 如果你后悔了，随时可以联系我，我的提议永远有效。
E: If you ever change your mind, come find me any time. My proposal stands in perpetuity.

C: 关于「龙女大人」的事？
E: It's about the Dragon Lady?

C: 那…我能做什么？
E: Then... is there really anything I can do?

C: 我看你就是在包庇那个女人，看来你知道的不少，我得好好问问。
E: You're covering for that woman — it's obvious. I'm not done questioning you...

C: 如果你真心想帮我做点什么的话……
E: If you really are sincere about helping me with something...

C: 哦不对，应该是……
E: Oh, no it should be...

C: 这家伙准备躲哪儿去呢？又打算怎么离开仙舟呢？<color=#dbc291ff>等着瞧，也许用不了一日，他又该来求我帮忙了</color>吧？
E: Where is this guy planning to hide, and how does he intend to leave the Xianzhou? <color=#dbc291ff>Let's wait and see — he might come asking for my help again in less than a day.</color>

C: 出了我这样的叛徒，想必他们也坐不住了。
E: I'm a traitor to them... They won't stand idly by if they lay eyes on me.

C: 呸呸呸！补你个大头鬼！你个欠收拾的药罐子，看本小姐我一尾巴抽到你爹妈认不出来！
E: Blah, blah, blah — I've heard enough out of you already! If it's a beating you want, allow me to do the honors!

C: 小小丫头，我一会儿再收拾你。来人，先把这个叛徒拿下，一定要从她身上把名单搜出来。
E: I'll deal with you in a moment, little girl. Men! Take the traitor and make sure you get the list from her.

C: 此处不安全，汝等最好立刻离开。
E: This place isn't secure. You should leave immediately.

C: …没错。
E: ...Affirmative.

C: 怪、怪物——
E: M—Monster...!

C: 列车…是什么？
E: Express... What's that?

C: 当然！自从白露小姐继任，非议之声不绝。但丹鼎司深信那孩子是块了不得的璞玉，慈悲好生，远胜丹枫百倍。
E: Certainly! Miss Bailu has weathered nothing but criticism since she was granted the title, but the Alchemy Commission firmly believes that girl to be a precious diamond in the rough. She is compassionate, kind, and a hundred times better than Dan Feng.

C: 看起来，这家伙就像擅自变更医方的庸医，这下可好，害苦了自己，也害苦了别人。
E: So in medical terms — he messed up the prescription... and brought suffering down on himself and just about everyone else in the process.

C: 族内审判？
E: Trial?

C: 各位，我没来晚吧！
E: Ah! Am I too late!?

C: 赐予人长生。
E: Give people immortality.

C: 当时罗刹都做了什么？
E: What did Luocha do, exactly?

C: 天啊！原来是这样！
E: Eureka! That solves everything!

C: 要是骗我们，我们会回来找你算账的！
E: If you lie to us, we'll be back!

C: 你们的那段录像，我有些印象。那天书肆打烊之后，我想找个地方去安安静静地读书，就在街上转了几圈。
E: That footage... I remember that day. After I closed up the store, I walked around for a while. I was looking for a place to read.

C: 罗刹撕书是给同伙的接头暗号。
E: Maybe the page will mean something to his accomplices.

C: 哎…毕竟还是我擅离职守导致的。
E: *sigh* At the end of the day, this wouldn't have happened if I'd stayed at my post.

C: 真难缠，这仙舟罗浮哪来这么多敌人？
E: Ugh, what are all these enemies doing on the Luofu!?

C: （…三月，你想剧情的时候我们可以等，不是非得安排战斗不可。）
E: (...March, you don't have to add in combat scenes while you're figuring out where to take the story — we can wait.)

C: 但从刚才的战斗能看得出来，驭空是个经验老到的战士。她弯弓的时机，目标的选择，全都无可挑剔。
E: ...but based on that fight, Yukong is clearly an experienced soldier. The moments she chose to strike and the targets she attacked were all impeccably strategic.

C: 你不该那么和母亲讲话。
E: You shouldn't have talked like that to your mother.

C: 可以想象。父母总是孩子最初的英雄，而英雄的形象往往会影响孩子的一生。
E: I can imagine. A parent is often a child's first hero, and their image can influence their whole life.

C: 小时候我有样学样偷开星槎，实验各种极限操作…事实证明我的确像她一样有天赋，因为我不但活了下来，还停得很稳。
E: I used to watch her fly when I was young... then one time, I stole a starskiff and I tried all kinds of difficult maneuvers. Turns out I was as talented as she was. Not only did I survive the flight, my landing was perfect.

C: 不如先去问问景元将军吧。神策府将军公务繁忙，我们未必见得到他，但有试一试的价值。驭空司舵是他一手提拔上来的，那些往事他大概比谁都清楚。
E: I think we should try General Jing Yuan first. He's been busy at the Seat of Divine Foresight recently — we might not get to see him right away. Still, it's worth a try — he was the one who promoted Helm Master Yukong — he probably knows more about her past than anyone.

C: 这样的问题，只有当事人亲口回答才有意义。
E: Yukong herself is best placed to answer such questions...

C: 没关系…这毕竟是对你而言相当重要的事……
E: You're welcome... I know this is important to you...

C: 我知道，接下来你们肯定要去翻驭空大人的办公桌了。
E: ...I suppose you're going to go through Madam Yukong's office desk next?

C: 你可千万别跟你妈提起今天见过我！
E: Please, don't tell your mother that you saw me today!

C: 但我不会因此而退缩，我并不害怕自己和她走上同样的道路…如果牺牲能换来仙舟上黎民苍生的幸福，那我甘愿慨然赴死！
E: ...but I won't hide from it — I'm not afraid to walk the same road as her. If my sacrifice can bring happiness to the citizens of the Xianzhou, then I'm ready for it!

C: 嗯…这就不了吧。我不会再飞了。
E: Hehe, I... I'm afraid I can't. I won't be flying anymore.

C: 晴霓站在母亲身边，静静地凝望着那个让她满怀热情的地方。
E: Qingni stands beside her mother and quietly gazes at the place that fills her with so much passion.

C: （应该叫上白露一起打开这个包裹。）
E: (I should open it with Bailu.)

C: 我吗？我会建议你去一趟。就算你不愿意再和她有什么来往，也最好当面和她说清楚…看这段信息，她也许真的很需要你的帮助。
E: Me? I'd suggest you go yourself. Even if you don't want any more dealings with her, it's best to say that to her in person... Reading this message, it seems like she may really need your help.

C: 好吧，那样的话，你就保留这一份选择好了——{NICKNAME}，你会留下来吗？为了我。
E: Well, in that case, how about this choice... {NICKNAME}, will you stay here? For me?

C: 我知道你会回心转意的。谢谢。在这仙舟上…我能拜托的只有你了。
E: I knew you'd come around. On the Xianzhou... you're the only person I can turn to for help.

C: 我留下来帮你。
E: I'll stay and help you.

C: （这个问题该怎么回答呢？如果说了真话，下一次就必须说谎，反之亦然；不过，我也可以作弊…真的可以吗？）
E: (How should I answer? If I tell the truth, I have to lie the next time, and vice versa. Or I could just cheat... Is that really an option?)

C: 这是我拼凑出来的情报，具体的阿刃不肯说。
E: That's the information I managed to piece together. Bladie refused to tell me the details.

C: （「卡芙卡」的事情）
E: (Ask about Kafka)

C: {NICKNAME}，打败这个小弟弟，你的任务就结束了。
E: {NICKNAME}, defeat this little boy and your mission is over.

C: 以往接触到的世界都被星核侵蚀了很长时间，空间站和这里是为数不多刚刚遭受侵蚀的地点，侵蚀初期的信息还很不足够……
E: The Stellaron-affected worlds we've come into contact with so far were all subjected to prolonged corrosion. In contrast, much like here, the space station had only just begun to be affected when we arrived. It's still the case that not much is known about early-stage corrosion...

C: …前…前面…
E: ...Up... Up ahead...

C: 方才你们提及「星核」……
E: You mentioned the Stellaron...

C: 大家小心，做好准备。
E: Get ready, and watch your backs.

C: 看来是一封邀请函…会是谁寄出的呢？丹恒乘客在罗浮仙舟上还有朋友吗？没记错的话，他说过自己被永久放逐了帕？
E: It looks like an invitation... Hmm... Who could have sent it? Does Dan Heng have any friends on the Luofu? If Pom-Pom remembers correctly, he said he was exiled from there, right?

C: 而饮月，你要和我同去，不可以拒绝。无论你对自己的前世是否在意，收下我的信，便是答应了我的邀约。
E: Imbibitor Lunae, you must accompany me — I won't take no for an answer. Regardless of whether you're still interested in your previous life, accepting my letter means that you've accepted my invitation.

C: 气死我了！四条腿撒的飞快…别让它逃了！
E: Argh, that thing runs so fast! Don't let it get away!

C: 你平时也这么健谈吗？
E: Are you always this talkative?

C: 「长生主只给了我族深不可测的力量，但却在你们体内播撒神木的种子，当真不公平啊……」
E: "The Master of Immortality only granted us power, but cultivated the seed of the sacred tree in you. How unfair..."

C: （以下章节需付费阅读）
E: (The following chapter requires payment to read)

C: 您客气了。
E: All in a day's work.

C: 渴望。
E: Yes, I do.

C: 没办法，规矩也不是我定的。如果不肯完成试炼，那我们也只能委屈二位永远保守秘密了……
E: There is nothing that can be done. I didn't write the rules. If you are unwilling to complete the initiation process, then we will have to ask that you keep our secrets hidden... permanently...

C: 我…我也准备好了……
E: I... I'm ready...

C: 持明一世能有个六七百年，日子到了就要去鳞渊境重入轮回。对我们来说只是生命的又一个新阶段罢了。
E: As a Vidyadhara, one's lifespan typically spans six or seven hundred years. At the end of that span, there comes a day when we journey to Scalegorge Waterscape and embark on a new phase through self-reincarnation. It marks a significant moment in our eternal life cycle.

C: 顺利截获了。
E: I've intercepted it.

C: 任何妄图忤逆本能的行为，都是可笑可耻可悲的…虽然你仍未找到自己应走的道路，但你已经选择了正确的方向。这很好。
E: Any act that runs counter to that instinct is lamentable, shameful, and futile... You may not have found the path yet, but you've already chosen the right direction. Very good.

C: 刚刚云骑报告说在现场发现了执信的时候，我还抱有一线幻想……也许是他和你合力抗敌，他力战不支之类的情况……
E: The Cloud Knight you encountered only just finished reporting back to me — he mentioned discovering Zhixin at the scene. I was hoping that maybe — just maybe Zhixin had attempted to join forces with you against the enemy — that he'd fought with all his might...

C: 我们的丹士长，丹枢大人。
E: ...The chief alchemist, Lady Dan Shu.

C: 判官大人行动时，没有人接应吗？
E: So are judges all loners? You don't seem to have any backup.

C: 不成！阿财，你自个儿逃命去吧。云骑久久不来，为今之计，也只有老夫力~挽~狂~澜~！
E: Not a chance! Acai, escape while you still can — there's no hope of the Cloud Knights arriving now. As darkness falleth think not what is just, to this old man entrust your hopes... you must!

C: 这个人的坐标不是由空间站发出的……
E: Weren't their coordinates sent out from the space station...?

C: 谁、谁说的？咳，我可没说做不到。做不到与「未必」之间，有百万光年的差距。
E: Wh—Who said that? I didn't say it was impossible, I said it was "viable in principle." There is a gap of a million light-years between impossibility and viability.

C: 地髓矿石…
E: Geomarrow ore...

C: 我理解。梦境本就是十人十色，注定不会适合所有人。
E: I understand. The dreamscape is inherently different for everyone, so inevitably there are some people who it won't suit.

C: 我是小鸟胃，吃不了多少。
E: I don't eat much.

C: 你说错了，我非常遵守规则。
E: Oh, you're mistaken. I always follow the rules.

C: …那你这人还怪好嘞。
E: ...You have a kind soul.

C: {NICKNAME}，我欠你一个解释…不过，这儿不是说话的地方，咱们得换个去处。我得提前声明，我可没有消气，这…这只能算是中场休息。
E: Look, {NICKNAME}, I owe you an explanation... but this isn't the best place to talk. We need to find somewhere else. Let me be clear though, I'm still pretty riled up. This... this is just a temporary break.

C: 云璃虽然立誓要「搜猎魔剑，尽数断绝」。想完成这个誓言，所付出的代价绝不轻松——仅是跋涉星海寻剑，就无异于海底捞针。
E: Despite her vow to hunt down and wipe out all cursed swords, fulfilling that vow requires immense effort. Traversing the starry seas in search of the swords is like finding a needle in a haystack.

C: 云璃打算明天和你聊聊…
E: Yunli plans to talk to you tomorrow...

C: 云璃就多拜托你照顾了。
E: Please take good care of Yunli.

C: 剑匣外壳
E: Sword Case Exterior

C: 欢迎回家，云骑士。
E: Welcome home, Cloud Knight.

C: 已经…联系不上云骑主力了。
E: It's already... impossible to contact the main Cloud Knight forces.

C: 剑匣打一开始就没锁上。
E: It means the case was never locked in the first place.

C: （不做解释）
E: (Offer no explanation.)

C: 该把我的「面具」还给我了吧？
E: Shouldn't you give my mask back to me now?

C: 不过啊，桑博…时隔这么久，你怎么突然想起拿回面具了？这不像我认识的你呀……
E: But Sampo... After all this time, what made you suddenly want to take back your mask? This doesn't seem like the Sampo I know...

C: 请黑天鹅大人开始调查吧！案发现场留下了许多线索，一定能帮助您锁定真凶。
E: Please begin your investigation, Lady Black Swan! There are lots of clues at the crime scene that are sure to help you apprehend the real culprit.

C: 不必了。
E: That won't be necessary.

C: 嗯？这证据好像没法证明他是凶手吧……
E: Hmm? This evidence doesn't really prove that he is the murderer...

C: 没什么事。
E: Nothing.

C: 那个未来是什么？
E: What is this future you're talking about?

C: …知道吗，{NICKNAME}，即使「星神」，也是可以被杀死的。
E: ...You know, {NICKNAME}, even Aeons can be killed.

C: 不死不灭的造物，一旦放任它开枝散叶，会让整个世界的生态系统彻底崩溃——
E: If immortal creations were left to spread their branches and roots throughout the universe, entire ecosystems would collapse...

C: 可惜呀，这木精一作乱，连工造司都不得不暂时封闭了。
E: *sigh* The Artisanship Commission had no choice but to halt operations once the tree demon appeared.

C: 公输师傅手忙脚乱地架好了仪器设备
E: Master Gongshu sets up the equipment hastily

C: 许多远跨群星来到仙舟的人要么心事重重，要么疲惫不堪。你的步伐却坚实有力，不愧是无名客。
E: Many who undertake the far-reaching journey to the Xianzhou are weighed down by a heavy heart and exhaustion... but your steps are bold and steady - a stride worthy of a Nameless.

C: 不必客气，你为罗浮…为仙舟做了很多事，身为策士长，这是我应有的答谢。
E: Please, take them. You've done so much for the Luofu... for the Xianzhou. This is the least I could do.

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: 我是反物质军团。
E: I am the Antimatter Legion.

C: 我…没事。是我自己不好，本不该到处乱跑的…结果撞上那几个家伙。
E: I'm... okay... it's my fault. I shouldn't have wandered off on my own... then I wouldn't have run into those guys.

C: （头突然好疼…怎么回事……）
E: (Wait a minute... Argh, my head... What's happening?)

C: 我知道。
E: Yes, I am aware.

C: {NICKNAME}，没想到你会来找我。
E: {NICKNAME}, I didn't expect you to come looking for me.

C: 请你相信在下，在下从没想过要加害于你。我很欣赏你，只是想把长生与自由的机会留给你。
E: Please believe me when I say that never once have I thought about harming you... I merely wanted to offer you the chance to obtain immortality and freedom.

C: 这些家伙潜伏良久，如今终于露出真面目，一定是为了某些更可怕的计划。我得加快搜捕的步伐。
E: These people have been in hiding for so long — they must have a more nefarious plan. I've got to apprehend them quickly.

C: 你…您能帮我调查法乌努斯红毛羊失踪的真相？哎哟，怪不得，我见您第一面就觉得您面慈心善！
E: You... Could you help me find out the truth behind the disappearance of the Faunus Red Sheep? I knew you were a kind soul the first time I met you!

C: 您所做的这种事不仅会让放生者伤心，恐怕也会触怒那位好生仁慈的星神啊。
E: Your actions earlier not only broke the heart of the Unshackled member, but may have also enraged that merciful Aeon.

C: 这名字也太不整齐了…
E: Their names are all over the place...

C: 你们打一架吧，我当裁判。
E: Why not decide the winner through a fight? I'll be the referee.

C: 如果是这种地方存在机械生物，多半会有技术衰退的困扰。这样的无机生物确实算得上是「凶猛且濒危」了！
E: If mechanical lifeforms were present on such locations, most of them will be troubled with technological regression. In that scenario, they can be counted as ferocious and endangered!

C: 你这个想法非常好啊，不过还有一个小问题——这玩意儿不是植物啊！
E: Your idea is promising, but there's a problem — this thing isn't a plant!

C: 好啊。虽然眼下来贝洛伯格的商船渐渐多了起来，但毕竟这儿还是真正意义上的「穷乡僻壤」。希望两位往后也能常来这儿转转。
E: Sure. Although there have been more merchant ships in Belobog recently, this city is still rather quiet and desolate. Please drop by whenever you have the chance.

C: 所以，它是植物？无法接受…这不是植物。绝对，不是！至少它得长得像一株植物吧！
E: So, it's a plant? This is unacceptable... It can't be a plant. Absolutely not! It has to at least look like one!

C: 那我们的「入会试炼」算是……
E: So, how did we do in this newcomer trial...

C: 他们之间有那么大的分歧，现在却同意放生同一种生物，这种和谐的大团圆结局，难道不值得我们笑一笑吗？
E: They have worked out their differences and agreed to release the same living thing! Isn't this kind of happy ending worth our laughter?

C: 可是，这也是经过了几位一致同意啊？
E: But all three of you approved of our idea.

C: 哎…伤员躺好，别激动别激动……
E: Alas... Why don't you lie down and stay calm...

C: 啊啊啊啊——
E: Aaaah—

C: 呃，这都是模仿罗浮网络上当红主播们的视频标题…我听人说这样能吸引眼球。
E: Uhh, that was me copying video titles from the hottest streamers on the Luofu... I heard they help attract more viewers.

C: 说起来，{F#小姐}{M#小哥}你有没有时间？要不要，一起去探探绥园，就咱俩？我保证这次一定能挖出其中的真相。
E: Actually, do you have some free time? Do you wanna explore Fyxestroll Garden together, just the two of us? I guarantee you we're gonna reveal the truth this time.

C: 我们有来过这儿吗？
E: Perhaps we were never here?

C: 说了好几遍老子不是幽灵，再啰嗦就把你们都吃了！
E: I told you, I'm not a ghost! If I have to repeat myself again I'll be eating every one of you!

C: （默默离开）
E: (Leave quietly)

C: 绥园被一股不知来源的力量吞没了…务必小心！
E: Fyxestroll Garden has been enveloped by an unknown power... You must be careful!

C: 呵呵，我与恚炎同为关在洪炉中的狱友，彼此知根知底。它力量虽强，但心思却比孩子还幼稚，一味执着于「胜负」。我只需要三句话，管教它不攻自破。
E: Hehe, me and Furynox were "furnacemates..." I know them well. They are powerful, but as naive as a child and obsessed with victory. I only need to say three things to incite them.

C: 瞧瞧，轻松搞定。
E: See? Easy-peasy.

C: 藿藿，虽是机巧身躯，吾心里也曾闪过一丝畏惧。
E: Huohuo, though I am of ingenium body, I too am feeling a sliver of fear.

C: 哎呀，这里有好多铜镜，难道说……
E: Hmm, so many bronze mirrors. Could it be that...

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 先把「特调」喝了吧。
E: You should drink the special drink first.

C: 嗯，不能丢下柯柯娜。
E: Yes, we can't leave Cocona alone.

C: 我也没有什么雄心壮志，不奢望能成为什么金融精英，只希望能去「烫金的时刻」找一份体面的工作，舒舒服服过完这一生就好啦。
E: I've no grand ambition, no desire to become some financial elite — I only hope to get a decent job at the Gilded Hour and live out a comfy life.

C: …好好选，千万别让我们失望。
E: ...Choose carefully. Do not disappoint us.

C: 你只能进奢侈品商店工作。
E: Your only choice is to work at the luxury goods store.

C: 可我没有错……
E: But I'm not in the wrong...

C: 在黑暗和阴冷中生活的柯柯娜…曾经也拥有过一束暖光。
E: Cocona, who lived in cold darkness... used to possess a single ray of light.

C: 冰冷和疼痛让你几乎感觉不到自己的手——但你还是握得更紧了一些。
E: You lose almost all the feeling in your hand from the cold and pain, but you still hang on even more tightly.

C: 他的双眼空洞无光，仿佛被身后的城市吸走了魂魄。
E: His eyes are hollow, like his soul has long been robbed by the city behind him.

C: 「那些未完成的画，仍在流淌的歌」
E: "Those unfinished paintings and the songs that are still playing."

C: 形容一下感觉，我来帮你。
E: Describe how you feel to me. Let me help you.

C: 说吧，我不会告诉别人的。
E: Tell me, I will not tell anyone.

C: 这里就是，我的……
E: This is, this is my...

C: 芙洛拉——你知道吧？这次巡游结束以后，我就要换经纪公司了。
E: Flora... You know, don't you? After this tour, I will be switching agencies.

C: 冷芯将你带至船长室，示意你看向空白的墙壁。
E: Caldwick takes you to the captain's cabin, signaling you to look at the blank wall.

C: 哎，这可不行，尾翼多脏啊，航行时万一遇到点事儿，还会破损开裂，涂装用您的模样，不吉利啊。
E: Ah, that's a big no-no. The empennage is filthy, and if an accident happens during flying, it'll be split open and ruin your image. That's bad luck!

C: 现在这里我说了算——
E: I'm in charge of things around here now...

C: 算了，你上去吧。
E: Forget it. Go on up.

C: 啊…既然是商业伙伴，那不如留一张照片当做纪念吧？就把它当作集团代表之间的一次…非正式的会晤？
E: Ah... Since we're business partners then, why don't we snap a souvenir photo? Just think of it as... an informal gathering between group reps?

C: 这是对高个子的歧视！
E: This is discrimination against tall people!

C: …抱歉{F#女士}{M#先生}，似乎有同事找我…请您稍等片刻。
E: ...I'm sorry, {F#madam}{M#sir}. I think my coworkers are looking for me... Can you please hold on a sec.

C: 但愿我们一起埋下的种子能挺过浪潮的冲刷，{NICKNAME}。希望在宴会散去以后，大家都能带着微笑醒来……
E: I hope the seeds we planted together can withstand the erosion of the tide, {NICKNAME}. My wish is that everyone will wake up with smiles after the banquet ends...

C: 不许废话，跟着矲主念！
E: Enough nonsense! Just repeat after the master!

C: 你、你居然也是帝垣琼玉牌手？！可惜现在就只有我们两个，等找到机会，我们一定要凑齐一桌打牌！
E: Y—You're a Celestial Jade player too!? It's a shame there are only two of us here. Let's get two more players to play with us next time!

C: 说不定他们藏了什么秘密武器。
E: Perhaps they are concealing some secret weapons.

C: 青雀——这是波提欧和银枝。
E: Qingque, this is Boothill and Argenti.

C: 于是我提议，列车组的送别就留在最后吧！咱们先和彦卿一起送别远道而来的客人！
E: That's why I suggested that we save the Crew's farewell until the very end! Let's go and see off our guests from afar on their way with Yanqing.

C: 不会是「仙人快乐茶」吧？
E: It's not Immortal's Delight, is it?

C: …不过最近联盟风波未定，还有很多事要做好准备，交手之日可能会隔上很久。
E: ...Although, the recent alliance turmoil is yet to settle and there are lots of preparations to take care of. I imagine we will have to wait some time for our battle.

C: 丹恒说他们已经在港口上等待着了，估计就在这附近吧？
E: Dan Heng said that they were waiting in the port. I imagine they must be nearby?

C: 嗯。
E: Yeah.

C: 怀炎将军，云璃妹妹一路上小心。也请二位替我向炎庭君问好，灵砂在罗浮仙舟绝不会浪费朱明所学所闻。
E: Safe journeys, General Huaiyan and Miss Yunli. I hope that you shall send my regards to Ardens Regia. I will not let all that I learned on the Xianzhou Zhuming go to waste on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 等等！我们拍张合照再走吧！还有，我这里准备好的苏打豆汁儿也请一起带走……
E: Wait! Let's take a group picture! Oh, and I have mung bean soda here for you all to take with you...

C: 你还在惦记着手稿吗？
E: Are you still thinking about the manuscript?

C: 客人，你怎么还抢我的词儿呢？
E: Hey, audience. Please don't steal my line.

C: 在这一阶段里，「星槎种子」内部的「息壤」和「木无患」等材料会以玉兆上的信息为基础，长出最初的「胚芽」、「胚轴」的结构。
E: During this phase, materials such as fallow earth and Ligneous Freeroamers inside the starskiff seed will form the earliest signs of seed germ and embryo.

C: …别问我为什么不让你上星槎直接试试，我只能说「珍惜生命」。
E: ...Don't ask me why you can't hop straight on the starskiff to test it. I wouldn't recommend it if you want to stay safe.

C: 我猜刚才那些都是小问题…
E: I guess those were all minor issues...

C: 你怎么也来了……
E: What are you doing here?

C: 过了不久，青雀就带着公输师傅来到了这里。
E: Soon after, Qingque brings Master Gongshu here.

C: 真的有这么惨吗？
E: Is it really that bad?

C: {NICKNAME}，青雀小姐，我想最后试一试，我想见莱恩师傅一面。
E: {NICKNAME} and Qingque, I want to give the design one last try. I wish to meet my master.

C: 我听说判官有「拘、锁、刑、问」四部职责，你该不会是专干处刑这一块的吧？
E: As far as I know, a judge has four duties: Detention, interrogation, incarceration, and punishment. You aren't in charge of the punishment, are you?

C: 但你只看到了「梦想」，却一点也没有看出手稿粗陋与青涩……铖杰，很遗憾，你没有成为星槎匠人的才能。
E: You focus too much on that concept that you overlook the weaknesses and inferiority of the manuscript... Chengjie, I'm very sorry to say that you aren't cut out for being a starskiff craftsman.

C: *机械停止运转的声音*
E: *Whirring noise of a machine that stops working*

C: 他不在了。它已重返因果殿中了。
E: He isn't here. He's returned to the Hall of Karma.

C: 我明白你的意思，先从学徒做起，没错吧？
E: I understand what you mean. I should start from being an apprentice, right?

C: 你们在说啥…
E: What are you two talking about...?

C: 稍等…
E: Hold on...

C: 别看他现在这样，要是真上了前线，我愿意把性命托付给他。光是「地火」一个组织里，欠他一条命的人就不止几十个…更别提下层区的平民了。
E: Still, when it comes to fighting on the front lines, you can put your life in his hands. There's a dozen of us in Wildfire who are still in his debt... not to mention ordinary Underworlders.

C: 这家伙还真难缠…幸好咱们不用单打独斗。
E: Phew! That was a tough one... Good teamwork, guys.

C: …不行，我不能答应，你这就是自找不痛快！且不说你有没有胜算，「地火」和史瓦罗的关系才刚修复……
E: ...No, I can't agree to this, you're asking for trouble! Forget about winning or losing — the relationship between Wildfire and Svarog only just got patched up...

C: 我没怎么跟史瓦罗大佬接触过，这次还辛苦你们带路了。出发吧！
E: I haven't really worked with boss Svarog before, so please, lead the way. Let's go!

C: 哈哈哈，我真看不出来你是支持哪边的！
E: Hahaha, I really can't tell whose side you're on!

C: 在寻宝。
E: We're treasure hunting.

C: …噢？虎克有点糊涂…
E: ...Huh? Hook's confused...

C: 喔？唔……
E: Hmm? Whew...

C: 这应该问本地人吧？
E: Why don't you ask the locals?

C: 确实，你长高了！
E: Yeah, you're definitely taller!

C: 你叫他们步离人？
E: Did you call them "the borisin"?

C: 将军，我将列车的客人接来了。不知道将军见客，彦卿来的不是时候。
E: General, I've brought our guests from the Express. I'm sorry for my bad timing. I didn't know you were meeting a guest, General.

C: 正是。既然有缘再会，希望你能……
E: Yes, it is. Now that we've met again, I hope...

C: 但这位怀炎将军，却这么…呃，这么瘦瘦小小，一副迎风就倒的模样。这个干巴巴的老爷爷，真是帝弓天将吗？
E: But that General Huaiyan, he looks... so thin and scraggy, as if even a light breeze would knock him over. Is that old man really an Arbiter-General?

C: 想必两位就是仙舟「曜青」的使者了。
E: You must be the messengers from the Xianzhou Yaoqing, I assume.

C: 我们倒是能为景元作证。
E: We can vouch for Jing Yuan, though.

C: 听说你们遇到了点麻烦。
E: I heard you're in trouble.

C: 联盟对生物制品的管理条例非常严格。如果不进一步检查，天舶司是无论如何都不可能放行的。
E: The Alliance's regulations on biological products are very strict. Without further inspection, there is no way for the Sky-Faring Commission to release the cargo.

C: 天舶司可以照价赔偿
E: The Sky-Faring Commission can pay compensation.

C: 你们就要把这种东西在罗浮的码头上放好几天？这也太危险了吧！
E: Were you seriously planning to leave this stuff unchecked at the dock for days? That's way too dangerous!

C: 这…这真的不关我们的事！一定是你们刚才不小心触发了「货物」的防卫程序！
E: I... I had no idea about it! You must have accidentally triggered the cargo's defense program!

C: 你也不必归还了，因为我失去的剑，我会亲自把它夺回来！！
E: Fine, you don't have to give it back because I'll take it back myself!!

C: 对了，将军，你已经见过衔药龙女了吧？能否让我瞧瞧她开出的诊断处方？
E: By the way, General, you met the Healer Lady, yes? Could you show me the medicine she prescribed you?

C: 不过是斩了些怪物就得意忘形。
E: All you did was chop down a few monsters. Don't get carried away with yourself.

C: 我正有此意！胜者花落谁家还不一定呢！也许是我，也许是别人，也许还是我，但总之…未必是他！
E: That's exactly what I had in mind! Nobody knows who's gonna come out on top! It could be me, could be someone else... It'll probably be me, but whatever happens... it won't be him!

C: 倒是三月小姐…仍是块未开凿的璞玉。
E: As for Miss March... she's like a piece of jade in the rough, just waiting to be shaped.

C: 嘿嘿～说来说去还是得归功于两位师父教得好！
E: It's all thanks to your amazing guidance, masters!

C: 但凡能从战阵中活着回来，一切价值都会被重新定义。光明磊落也好，阴险卑鄙也罢，在我看来，都轻如鸿毛。
E: Surviving the battlefield reshapes all notions of worth. Be it integrity or treachery, in my eyes, their significance is negligible.

C: 我问的不是年龄！我是问…你有没有彦卿兄弟这样的梦想？
E: I'm not asking your age! I'm asking if you have a dream like Yanqing has?

C: 小朋友，你们的父母难道没告诉过你，迴星港虽然是自动运转的设施，但这并不意味着你们几个能随随便便闯进来。
E: Hey, kids, didn't your parents ever tell you to stay away from the Stargazer Navalia? I know it's an automated facility, but it doesn't mean you can just break in and do what you want.

C: 看来他们打算利用迴星港的船只，带他们离开仙舟。
E: Looks like they're planning to escape on the skiffs in Stargazer Navalia.

C: 不能留活口，动手！
E: Wipe them all out!

C: 我原本没有擅入仙舟的打算，只是……
E: I never intended to trespass on the Xianzhou ship, but...

C: 正事要紧，我们走吧。
E: Well, business first. Let's keep moving.

C: 这一次，曜青的使节也将失望而归。但我和我的兄弟们就不同了……
E: And once again, the envoys of the Yaoqing will leave disappointed. However, I won't say the same for me and my brothers...

C: 他不是你朋友吗？
E: But isn't he your friend?

C: 最好的结果便是封锁大门，与敌同埋于深狱之中。绝对不能让那头巨狼离开此处。
E: The best-case scenario would be, we seal the gates and trap the enemy inside with us. We can't let that monstrous wolf escape.

C: 幽狱武弁和机关拖不了他们太久，随我来！
E: The Prison Wardens and mechanisms won't be able to hold them for long. Follow me!

C: 诚如将军所言。将军所做决断，十王司将倾力协助。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission will support your decision with everything we have, General.

C: 不知为何，地上残破的金属小山中似乎仍藏着什么东西蠢蠢欲动。
E: Something seems to be hiding in the pile of metal on the ground, ready to move.

C: 灵砂小姐看出什么来了？
E: What's on your mind, Miss Lingsha?

C: （眼下先按这家伙说的办吧。）
E: (For now, I'll do as he asked.)

C: 如果我能帮上您的话……
E: If I can help you...

C: 这家伙…能怎么狩猎我们？
E: How can Hoolay... possibly hunt us down?

C: 呜哇，竞锋舰上的礼炮声好响啊！这就是「演武仪典」的气氛吗，感觉耳朵都要震聋了。
E: Wow! The Skysplitter's gun salute is really loud! So this is what the Wardance is actually like? I feel like my eardrums are going to burst.

C: 云璃师父，力气很大。
E: That Master Yunli is very strong.

C: 如您所见，我是负责现场赛事采访的记者，没错。
E: As you can see, I am the journalist entrusted with interviewing contestants on-site.

C: 你自己都说是小道消息了…
E: You yourself said that this was just gossip...

C: 在做出决定前，我们要杀死内心的犹豫；在做出决定后，我们要和悔恨缠斗。
E: Before making a decision, we must destroy any hesitation that we are holding onto. Once we make a decision, we must fight off any regrets.

C: 不然呢，肯定也是啊。
E: Well, what else would I be? I'm definitely one.

C: 她…热血上头就是这样，把所有地方当成可以乱来的战场。
E: She... She's just very passionate. She sees every place as a battlefield where she can unleash hell.

C: 别碍事，小子，让你的将军来和我说话，我和她的狩猎游戏还没结束呢。
E: Don't stand in my way, child. Have your general speak with me. Our little hunting game is not over yet.

C: 眼下是在罗浮仙舟上，你可给我收着点拳脚！
E: Remember you are still on the Luofu. Try not to go too wild!

C: 你们有识别步离人的手段吗？
E: Do you have a way of identifying borisin?

C: 椒丘，我命令你！治好我！
E: Jiaoqiu, this is an order! Cure me!

C: 彦卿骁卫，你身体还撑得住吗？
E: Lieutenant Yanqing, how are you holding up?

C: 喔？谈论「求存」不成，长老要谈「利益」了吗？
E: Oh? So now that "survival" won't convince us, you want to talk about "interests"?

C: 慢着！
E: Hold it!

C: 可我都不认识{F#她}{M#他}……
E: But I don't know {F#her}{M#him}...

C: 记住朕的话，彩拿篷先生——「善意是可以传播的。」
E: Heed my words, Mr. Chenapon: Goodwill can be spread.

C: 我明白了，陛下…好心人，是这样的，我是克里姆特立宪国来的逐梦客，几个系统时后要和鸢尾花家系谈一笔唱片生意。
E: Understood, Your Majesty... Kind soul, about the matter at hand: I am a Dreamchaser from the Klimt Republic. I am to negotiate a record deal with the Iris Family in a few system hours.

C: 哟，你还挺入戏？你还真当她是「皇帝」了啊？
E: Ha, a method actor, aren't you? You really think she's the Emperor?

C: 帕…什么市？那是哪里？
E: Pa... Wha? Where's that?

C: 您看看您，还专门跑一趟…您有什么看中的花卉，小人送到您府上去便是，您纡尊降贵亲自前来，实在是折煞小人啊！
E: And for you to specially make this trip... All you had to do was make a selection of your favored blooms and I would deliver them personally to you. My lowly shop is not worthy of your glorious presence!

C: 图尔良税务官，多么正直清廉的官员！舅舅，你竟狠得下心，放火烧死他们一家<unbreak>49</unbreak>人。
E: Tax Collector Turian, he was an upright and moral official! Yet you, Uncle, gave in to your vileness and burned their whole family of <unbreak>49</unbreak> to death.

C: 灰骑士，快点过来。
E: Gray Knight, get over here quickly.

C: 陛下，历史会审判我们每一个人。
E: Your Majesty, history will judge us all.

C: 你和「先皇」是什么关系？
E: What's your relationship with the late Emperor?

C: 只有几个零星的片段被兜住了，留了下来。我得小心翼翼地把它们捡起来……
E: Only a few fragments are caught by the mesh and stay in the net. I have to pick them up cautiously...

C: （螺丝…居然还有这一面啊。）
E: (Screwy... I've never seen this side of him.)

C: 没错，恐怕是寰宇蝗灾时期留下来的。已经太久无人问津这颗星球了，在这座设施里看到什么我都不意外。
E: You're right, and I think they're probably from the Swarm Disaster era. It's been a long while since anyone stepped foot here. I won't be surprised by anything I see in this facility.

C: 如果你们还没有准备好迎接这样的生活——趁着大门还没打开，离开还来得及。
E: If you aren't ready for this kind of life, you may go before I open this door.

C: ——凭借的不是药物的效果，而是<color=#dbc291ff>铭刻于你意识根底的执念和坚持。</color>
E: It isn't the effect of the drug, but the <color=#dbc291ff>ingrained dedication and perseverance in your consciousness.</color>

C: （奇怪…这房间完全没有宾客入住的迹象。）
E: (Strange... There are no signs of any guests having stayed in this room.)

C: 一个两个的，怎么都在纠结这种幼稚的设定…比起在这跟我兜圈子，你更该去找找那位「钟表匠」留下的东西。
E: What's with you people and your obsession with such a juvenile setting... Instead of going around in circles with me, you should look for the stuff that the Watchmaker left behind.

C: 我忙得很，去找别的倒霉鬼当导游吧。慢走不送。
E: I'm very busy. Go find another unlucky soul to be your guide. Don't let me keep you.

C: 鸟能当筑梦师吗？
E: Can birds be Dreamweavers?

C: 哎呀，冯恩先生，清醒点吧——你的大名还挂在星际和平公司的黑名单呢，除了那位教授，宇宙中没人敢接你的简历。
E: Oh Mr. Vaughn, please be realistic. Your name is still blacklisted by the IPC. Apart from the professor, no one in the universe will hire you.

C: 目前在这片梦域工作的筑梦师只有我和奥尔拉。不过奥尔拉还小，不能让他陷入危险中…我要把这些迷因都引开，能搭把手吗？
E: Orla and I are the only Dreamweavers in this dream domain. But Orla's still young, and shouldn't be confronted with such danger... I will distract those memes, will you lend a hand?

C: 听到你有危险就跑来了。
E: I ran over as soon as I heard you were in danger.

C: 不能让全部人都为我们的一腔私情买单，我必须思考能让大多数人幸福的办法，因为我是「家主」——这是格拉克斯教授交给我这份职责前的告诫。
E: We can't make everyone pay the price for our selfishness. I need to think of a way to make the majority happy because I am the family head. This is what Professor Glaux instructed before handing me this responsibility.

C: ——奥尔拉？
E: ...Orla?

C: （必须唤醒奥尔拉！）
E: (I must wake Orla!)

C: （回流梦礁问问它吧。）
E: (Time to go back to Dreamflux Reef and ask it.)

C: …那你呢？我此行是来带所有筑梦师回到隐夜鸫…你愿意跟我回去吗？
E: ...What about you? I came here to bring all the Dreamweavers back to the Nightingales... Will you come with me?

C: 你会公布这份记录吗？
E: Will you publish this record?

C: 是吧？公民们应该团结起来维护自己的权益才对，不过这又说来话长了……
E: Right? The people should be banding together to protect their own rights, but that's another long story...

C: 缇宝他们不是带来了一批吗？
E: Didn't Tribbie bring back a group?

C: 乐意效劳。
E: I'm happy to help.

C: 外邦人啊…怎么说呢，这些吃食还挺宝贵的，我希望它们的美味能被充分享用…你懂我意思吗？
E: Outlanders eh... How do I put this... This food is quite valuable, and I hope that their taste will be fully savored... You get my drift?

C: 那可是他凭本事偷的。
E: It was his own ability that determined the theft's success.

C: 传送锚点没开。
E: We didn't unlock that teleport anchor.

C: 克帖西芬在石板与书卷中翻找了许久，看来石板和卷轴做书最不方便的就是没有封面辨别书名……
E: Ctesiphona rummages for some time among slates and scrolls. It seems that the most inconvenient thing about working with slates and scrolls is that there is no front cover to help identify them quickly...

C: 说到这里，帕里斯饶有兴味地看向天谴猎手。
E: Having said these words, Paris turns to the Furiae Archer with obvious admiration in his eyes.

C: 欧洛尼斯的力量…好吧，既然有能人出手相助，我就不多计较了。
E: The power of Oronyx... Very well, as a capable hero has stepped in to help, I will take this matter no further.

C: …有什么事吗？
E: ...Can I help you?

C: 神明不会亲手把剑插进我的胸膛，但你们悬锋城的战士会啊。而且他们尚且无心帮助虔诚祈福的信徒，又怎么会有空来管一个胡言乱语的凡人呢？
E: The gods would never pierce my heart with their blade personally, unlike the warriors of Castrum Kremnos. What's more, they cannot find it in themselves to assist their most devoted disciples. Do you think they have time to address a rambling mortal like me?

C: 但它们不会回答我的问题，只会在尘世外低吟似是而非的预言，像他们执掌的宿命一样冷漠。如此不负责任的存在，真是一群…一群……
E: But they will not answer my questions. All they would do is whisper paradoxical prophecies into the ether. They are as cold as the very fate that they control. Beings that flaunt their responsibilities like that are no more than a bunch of... A bunch of...

C: 一起逃跑吧！/一起并肩作战吧！
E: Run away together!/Fight together, side by side!

C: 帕里斯掏出了自己怀中的纺锤，将丝线的一段缠绕在自己的戒指上。
E: Paris pulled out the spindle from his chest pocket and wrapped a section of the thread around the ring on his finger.

C: 不客气。
E: Not at all.

C: 听，快听，灵魂传来了你熟悉的声音。
E: Listen, quick, listen. There is a familiar voice in your soul.

C: 哇，这里是正在开派对吗？好热闹！
E: Wow, are they having a party? This place is so busy!

C: 具体的事情我都听见了，看在你诚心诚意的份上，人家就大发慈悲地帮你看看吧。
E: I've heard most of the details. Since you asked me with such sincerity, I shall help you mercifully.

C: 是吗？但这位缇宝大人，声音似乎有些成熟。
E: Oh really? But your voice seems quite mature for Lady Tribbie.

C: …你、你是说，那位迷迷能接触到过去的记忆？！
E: ...Y—You're saying that Mem can access my memories!?

C: 就是这么牛。
E: I am that OP.

C: 没错，现在的它只是被愤怒冲昏了头脑，故意吓吓我们这些凡人而已——你别闷着啊！
E: That's right. The way they are now, they're just feverish with rage. It's nothing more than one of their tantrums to frighten us mortals... Well, say something!

C: 对了，别急着走，还是照你说的那样，让帕西提亚再试试…命运，希望会有转机。
E: Oh yes, don't be in a hurry to leave. We'll still attempt what you said, to have Pasithea try again... in hopes of destiny turning in our favor.

C: 然后，黑潮如期而至。
E: And then, the black tide arrived.

C: 被关进神殿深处，咽下毒草，最后被掩埋在废墟里。方才经历的种种，只是你在恍惚间经历的一场有关未来的噩梦。
E: Locked in the depths of the temple, choking on poison herbs, finally buried beneath debris... What you have experienced is but a nightmare of the future you encountered in a stupor.

C: 一如在神殿中祈祷时那样，在聆听到的瞬间，便能理解其中的意义。这份我拼死挣脱的身份，终究还是……
E: Just like a prayer whispered in the temple, I understood the meaning of the echo the moment I heard it. This identity I had fought so hard to escape from... had finally...

C: 自我堕落的借口。
E: An excuse for self-degradation.

C: 束缚万物的囚笼。
E: A prison that constrains all things.

C: 她究竟是…
E: Who exactly is she...

C: 冠冕堂皇的话我不会说。总之，该帮的忙我肯定会帮。
E: I'm not one for fancy words. But if you need help, I'll definitely be there.

C: 谜语人滚出匹诺康尼。
E: Riddlers need to get out of Penacony.

C: 可能要一千个琥珀纪，也可能只要一两年。唯一能确定的是，你正在做的事，一定能促进它的生长。
E: It might take a thousand Amber Eras, or it might only take a year or two. The only thing for certain is that what you are doing will surely hasten its growth.

C: 等姬子和杨叔回来，再统一做复盘吧。不妨先休息一会儿，{NICKNAME}看起来也有些累了。
E: Let's wait for Himeko and Mr. Yang to come back before we do a full debrief. You should rest for now, {NICKNAME}, you look tired.

C: 在你抵达前，翁法罗斯几乎无人知晓。因列车到来，它得以冲破囚笼，奔向群星。
E: Before your arrival, Amphoreus was virtually unknown. Thanks to the Express, it broke free from its cage and raced toward the stars.

C: 不过这都是后话。现在，只要你能替我找来3个「超镍零件」，老爹的独门手艺、银河至味「卡利白」，那是一定管够！
E: But that's all for later. Now, if you can find me 3 Ultra Nickel Parts, I'll treat you to as many Kapo-Kali as you want!

C: 更别提如今你只要替我找来3个「超镍零件」，老爹的独门手艺、银河至味「卡利白」，那是一定管够！
E: Not to mention, you just have to find 3 Ultra Nickel Parts for me and you can have all the Kapo-Kali you want!

C: 那个老头，哦就是古恩，他之前还好意思给我留这么多研究报告的工作。笑了，你们人类自己没有手？
E: Gunn, that old fart, he even left me all those research reports to do. What a joke. Don't you people have hands?

C: 不知道，到底要怎么做，我才能融入他们的生活，接得上他们讨论的话题……
E: I wonder what I have to do in order to integrate into their social circle, and be able to join in their conversations.

C: 来，说出你的梦想。
E: Alright. Tell me what your dream is.

C: 所以我就想请教下你，有没有什么万能句子，能把对话顺畅自然地延续下去？
E: So, I just want to ask you, is there any kind of catch-all phrase that can make any conversation continue smoothly and naturally?

C: 哎，你也是来找「实验品<unbreak>13</unbreak>号」的吧？就是那个长得像马桶的奇物。
E: Ah, you're here for Experiment <unbreak>13</unbreak> as well, right? The Curio that looks like a toilet seat?

C: 「幸运签」这种东西…呵呵，佩佩都不会信！
E: Fortune leaf... Heh, even Peppy won't believe that!

C: 我之后会好好反省的……
E: I will reflect on my actions...

C: 哎，我还是有事走不开…你能帮我打听一下，现在流行什么款式的隐形眼镜吗？
E: *sigh* I'm still too busy to get away... Could you please ask around to see what contact lenses are in fashion these days?

C: 那也是，像我的话用了肯定两眼通红。
E: True. I would definitely get inflamed red eyes with contact lenses.

C: 没了，当季最流行的就是这款，没有之一！
E: Nope. This is the most popular style this season. No other options.

C: 皮毛、脚印、甚至粪便都可以！拜托啦，我肯定会准备丰厚的谢礼报答你的。
E: Fur, paw marks, and even excrement are okay! Please! I will definitely repay you with rich rewards!

C: 这次真的辛苦你了——请收下这些报酬吧！要是旅行途中发现了任何珍稀动物，一定记得转告我哦。
E: Thank you so much for this — Please take these rewards! If you find any rare animals on your journeys, please let me know.

C: 钱买不到真心的「朋友」。
E: Money can't buy true friends.

C: 你的目光扫过地面，试图捕捉羽毛和爪印的痕迹——结果当然一无所获。你从未在贝洛伯格见过飞翔的鸟类。
E: You look all over the ground, trying to find traces of feathers or claw marks — but you come up empty-handed, as expected. You have never seen a bird in Belobog, after all.

C: 你…你们是？这打扮看着不像「地火」的人呐……
E: Who are you? You don't dress like a Wildfire member...

C: 下次出来作业记得带个同伴。
E: Remember to bring a companion next time you go out for work.

C: …什么玩意？完全没听过的地名啊，你不会是在胡编吧……
E: ...Where's that? I have never heard of that place. Are you just making it up?

C: 我想买一束「七彩虹」。
E: I want to buy a bunch of Rainbows please.

C: 「七彩虹」，对吧？没问题，这就帮你挑几株。
E: Rainbows, right? No problem, I'll pick some out for you now.

C: 她、她给我回信了？快，拿给我看看……
E: Sh—She wrote back to me? Quick, let me read it...

C: 我当时心情比较激动，就一口答应下来了。
E: I was a bit emotional at that point and agreed to his request.

C: 第二题：以下选项有且只有一个是正确的，请选择。
E: Question two: One and only one of the following options is correct. Please make your choice.

C: 当然，也请您不要气馁，继续加强学习。到那时再来挑战吧。
E: Of course, you shouldn't be discouraged! Keep working on your studies, and then come back to try again.

C: 杰克。
E: Jack.

C: 克里斯。
E: Chris.

C: 年轻人，有缘再见吧。
E: Until we meet again, youngster.

C: （这样就算刺探成功了吧…该回去找雷金了。）
E: (Mission accomplished... let's report back to Regin.)

C: 你为小女子带来的情报虽然都很重要，但毕竟还是二手信息…等传到小女子耳朵里，那都成了三手信息啦~
E: All this intel you've brought me is fantastic, but it's still second-hand info... and by the time it reaches me, it's already third-hand...

C: 不不不，我都说了是去做义工啊！我们这个「会社」是……
E: No no no, I told you I'm going to do volunteer work! This Society, it's...

C: 当然，这并不意味着你可以随便差使社友…要想享受权利，你就必须有过帮助他人的记录才行。
E: This certainly doesn't mean you get to command other Society members as you wish. To enjoy the benefits of the Society, you need to have a record of having helped others.

C: 我来帮你行使正当权益！
E: I'll help you exercise your rightful rights!

C: 「会社」不该帮人逃避工作吗？
E: Isn't the Society all about helping people avoid work?

C: …哎，也是。毕竟我们也不熟，我又擅自拉你跑来喝下午茶。这样吧，我就讲讲自己的事好了。
E: ...Right, we're not very close friends, and I did drag you here just to have afternoon tea. I'll tell you something about myself then.

C: 拍好了吗！快让我看看——
E: Did you take it? Let me see!

C: 我只是在制止你往海里面扔垃圾，你千万住手！
E: I am just here to stop you throwing garbage into the ocean. I beg you to stop!

C: 漂流瓶里的故事是假的。
E: The story in the drift bottle is not true.

C: 你在哪里？
E: Where are you?

C: 没关系，我信守承诺，我会实现你的愿望。
E: Fear not, I honor my promises, I shall grant your wish.

C: 一饮而尽！
E: Bottoms up!

C: 你仔细品味着，浓郁的酪香与鲜嫩多汁的水果混合在一起，清甜馥郁，除了果肉塞牙缝之外没有任何的问题——
E: You taste the tea carefully, savoring its rich creamy aroma and sweetness of the fresh fruity juice. There seems to be nothing wrong with this tea, except for the fruit pulp getting stuck between your teeth...

C: 喝就完事了！
E: Bottoms up!

C: 这杯茶入口冰凉无比，似冰涧下的寒凉泉水，在你的全身游走。你确信它也是「烈焰浓茶」的其中一种——
E: This cup of tea tastes chillingly cold, like a cold spring under the ice, coursing through your entire body. You are certain that it's a variation of the Flaming Potent Tea because...

C: 是吗？没有副作用那说明配方是靠谱的，接下来可能就是得调整下口感了。
E: Oh, really? If you're not experiencing any side effects, it means the recipe is usable. Next I'll adjust its flavor.

C: 「贼之手」铺子的广告牌，「经营范围广阔，只要利衡币足够，甚至能借来泰坦的权能」——至少宣传是这么宣传的。不过，挂着这种店名还有谁会进去？执法人员吗？
E: The Thief's Hand shop's signboard. "With a diverse portfolio, as long as you have enough Balance Coins, you can even borrow the Titan's authority" — Is how it promotes its business. But who would even want to enter a shop with such a name? Law enforcement?

C: 一阵急促的脚步声在你耳侧响起——
E: A wave of brisk footsteps reaches your ears...

C: 是我记错了，误会，都是误会！这里有些茶水钱，您若是得空，可以去浴场里休息休息，喝两杯法吉娜佳酿，给您润润嗓子。
E: I misremembered. It's all a minor misunderstanding! Here's a small token for you to buy some tea. If you've got time, you can relax at the baths, have a few sips of Phagousa's fine brew and slake your thirst.

C: 低温浴池
E: Cold Bath

C: 改天骗…循循善诱，让丹恒一起来试试。
E: Next time, I'll trick... persuade Dan Heng into trying it out with me.

C: 首先为您介绍今天节目的主要内容：
E: We are here to bring you the latest news from across the cosmos.

C: 博识学会首次观测到名为「翁法罗斯」的新生星体，并正式将其编入星图。
E: The Intelligentsia Guild reports its first observation of a newly formed celestial body, designated as "Amphoreus," which has since been officially incorporated into astral charts.

C: 负世泰坦
E: Worldbearing Titan

C: 又一次登上九十九级长阶，扎格列斯老祖也难免汗如雨下——
E: Climbing these ninety-nine steps, even ancestor Zagreus was soaked in sweat—

C: 冥河的引渡者啊——你究竟所在何方？
E: O Ferryman of the River of Souls — where are you?

C: 如今却在安详的沉眠里，骨骸如鲸鱼般生满苔花。
E: Yet now you rest in peaceful slumber, your bones covered in moss, like a forgotten whale.

C: 托缇宝老师的福，难民们都已安顿妥当了。希望圣城能治愈他们颠沛疲惫的身心。
E: Thanks to Lady Tribbie, the refugees have already settled. I hope that the holy city can heal their fatigued minds and bodies.

C: 你可真是自说自话啊，万敌，战士之间不需要谦让。等到了尼卡多利面前，我们应当凭实力夺取火种。
E: I see your concern only stretches as far as yourself, Mydei. There is no need for humility among warriors. When we are faced with Nikador, we should use our strength to seize the Coreflame.

C: 嗯，一切会如你所愿。只是…为什么要让它出生呢？
E: Alright, as you wish. I just want to know... Why did you allow it to be born?

C: 又或…观晓将会经我之手的纺线，是如何在此处「回响」。
E: Or, should I say... Here to see how the threads that will pass through my hands "resonate" here.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>三角</color>的砝码象征着命运，把它放在<color=#dbc291ff>左侧</color>，<color=#dbc291ff>站在右侧托盘</color>的朝圣者们便能如愿进入神殿深处。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The triangle</color> weights symbolize destiny. Place them on the <color=#dbc291ff>left</color>, <color=#dbc291ff>and those pilgrims standing on the right tray</color> can venture deep into the temple.

C: 明白了，圣女大人，您多保重。我听人说，那群达官贵人待你态度总不太好……
E: I understand, great Holy Maiden. Please take care of yourself. I have heard word that those officials have been treating you poorly...

C: 原本清澈的瀑布飞流此刻泛着淡淡幽蓝，飞溅的水珠像是无声的眼泪坠入水池，恍惚间你听到几声叹息。或许这就是为什么这里叫做「垂泪净身室」。
E: The once-clear waterfall now glimmers faintly with a bluish hue, its splashing droplets falling like silent tears into the pool below. In a trance, you think you hear faint sighs. Perhaps this is why the place is called the "Chamber of Purifying Tears."

C: …或许称呼它为「柱子」并不合适，不妨叫它「柱头」吧。您理解了吗？「柱头」与「猪头」谐音，令人忍俊不禁——
E: ...Perhaps "pillar" isn't quite right. Maybe we should call it the "pillar head." Do you get it? "Pillar head" and "pig head" share the same first characters, doesn't it make you smile —

C: 也许一个{RUBY_B#离谱}美妙{RUBY_E#}的提问，就能唤醒沉默许久的泰坦。那么该问点什么问题呢？
E: Maybe a truly {RUBY_B#absurd}fantastic{RUBY_E#} question will rouse the Titan from their long silence. So, what should we ask?

C: 你有性别吗？
E: Do you have a gender?

C: 富商。
E: The merchant.

C: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
E: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

C: 我找到的若虫都在这里了吗？
E: Are all the nymphs I found here?

C: 嗯…有位织者笃信命运。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>觐神祭台上</color>，赞颂那位泰坦的伟大呢。
E: Hmm... there's a weaver who devoutly believes in destiny. The golden threads bring word that the weaver's <color=#dbc291ff>at the Theophany Altar</color>, singing praises to the great Titan.

C: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
E: When the cocoon falls away, only a piece of brocade woven by golden threads is left floating in the air. With a wave of the Garmentmaker's hand, it splits in two, one half flying into your hand...

C: 给我赠品券。
E: I'll take the coupon.

C: 巨无霸双拼肉饼！
E: Supreme patty blend pie!

C: …石榴汁双拼羊乳？
E: ...Pomegranate juice and milk mix?

C: 我们咀嚼山楂树叶…
E: We chew on hawthorn leaves...

C: 什么，还有这种好事！
E: What? A stroke of luck!

C: 真的吗！谢谢叔叔！咦，我好像在我家附近看见过你，你在追求我妈妈吗？
E: Really!? Thank you, mister! Hey, I think I've seen you near my house — do you like my mom?

C: 你盯着墙上的排风口，伸手感受着气孔处传来的微风，想起了翁法罗斯的一句民谚：「艾格勒的叹息即是凡间的风暴。」里面会是哪位泰坦在呼吸吗？
E: You stare at the vent on the wall, reaching out to feel the faint breeze escaping from its perforations. A saying from Amphoreus comes to mind: "Aquila's sighs are the storms of the mortal realm." Could there be a Titan breathing within?

C: 聆听「隆隆」。
E: Listen to "Rumble."

C: …伟大的翻飞之手？
E: ...The mighty Whimsy Hand?

C: 我怕伤到你。
E: I am afraid that will hurt you.

C: 当然，我们早就听说了您的名声。
E: Not a problem for us. We've heard all about your reputation.

C: 这取决于你，不取决于我。
E: That's up to you, not me.

C: 熄灭的太阳，快从海中升起呀——
E: Extinguished sun, rise once more from the sea—

C: 不客气，我也未曾想过它还会与曾经的主人再次相遇。
E: It's nothing. I just never expected it to meet its former owner again.

C: 回想一下，在你离开哀丽秘榭，回到逐火的开端时——
E: Think back to when you left Aedes Elysiae, back to the beginning of the Flame-Chase...

C: 所以，我要留给你一个问题。<color=#dbc291ff>假如有一天，三月七走在了和你截然不同的道路上……</color>
E: So, I'll leave you with a question. <color=#dbc291ff>What if one day, March 7th walks down a path completely different from yours...</color>

C: 但是命运不光是某个瞬间。我们的命运将交由吉奥里亚的后裔们，后裔们的命运还将交给更加遥远的未来，这才是命运的呈现方式。
E: But destiny isn't just a single moment. Our destiny will be passed on to the descendants of Georios, and theirs into the hands of a future even farther away. That's how destiny manifests itself.

C: 好高的建筑…好完美的装潢…
E: Such impressive height... such perfect ornamentation...

C: 请问，我以后能够变成你那样吗？
E: Tell me, will I ever become like you?

C: （这样一看，确实是仪式剑的形状……）
E: (Looking at it this way, it really does have the shape of a ceremonial blade...)

C: 我咋这么好看？
E: Why am I so pretty?

C: 看来传闻是真的，「记忆」的令使们没有实体，只允许想被看见的人找到他们。
E: Seems like the rumors are true. The Emanators of the Remembrance don't have a physical body and only those they allow can see them.

C: （咦，镜子还在……）
E: (Hmm? The mirror is still here...)

C: 哔——啵。
E: Beep — boop.

C: 装置的具、具体使用方法，您可以在前线咨询奥列格兵长。
E: Ask Captain Oleg on the front lines about how to use it.

C: 我…我明白了，我绝对尽力而为！
E: I... I understand, and I'll do my utmost best!

C: 你听见细微的电子音：「联觉信标已激活。」
E: You hear a faint electronic voice: The Synesthesia Beacon has been activated.

C: 小狗满怀期待看着你，它歪着头，眼睛闪闪发光。
E: The puppy gazes at you expectantly, tilting its head, its eyes shimmering.

C: 佩佩瞪大了双眼，被你的自信所震慑。
E: Peppy widens its eyes, awed by your confidence.

C: 质疑
E: Interrogate

C: 质疑
E: Interrogate

C: 啊？为什么！说这种话，就算人家不可能讨厌你，但也是会伤心的哦！
E: Why would you say that? Even if I couldn't hate you, that would still hurt my feelings!

C: 人家注意你好久了，一动不动地，是在发呆吗？睡着了吗？还是说，有什么心事？
E: I've noticed you've been still for a while now. Are you lost in thought? Asleep, or maybe something's bothering you?

C: 一过来就看见你在笑…呀，因为休息日吗？是不是一下就猜对啦？
E: I saw you were smiling when I got here... Ah, is it because it's your day off? Got it in one, didn't I?

C: 不过人家可以顺着你说，嘻嘻——还不是因为断章！
E: But I can play along, hehe — it's all just because of those cliffhangers!

C: 但是放心，在奥赫玛，{NICKNAME}是受人敬仰的大英雄！人家会把你的名字，传到每一个人的耳朵里。
E: But don't worry. Here in Okhema, you're a celebrated hero, {NICKNAME}! I'll make sure everyone knows your name.

C: 总之，人家还是会好好把这一切记在心里，毕竟，他们的故事…应该被继续讲述下去，对吧？
E: In any case, I will remember all of this in my heart. After all, their stories... deserve to be told and retold, right?

C: 开始运行！
E: Operation Started!

C: 小娃儿，你也太敷衍了。这么神奇的大宝贝，你可以多夸两句嘛。
E: That sounds a little halfhearted, kid. It's such a miraculous item, I'm sure you have a few more words to say about it, right?

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Just a moment, I have something else to do.

C: 哎，可惜我那些蠢徒弟，整天就知道空谈。上次他们居然问我「师傅，你说这金人如果装上岁阳能量的推进器，能把彗星给推回去吗？」
E: *sigh* My foolish apprentices only make empty talk. Last time they actually asked me, "Master, do you think this aurumaton can push the comet back if it is equipped with heliobus energy thrusters?"

C: 大师，您不认识我了吗？
E: Master, do you not recognize me?

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 不可能！难道「枘凿六合」难度高了？玩家照样比咱们多。
E: Impossible! Did Hexanexus raise their difficulty? They're attracting more players than us.

C: 你赖在这里是想羞辱我么？快拿着你的宝箱走开。
E: Are you trying to humiliate me by loitering around here? Take your chest and get out of here.

C: 为了让不熟悉「枘凿六合」的玩家了解到本系列之原点，作为系列一周年重要作品之一，我们选择了对「枘凿六合」进行重制。
E: To acquaint gamers unfamiliar with Hexanexus with the series' origin, we decided to remake and release the game as a cornerstone of the series' first anniversary celebrations.

C: 为什么要做「Remake」？
E: Why a "Remake"?

C: 我没什么事了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 「努力固然重要，但若是精神紧绷，不妨休息一下」
E: "Working hard is important, but if your nerves are tense, how about taking a break?"

C: 多亏你的努力，以后出故障的迷钟想必会越来越少吧。希望游客你不会觉得寂寞！
E: All thanks to your hard work, I'm sure there will be fewer faulty Tickers in the future. I hope you won't feel too lonely then!

C: 信息量有点大…
E: Information overload...

C: 我找齐了这里的全部若虫。
E: I have gathered all the nymphs here.

C: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
E: The golden thread solidifies around the mannequin, creating a cocoon that envelops it.

C: 嗯…有位织者跋山涉水，寻找强健躯体之道。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>铸造战甲的高台上</color>，祈求能得到一场酣畅淋漓的锤炼。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who searches high and low for a way to strengthen its body. The golden thread brings tidings: They now pray <color=#dbc291ff>on a platform where the war armors were forged</color>, hoping to undergo a profound refinement.

C: 眼下衣匠已经为你揭露了一只若虫的位置。在找到它之前，其他若虫的信息就暂且保密吧。
E: The Garmentmaker has already revealed the location of one nymph to you. Until you find it, the whereabouts of the other nymphs will remain a secret.

C: 这份预言应该还有另一份残本…如果你有兴趣的话，不妨也试着解读看看。
E: There should be another remnant of this prophecy... If you're interested, you might want to try to interpret it yourself as well.

C: 是谁打扰了我的安眠……
E: Who dares disrupt my slumber...

C: …没错，愿荣耀与你同在喀。
E: ...Correct. May glory be with you, crrk.

C: 这花瓶很值钱吗？
E: Is this vase valuable?

C: 原、原来这是您家？
E: S—So this is your home?

C: 有邀请过你来吗？
E: Did I invite you here?

C: 近来传闻奥赫玛出现了个「神偷」，风头隐隐有压过我之势。为了给扎格列斯老祖挣点颜面，我决心干票大的重整旗鼓。
E: Rumor has it that there's a "master thief" that's been running around recently, whose reputation seems to be threatening my own. So, I decided I'd do something big and restore glory to the great name of Zagreus.

C: 「泰坦不应该有小脚趾，人也不例外。」
E: "Titans should not have little toes, and neither should humans."

C: ——扎格列斯老祖在被奥赫玛元老们设计陷害时如此评价道。
E: ...Ancestor Zagreus espoused these words when ensnared in a trap set by the Okheman Elders.

C: 呜哇！糟了糟了！
E: Waaa! This is bad!

C: 好啦，我们也是老交情了…拿着你的战利品，认真投入你自己的游戏吧！我们还会再见面的…桀桀桀桀。
E: Alright, we're old friends now... Take your treasure and devote yourself to your own game! We'll meet again... Hehehehe...

C: 看得出，它在比划着什么。你发挥充分的想象力，开始在脑海中理解它的意图……
E: You can see it's trying to convey something. With your imagination at full power, you start understanding its meaning...

C: 桀桀桀，你就姑且认为，能在这里见到老巴特鲁斯是世界的小小奇迹吧！反正类似的奇迹你今后还会见到许多。
E: Hehehe... just think of it as a little miracle to see old Bartholos here! You'll start seeing a lot more of us anyway.

C: 不过——咱精心准备的登场位置还是不能浪费！这样这样…作为一种体验上的补偿，老巴特鲁斯就悄悄告诉你一个关于世界的惊天秘密，如何？
E: Still, can't let this setup go to waste! Let's see... how about a consolation prize? I'll whisper to you a world-shaking secret. Sound good?

C: 巴特鲁斯听说，有位城邦哲学家曾得出结论——世界的本质就是「吃」！植物贪婪地吮吸阳光，动物更是不放过一切自己能消化的东西。至于人或者泰坦——
E: I heard about this city-state philosopher who figured out that the nature of the world is basically just "eating"! Plants soak up sunlight like they're starving, animals gobble up anything they can digest. As for humans or Titans...

C: 从名字到台词，这只桶充满了盗用创意的气息。在一个盗贼亦可成为泰坦的世界，模因被偷盗似乎也是迟早的事情。
E: This trashcan's entire identity, from name to dialogue, screams plagiarism. In a world where thieves can become Titans, stealing memetic entities was just a matter of time.

C: 无论如何，这些都是从「黄金替罪羊」赐予我们的战利品中提取、翻译出来的宝贵信息——我相信它们一定有着非比寻常的特殊意义。
E: Anyway, they're all precious information extracted and translated from the treasures bestowed upon us by the Golden Scapegoat, and I firmly believe that they are of unusual significance.

C: 顺便，我就是在传信石版上那位「老师」，帮你解读「黄金替罪羊」所含信息的人。
E: By the way, I'm the teacher mentioned on the teleslate, the one who helped you decipher the information about the "Golden Scapegoat."

C: 看来大家聊得很投机呢，不错不错。寒暄就聊到这里，让我们言归正传吧。
E: It seems everyone is enjoying the conversation. Good, good. Let's cut the small talk and get to the point.

C: 嗯，效果不错。那么，在下会尽快着手解读手里这些战利品了。
E: Alright, that works well. I'll get started on analyzing these trophies right away.

C: 这也是黑潮的影响？
E: Is this also a result of the black tide?

C: 阁下可是仍有不甘？
E: Are you unwilling to let this go?

C: 《走过安眠地的花丛》
E: Through the Petals in the Land of Repose

C: 你已经完全理解「雅努斯迷津」的机制了，现在，是时候处理一些真正的委托了，我瞧瞧……
E: You've mastered the mechanism of Janus' Maze. It's time to tackle real requests. Let me check...

C: 金卷的问题是——「丢失的一千万利衡币在何处」，让我布置一下……
E: Its question is — "Where is my lost ten million Balance Coins?" Let me set the ceremony up...

C: 我还有别的事…
E: I've got other matters to handle...

C: 这回总该开出来了吧？
E: This has to be the one, right?

C: 找到了不得了的东西啊。唉，想当初，我也差点成了他们中的一员……
E: Now this is something big. Heh... Y'know, I almost ended up like them once...

C: 太好了，{NICKNAME}阁下，请您打开这个火种匣试试吧。
E: That's a relief! {NICKNAME}, please, try opening this Casket.
...Yeah.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「我知道，我知道。可是事先告诉你，就没法收集有效的数据了。」</color>黑塔不以为然地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「我会让螺丝咕姆事先做好防护。下次见到虚拟纳努克，你会让祂大吃一惊的——祂再也没法伤害你了。好，就这样，辛苦你啦，挂了。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"I know, I know. But if I tell you in advance, there's no way to collect reliable data."</color> Herta says carelessly. <color=#dbc291ff>"I'll ask Screwllum to protect you in advance. Next time you see the simulated Nanook, you'll give THEM a huge surprise — THEY won't be able to hurt you anymore. Well, that's it then. Great job. I'm gonna hang up."</color>

C: 那就得看你自己了。阿哈和浮黎大概会主动找你搭话，克里珀和Ⅸ可能不会理你，纳努克也许刚见面就会把你烧成灰……
E: That's up to you. Aha and Fuli will probably strike up a conversation proactively, while Qlipoth and IX might ignore you. And Nanook, well, they'll probably scorch you to cinders the second they see you...

C: 「你看见的是阮•梅和螺丝咕姆精心培育的模拟体星神，真正的星神才不会搭理咱们哩，模拟星神当然也一个德行。我就把你的模拟身份设置成『开拓』星神阿基维利，用来吸引祂们。」黑塔啧了一声，「现在看来我的判断没错，接下来你遇到虚拟星神时，就得跟祂们多套套近乎。」
E: "What you saw was the simulated Aeon carefully cultivated by Ruan Mei and Screwllum. The simulated Aeons will ignore us just like the real ones, so I set your simulated identity as Akivili, Aeon of Trailblaze, to attract THEM." With a click of her tongue, Herta says, "Now it seems that my judgment is correct. Next time you run into the Aeons, try to get something out of THEM."

C: 极亮的恒星风被煽动，你看到祂扬起长弓，接着，祂的身影突然跃至远处——你分明看到祂前来的模样，但一瞬后就只剩祂的背影。
E: The dazzling stellar wind wavered. You see THEM drawing a bow, and then THEY suddenly leap into the distance. You clearly see THEM coming, but after a moment, only his shadow remains.

C: 原来你还在看着我？
E: You are still watching me?

C: 结束。
E: Finish.

C: 结束。
E: Finish.

C: 你们打算怎么处理阿哈？
E: Have you decided on what to do with Aha?

C: 这是十倍速宇宙。
E: This is the <unbreak>10</unbreak>× Speed Universe.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了泯灭帮火焰般的嘶吼。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into the crackling howls rising from the throats of the Annihilation Gang.

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 关于「寰宇蝗灾」…
E: About Swarm Disaster...

C: 你忽然意识到——是天秤发生了偏移。祂的视线落在你，落在*万物*身上——
E: You suddenly feel it: The scales have moved. THEIR gaze falls upon you, upon everything.

C: 你撞倒楼梯上骚乱的人群——跌倒昏迷前，你几乎已抓住了*那个女人*糖果色纱裙的一角。
E: You collide with the tumultuous crowd on the stairs. Just before falling into unconsciousness, you almost catch a corner of the candy-colored chiffon dress of *that woman*.

C: 一则流言不胫而走：神秘的女人在公司推动下现身。她脱下白大褂，换上一袭粉色的长裙…她的行事风格并不残忍，十分果决。
E: A rumor is spreading: A mysterious lady has shown up at IPC's invitation. After taking off her white robe, she changes into a pink dress... She does things decisively but not callously.

C: 它能记住我吗？
E: Can it remember me?

C: 就这样吧。
E: There we go.

C: 似乎是被你的言辞激怒，终结单元在极短的时间内，以令人眼花缭乱的姿态完成了变形，它们脱下多余的装备，不断折叠自己，像长满了腿的诺布莱斯虫，狞笑着向你自由落体。
E: As though aggravated by your words, the termination units complete their dazzling transformation in an extremely short period of time. Shedding their excess devices, they keep folding themselves up just like noblesse worms with legs, laughing maniacally as they free-fall towards you.

C: 更有阿吉亚人，乘着这片海洋，用石头和木棍实现了数颗星球的远古殖民。
E: There are even some Ajya people who exploit this ocean, using sticks and stones to establish ancient colonies on several planets.

C: 「上个月，R<unbreak>3104</unbreak>在自娱自乐时，用啃下来的碎指甲摆出了微观星环的运行轨迹。前天，U<unbreak>1048</unbreak>浑浊难辨的梦呓中，出现了一个扰动空间弦的音符。我们的方向是对的。」
