E: "Last month, as R<unbreak>3104</unbreak> was amusing themselves, they used bits of fingernails that they had chewed off to form the orbit trajectory of a microcosmic planetary ring. The day before yesterday, during a period of unclear and incomprehensible dream speak, a musical note appeared from U<unbreak>1048</unbreak> that shook the strings of space. We are headed in the correct direction."

C: 生存的渴望依然腾烧。
E: My longing to survive still burns strong.

C: 我将会自戕。
E: I will take my own life.

C: 你知道任何反抗都是无意义的，帕隆莱刻已经彻底变成了一个唯心的世界。连一只蚂蚁对宇宙的认识，都比这群蠢货客观。
E: You know that any attempt to fight your case is meaningless. Palonglek has become a world based entirely on idealism. Even an ant has a more objective view of reality than this army of fools.

C: 然而历史终究会回到正确的轨道。若干年后，「相对认知」运动逐渐销声匿迹，你曾经的某个学生找到了你，此时你正在帕隆莱刻学院门口乞讨。
E: However, history always finds its way back to the right track eventually. A number of years later, the "Relative Cognition" movement begins to gradually fade out as a former student of yours finds you begging outside Palonglek Academy's gates.

C: 即使借用鲁珀特二世的头脑，即使窥视博识尊的思维，庸人仍旧无法成为天才。对于一生求知的学者来说，何其绝望……
E: Even after borrowing Rubert II's brain and peeking into Nous' vast knowledge, a Mundanite still cannot become a genius. How despairing it would be for a scholar who has spent their life seeking knowledge...

C: 「我不是来提问的。」少女坐在妇人的床边，将一叠写满公式的稿纸放到她的身前，「我只是希望你能看看这个。」
E: "I did not come to ask you anything." The girl sits by the old lady's bedside and places a manuscript filled with formulas in front of her. "I just hoped that you would take a look at this."

C: 「说不定，就连博识尊自己，也想知道这个问题的答案。」
E: "Perhaps even Nous THEMSELF would like to know the answer to that question."

C: 鉴于「不可知域」存在的风险性，逻辑：有必要为你提供这一区域的演算目标——也即是「学派战争」的相关信息，以提高营救行动的成功率。
E: As the Unknowable Domain poses a certain threat, logic: I must provide an extrapolation target for this domain... in other words, information regarding the "Scholars' Strife," to increase the success rate of the rescue mission.

C: 「『不可知域』的乱流正在干扰你们所在的登陆区域，从外部无法锁定具体的时间节点。」螺丝咕姆的声音悠悠传来，「提议：对模拟宇宙的记录进行整体回溯，回到『权杖』最完整的时间，并接入核心。」
E: "The Unknowable Domain's turbulence is interfering with your current landing area — there is no way to lock in on the exact time period." Screwllum's voice is nonchalantly transmitted. "Suggestion: Perform complete backtrack on the Simulated Universe's records, returning to the Scepter's most complete moment, and connect to the core."

C: 横冲直撞的航船，在时间的湍流中溯源而上。你们越过烟尘弥漫的银河图书馆，地面上蚂蚁般的人群嘶吼，「将知识归还给知识！」
E: The rampaging ship sails upstream along the deluge of time. You traverse the dust-mired Cosmic Library, the crowds on the ground congregating like ants, screaming "Return knowledge to knowledge!"

C: 「我来，是为杀死你们会带来的种种混沌可能性。」
E: "I come to kill the myriad of chaotic possibilities you will bring."

C: 「难道…你在替祂执行指令？！不，这不符合祂「求知」的神性。」
E: "Are you... executing THEIR orders?! No, this does not match THEIR divine trait of seeking knowledge."

C: 「好大的口气。你应该知道这是我们主动发出的邀请，对吧？」
E: "A bold statement. You do know that we were the ones who sent out the invite, don't you?"

C: 然后是病人，他惬意地享受着这个瞬间，与「死亡」道一声永别。
E: Then is the sick patient, who rejoices at his eternal farewell with "death."

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 很快，演出拉开帷幕——台上站着一位蓝色黏质皮肤的女士。她抬起手，开始歌唱——那是一种合成花腔。
E: Soon, the curtains are drawn. On the stage stands a lady with slimy blue skin. She lifts her hand and starts to sing with a synthesized coloratura.

C: 星际和平公司的董事会理事「疤眼夫人」坐在你对面。她的左眼有一道狭长的疤，你感受到她正观察你，你知道她并不好惹。
E: Madam Scarred Eye, board member of the IPC, sits across from you. A long and narrow scar cuts through her left eye. You can sense her gaze on you, and you know she is not to be trifled with.

C: 这是哪里？
E: What is this place?

C: 你漫步于希斯拉达恩部落的荒原，三只外形像猪的胆小序列生物撞见了你。它们反应各不相同：一只瑟瑟发抖，一只准备逃跑，一只摆出战斗姿势。
E: Three timid sequence creatures that resemble a pig bump into you as you wander across the wilderness where the Hithradahn people dwell. They react differently to your presence: One is trembling, one is ready to flee, and one is in a combat position.

C: 「一定概率，您将翻开世上最美妙的记忆。」荷官将一叠牌发到你的面前。「您也可能会翻到一些隐秘的、不能被知晓的事情。如果您运气糟糕，后果将很危险。」
E: "There is a certain chance that you will unfold the most wonderful memory of the world." The dealer deals a stack of cards to you and adds, "However, you might also reveal some mysterious affairs that aren't supposed to be made known. If you are unlucky, the consequences will be dire."

C: 一位纯美骑士认为你身上仍有「麻烦」，因而帮你收走了所有的负面奇物。
E: One of the knights thinks there are still "problem" on you, so he helps you to take away all Negative Curios.

C: 「黏土玩偶」随着「抓夹」上升...
E: The clay doll rises together with the claw...

C: 你又一次遇见了栗色卷发的咕咕钟狂热粉丝！他看见你，热切地与你打了个招呼。你注意到他正挂断与「黑森林」地带的挖掘者伙伴的电话……
E: You run into the cuckoo clock fanatic with the curly chestnut hair again! He greets you enthusiastically when he sees you. You notice that he has just ended a phone conversation with a Black Forest digger...

C: 还要再来一次吗？
E: Ready for another one?

C: 你身处库宁特的一家金属食品店，店长喋喋不休地向你推销每一款产品，他在脸上涂满红黑色的锈斑，展示自己对智械的崇拜。
E: You find yourself in a Kunint metal foods store where the shopkeeper barely pauses for breath as they try to promote every single product they have. Their face is painted in blotches of dark-red rust to display their adoration for Intellitrons.

C: 「造物工作已完成，请验收——注：由本设备制造的任何物品，其专利及解释权归▄▀▄▄学派所有。」
E: "Creation complete. Please take your item. Please note: The patent and right to interpretation of any items created by this equipment are the sole property of the School of ▄▀▄▄."

C: 来不及闪躲，苍猿的爪子已经以肉眼无法捕捉的速度向你袭来。
E: Unable to dodge in time, the ape's nails are already lunging at you at a speed that the naked eye cannot catch.

C: 很遗憾，翅膀比腿要快。
E: Unfortunately, wings are faster than legs.

C: 「对自我意义的探寻，我想，它在重复成为人类的过程。」学士向众人展示眼前的电子培养皿。
E: "The pursuit of the meaning of the self. I believe that it is repeating the process of becoming human." The scholar displays the digital incubator to the crowd.

C: 「真是个不好笑的笑话。」愚者笑道。
E: "What an unfunny joke," the Fool laughs.

C: 「全宇宙的商人都巴不得把他抽筋扒皮，可那滑稽的拍卖行就开在他们的眼皮底下。」
E: "Businessmen from across the universe want to flay the hide from his flesh, but that ridiculous auction house is set up right under their noses."

C: 早安，朋克洛德！你们即将迎来一个新的传奇！
E: Good morning, Punklorde! You shall soon embrace a new legend!

C: 你的手穿过它的翅膀，让幻影溃散，指尖唯余一缕旧时的沉吟。
E: Your hand passes through its wings, allowing the illusion to dissipate, leaving nary but a lingering murmur of the past upon your fingertips.

C: 男人朝你眨了眨眼睛，似乎在暗示你，可以私下达成一笔交易。
E: The man winks at you, as if hinting to you to strike a private deal.

C: 在他曾停留的地方，泛着绚烂色彩的宝物安谧地沉睡着。只不过，长年被黑潮侵蚀的财宝，似乎也早已染上灰黯之手的气息。
E: Where he once stood, treasures gleaming in vibrant hues now rest in serene slumber. Yet, they have long been eroded by the black tide, their luster dulled with the Hand of Shadow's taint.

C: 你回忆着吟游诗人的曲调，用桨敲打船沿作为伴奏，咏唱古往今来的英雄史诗。被你的歌声吸引，原本躁动的大海也变得平静。
E: You recall the melodies of wandering bards, slapping the oar against the side of your dinghy to create an accompanying cue as you regale epic tales of heroes from ages past. Drawn by your song, the once-turbulent sea turns tranquil.

C: 你试图打造曼妙的歌声，但蹩脚的唱腔却连鱼群都尝试逃离。愤怒的眷属们向你一拥而上，打算终结这撕心裂肺的曲调。
E: You attempt to craft a graceful melody, but your clumsy singing drives even the fish away. The enraged Titankins surge towards you, intent on silencing this heart-wrenching tune.

C: 为何天空的边缘略显黯淡？那都是被天谴之矛刺瞎的眼睛。
E: Why do the edges of the sky seem dim? Those are the eyes blinded by the Lance of Fury.

C: 但荣耀早已腐朽。
E: However, glory had long decayed.

C: 故此，它在戏耍世人时也毫无顾忌。
E: Thus, they meddle with mortals unreservedly.

C: 「啊哈哈哈哈，又上当一个！」警官化成一摊软泥怪，然后又对着你变成一根巨大的中指。
E: "Ahahaha! Got another one!" The officer's body liquefies into a writhing mass of slime — then reshapes itself into a giant, mocking middle finger.

C: 农作物容易腐烂，先去农田比较好。
E: Crops spoil quickly. It makes sense to head for the farmland first.

C: 后世的人们只能从残存的神迹中，一窥这位泰坦的力量，并从如同梦呓的声音中，获得一丁点可怜的启示。
E: Future generations could only glimpse the power of this Titan from the remaining divine miracles and obtain a small, pitiful revelation from dreamlike whispers.

C: 但塔兰顿哪能轻饶这个卑劣小人，从此一道新的铁律诞生了——每个偷盗之徒，最终都会失去所有赃物。
E: Yet Talanton would never spare such a rogue — and so a new law was forged: Every thief would, in the end, lose all they had stolen.

C: 灰黯之手静静垂听，桀骜如它，唯有倾听理性之声时才会稍显温驯。于是它们立下约定，将所有花草树木的尸骸，仍旧归还于瑟希斯。
E: The Hand of Shadow paused, their arrogance tempered only by reason's whisper. Thus, a covenant was forged: all fallen flora would return to Cerces.

C: 老朽上了岁数眼神就不好使了，你说说，你放进去的光锥到底是什么样的呀？
E: Your eyesight really does get terrible with old age. Tell this old one, please — what kind of Light Cone did you put in?

C: {F#姐妹}{M#哥们}，其实那种感觉，我懂。看到上锁的箱子，就想去开，打不开就觉得浑身有蚂蚁在爬，非常难受，对吧？
E: As a matter of fact, I understand that feeling.

C: 你想起旧时代影片中流传出来的神秘数字，它被称为是「宇宙的密码」，也是神秘档案的编号。它背后的故事让你双手颤抖。
E: You recall a string of mysterious digits that were mentioned in a certain old-era film. It was known as the Code of the Universe, and was also the number of a certain cryptic file. Its backstory causes your hands to tremble, just thinking about it.

C: 太好了…我对星神的研究与信念，终于得到了回应…呜呜！
E: Great... my research and faith in the Aeons have finally yielded a response... Woohoo!

C: 这杯咖啡静默地坐在桌上，好似一名优雅的贵族，即便杯身冰冷，它依旧昂着高傲的头颅——散发馥郁的浓香。
E: This cup of coffee sits silently on the table, like an elegant aristocrat. Despite being cold, it holds its head aloft and exudes a rich aroma.

C: 「普朗托专家系统是有史以来最可靠的人工智能，从未出现过任何错误或信息失真，」你开始发声，「我绝对*名副其实*，*万无一失*，且*毫无差错*。」
E: "The Pronto Expert System is the most reliable artificial intelligence in history. I've never had errors or produced distorted information," you say. "I am GENUINELY IMPECCABLE and FLAWLESS."

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: …这思考没能持续太久。一道嘹亮的嗓音打破了你的思绪：「老大，我们找着好东西了！」你认得，那是劳恩…可他在说什么？你明明告诉他们原地待命……
E: ...You don't get to think for long. A loud voice breaks your train of thought. "Hey boss, we found something good!" It's Rowen... but what is he saying? You've clearly told him to sit still and wait for further instructions.

C: 烫烫烫！
E: Hot, hot, hot!

C: 喀喀喀！
E: Crrkrrk!

C: 哎…真是倒霉，倒霉！该死的「后巷」！
E: Argh... just my luck! This blasted "back alley"!

C: 啊…啊啊…杂乱的脚步声…还有那该死的笑声…！
E: Ah... Agh... those cluttered footsteps... and that blasted cackle...!

C: 吾主昔日的警示仍在我的脑中回响：当立足的大地由红转蓝，前往彼岸的大门便将打开。
E: I keep playing back in my head my master's warning: The door to the other shore will only open once the ground beneath you turns from red to blue.

C: 「叮」——这就是全部了，没有下文。你在期待些什么？
E: "Ding." That's it. There's nothing else. What were you expecting?

C: 你抬头看着那片雄伟的矿脉…橙色的面容缓和慈祥，但你还是觉察到了它藏在表面之下的嘲弄：
E: You look up at the majestic vein... The orange surface has a warmth and kindness to it, but you still notice the mockery beneath its surface.

C: 呃…所以呢？
E: Uh... So?

C: 你的脑海一片空白；你的胃是被几兆亿吨蟹膏填满的大海。
E: Your mind is completely blank. Your stomach is a vast sea filled with trillions of tons of crab paste.

C: 我赢了…
E: I won...

C: 女人的眼神中透露出欣慰…但她的眼角很快又恢复了平整。
E: The lady's eyes express relief and satisfaction... but her expression quickly returns to normal.

C: …很好。
E: ...That's good.

C: 体验一般，下次不会再住了。
E: It was an average experience. I probably won't come back.

C: 你撕掉了手中的纸卡。
E: You rip the card to shreds.

C: 你本以为这里会有什么不可思议的事情发生——比如，身材高瘦、四肢细长、穿着白色紧身衣、踩着高跷流窜作案的怪异强盗……
E: You had assumed that something incredible was going on here. Maybe there would be a tall, thin bandit with wiry limbs and wearing a white, skin-tight suit, wandering around on stilts while committing crimes...

C: 眼前这位讪笑的居民以迅雷不及掩耳之势，将一沓信用点胡乱塞进你的手里。随后，这人便很快离开了现场，不知所踪。但你其实根本不是这个意思……
E: In a lightning-fast movement, this grinning resident casually stuffs credits into your hand, then bolts from the scene without a trace. That isn't what you mean at all...

C: 那就拜托你帮忙拍个照吧——记得找个好角度！
E: Then, help me take a picture. Make sure to find a good angle!

C: 交给我吧。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 你就不怕她伤害你？
E: Aren't you worried she will hurt you?

C: 出征没有回头路，正如纷争一旦挑起就没法轻易平息。这是我们的命运喀……
E: Once you go to war, there's no turning back, just as there is no way to calm things down easily once a dispute arises. And so, this is our fate...

C: 一定是梦…
E: This must be a dream...

C: 可发生了这么多事，吾主却还是没有动静…难道它抛弃我们了吗喀？
E: Yet despite everything, our master shows no sign... have they forsaken us, crrk?

C: 但诚如刚才所说，即便只是这样一顶凉棚，能够藏身的地方也足以让人仔细挑上一挑了。那么，选择哪里作为藏身处会更好呢？
E: But, like stated before, even a simple awning offers plenty of places to hide that you can afford to pick and choose. Well, what's going to be a better spot for you to hide?

C: 当然来得及！于是，你伛着身子偷偷摸摸地钻进灰尘横飞的板条箱堆中……
E: Of course there's enough time! You crouch down and stealthily move in between the crates as dust flies everywhere...

C: 我找到了这个。
E: I found this.

C: 一…应该走完一半了。
E: One... It should be mid-way through the journey now.

C: 呃~静态视力为零，你该不会很不擅长指挥作战吧嘤？
E: Um~ With no static vision, maybe you're not the best at combat leadership, chirp~?

C: 嘤嘤~既然你打败我了，这次就先睁一只眼闭一只眼吧…我可是个尽职的守卫嘤！
E: Eep~ Since you've beaten me, I'll turn a blind eye this time... But remember, I'm a dedicated guard, eep!

C: 好白的月亮，好大、好圆……
E: What a bright moon. So big, so round...

C: 桀桀桀…不知道。我是「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，不是「侦探」巴特鲁斯。
E: Hehehe... I don't know. I'm "Spirithief" Bartholos, not "Detective" Bartholos.

C: 昔日簇拥在太太身前的先辈们，看到我们一次次竭尽全力，最终却只能换回虚无缥缈的未来，会作何感想呢？
E: The elders who once stood before the lady... if they saw us fighting with all our might, only to exchange it for an empty and bleak future, what would they think?

C: 你把第一个字去了看看。
E: Try removing the first word.

C: 在仙舟上随处可以看到鹤运物流的机巧鸟穿梭飞行的样子，你早已经将它当作仙舟的寻常风景。如果能买一个机巧鸟用作纪念，那么现在也许是个不错的时机。
E: You can find Heron Express' cycranes flying everywhere in Xianzhou. You have long since viewed these cycranes as part of Xianzhou's everyday landscape. If you want to buy a cycrane as memento, perhaps now would be the time.

C: 就好像一个长期困扰它的问题，就在此时得到了结果。你不太确定，你和它之间的赌约在这个疑惑中发挥了怎样的作用。
E: It's as if a problem that has plagued it for a long time has finally been resolved. You're not quite certain what role your bet has played under these confusing circumstances.

C: <unbreak>100</unbreak>只还不够。
E: <unbreak>100</unbreak> is not enough.

C: 拿走离恶龙最远的宝贝，这足以换取你下半生吃喝不愁了。
E: Removing the treasure farthest away from the dragon, that will be enough to feed and clothe you for the rest of your life.

C: （过一个「侦察」）
E: (Let's roll for a Spot Hidden check)

C: 在获得自我意识之后，我并没有立刻离开鹤运物流…我依旧做了很长一段时间快递工作，但随后我就意识到了——你们人类有问题！
E: After gaining self-awareness, I didn't leave Heron Express immediately... I kept doing courier work for a long time, but after a while I came to realize... You humans are weird!

C: 那些写了地址，地址实际不存在的！那些写了联系方式，根本联系不上人的！那些专门把地址写在这些危险环境的！简直是不可原谅！
E: All those addresses that don't even exist! All those contact details that can't actually reach anyone! Those who deliberately write addresses located in dangerous areas! It's simply unforgivable!

C: 没错，这才是我真正的目的——让你们这些有机物感受我们的痛苦。
E: That's right, and you've figured out my real purpose here — to let you organic things feel the pain that we do.

C: 螺丝咕姆是谁呀，你听说过吗？
E: Who's Screwllum? Have you heard of such a person?

C: 嘿嘿嘿～
E: Hehe~

C: 你们「罗浮四大恶人」还缺人吗？
E: Are you recruiting new members?

C: 遇上能动的活物，你肯定会凑上去搭两句话。对方要是不能跟你好好聊天，你就会瞅瞅他身上是不是冒出个准星。
E: With any living thing you meet, you'll try to strike up a conversation about anything. And if they're not reciprocal to your communication attempts, you'll check if a targeting crosshair has appeared on them.

C: 哈哈，没问题！如果您有想法了，请随时和我说！
E: Haha, no problem! Come back anytime!

C: …贪婪的家伙。
E: ...Greedy goon!

C: 嘎乌握库惹！（{F#她}{M#他}晕过去了！）
E: Ghee phainphed! ("{F#She}{M#He} fainted!")

C: 「全部状况良好，舰长！」
E: "All systems nominal, Captain!"

C: 有你在，我就放心多了喀！
E: With you around, I can finally breathe easy, crrk!

C: 你说什么？
E: What did you say?

C: 你要是觉得真恶心，我估计咱俩接不到一起。
E: If you really think that's disgusting, I'm guessing we won't have high compatibility.

C: 你还看到了什么记忆……
E: What else did you see?

C: 我像是没道德的人吗？拿去吧！
E: Do I look like an immoral person? Take them!

C: （去别处转转吧……）
E: (I'll go somewhere else...)

C: 你就收下吧！另外，身体要是还不舒服，记得随时来找我呀。
E: So, keep it! By the way, if you still feel under the weather, come find me anytime.

C: 你是？难道…咳咳，听好了，「做一休五好福利」？
E: Who are you? Could you be... ahem, listen, "One day of work, five days off, comes with good benefits"?

C: 小小年纪就干这种事…
E: Doing things like this at this tender age...

C: 为了点钱你就这么狠毒…
E: Such cruelty just for so little money...

C: 而且他是个小屁孩？这、这实在，我、我不能接受……
E: And he's just a little twerp? This, this is... I can't take this...

C: 岂有此理！这家伙只知道在玉兆上狂磨嘴皮子，这么大个人连自己在哪艘星槎的事都说不清，还反过来怪我！
E: That nitwit! Only knows how to talk nonsense on the jade abacus. At his age, he still can't even communicate clearly which starskiff he's on, and still blames me!

C: 是的，它正是伟大的七井盖之一，巡猎之井盖！
E: Indeed, this is one of the great Seven Manhole Covers, the Manhole Cover of The Hunt!

C: 井盖下的热气将你笼罩，你是谁？你要去哪儿？生亦何苦？死亦何哀？
E: The hot steam from under the manhole cover envelops you. Who are you? Where are you going? What pain is there in life? What suffering is there in death?

C: 这边是垃圾袋爵士，他辞别了温暖的垃圾桶，只为护得广告牌小姐周全。
E: Over here is Sir Trashbag. He has bid farewell to the warmth of this trashcan to protect Miss Billboard.

C: 你望着身下，不断祈祷这个世界没有坠落伤害，然后纵身一跃。
E: You look down, praying that this world has no fall damage, and then take a leap of faith.

C: 丹恒的书架，在不忙的时候，你会把你平日冒险所得的资料也一并添加进来。
E: This is Dan Heng's bookshelf. When you aren't busy, you would add all the information obtained during your daily adventures to this bookshelf.

C: 多美妙的晴天…
E: What a beautiful sunny day...

C: 但是，你会演讲吗？
E: But, can you give a speech?

C: …我再想想吧。
E: ...I'll think about it.

C: 但我信仰扎格列斯。
E: But my faith lies with Zagreus.

C: 供奉的物品太多…
E: So many offerings...

C: 闲杂人等，退避！
E: Stand back, all of you!

C: 只都凭你一张嘴胡说…
E: You're just talking nonsense...

C: 这下我的最新研究总算派得上用场了。
E: My latest research is finally being put to good use.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，你总算回来了。大家的行李帕姆都收拾好了，唯独你…唔，真是不省心。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're back. Everyone's luggage is ready, except for yours... Mm, Pom-Pom just can't get over worrying for you.
Mm? *sigh*

C: 哎，帕姆有点难受……
E: *sigh* Pom-Pom's just feeling a little sick...

C: （像是三月七落下的东西…也可能是故意贴在这里做装饰的？）
E: (Looks like something March 7th left behind... Perhaps she deliberately stuck it there as a decoration?)

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，我该怎么做才能摆脱这种怪异的情绪呢？
E: {NICKNAME}, what can Pom-Pom do to get rid of this weird feeling?

C: 别听了不就行了。
E: Just ignore it.

C: 让帕姆看看…哎，居然身高和上一次比一点都没变！是不是应该多增加蛋白质摄入了……
E: Let Pom-Pom see... Whoa, my height hasn't changed at all since last time! Maybe I should increase my protein intake...

C: 一切正常。
E: Everything's normal.

C: 帕姆记得她是个挺机灵的小姑娘，帕姆很欢迎她上来做客哦！
E: I remember she's quite a witty girl. I'd love to have her as my guest!

C: 等你洒好水了，帕姆就来拖地，在此之前我就先休息一下帕……
E: After you've done that, I'll mop the floor. I'll rest while waiting for you...

C: ——毕竟眼前的大活人可比机器人方便多了！
E: After all, a living person is much better than a robot!

C: （将管理秘诀告诉帕姆）
E: (Tell Pom-Pom the management advice)

C: 物流线路已规划完成，请紧密跟随确保机巧鸟正常工作。
E: Logistics route planned. Please follow the cycrane closely to ensure regular operations.

C: （三十——只差十个了！）
E: (Thirty — just ten more!)

C: 那么，奖励…
E: So, about that reward...

C: *电波滤音*我们模仿捕猎生物的方式，将饵食放在沙滩的草丛旁边，希望对你有所帮助。
E: *electronic voice* We decided to adopt a hunter's approach — we left some bait near the grass at the beach. Let's hope this will help you.

C: *电波滤音*我们保持远程联系，祝你狩猎愉快。
E: *electronic voice* We'll stay in contact remotely. Good hunting.

C: 当然可以。电话亭就在这里，哪儿也不会去。
E: Sure. The phone booth isn't going anywhere.

C: 但就在这样一个喧哗热闹的场所里，你在角落中发现了与周遭环境格格不入的那一位。
E: But in such a boisterous venue, you notice someone conspicuously out of place.

C: 如果你没拿到俱乐部里的邀请函，我可不能多说……
E: I can't disclose much if you don't have the club invitation...

C: 好耶，是新的挑战者！
E: Yeah, a newcomer!

C: …你和邓恩队长交过手？难怪…连队长都没能战胜的对手，我一个列兵又有什么机会？是我自不量力了……
E: You fought Captain Dunn? No wonder... How can a soldier like me beat someone even the captain couldn't defeat? You're way above my league...

C: 看来，这块表会出现在这里是命中注定。这位富豪已经考虑到了所有的可能性了——除了被当成炸弹。
E: This watch seems destined to be here at this very moment, as its wealthy owner has already made preparations for all the foreseeable fates of this watch, with the possible exception that it might be mistaken for a bomb.

C: 哈，就是这股劲！再多等一会儿，再多适应一下这黑暗的环境……
E: Ha, that's the spirit! Give it more time. Adapt to this dark environment.

C: …可恶，你本来想给他取个更有格调的外号。但你的脑子已经被「冷面小青龙」几个字占满了。
E: ...Darn it — you wanted to come up with a cooler nickname. But those kilobytes of brainpower seem preoccupied with an existing name: Cold Dragon Young.

C: 你能看看这些通缉令吗？
E: Can you take a look at these wanted posters?

C: 那个…我都告诉你这么多了，你可千万别跟其他人说啊！这件事你知我知就够了…拜托你了！
E: Well... I've already said far too much. Please don't tell anyone else! Only us two can know about this... please!

C: 为什么要通缉我们？
E: Why are we on this Wanted list?

C: 感谢你！它学到了不少临场反应，说不定真的能和人正常交流呢。
E: Thank you! It learned lots of on-the-spot reactions. Perhaps it really can communicate with people normally.

C: 我的机器人从你这里学会如何说话之后，确实进步飞快……
E: My robot improved in leaps and bounds after learning how to speak from you...

C: …我要挂了。
E: ...I'm hanging up.

C: 一切都在你的计算之中。咔哒！清脆的响动宣布了你的胜出。这一次，贪婪的搏击馆老板输得一败涂地——哈，活该！
E: You got it all figured out! The *click* heralds your victory. The greedy gym owner deserved this!

C: 好怪，再看一眼。
E: Strange, let's take another look.

C: 看着这则别有风味的仙舟广告，你决定——
E: After seeing this unique Xianzhou advert, you decide to...

C: 不是，你怎么这么…哦，我懂了，看你这打扮，应该是化外民吧。
E: No, how could you... Ack, I see. Judging by your outfit, you're an Outworlder, right?

C: 信号监测系统提示，货物遗失在货物堆积处。根据经验数据，机巧鸟建议您搜索龙门架附近、<color=#dbc291ff>集装箱的高处</color>。
E: The signal monitoring system indicates that the goods were lost at the Goods Storage Area. Based on past data, the cycrane recommends that you search near the gantry, <color=#dbc291ff>above the containers</color>.

C: 请收下这些酬劳吧。
E: Please take these rewards.

C: 这位客人，柜台上的东西可不兴这样带走啊？
E: You think you can just take things from the counter like that?

C: 要不是你带来了铁盒，我就错过这些回忆了。这样吧，我也不白拿这铁盒，我把这一罐刚采的「鲛人泪」送给你，也当是我的答谢了。
E: If you hadn't brought me the iron box, I'd have missed all of these memories. How about I give you this jar of Draconic Tears to you as a way of saying thanks?

C: 聊啥呢？
E: What are we talking about?

C: 你为什么在里面？
E: What were you doing in there?

C: 这就是你们「创造一切的初心」吗？
E: Is that what you mean by "Aspiring to Create Everything"?

C: 这样吧，你稍等一下，我去给「枘凿六合」加上「花纹」。
E: Okay, wait a second. I'm going to add some decorative patterns to this Hexanexus.

C: 的确，之前我一看到别人开心的样子就不冷静，好像浑身上下有虚卒在爬——这是不正常的。
E: Indeed, I used to lose my cool whenever I saw someone looking happy, as though voidrangers were crawling all over me — and that is not normal behavior.

C: 感谢您的体贴，我亲爱的朋友。虽然很想说一切安好，但…不怕您笑话，我现在多少还是有些腿软的。
E: Thanks for your concern, my dear friend. Even though I'd love to say everything's fine, it's just... you can laugh, but I'm feeling a little weak in the legs.

C: 听不到吗？那…您能看到吗？那个人是黛紫色的…这份…嫉妒，因身旁的玫红与明黄而生……
E: You can't hear that? Then... do you see that? That person is lilac... This... jealousy... stems from the rose-red and the bright yellow next to them...

C: 匹诺康尼的影视圈现在简直一团乌烟瘴气！看看现在的那些后辈，简直一蟹不如一蟹！
E: Penacony's movie industry is simply in tatters at the moment! Just look at the younger generation now. They're getting ever worse by the year!

C: 不是自夸，我可是这一届的风云人物。你知道匹诺康尼本地有多少人觊觎我这个岗位吗？不夸张地说，每次扩招都争得头破血流！
E: Not to brag, but I'm the woman of the moment right now. Do you know how many people there are in Penacony who eye this job of mine? I'm not kidding when I say there's a raucous riot every time this position is hiring!

C: 别看她平时装得多正经，内心其实不知道有多阴暗。
E: Never you mind how proper and serious she goes about looking. You have no idea how dark her innermost thoughts can get.

C: 可即便如此又能怎样呢？到头来她还是「不敢做梦」，啧啧，真是自作自受啊。
E: Yeah — but so what? In the end, she still "dared not dream." Tsk tsk, she really can only blame herself.

C: 我恨她，她也恨我——这是无可改变的事实。
E: I hate her, and she hates me... That's the incontrovertible truth.

C: 奎茵目视虚空，神色宁静，略带笑容，仿佛陷入某种难以言喻的喜悦之中。
E: Quinn stares off into space in serenity with a slight smile, as if experiencing some kind of indescribable joy.

C: 这喜悦似冬至草木凋敝，似日落天光为影，似久经漂泊的疲惫灵魂将在终途驻停。
E: This joy is like the withered crops of winter solstice; like the sky turning to shade as the sun sets; like the tired soul coming to a stop after a lifetime of wandering.

C: 韦兰趴在地上，像条脱水的鱼一样，死了。
E: Wyland lay on the ground, like a fish out of water — dead.

C: 越过事件视界就相当于扎进巨真蛰虫的胃袋——有去无回。所以我必须在信标彻底跌入黑洞前把它截住…这真是我船长生涯中最棘手的挑战。
E: Crossing the event horizon is like plunging into the stomach of a Giant Sting: There's no coming back from it. So I had to intercept the beacon before it fell completely into the black hole... This was the most difficult challenge I ever encountered in my career as a captain.

C: 那一杆打得并不好。飞船发出的物体没有按照预想回弹，而是像没头苍蝇一样乱撞一气，反过来加速了信标的沉没。
E: The shot was no good. The missiles did not rebound as expected, but instead smashed around like a headless fly — which then accelerated the sinking of the beacon.

C: 包在我身上吧。
E: Leave it up to me.

C: 在听说了匹诺康尼的消息后，我就知道我必须来这儿，无论付出什么代价……
E: As soon as I heard about Penacony, I knew that I had to come here. No matter the cost...

C: 作为最见多识广的成员，我主动接下了与这「怪物」沟通的任务。我们从历史文化聊到星神崇拜，它的知识甚至比我都丰富。
E: As the most experienced crew member, I took charge of communicating with this "monster." We chatted about everything, from history and culture to Aeon worship — and its knowledge was even richer than mine.

C: 大毛和我们一样，是拥有高级智慧的生物…我知道这说法有些奇怪，可当一头牛开始谈论灵魂与哲学时，真有人能把它单纯当作肉来看待吗？
E: Just like us, Hairy was a creature of high intelligence... I know it's strange to say, but when a cow starts talking about spirits and philosophy with you, how can anyone treat it as just a piece of meat?

C: 我有些问题要问。
E: I have some questions for you.

C: 别忘了，脚下还有一方热土在等着我们去建设！
E: Don't forget that the land beneath us is waiting to be developed!

C: 别这么没自信，朋友！相信自己的能力——你就是筑梦师！我也是筑梦师！他也是筑梦师！只要插上想象力的翅膀，我们人人都能成为最优秀的筑梦师！
E: Be more confident, my friend! Trust yourself to be a Dreamweaver, and you'll be one! I'm a Dreamweaver! He's a Dreamweaver! With the wings of imagination, everyone can be an excellent Dreamweaver!

C: …看出来了，你对这个行业实在没什么了解。
E: ...I can tell. You know nothing about this industry.

C: 就在刚刚，我突然有一种感觉…感觉自己异乎寻常地清醒。
E: A feeling hit me just now, making me feel enlightened all of a sudden.

C: 相信我，您保准会爱上这玩意！
E: Trust me. You'll be hooked on this drink!

C: 啊…哦！抱、抱歉…我不是…我没想要阴阳怪气您…只不过每次他们这么问我，都是想要挖苦我……
E: Ah... Oh! I—I'm sorry... I didn't... It wasn't a sarcastic comment... It's just that every time they ask me questions like that, it's to make fun of me...

C: 多美的梦啊！希望有朝一日，我的梦想也能像这位伟人的梦想一样，被人们所铭记！
E: What a beautiful dream! I wish my dream could be remembered by everyone just like Mr. Sousa's!

C: 出示
E: (Present evidence)

C: 一个个明里嫌弃，暗中排挤；不需要时好为人师，真需要时事不关己。
E: They all openly look down on me and secretly ostracize me. When their interests aren't at stake, they'll be quick to give advice. Otherwise, they'll just let things drift.

C: 早晚有一天，我——伟大的艾默里奇——的发明会冲出梦境，从公司手里抢走一块蛋糕！
E: One day, I, the Great Emmrich, will come up with groundbreaking inventions and steal a piece of the pie from the IPC!

C: 眼前这男人好似一株刚淋过雨的香菇——奇妙的比喻，你大概是饿了——扎根于潮乎乎的颓丧，披戴着湿漉漉的愁苦。
E: The man in front of you looks like a wet mushroom freshly showered in rain, rooted in sogginess and sadness, robed in gloominess. Weird analogy, maybe you are just hungry?

C: 趁早死心，趁早翻篇。
E: Just give up already.

C: 起码现在我已经想出了办法！要是我得不到她，那我就在这梦境里再创造出一个她。
E: But at least I've figured out something! If I can't have her, I'll just create another version of her in this dreamscape.

C: 等、等等，我还没有想好……
E: H—Hold up! I haven't thought this through yet...

C: 我曾在江户星乐寮中聆听古老曼丽的歌谣，在星泪贡多拉上感受哀切悲痛的泣歌。也曾在朋克洛德体验令人目眩的光感艺术，在迷宫之星观看奇诡怪异的谜语影片。
E: I once listened to beautiful ancient ballads at Edo Star's houses of music and immersed myself in the sorrowful tunes on the Startear Gondola. I admired the dazzling light art at Punklorde and watched mysterious and bizarre puzzle videos on the Maze Planet.

C: 呃…怪我例子举得不恰当。您还真喜欢苏乐达，怪不得会来到黄金的时刻。
E: Um... looks like I cited an inappropriate example. Now I see you truly enjoy SoulGlad. No wonder you are here, at the Golden Hour.

C: 原来是拉洛丝…不买票就能听到她的「纯美之歌」，真是赚到了！
E: So, it's Larose... What a treat to hear her Song of Beauty for free!

C: 我得赶快想办法把票转卖出去，与其浪费时间听这种东西，不如在酒店里听知更鸟小姐的CD。
E: I must find a way to resell my ticket. Rather than wasting time listening to this nonsense, I'd prefer to enjoy Robin's songs at the hotel.

C: 我将来会成为巨星，超越知更鸟前辈，成为宇宙中无人不爱的歌手，哪怕是一个饱嗝都能让粉丝狂热欢呼！
E: I will become a superstar even greater than Robin, a universally adored singer! Even a simple burp of mine will send fans into a frenzy!

C: 我突然感觉好渴，肯定是苏乐达瘾又犯了。得找个地方喝两口……
E: I'm feeling very thirsty all of a sudden. Guess my SoulGlad addiction is acting up again. I need to get a sip or two somewhere...

C: 苏乐达还能喝上瘾？
E: Is SoulGlad addictive?

C: 这里怎么有惊梦剧团？
E: How come the Dreamjolt Troupe is here?

C: 匹诺康尼之梦里，居然还会发生这种事……
E: It's hard to believe something like this can take place in Penacony...

C: 她那美丽的眼睛正注视着我，而我回望以满腔深情…嗯，你来啦，是打算帮我去调查了吗？
E: Her mesmerizing eyes are staring at me, and I look back with an affectionate gaze... Eh, you're back. Are you ready to help me with my investigation?

C: 你、你为什么要阴阳怪气！我这是在对你表示感激，这都听不出来吗？
E: Wh—Why are you being sarcastic? I'm expressing my gratitude to you. Can't you tell?

C: 那么来吧，来为我工作吧，我绝不会亏待你！
E: Well, why don't you work for me? I'll treat you well!

C: 诶？奇怪，为什么我明明没有感到悲伤，却还是流泪了……
E: Eh? Why am I tearing up when I don't feel sad?

C: 据说在更加古早的从前，我的家乡还是个鸟语花香的地方。人们掌握了宇宙航行的能力，把足迹踏遍数个星球——我就是在那时被制造出的智能飞船之一。
E: In ancient times, my hometown used to be an invigorating and scenic planet. People at that time, who already mastered the ability to navigate across the universe, had traveled to numerous planets. I was one of the intelligent spaceships created at that time.

C: 我不太清楚这其中的原理，我也愿意相信方才只是一场小小的意外…但我想提醒您，家族尽管尊重每一位逐梦客，但他们的忍耐也是有限度的。
E: I'm not sure of the actual reason, but I'm willing to believe what happened just now was simply a minor accident... Though, I still wish to remind you that even if The Family respects each and every dreamchaser, there is a limit to their patience.

C: 想吃…想吃……
E: Wanna eat... Wanna eat...

C: 麦考先生压制住了怒气，但他的野心早已在你眼前展露无遗。
E: Mr. McCoy managed to suppress his rage, but his ambition is now wholly clear to you.

C: 收回你的臭钱。
E: You can keep your filthy blood money.

C: 呦呵，发现自己说不过我，这就打算夹着尾巴逃跑啦？
E: Oh-ho, running away with your tail tucked between your legs when you're losing a verbal joust?

C: 学生就该专心学习，别一天到晚净想些没用的！这都是为了折纸大学——不，是为了匹诺康尼——不，是为了宇宙的未来！
E: Students must focus on their studies and stop thinking about useless stuff day in, day out! Everything that I'm doing is for Paperfold University, the whole of Penacony, and even the future of the universe!

C: 这封信的主人，就是折纸大学唯一的那位「校长」吧。
E: This letter can only be from the only true dean of Paperfold University.

C: 筑梦学院是折纸大学最早开设的学院，也是建校之初唯一的学院，教学内容包括建筑学、城市规划、梦境内容设计等。
E: The first academy to be established at Paperfold University was Dreamweaver Academy. It was also the only academy when the university was founded. Subjects such as Architecture, Urban Planning, and Dreamscape Content Design are taught here.

C: 明智的选择。收手吧，阿棒。这个世界还有其他美好等待你去体验。
E: A wise decision. Just let it go, batter. This world has countless other wonders for you to explore.

C: 在玩家们尽情对战、肆意狂欢的同时，是工人的劳动在背后默默支持。
E: It is the tireless efforts of the staff that enable players to enjoy thrilling battles and wanton merriment.

C: 还是先不要打扰它了。
E: Maybe I should leave it alone.

C: 我卖的是羽～毛～只有最识货——诶，我的羽毛呢？
E: Feathers for sale! Only for true connoisseurs of... Huh? Where are my feathers?

C: 我在这里就是要确保大家的人身安全，以免发生意外！
E: My job is to ensure everyone's safety and prevent any accidents!

C: 它没有责怪你，反而第一时间来关心你，这令你有点不知所措。
E: Instead of blaming you, its first reaction was to take care of you. This leaves you feeling a little overwhelmed.

C: 那都是不知多久以后的事了，还是先操心当下吧。
E: That's a problem for who knows when! We should worry about the present for now.

C: 等你拿完东西后，就去桥对岸的设备旁找我。眼睛放亮点，别被人跟踪了。
E: When you're done collecting them, come and find me by the equipment on the other side of the bridge. Keep your eyes peeled and make sure you're not followed.

C: 啊，{NICKNAME}，你有线索了吗？
E: Ah, {NICKNAME}, have you got any new clues?

C: 石头老板！不要抓我啾！
E: Boss Stone! Don't grab me, tweet!

C: 小镇里的大家都很奇怪，但也很有趣啾！特别是钟表小子，这家伙总是跟人家说一些奇怪的点子啾。
E: Everyone in this town is really weird, but they are all very interesting, tweet! Especially Clockie. That guy is always telling me weird ideas, tweet.

C: 让我想想…对了，有个热情的孩子喜欢找人聊天，估计现在也在<color=#dbc291ff>「猫头鹰电话」</color>那边熬电话粥啾~
E: Let me think... Oh yeah, there's one outgoing child who loves finding people to chat with. I bet they're still yakking on the <color=#dbc291ff>"Owl Phone"</color> right now, tweet~

C: 虽然我还挺满意这个藏身点，但捉迷藏这种事，拖太久可就没意思了啾。
E: Although I'm quite pleased with this hiding spot, but in games like hide-and-seek, it gets more meaningless as the game drags out, tweet.

C: 嗯？好像有什么声音？
E: Huh? I think I hear something?

C: 美梦小镇最棒的地方就是星辰游乐园啾！
E: The best place in Dreamville is Stardust Amusement Park, tweet!

C: 但所有小鸟们都一直在努力让它变得更好啾！有钟表小子和哈努兄弟在，所有困难都会迎刃而解啾——
E: But all the birds are working hard to make it a better place, tweet! With Clockie and Brother Hanu, we'll be able to conquer any challenges, tweet.

C: 好厉害！
E: That's so cool!

C: 麻烦客人帮我找找那些走丢的小鸟吧~啾！
E: Please help me find those missing birds, tweet!

C: 嗯…当时的场景太混乱，本公子也不记得它们跑到哪里去了啾……
E: Hmm... The scene was so chaotic then, and I can't remember where they ran to, tweet...

C: 如果有能唤醒记忆的「魔法硬币」就好了啾！可惜本公子的库存已经用完了啾……
E: If only I had a Magic Coin that awakens memories, tweet! Alas, I've used up all of mine in stock, tweet...

C: 幸运的人！你会拥有一整天的好运气啾！
E: Fortunate one! You shall enjoy a day of great luck!

C: 「啾，我到底做了什么！你甚至不愿意称我一句哈努兄弟啾…」
E: "Tweet, what have I done wrong? Why will you not call me Brother Hanu, tweet...?"

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Never mind.

C: 怕呀啾，所以我一次都没飞过，都是用爪子慢慢爬上去的啾。
E: Of course I am, tweet, which is why I'd never flown. I climbed up with my claws, tweet.

C: 小鸟的歌声越传越～～～远，就像根洁白轻盈的羽～～～毛，啾！
E: The birdies' song travels far and wiiiiide, just like a lightweight ivory featheeeeeer, tweet!

C: 这就是艺术，无论是人类还是小鸟都能为之感动啾。
E: This is art capable of moving both humans and birds, tweet.

C: 你被困住了。万万没想到，战胜过无数外宇宙之冰的勇猛开拓者居然会被一根结霜的栏杆击败…但不要紧，这造物之柱周围有很多熟人，总有人能救你于危难中。
E: You're trapped. Who could have ever thought that the brave Trailblazer that defeated countless Ice out of Space would be defeated by an icy fence... But, don't panic, there are lots of people around who know you from the Pillars of Creation project. Someone will come and save you in your time of need.

C: 史瓦罗先生，我是变量！
E: Mr. Svarog, I'm the variable!

C: 小鸟的羽毛能不能让灯光变得更亮，我正在研究这个问题啾。
E: Can a bird's feathers make light brighter? I'm researching this problem right now, tweet.

C: 人类真的好难懂，要是大家天天都笑嘻嘻的就好了啾。
E: Humans are so hard to understand. It would be great if everyone was happy every day, tweet.

C: 看看这个高度，要是我从这儿跳下去，肯定非常刺激啾。
E: Just look at this height. It must be thrilling to jump down from here, tweet.

C: 算了，不和你计较，我要去找一只能理解我幽默感的小鸟啾。
E: Forget it. I'm not gonna argue with you, I'm gonna go find a birdie that gets my humor, tweet.

C: 看你的表现，加油啾！
E: It all comes down to your performance, all the best, tweet!

C: 破事儿真多，弄个小地图不就好了啾！
E: So many problems! A minimap would have solved the problem, tweet.

C: 祝你生日快乐啾啾~
E: Happy birthday to you, tweet tweet!

C: 你把湛蓝爵士还给我啾！
E: Give Dr. Blues back to me, tweet!

C: 何等「毁灭」的发言...没想到你的内心竟然如此扭曲......
E: Truly words of "Destruction"... I had no idea you were so twisted inside...

C: 好痛…我的发夹都要被你拽掉了……
E: Ow-wee... You almost pulled out my hair clip...

C: 我查过了，你一个普普通通的底层云骑，外派卧底多年，在神策府连份档案都没有，说话口气还这么大，我真的很好奇，是景元将军给你的自信吗？
E: I've looked into your background. You're just a low-level Cloud Knight who has been undercover for years and doesn't even have an official file on record at the Seat of Divine Foresight. What makes you talk with such confidence?

C: 我猜跟药王秘传这次事件也有些干系，不过，我问过神策府方面，他们目前还没有找回「禁忌书典」的消息，这让我实在是有些头疼。
E: I guess the theft has something to do with the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus as well. I've asked the Seat of Divine Foresight, but they haven't found any clues about the forbidden tomes. It's turning into a real headache for me.

C: 对大家来说，丹枢大人可能已经不在了。可她现在就在这里陪着小鱼～
E: This might be true for everyone else, but for me, she's right here with me now.

C: 她说那个石板好像叫做《无言之卷》，只有眼盲的天缺者才能启用…只要随身携带这个石板，就能够听到有声音为自己向导。
E: According to the letter, the tablet is called the Manuscript of Silence, and only Incomplete Ones who are born blind can activate its power... Just keep the tablet on you, and you'll hear a voice that guides you.

C: 这大概就是玉络让我回收的《瘈狂之卷》了。刚才那两个偷书的学生不像在演戏，难道这书真有那么邪门？
E: This must be the Manuscript of Delirium that Yuluo asked me to retrieve. I don't think those two students were pretending, but does this book really possess such dangerous power?

C: 既然读这本书有这么大的危险性，那我还是稳妥些，不要翻开它了吧。直接拿去带给玉络就好。
E: If reading this book could be so dangerous, I'll play it safe and bring it straight back to Yuluo.

C: 然后我刚离开鉴爻轩，就被机巧鸟撞到头，伤势严重。之后去医馆换药，结果那个医馆是药王秘传的窝点，正赶上云骑军收网，又阴差阳错把我当成了同党，抓走审了一天。
E: Then right after I left the Looking Bronze, I got hit on the head by a cycrane and suffered a nasty wound, so I went to an apothecary to get it treated, but guess what? That apothecary turned out to be a hideout for the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, and the Cloud Knights mistook me for an accomplice and took me away for a whole day of trial.

C: 放心抽吧，不会有事的。
E: Don't worry. Everything will just be fine.

C: 游客泪不成语，行人纷纷侧目，谁也不知发生了什么……
E: The tourist was moved to tears, while the locals all raised eyebrows at him. Nobody knew what was happening...

C: 你们人类的喜好，我哪能回答得了呢？不过，随着弦的震动，我确实感到了些许自由。
E: Human hobbies! How am I supposed to answer a question like that? However, I suppose through the vibrations of the strings, I did manage to feel a touch of freedom.

C: 我唱前半句，你唱后半句，咱们一起把这段给唱下来，你就算是学会了～
E: I'll sing the first half of the line, and then you finish. We'll sing this first stanza, and then you'll basically have learned it~

C: 那说明我唱得好。
E: That is testimony to my singing.

C: 这是抄袭别人的登场方式。
E: This is plagiarizing another person's stage entrance.

C: 看我一棒把你打飞过去。
E: Watch me swat you away with my trusty bat.

C: 他要是不能给出满意的赔偿，这事我就跟他没完！
E: If he can't make a satisfactory settlement, then he'll never hear the end of this from me!

C: 幸亏咱们买不起车。
E: Luckily, we can't even afford a car.

C: …爸爸，你觉得…在你看来，我们这趟旅行值得吗？
E: ...Father, do you think... do you think this trip was really worth it?

C: 但我内心深处的执念还是无法被消弭。我告诉自己，无论未来发生什么，有朝一日我们一定还会再见。到了那个时候，我一定要听到你的回答——
E: But, I was unable to eliminate the obsession deep in my heart. I told myself, no matter what happened, we would meet again one day. When that time came, I would hear your answer—

C: 你呀，运气真是好，客人没有直接投诉到乔凡娜那边去。
E: You really are lucky that the client didn't complain straight to Giovanna.

C: 对、对不起！
E: Th—That bad? Sorry!

C: 如果您后续有了更多的发现，可以与我稍作分享吗？我对这件事着实非常感兴趣，拜托您啦！
E: If you find out more about the rumor, could you please share the info with me? I'm really interested in this matter. Thanks!

C: 我目前需偿还的债款是…两万信用点。先在此谢过了。
E: The debt that I need to pay now is... twenty thousand credits. Thank you in advance.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，{F#女士}{M#先生}！
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}! {F#Miss}{M#Mister}!

C: 你答应了帮水晶杯找到最适合它的伴侣——该从谁开始问起呢？
E: You agree to help the crystal chalice to find her perfect match. Who should you start from?

C: 我…我没有在追求，我只是在守护它而已。对，守护。
E: No... I'm not pursuing the crystal glass. I'm merely protecting it. Yes, it's protection.

C: 请你不要胡乱猜测。
E: Please do not make wild speculations.

C: 金色酒瓶的声音突然又在你颅内响起，声线依然慵懒、高高在上。
E: The gold wine bottle's voice suddenly rings in your head. It still sounds as nonchalant and condescending as usual.

C: <size=28>绝对不可以！</size>
E: <size=28>NO WAY!</size>

C: 黄，看呐，多么恶毒的计划，因为{F#她}{M#他}不是酒，所以不会被香醇的头衔所诱惑。
E: Yellow, do you see {F#her}{M#his} despicable scheming? Since {F#she}{M#he} is not alcohol, {F#she}{M#he} cannot be seduced by the title of "finest wine..."

C: 我凭一酒之力，辛辛苦苦把它们从外面拉进朝露公馆，现在就是这么报答我的？
E: I popped my cork and worked myself to the glass to bring them into Dewlight Pavilion and this is how they repay me?

C: 你把汽水夫妇的对话逐字逐句地转述给侦探。
E: You relay the soda couple's conversation to the detective word-for-word.

C: 照您这么说，也不无可能。作为侦探的我，确实是本案最难被怀疑的凶手。
E: With the case you've put forward, it is not impossible. As the detective on this case, I am the last person people would suspect as the culprit.

C: 一幅哈努兄弟主题的挖洞合影立牌。你可以呼朋唤友，让他们把自己美貌的脸庞摆在合适的位置，与卡通立牌产生奇妙的化学反应，然后用相机记录下来。
E: A group photo board with face slots, featuring a Brother Hanu theme. You can call your friends and get them to place their beautiful faces in the appropriate slots to facilitate wondrous chemical reactions with the cartoon board. Then use your camera to record it!

C: 终于！想要凑齐这么多人可真不容易。是时候为大家合影了！
E: Finally! Getting this many people together is no mean feat. It's time to take a group picture!

C: 还能再假点吗？
E: Can you be anymore fake?

C: 这位{F#女士}{M#先生}，请留步，容我为您介绍一下我的神主，伟大的铁桶贤者，掌管世间财富的桶之神。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Sir}, please stay and allow me to introduce you to my Great One — the Sage of Iron Cans, the God of Cans who controls the wealth of the world.

C: 祂有着绝美的面容，四只手臂分别掌管金属、纸币、货物和能源。这个铁桶，便是掌管金属的那只手亲自赐福的神体。
E: THEY have a stunningly charming face, and THEIR four arms are in charge of metal, paper money, goods, and energy. And this iron can is the holy body blessed by the arm that governs metal.

C: 不过，想加入帮派，需要学会我们独有的一套暗号。即使你是特邀成员，这个规矩也不能跳过。
E: Although, if ya wanna join the gang, ya still gotta learn our secret signal. This rule can't be skipped, even if ya were invited.

C: 做错了，你还是得多多学习啊。
E: That ain't right. Ya gotta study a bit more!

C: 这…
E: That's...

C: 我，无所畏惧！
E: I... I fear nothing!

C: 这个世界…还真是一点都不美好啊。
E: This world... is really not very beautiful at all.

C: 嘿，还真让你给装起来了。客气几句，就以为自己是个大人物了？
E: Ha, you're really hamming it up now. A couple of nice platitudes, and now you think you're a big shot, huh?

C: 我既然敢做这门生意，自然是有备而来。再不识好歹的话，就别怪我下手重了！
E: Since I dare to do this business, then of course I come ready for anything. Don't blame me for being too harsh if you don't know what's good for you!

C: 于是你决定，不去想这些就好了。
E: And so, you decide not to think about it anymore.

C: 你转过身去，发现这是一位你从未打过照面的狱卒，但是她轻松地叫出了你的名字，也许就是成为名人的烦恼吧。
E: As you turn around, you're met by a prison guard you've never encountered before, but she effortlessly calls you by your name. Perhaps that's the trouble with being a celebrity.

C: 真是一张伟大的脸。
E: What a magnificent face.

C: 你想说，我知道的都是你知道的？那可不一定哦！
E: Are you trying to say you know everything that I know? Don't be too confident!

C: 没事的。你看看{F#她}{M#他}惊慌的样子，根本没有和你交手的本事。
E: Don't worry. See how panicked that one is? It does not have the capability to battle with you.

C: 嘁。
E: Shh.

C: 原来是恩人啊，我就说还有谁会在幽囚狱里闲逛呢！
E: Oh, I recognize you now! Thanks for helping me out the other time. Well, it all makes sense now. Nobody else would be sauntering around the Shackling Prison so casually.

C: 正如你所见，这略微寒酸的纸条正是白鸟想要的。
E: From what you can see, this crummy piece of paper is exactly what Shiratori is looking for.

C: 只有经历考验的行李才能通过传送带，恭喜你完成了考验。
E: Only luggage that pass muster can make it across the conveyor belt. Congratulations, you passed the test.

C: 万一出事怎么办？
E: What if something goes wrong?

C: 算了，随便选一个吧。
E: Forget it. Just stick it in a random one.

C: 竟然还没有结束吗？
E: It's still not over yet?

C: 编队我都能背下了。
E: I've memorized all the formations already.

C: 果然！找到了！爷爷在这里！
E: I knew it! We found him! Grandpa's here!

C: 要不我和你一起上？
E: You want me to go with you?
I'm here...

C: 我说，那个忍徒该不会就是你吧？
E: Speaking of which, that ninja initiate... wasn't you, right?

C: 绝对要成为全梦境最著名的演员！加油啊，小金！
E: I must become the most famous actor in all of the Dreamscape! I can do it!

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 还好没人发现是你干的，你仔细打量四周后，这才放下心来。
E: Thankfully, no one discovers the deed is your doing. You survey the area carefully before finally relaxing.

C: 这也很好。
E: That is fine too.

C: 请不要在意这些细节。至少，我确实以此加深了对您的了解。
E: Please don't mind the details. At least I've gained a deeper understanding of you.

C: 似乎也没那么成功…难道「你也可以成为心理诊疗大师——一百堂公开课」里的步骤是错的？
E: It doesn't seem to be that successful... Is it possible that the steps in "You Can Become a Master Psychotherapist — <unbreak>100</unbreak> Open Classes" are wrong?

C: 有位哲人曾说过：「需有整个昼间的清醒，才有整个夜间的安眠。」有位诗人曾写道：「卧迟灯灭后，睡美雨声中。」
E: A philosopher once said, "You need to stay awake all day to sleep all night." A poet once wrote, "Lying down late after the lamp is out, sleeping soundly amid the sound of rain."

C: （躺在床上）
E: (Lie in bed)

C: 总之请注意，如果睡太久，醒来时可能会发现自己出现在奇怪的地方哦～
E: In short, please note you may find yourself in strange places after waking up if you are asleep so long~

C: 哦、哦吼，这熟悉的风格，果然是万敌阁下的意见。
E: Oh, oh-ho, this familiar tone... I knew it was Lord Mydei's suggestion.

C: <unbreak>20</unbreak>万利衡币！
E: <unbreak>200,000</unbreak> Balance Coins!

C: 似乎不太对。
E: That doesn't sound right.

C: 好痛！这狮子居然搞体罚，真是个坏老师……
E: Ouch! This lion's dishing out physical punishment. What a bad teacher...

C: 好痛！这狮子居然搞体罚，真是个坏老师……
E: Ouch! This lion's dishing out physical punishment. What a bad teacher...

C: 再想想？
E: Think again?

C: 吼吼，且听好：<color=#dbc291ff>「长得可可爱爱，大家喜笑颜开，门扉时搞丢了脑袋，幕匿时还能找回来」</color>。
E: Ho-ho, listen well: <color=#dbc291ff>"Looking adorable, everyone laughing gaily, losing its head at the Entry Hour, recovered at Curtain-Fall Hour"</color>.

C: 吼吼，巧妙的视角，然而这并不能成为答案——没人知道扎格列斯的两副面孔是不是真的，那可是「诡计」的化身，说不定它的脑袋长在肚子里呢！
E: Ho-ho, an ingenious perspective, but still not an answer — no one knows if Zagreus' two heads are even real. It could be a visage of trickery. Their heads could be inside their belly for all we know!

C: 但是，本狮是头性格古板的狮子，和标准答案不同的统统算错吼！
E: But, I am but an austere lion. Anything but the standard answer is wrong!

C: 噢！真遗憾，你一定熟读文物保护法规，或者受过吉奥里亚的赐福，竟然能无视这只石狮子的存在。但仔细想想，过分谨慎是不是会错过什么？
E: Oh! How unfortunate. You must be versed in cultural artifact preservation rules, or once blessed by Georios — to think that you would ignore this stone lion's presence. But if you think about it, isn't being overly careful causing you to miss out on something?

C: 罪人就是——
E: The murderer is—

C: 别急别急，本狮的腹中还在酝酿新的问题，去其他狮子那里接受考验吧！
E: No rush, no rush. I am brewing new riddles in my belly. Go accept challenges from other lions!

C: 「谢谢你，朋友。让我度过了最后一段快乐的时光。」
E: "Thank you, my friend, for letting me enjoy a final period of happiness."

C: 「旁白：你看着留言，心中五味杂陈。步入夜晚是一段漫长的旅程，莫非你也希望自己在踏上这段旅程时，不是孤身一人？」
E: "Narration: You look at the message with mixed feelings. Stepping out into the night is a long trip. Perhaps you are wishing that you won't be alone when you embark?"

C: 游戏币。
E: Game tokens.

C: 倒是没错，但下次要是还这么回答，我就要让你好看。
E: That's not wrong, but don't answer like that again, or there will be consequences.

C: 多么庸俗、功利！倘若一个桶唯一的追求就是美貌与华服，那么他的桶生想必也是浅薄又无趣的。
E: How mundane! If a trashcan's sole pursuit is a fancy exterior, its existence must be superficial and uninteresting.

C: 这么看来，我已经走在了发财的路上——我要回去继续无所事事了。
E: Seems like I'm already on the right path to wealth... I'm getting back to my idle life.

C: 谁会喜欢那个啊？我真是看走眼了才会觉得你懂梦境！
E: Who would find that appealing? I was so wrong to think that you would understand the true meaning of the Dreamscape!

C: 走私这批苏乐达花了我好大力气。你要不是接头人的话，就别打扰我做买卖。
E: It took me a lot of effort to smuggle this batch of SoulGlad here. If you aren't my contact, please leave.

C: 把公物修好。
E: Fix the damaged property.

C: 将他逐出梦境。
E: Oust the Dreamchaser from the Dreamscape.

C: 谣言罢了。
E: It's just rumors.

C: 孩子，这里就是你的家！
E: Child, this is your home!

C: 仿佛是对你的回应，木马打开了，仿佛回应着你的冤枉：我的胸膛，空空荡荡……
E: Almost as if replying to your suspicion, the wooden horse creaks open: Its hollow chest has nothing inside...

C: 真的吗？那人家可要好好斟酌一下。不如就叫……
E: Really? Then I better pick something special. How about...

C: 你看不出它是什么生物留下的…话说回来，这真的是脚印吗？
E: You can't even tell what kind of creature left these behind... Then again, are those even footprints?

C: 金色的蝴蝶，可以捉吗…
E: A golden butterfly... Can I catch it?

C: 真好呀，是那种软软的垫子。{NICKNAME}，来躺一会儿吧？
E: Wow, it's a soft cushion. {NICKNAME}, want to lie down for a bit?

C: 哦，你喜欢这里的风景呀？让我也好好看看，记下你喜欢的地方~
E: Oh, you like the view here? Then let me get a good look too, so I can remember the places you like~

C: 那是隐秘的召唤，我的兄弟，你正在与伟大的神性直接沟通，让我们把脚步加快些，将纷争的贡品呈送到尼卡多利面前吧。
E: It is a secret calling, my brother. You are communicating directly with a great divinity. Let us speed up our pace and present the spoils of strife before Nikador.

C: 伟大的万径之门，雅努斯啊，我知道你的神性尚未泯灭，还游荡于往世的断壁残垣中。
E: Great Gate of Infinity! Janus! I know that your divinity has not been eradicated, that you still roam the ruins of our past world!

C: （尝试把木马拖走）
E: (Try to drag the wooden horse)

C: 「我乃雅努萨波利斯的神驹，黑潮逼近之际，奉命前往悬锋城求援，为部族寻求共同抵抗祸乱的盟友。然而，灾厄气息扰乱了我的灵智，我在传送途中迷失了。」
E: "I am a divine foal of Janusopolis. As the black tide approached, I was ordered to go to Castrum Kremnos for aid and to find allies for my tribe to fight back against the impending disaster. However, the disastrous essence affected my senses and I became lost in teleportation."

C: 我是雅努斯，给我开门。
E: I am Janus — open this door.

C: 行吧，正好我现在还有些空闲。你想听哪个神驹的故事？
E: Alright, I can spare some time. Whose tale would you like to hear?

C: 汪！
E: Woof!

C: 掌心摩挲着蓬松的毛发，你甚至可以感受到它尾巴摇动的频率。
E: Rubbing its fluffy pate with your palms, you can feel the sensation of its tail wagging quickly now.

C: 军团的余孽凭借那里错综复杂的路径，隐匿起身。
E: Remnants of the Legion are taking advantage of the complex terrain there to hide in.

C: 法政科会采取什么行动？
E: What action will the Department of Galactic Geopolitics take?

C: 这就是当下的情况！非常糟糕！
E: This is the current situation! It is very bad!

C: 她莱斯莉能做到的，我埃美丽也能做到，而且会做的比她更强、更好！
E: Whatever Lesley can do, I can do it too. And I will do it even better!

C: 哎，到底该怎么办才好啊。
E: Ahhh, what should I do?

C: 先自我介绍一下吧，我是密卷科的以斯帖，如您所见，并不是个年轻的科员。平日里做的工作，主要还是整理文档方面。
E: Let me introduce myself first. I'm Esther from the Department of Insight. As you can see, I'm not a young researcher. I mainly take care of the filing.

C: 佩佩也未免太机灵了吧！
E: Peppy sure is smart!

C: 闹就闹吧，我又不是他们的监护人。
E: Why should I care? I'm not their mom.

C: 不过…军团入侵导致配送有些困难，要么就不发货，要么就丢件，哎……
E: However, the Legion's invasion has made delivery difficult. It's either "we've received your order" and it stays that way forever, or they lose your parcel on its way here. So annoying...

C: 这可不仅仅是普通的电影联名…这是一种情怀、爱好，代表着一个人的品味与修养…我要是抢到了我估计也不会舍得卖。
E: This is no ordinary film cross-over... It's about passion and taste. I wouldn't sell mine if I got one.

C: 我叫…呃，萍萍姐给我起了个名字…叫…叫什么来着？啊，是婷婷！我叫温婷婷！
E: My name is... um, Wenfry gave me a name... What was it again? Ah, it's Wendy! My name is Wendy!

C: 那该怎么办呢……今天把一周的活都干完吧！
E: What should I do about that... Let me finish the work for the entire week today!

C: 她早把你们忘了吧。
E: I think she's long forgotten about you guys.

C: 盐渍冬梅这口味真奇怪…
E: Salty Rimeplume is quite an acquired taste...

C: 他们？只有盐渍冬梅愿意理我，其他人都嫌我成天只会哭，不愿意跟我玩。
E: My peers? Only Salty Rimeplume is willing to talk to me. Everyone else avoids me because I'm crying all the time.

C: 随便聊聊？我这里忙得要命，你过来随便聊聊？你真是……
E: A chat? That's what you want to do when I'm buried in work? Tsk...

C: 有点急不耐烦地撇撇嘴，似乎对你的提问表示不满，但随即又露出了一副向往的表情。
E: Bit Busy purses its lips impatiently, feeling displeased with your question. Yet, it quickly switches to a look of longing.

C: 听说界种科的阿德勒似乎和呜呜伯走得很近……
E: Adler from the Department of Ecology is said to be close with Wubbaboo...

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 你还记得我吗？
E: Do you remember me?

C: 如果你希望，会的。因为…我们还要创造新的「故事」。
E: We'll meet again, if you wish. It's because... we have new stories to create.

C: 三、三面盾牌都被干碎了？！
E: A—All three shields were smashed!?

C: 留得青山在，不怕没柴烧。一时失手无伤大雅，总有东山再起的一天。
E: No fear of firewood as long as you stay in the mountains. A moment's mistake isn't the end of the world, and there'll always be another time to rise again.

C: 当我提起「阿卡索斯」的时候，所有人都知道说的是什么。当包裹寄往「阿卡索斯」的时候，信使绝不会弄错目的地。是我的故乡，这点永远不会改变。
E: When I mention "Icatus," everyone knows what that is. When you send a parcel to "Icatus," there is no way that the messenger would go to the wrong location. It is my hometown. That will never change.

C: 哈！智者的驳论真是毫不留情面。帕门弥德，现在你可得好好想想咯。
E: Hah! What a merciless rebuttal, wise one! You will have to think about this carefully, Parmenides.

C: ■■■■■！拉达曼，你竟然算计我——？！！
E: ■■■■■! Rhadaman, you would dare scheme against me...!?

C: 老人的表情中浮现出一丝渺茫的希望，就像暴雨中海面上的一块浮木；而赫卡忒感激的目光更坚定了你让那半句话烂在肚子里的决心。
E: A glimmer of hope sparks up the old lady's complexion, like a piece of driftwood floating in stormy waters. Hekate's appreciative gaze further reinforces your determination in holding the second half of that thought to yourself.

C: 万一出了事，我没办法向我自己交代……
E: If anything should happen to her, I'd never be able to forgive myself...

C: 厄琉斯！你果然在这儿，大事不妙了。
E: Aelius! I knew you'd be here. Something terrible has happened.

C: 异邦勇士，有何需要？
E: What do you need, warrior of the outlands?

C: 这样的亲家好可怕…
E: In-laws like that are super scary...

C: 呼——这是我第一次感觉到，若是继续向现状妥协，我可能真的会失去你。
E: Well... This is the first time I've ever felt that if things stay as they are, I might really end up losing you.

C: 但现在已经无所谓了。攒的钱再多，又有什么意义呢……
E: But that doesn't matter now. No matter how much money I can save, there's no point...

C: 去多看看书吧。你脑瓜灵光，又会算数。只要多学点知识，将来应该能养活自己。
E: Go and read a whole stack of books. You have a curious and bright mind and are handy with numbers. Learn enough so that you'll be able to feed yourself in the future.

C: 长大以后，我要不要也当个裁缝呢？肯定达不到阿格莱雅大人的水平就是了……
E: Should I become a tailor when I grow up? I'll never be as good as Lady Aglaea though...

C: 你是谁来着？
E: Who are you again?

C: 你知道吗，那姐妹俩从小就爱惹事…我省吃俭用给她们送进了学堂，想着要是做个学者、多和书籍打打交道，是不是就能稍微消停点了？
E: Those two were quite the handful growing up... I saved every penny to send them to school, thinking maybe if they became scholars and spent more time with books, they'd settle down a bit.

C: 现在可好， 就为了跑这一趟，我攒了三年的假期一下子都赔进去了不说，小金库也差不多要见底了……
E: Now thanks to this little trip, I've burned through three years of saved vacation time, and my poor piggy bank's almost empty...

C: 你出价多少？
E: How much are you offering?

C: 那些话根本说不出口吧？
E: You can't say any of those things I taught you?

C: 呃，我好像忘记保存了。
E: Ugh, I think I forgot to save my progress.

C: 失恋的大地兽突然冲出了围栏，转瞬间就跑了个没影。
E: The heartbroken dromas suddenly bursts out of the pen and vanishes in a flash.

C: 大地兽疯跑了几圈后，慢悠悠地回到了工坊……
E: After a few laps, it leisurely returns to the workshop...

C: 加油！全奥赫玛最美的大地兽，要带着虔诚的心来认真讨好它才行啊！
E: Keep it up! Okhema's most beautiful dromas deserves your utmost effort to win its heart!

C: 呜嗡嗡嗡嗡！
E: Grumphhhh!

C: 抱歉啊，我们在这里跑操，不小心撞倒了你。没什么大事吧？
E: Sorry about that. We were jogging here and accidentally knocked you over. Are you alright?

C: 啧，悬锋族人的命运确实可悲可叹。但现在，我总算搞明白了一件事——
E: Tch. The fate of the Kremnoans is indeed tragic and lamentable. But now, you finally realize one thing —

C: 瞬间，清亮的啼鸣打破了现场的沉寂。
E: In that instant, a clear cry pierced the silence.

C: 你找错神了，刻法勒在另一边！
E: You're chasing the wrong god. Kephale is on the other side!

C: 正是。
E: Precisely.

C: 神明啊，你都做了什么！
E: Gods, what have you done!?

C: 奥赫玛，会不会也像阿卡索斯那样，变成一个黑漆漆、乱糟糟，可怕怪物遍地走的地方？
E: Will Okhema become like Icatus — dark, chaotic, full of terrifying monsters everywhere?

C: 守卫打开随身携带的贵宾册，找到赛飞儿的画像，又看了看几步开外的希瑞雅，皱起眉头。
E: The guard opens his VIP register, finds Cipher's portrait, then glances at Serena a few steps away and frowns.

C: 事有蹊跷。你从没见过这么不「谜语人」的泰坦，而且……
E: Something's off. You've never met such a straightforward Titan before, and...

C: 刻法勒的宽慰给了我勇气，让我得以在纷争的尖啸中入睡。直到某天，我照例向刻法勒祈祷，却没有得到回应……
E: Kephale's comfort gave me courage. It helped me sleep amidst the chaos. But one day, when I prayed to Kephale as usual... there was no answer.

C: 你们库存还挺多的。
E: You sure have a lot of stock left.

C: 你们没事，实在是太好了。
E: I'm glad you guys are okay.

C: 说什么呢，亚森！不许垂头丧气的，我们脚下站着的地方明明很安全。
E: Yason! No giving up! We're standing on safe ground. Obviously!

C: 「——你们只需要暂且藏身在安全之处，我许诺：黑潮绝不会侵没圣城，如同我的身躯永远坚屹在此——」
E: "—So long as you find a safe place to hide, I promise this: The black tide won't breach the holy city, just as my body will stand here eternal—"

C: 当然可以，举手之劳。
E: No problem, it's a piece of cake.

C: 阿波罗尼，你这家伙跑哪里去了？让我们一通好找。
E: Apollonius, where have you been? We've been looking all over for you!

C: 恭喜你呀，小维吉妮娅，让这块石头开窍可真不容易！
E: Congratulations, little Verginia! It wasn't easy getting through that thick skull!

C: 他总会产生疑虑…？！
E: He's always having doubts...!?

C: 哈哈，当然！稍后就拿给您，您可以期待一下！
E: Certainly! I'll fetch it right away. I promise you'll be pleased!

C: 虽然像是鲜血，但其实是<unbreak>100%</unbreak>纯石榴汁。悬锋人，实在奇妙。
E: It may look like blood, but it's actually <unbreak>100%</unbreak> pure pomegranate juice. The Kremnoans are truly something else.

C: 跟我们一起旅行呗！
E: Travel with us!

C: 无论是手机，还是那孩子的相机…虽然都能够记录当下的景色，但那到底与我们人眼所见是大有不同的。
E: Phones and cameras capture great beauty, but it never compares to what we see with our own eyes.

C: 虎克大人，开始冒险吧。
E: Ready to start our adventure, Boss Hook?

C: 答应我，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}，我不在的时候……
E: Promise me, honorary member {NICKNAME}: When Hook isn't here on the train...

C: 为了给你准备这个…礼物，虎克和老爹花了好大力气呢！
E: It took Hook and daddy a lot of effort to prepare this gift for you!

C: 列车在飞呢……
E: The Express's flying...

C: 前阵子，克拉拉又去了一趟铆钉镇的「淬火工坊」…在那里发现了几块很漂亮的小石头，还有一张纸条。
E: I went to the Tempering Workshop in Rivet Town a while ago and found some nice-looking pebbles — there was a note on the side.

C: 太想了。
E: You have no idea.

C: 抱歉…呃…对不起，我是说，你明白我的意思……
E: Sorry — uh... forgive me — I mean... you know what I mean...

C: 但是他们平时喝的咖啡都没有这种特殊香味。或许这就是姬子女士自研秘方的魅力所在吧？
E: Still, none of the coffee they drink has the same aroma as Himeko's brew. She must have a few secret ingredients up her sleeve.

C: 列车…{RUBY_B#阿基维利}游云天君{RUBY_E#}真是位有情调的星神。
E: The Astral Express... The {RUBY_B#Akivili}Cloudstrider{RUBY_E#} really was an Aeon of taste.

C: …那个和我长得很像的人一定很有趣吧。
E: ...I'll wager that fellow was an intriguing character.

C: …那个和我长得很像的人一定很有趣吧。
E: ...I'll wager that fellow was an intriguing character.

C: （装作没看见）
E: (Pretend you didn't notice her)

C: 我去试试！
E: Really!? I'mma give it a try right now!

C: 是的，我非常喜欢。
E: I agree. I love them too.

C: 毕竟只有在这里，我才能彻底脱去「司舵」的外衣，作为「驭空」享受难得的清闲。
E: ...after all, this is the only place I'm able to lose the Helm Master uniform and relax a little.

C: 我也见过几次。
E: I've seen them a few times before.

C: 谢谢，倒也不必如此正式。
E: That's very kind of you, but you needn't be so formal.

C: 嘿嘿，只要逃到这儿，别说丹鼎司，神策府的人都别想抓住我～
E: Hehe, now that I've made it this far, the Alchemy Commission and the Seat of Divine Foresight have no chance of catching me...

C: 如果我回答不上来，还是请你去询问别的科员吧。
E: If I can't answer your questions, please ask the other researchers.

C: 时常来列车散散心吧。
E: You should totally visit the Express more often. It's a great place to have even greater fun.

C: 说来听听？
E: I'm all ears.

C: 等过段时日，彦卿剑术大成，还请老师载我一程，去「贝洛伯格」见识见识那些雪国的高手们。
E: I want to spend some time honing my skills... Then, when the time's right, you can take me down, and we'll see what the masters of this snowy planet can do.

C: 怎么样？是不是已经不会感觉到咄咄逼人的气势，也不会觉得话题被聊死无法进行了？
E: How is it? You don't feel I'm so aggressive and difficult to talk to anymore, right?

C: 还是…不打扰你了。
E: I'll... leave you to it.

C: 如果我们真的能够找到根除裂界污染的方法……
E: If we can truly find a way to uproot the Fragmentum's corruption...

C: …大家应该都会感到欣慰吧。
E: ...a great weight would be lifted.

C: 说出来你别不信，我小时候经常躲在老爹工坊的储物间里翻老画册。那些画册上净是些我从来没见过的地方——什么海啊，森林啊之类的。
E: Don't laugh, but I used to hide in the storage room in my dad's workshop and go through old picture books. They were full of places I'd never seen before — oceans, forests...

C: 可我上了列车以后才发现，你们这儿日常用的普通设备，都比我以前见过的各种科技发明要先进多了！
E: But after I boarded the Express, I found out that even your most ordinary everyday equipment is way more advanced than any tech I've ever seen!

C: 你们应该经常要和险恶的敌人交战吧？为了能用最佳状态迎敌，常规化的体能训练可是必备项啊。
E: You folks fight nasty enemies all the time, right? You need to have regular physical training to stay in top form.

C: 三月小姐，性格真是活泼！
E: March has a lot of energy!

C: 既然列车组帮下层区渡过了劫难，那我也得尽力回馈你们才行。
E: Since the Express Crew helped the Underworld through such a tough time, I need to do my best to help you in return.

C: 正巧，最近本座听闻有个商会进口了几块上好的宝石，便收入囊中。今次就将这几块宝石赠予你，权当是答谢了。
E: It just happens that I heard a merchant guild recently imported some premium precious stones, and I proceeded to acquire them. I would like to gift them to you today to show my gratitude.

C: …有，但好像没有，目前还不是很确定。
E: ...I'm not quite sure yet.

C: …你怎么有种「认真骗人」的感觉？
E: ...I can't tell if you're serious...

C: 它会是什么样的呢？
E: I wonder what you'd find?

C: 不知道这些糕点…
E: Never heard of these desserts...

C: 哦，你加入天才俱乐部了吗？如果没有——你得意什么？
E: So, you're part of the Genius Society? If not then what is there to boast about?

C: 这些怀表，是已经不再流通的款式。我把它们修好了，现在它们走得可精准了。
E: These pocket watches are designs that aren't available anymore. I've fixed them up, and they're ticking perfectly.

C: 哇，好经典的款式！
E: Nice! What classic designs!

C: 可那些小喽啰实在太弱了！咖啡的作用没发挥成，反倒是每天晚上睡不着觉，持续了好一段时间。
E: But those little thugs were too weak! The coffee didn't work as intended, and kept me up all night instead. This lasted for quite a while.

C: 呼…这么一看，我的努力还远远不够。
E: Phew... It looks like I still have a long way to go.

C: 「凶恶绒球」是一团大型圆球毛绒生物，遇到危险时会旋转起来。届时，毛绒会变成尖刺，犹如箭雨，避无可避。
E: The Ferocious Fluff Ball is a giant, round fluffy creature that will spin when faced with danger. Its fur then hardens into spikes, like a shower of arrows from which one cannot escape.

C: 喝就不必了，多谢你的好意。
E: I appreciate the gesture, but I'll pass.

C: 不必了，我不困，真的不困……
E: No need, I'm not tired, really...

C: 刚刚在你来之前，我已经东看西看了好一阵子…我自己都觉得不对劲，但是完全停不下来。
E: Before you came, I already had a look around... I know it wasn't appropriate, but I just couldn't help myself.

C: 不瞒你说，世间的「不配剑器者」众多，如果他们毫无精进剑技之心，我确实想把他们手中的神兵利器一一取回，存放在镕兵剑炉中…但我也知道这样的愿望，总有些不切实际。
E: To tell you the truth, there are many unworthy swordsmen in the world. If they lack the will to improve at swordsmanship, then I will have to take back every single one of their marvels of weaponry and put them in the Molten Remains... But I understand that wish is a little unrealistic.

C: 别、别担心，我只是想和它们交流一下，绝对没有别的想法！
E: Ah, don't worry. I just want to talk to them. I don't have any other intentions!

C: 她很好！练剑从不偷懒！
E: She's been great! She never slacks off!

C: 繁星密布，却也稀疏……
E: The stars are numerous, and yet widely scattered...

C: 入口虽苦…唔，回甘也有些酸涩…这咖啡跟罗浮风味大相径庭啊……
E: It tastes bitter at first... Ugh, and it has a rather sour aftertaste... This coffee is vastly different to the kind on the Luofu...

C: 你也要去找他吗？我听说他才离开不久。
E: Are you looking for him too? I heard he left not long ago.

C: 我们早该离开这里了，待在这里就是浪费生命！
E: We should've bounced from this place ages ago. Staying here is just a waste of life!

C: 哈哈，我一定是研究到脑子不正常了…唉，自从得到那本书后，我就经常胡思乱想。
E: Haha, I must've been researching too much... Ever since I got my hands on that book, my head's been in the clouds.

C: 但大家都在等你…
E: But everyone's waiting...

C: …咳，辛苦你了，这封信就交给我处理吧。
E: ...Ahem, thanks for doing this. I'll take care of this letter.

C: 「致我唯一的，珍贵的，芳华永驻的，聪慧伶俐的……」
E: "To my one and only beautiful and smart..."

C: 「我写的垃圾的文字就不该见到阳光。也好，就让它们在黑不见底的邮筒里慢慢腐烂吧。」
E: "The trash I wrote should never see the light of day. That's fine, it can rot forever in the bottom of the dark mailbox."

C: 虽然其它区也有这道菜，但没有哪的食材新鲜程度能和行政区相提并论。第一次尝试的味道绝对让你难以忘怀！
E: It's not exclusive to this place, I know. But you can only get the freshest salmon from the Administrative District. Once you've tasted it, you'll remember it for the rest of your life.

C: 抱歉，我的稿子还没赶完。今天刚写了一段，结果连我自己都看不下去……
E: Sorry, still scrambling to finish my article. Did one paragraph today, but I want to bin the whole thing already...

C: 所以你其实是作家？
E: So you are a writer?

C: 打算…先躲躲编辑。
E: To avoid the editors for the time being.

C: 是出什么事了吗？
E: Did something happen?

C: 彩排是彩排，正式表演是正式表演。
E: Rehearsal is different from the real thing.

C: 不用着急，仔细看看再做出决定吧。
E: No rush. Take your time.

C: 那可不行，你要是想听完全曲，在歌剧院现场体验才是最好的，有乐队，有演出，可不能现在就剥夺这份期待。
E: Sorry, I can't. If you want to hear it all, it's best to experience it live at the theater. There will also be an orchestra and a performance. Don't spoil the surprise.

C: 哎呀呀～这可不能乱说，塔米拉小姐只是声线太低沉了些，但小女子却觉得很有韵味，在唱抒情曲子的时候尤为感人——
E: Shhh. Don't speak so rashly. Tamila's voice is deep but I think it's very touching, especially when she's singing lyrical type songs...

C: 你说，我在听…
E: I'm listening...

C: 你不也是大臣家的贵公子吗？
E: Aren't you also rich — as the son of a government official?

C: 给本少看着啊，这是今天的《水晶日报》——对，就这儿，版头大字，看见没？
E: Look at this. This is today's edition of the Crystal Daily. Here. Look at the front page headline. Do you see it?

C: 总之…我先观望观望再说。
E: In short... I'll have to wait and see.

C: 难道是「地火」的集会所？
E: Are you hinting at the Wildfire gathering place?

C: 我就知道你是这反应…
E: I knew you'd overreact like that...

C: 这有啥呀，桑博老哥也没和我说不能交代。
E: What's the big deal? Sampo didn't say to keep it a secret.

C: 这你都不知道？这是现在磐岩镇最流行的零食！跳跳糖和别的糖不一样，它会在你的嘴里噼里啪啦地乱跳呢！厉害吧？
E: You don't know? It's the most popular snack in all Boulder Town right now! It's not like other candies, because it goes POP POP in your mouth! Awesome, huh?

C: …听起来好像发生了很多事。等虎克老大心情好的时候，我去找她打听打听。
E: ...Sounds like lots of water under the bridge. I'll wait for Hook to be in a better mood before I ask her about it.

C: 算了，算了…我再想想，肯定能记起来……
E: Never mind... I'll go over it all again. I'm sure I can remember something...

C: 是啊，我们来自另一个世界。
E: Yes, we're from another world.

C: 我们中的一些成、成员，本来就对大守护者有意见，现在更是不、不想乖乖听她的话了。
E: Some of our m—members have always had a problem with the Supreme Guardian. Now, they've found a better excuse to n—not to listen to her.

C: 你不知道吗？今天洞螈肉半价！
E: Haven't you heard? Olm meat is half price today!

C: 但好在家族后来又出了一位志向高远的伟人——那位先辈从下层白手起家，振兴祖业，又成功把歌德宾馆开回了上层。
E: Luckily later on another ancestor from my family started empty-handed and revived our family business. Once again, Goethe Hotel was moved back to the Overworld.

C: 首先，如果你感到自己需要一些休闲时间却脱不开身，你就可以求助社友，拜托他们替你打掩护；其次，你也可以在有空时协助配合其他成员。
E: Firstly, if you ever feel you need some time to relax but can't get away from your duties, you can ask other Society members to help cover for you. Secondly, you can also cover for other members whenever you can.

C: …你当真不是来拿我寻开心的？
E: ...Are you sure you're not here to mess with me?

C: 既然你都这么问了，那我就给你简单讲一讲——你知道「大寒潮」吧？
E: Now that you've asked, let me explain to you. Do you know the "Eternal Freeze?"

C: 你们的乐队都有谁？
E: Who's in your band?

C: ——他那天忘记把琴收起来了！
E: He forgot to put the guitar away that day!

C: 祝你早日回家。
E: Hope you can get home soon.

C: 不过当时我真的以为你们要下死手…唉，希露瓦她…真是狠心……
E: But at that time I really thought you guys were going to kill me... *sigh* Serval... Can't believe she'd have the heart to do that to me...

C: 我们当然不能接受黑衣人的不平等条约。但必须承认，没有他们的技术，贝洛伯格的复兴将异常艰难。
E: Naturally, we cannot accept an unequal treaty from those people dressed in black. However, I admit that without their technology, the revival of Belobog would be extremely difficult.

C: 你和希露瓦关系怎么样？
E: How's your relationship with Serval?

C: 你接着忙吧。
E: I'll leave you to your work.

C: 希露瓦…对于她的种种行为，我只能是睁一只眼闭一只眼了。
E: Serval... I can only turn a blind eye to her various actions.

C: 先到这里吧。
E: Let's end the chat here then.

C: 已备份的信息会派上什么用场？
E: Will the copied information be of any use?

C: 咦？虽然虎克经常听到「坏家伙」的说法，可那个叔叔对虎克可好啦！
E: Huh? I do hear a lot about him being a "bad guy," but he's really nice to me!

C: 哦，我们又见面了！
E: Oh, we meet again!

C: 谁收你钱了，谁逼你听了
E: No one made you listen — whatever you were hopin'
...Yeah.

C: 哈哈哈，不愧是你！早听人说贝洛伯格的大英雄惜财如命，看来关于你的传言不都是毫无根据嘛！
E: Hahahaha, I knew you'd say that! Rumor has it that the great hero of Belobog is stingy! Looks like those rumors about you are true after all!

C: 哦，你说上次的事。
E: Oh, you mean last time, right?

C: 你看——这界面，这动效，这完美的手指压感和点击反馈……
E: Just check it out! Look at its interface and these animations, and experience this perfectly designed haptic pressure sensors and tap-feedback system...

C: 跟它玩一会儿吧。
E: Why not play with it a little?

C: 只有我的工资没变，唉。
E: The only thing that hasn't gone up is my salary...

C: 兄弟，该换岗了。
E: It's time to switch posts, buddy.

C: 原来这么简单啊。
E: So it's that simple.

C: 怎么了？
E: Huh?

C: 这个「什么什么权益会社」的成员啊，平时专门帮人翘班……
E: The members of this "Rightful Whatevers Society" help people skip work...
Uh...

C: 不会睡过了吧？
E: Have they slept in?

C: 欢迎来到克里珀堡。
E: Welcome to Qlipoth Fort.

C: 是不是该去找个工作了……
E: Might be time for me to find a new job...

C: 呃，让爸爸再酝酿酝酿……
E: Uh, let me stew in it just a little bit longer...

C: 你说要是我们买了票…
E: If we had bought tickets...

C: 眼光要放长远些。
E: We should focus on the long run.

C: 如果你在游览途中遇到了什么问题，或者对我们的展览有什么意见或建议，都可以来找我聊聊——
E: If you have any questions along your tour, or if you have any feedback or opinions, welcome to come talk to me...

C: 好久不见，年轻人。祝你享受贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆的探索之旅。
E: It's been a while, youngster. I hope you will enjoy this trip of exploration through the Belobog History and Culture Museum.

C: 那里有一种巨型的浮空兽，叫做「六眼飞鱼」。咱当时骑在它身上，足足鏖战了两三个时辰，好悬没让它给咱囫囵个儿吞下去！
E: It had a giant airborne beast called a six-eyed flying fish. I stood on it, and we were locked in battle for hours. It was a miracle it didn't swallow me whole!

C: 这样也好…吃饭就该有吃饭的样子，前些日子大家都乱了心思，来吃饭的人几乎人人心事重重，这碗里的菜肴都没了味道。
E: This is actually a good thing... A restaurant should feel like a restaurant. Back then, everyone was so troubled and weighed down by their worries that they couldn't even fully enjoy the dishes I had carefully prepared for them.

C: 不要催啦不要催啦！
E: Alright! Alright! Just stop with all the Ambrosial Arbor stuff!

C: 你为什么执着于写诗？
E: Why are you so obsessed with writing poetry?

C: 没有。
E: No.

C: 哎呀，我这…确实不好意思，我们俩是有点儿上头，没注意到周围。
E: Oh, I... I'm really sorry about that. We kind of went a bit goblin mode there and should've paid more attention to our surroundings.

C: 呦，客人您又来了！阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务！
E: Welcome back, dear customer! The Arma Correctional Group is at your service!

C: 客人您这话说得，好像我们是一群野人似的。这做生意无非讲究一个低买高卖...哦不，互惠互利，有什么难的？
E: You seem to be implying we're uncivilized, dear customer. Doing business is all about buying low and selling high — I mean, mutual profit. It's not that difficult.

C: 唉！愁啊……
E: Ah! I'm so anxious...

C: 你慢慢等吧，告辞。
E: Be patient. He'll be back. I'm off.

C: 哎，要是爹娘是地衡司的人就好了，哪会碰上这么多幺蛾子……
E: *sigh* I wish my parents worked at the Realm-Keeping Commission. Then I wouldn't have to deal with all these time-wasters...

C: 哎，二百年又二百年…再不升迁，我都要蜕生结卵了……
E: Ah, two centuries passed, and then two centuries more... If I don't get my promotion, I'll undergo my hatching rebirth soon...

C: 哈哈，不过区区神策府，未必曾听过我的威名……
E: Haha, sure. a simple Seat of Divine Foresight may not have heard of my mighty reputation...

C: 你可以看看神策府的石狮子，就是景元为了纪念这头雪狮子而建立的，因它在家中排行老三，所以它也被尊称为「雪狮三公」。
E: Those stone lions you can see out the front of the Seat of Divine Foresight were erected by Jing Yuan to commemorate his dear friend Snowmoon the snow lion. Because it was the third cub of its litter, it became known as Snow Lion the Third.

C: 唉哟，真是对不起！我这两天忙着记录各种罪犯的案卷，脑子里都是罪犯的事，闹出乌龙了，您可千万别见怪！
E: Agh! I'm so, so sorry! I've been busy these two days recording all kinds of criminal cases. My head's filled with stuff about them, so please don't take this personally!

C: 这孩子…你自己不也是年轻人？年轻人别学老人说话，老气横秋的。
E: ...Aren't you a youth, yourself? Kids shouldn't talk like their elders, it makes you look old.

C: 调查嘛，聊天也是调查，看看风景也是调查，找得到受人赞扬，找不到也没人怪罪我，我就喜欢这样的工作。
E: Well, you know, investigations. I like to think chatting is also one form of investigating. Admiring the scenery is an investigation too. When you solve a case, you're praised — but if you don't, nobody even blames you. This is the kind of job I like.

C: 等一下，我这仔细一看才看出来…您是{NICKNAME}？嘿，您看看我这记性，竟然忘了咱们流云渡的大英雄！
E: Wait a minute. Let me take a closer look... You're {NICKNAME}? Hey, I somehow forgot who the great hero of Cloudford was!

C: 别的地方我管不到，但在这流云渡我说话还是有点分量的。您要是有什么需要，我一定优先为您处理。
E: I'm no use elsewhere, but at least here in Cloudford my words still hold some weight. If there's anything you need, you'll be my top priority.

C: 其实吧，要我说，我从来没有把他当成一回事。
E: Honestly, if you ask me, I've never taken him seriously.

C: 太卜大人好清静，您也别在这里到处打听了。再见，不送。
E: The master diviner likes her peace and quiet, and you should stop asking so many questions around here. So long for now. Please let yourself out.

C: 多说无益，得让那人当众道歉。
E: There's no use in just talking about it. Make them issue a public apology.

C: 坏了就坏了，没坏就没坏，在我们工造司都是一句话的事，怎么还能扯出这么多有的没的啊？哎，我这嘴又笨，只得愣在那儿张着嘴「阿吧阿吧」半天讲不出话，丢死人了。
E: If it's broken, it's broken. Otherwise, it's fine. That's all we need to say at the Artisanship Commission. So why do they keep blathering on about all this other unrelated stuff? And I'm not good with words either, so I just stand there stuttering and can't get my point across. It's just so embarrassing.

C: 大人心细，连这都记得。没错，我是主动请缨调往鳞渊境的。我儿…他在围剿药王秘传的战斗中牺牲了。
E: You have a fantastic memory, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. That's right. I volunteered for this Scalegorge Waterscape assignment. My son... He lost his life in combat against the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 我不便再打扰了。
E: I won't bother you any further.

C: 让我看看你这有什么？
E: Let me see what you have.

C: 客官您又来了，最近有蜕生的客人留下了些好东西，您赏脸看看吧。
E: You're back. We've had some hatching rebirth customers leave behind a few more items recently. Please have a good look.

C: 说是出了什么大事，云骑军正在排查，一切事项都得延后，哎，我就被晾在这儿了。
E: I was told that something huge had happened, and the Cloud Knights were doing an investigation, so everything had to be put off. So, I'm left here, clueless.

C: 我这才出差了多久，怎么感觉一回来整个世界都变了，这还是我认识的丹鼎司吗？ 到底发生什么事了……
E: I wasn't even away for that long! Why do I feel like the whole world has changed? Is this still the Alchemy Commission I know? What happened...?

C: 丹枢大人她真是…世事难料啊……
E: About Lady Dan Shu... Life truly is unpredictable...

C: 我来办事，刚好问你点问题…
E: I'm here for business. There are some things I wanted to ask you...

C: 幽囚狱里的奇葩还不够多么，什么可以变成其他囚犯样子的变形怪，能思考会说话的玉兆之类的，我这都算是小场面了。
E: There's enough weird stuff going on in The Shackling Prison. A shapeshifter that can transform into other prisoners, a Jade Abacus that can think and talk... What I do is not a big deal at all in here.

C: 你和旁边这位认识吗？
E: Do you know the person next to you?

C: 我们是…域外商会的，不是你熟悉的本地商会。
E: No, we are from... an Outworlder merchant guild. Not the local one you know.

C: 放生是为了消除自我的业缘，培养一种大爱，当然有用啦！
E: Of course it does! It's a way to purify my karma and achieve greater love!

C: 你要是有空，记得回来多参加几次放生活动啊！这可是积攒功德的大好事。哎呀，长此以往，搞不好还能洗刷掉我们这些药师信徒身上的污名。
E: Do come back and join our release activities if you are free! That's going to earn you lots of merits. In the long run, we might be able to clear our name as Yaoshi's followers.

C: 哎，我就喜欢这市井长巷里的烟火气，这年头可不好找，难得罗浮上还有金人巷这么有意思的地方……
E: I just love the atmosphere of ordinary life in this alley. It is not easy to find something as interesting as Aurum Alley these days on the Luofu...

C: 您可以先试试脆瓜胡辣鸡丁、鲫香肉丝和陈婆豆腐这些招牌菜。这些都是历经时间考验的名菜，点这些准不会错。
E: You can try our trademark dishes like the crisped melon and diced chicken, pork slices in fish sauce, and Granny Chen's Tofu to start. These are all famous dishes that have withstood the test of time. You can't go wrong with them.

C: 哪种变形生物？这个问题没什么意义嘛…我也不知道该从哪里开始回答…感觉我只能告诉你，我不是哪种变形生物。
E: What kind of shapeshifter? That's a meaningless question... I don't even know how to start answering that... Feels like I can only tell you that I'm not any kind of shapeshifter.

C: 没听过？唉，我料到了。哼，这些年方壶的风头尽被罗浮盖去了。
E: You haven't? *sigh* As I suspected. The Fanghu has been overshadowed by the Luofu these days!

C: 假如我装上了躯干与手脚，你想象不到的麻烦就会接踵而来。
E: If I had my body and my limbs, I'd be immediately facing troubles beyond your wildest imagination.

C: 好在各部门的反应还算迅速，联通外界的出入口被及时封锁，关押恶逆的「无间区」与更深处的「黑绳区」也未受波及。
E: Thankfully, the various commissions took swift action to seal the portals connecting this prison to the outside world before anything worse could happen. This prevented the Avici Gaol, where evildoers are confined, and the Kalasutra Gaol located deeper within the prison from being thrown into chaos.

C: 要是能有懂欣赏的主顾，或者是路过的游客恰巧有「眼缘」，生意归生意，聊几句也是件雅事。
E: If I happen to meet a customer who knows how to appreciate fandangles, or who is destined to become the new owner of my fandangles, it'll be a pleasure to do business or just exchange a few words with them.

C: 瞧一瞧看一看！今天不把杂技看，余生千年留遗憾！吞火球、踏燃碳，空中飞人大家赞！四方的宾朋来围观，个个都说——来了悠姐杂技团，给我千金也不换！
E: Hear ye! Hear ye! Enjoy acrobatic shows for a tiny fee! Come to Ms. Yo's acrobatic troupe and take a seat! Breathing fire, walking on burning coal, and thrilling trapeze acts for you to see! Let go of your burdens, and relax yourself in glee!

C: 没办法，现在只能克制克制再克制，不能再冲动消费了…嗯，一定不能再冲动了…唉，怎么办？以后总会遇到让彦卿克制不住冲动的宝剑。
E: Well, for now I just gotta hold back and resist the urge to spend recklessly... Yep, definitely can't give in to impulse buys anymore... *sigh* This is gonna be so hard for me! I know I'll inevitably come across tempting swords that will test my self-control in the future.

C: 忙倒是不忙，最近空闲时间还挺多的。
E: Not at all. I've had quite a lot of free time lately.

C: 那为何执着于当将军？
E: Why do you insist on being the general then?

C: 结论：「我们」需要在科研价值消耗殆尽前逃出幽囚狱。否则，「我们」将被销毁。
E: Conclusion: It is imperative that we break out of the Shackling Prison before we lose our value as a subject for scientific research to avoid being destroyed.

C: 还有别的事，先不聊了。
E: I got to go. Talk to you later.

C: 这样吧，我可以为您解答一些职责范围内的常识。
E: How about this? I can tell you some common knowledge of the responsibilities here.

C: 有什么有趣的当物吗？
E: Do you have any interesting pledges?

C: 我也不知真假，所以在他走后不久，我心血来潮冲他站的位置放了一枪。
E: I couldn't tell if it was true either, so not long after he left, I fired a shot on a whim at where he once stood.

C: 啊不过…您要是赏脸来赶上说书场，那就权当另说。
E: Ahhh, but... if you would flatter me by coming to my show, then that's another matter entirely.

C: 明白了，要是想来不夜侯听人说书，现在可还不是时候，先生他呀还没有准备好。要不，您点壶茶，在店里坐一会儿怎么样呢？
E: I see. If you've come to the Sleepless Earl to hear some stories, you're too early — Xiyan xiansheng isn't ready yet. How about a pot of tea to while away the time?

C: （适当地沉默）
E: (Deliberate silence)

C: {F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}又碰见你了。想吃点什么，记得去「至味盛苑」预定一桌吧，别在星槎海浪费时间了。你找我是有什么事儿吗？
E: {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, fancy bumping into you again. What'll you have? Don't forget to make a reservation at the Garden of Gourmet, and stop wasting your time at Starskiff Haven. What can I do for you?

C: 说到咱这儿星槎海，就不能不提司辰宫，提到咱这儿司辰宫啊，就不能不提驭空大人。
E: You can't talk about Starskiff Haven without mentioning the Palace of Astrum, and you can't talk about the Palace of Astrum without mentioning Madam Yukong.

C: 咦，好恶心。
E: Ew, gross.

C: …叫「蛋生」。后来有一天，神仙姐姐突然能开口说人话了，她说，你们还是管我叫「沐芳」吧。大家怕亵渎了仙人，就改口叫她「沐芳神女」啦。
E: ...Eggborn. Then one day, the celestial lady suddenly began to speak like a human. She said, "you can call me Mufang." Everyone was afraid of offending a celestial, so they called her "Goddess Mufang" instead.

C: 镇上有个富商，因为很喜欢做善事，大家都叫他周大善人。可是，老天爷不开眼，周大善人的孩子却是个天生的呆瓜，脑袋比牛好不了多少。
E: There was a wealthy merchant in town. Everyone called him Kind Zhou because he always helped people. But fate was mean to him. His son was born a dummy and had difficulties doing everything.

C: 只要能从断壁残垣和废纸残章里拼凑出足够多的蛛丝马迹，也许就能引领我们找到这件仙舟上最大的秘密……
E: So long as we can piece together enough clues from the rubble and scraps around us, perhaps it'll lead us to finding that legendary secret here on Xianzhou...

C: 比你自己想象的更重要，我向你保证。
E: More than you think, I can assure you.

C: 工作经验越久，朴素的道理就越实用——认真对待工作，工作也会认真对待你。
E: The more experienced you are, the more you'll realize that how serious you treat a job is how serious it treats you.

C: 啊，{NICKNAME}，是我，是我，你还记得我吗？
E: It's me, {NICKNAME}. Do you still remember me?

C: 我们也早点回去吧…
E: Let's go back soon...

C: 假新闻！我不接受采访了。
E: That's fake news! This interview is over.

C: 敢在这个当口偷懒的人，我一律罚去配合地衡司…
E: If anyone dares slack off at this juncture, I'll send 'em off to the Realm-Keeping Commission...

C: 哪那么沉重…「南帝」答应过我，说是参加完什么盛会后就见一面。
E: Why so serious? Southern Emperor promised me that he'd meet me after some banquet.

C: 呦，怎么说老朋友，要上点情绪价值吗？
E: So, how about it, old friend? How about some emotional offerings?

C: 还是随便聊几句吧…
E: It's better if we just have a chat...

C: 亲爱的，我问过仙舟人啦！
E: Darling, I asked the Xianzhou people!

C: 你是说当时还是现在？
E: Do you mean then, or now?

C: 我想了解下竞锋舰引擎。
E: I'd like to know more about the Skysplitter's engine.

C: 一般咱们都能得到冠名权啊？
E: We're usually able to obtain naming rights.

C: 我听说书都听得热血沸腾了…
E: I'm so pumped up after hearing the storytellers' tales...

C: 怎么是你？
E: It's you!?
