C: 我只是想救他的命。
E: I just wanted to save his life.

C: 没法用「正确和错误」来衡量。
E: This can't be measured with "right or wrong".

C: 哼两句我听听？
E: Wanna hum a few lines for me?

C: 销金。
E: Giltun.

C: 你谁啊？我们之前有说过话吗？
E: Who are you? Have we ever meet before?

C: 而魔阴身的疯狂之于野兽，更胜于野兽之于人类…它是一种更加本源的生命力，抛弃血肉形态的充分生长，光是想想就让我感觉到痛苦。
E: But the difference between a mara-struck body's madness and that of a beast is even greater than the difference between a beast and a human... It's a more primitive form of life, a vitality that discards even the concept of corporeal existence. Just thinking about it hurts me.

C: 那里有着各种各样的奇物。
E: There're all kinds of diverse Curios over there.

C: 其实我心里有个成型的计划，不过缺的既不是工具、也不是人手，而是时间——需要至少一个琥珀纪来准备。
E: I've actually got a complete plan in mind. I'm lacking in neither the tools nor manpower to complete it, but time — I need at least one Amber Era to get things ready.

C: 毕竟我是偃偶，没有你们这些有机生物潜藏在基因里的「求生欲」，你要是狠狠打我呢，只要没把我打坏，我都不会感到害怕，只会感到兴奋！
E: I'm a puppet, after all, devoid of any "survival instinct" present in organic lifeforms like you. You can smash me all you like, and as long as you don't break me, I won't feel an ounce of fear, only thrill!

C: 看在你先前打的那么用力的份上，让人家想想…
E: Mm, you certainly pummeled me hard enough before, so let me think...

C: 不过，那些日子代行将军职务，确实有不一样的体会——
E: Although, my days acting as a General were indeed a unique experience...

C: 不过真相却和他们想的差之千里。我自幼受学卜算，穷究命运变通。但论及「命运究竟是否可以改变」，这个终极之问，却无力回答。
E: However, the truth is far from their assumptions. I have studied divination since I was a child and extensively examined the fickle outcomes of fate, yet I remain powerless before the ultimate question of whether destiny can be altered.

C: 哦，当然了，还要感谢你，{NICKNAME}。也请替我把感谢带给丹恒和三月七。你们又帮了「罗浮」一个大忙，这人情债景元怕是还不完了，哈哈。
E: Oh, of course, I would like to thank you as well, {NICKNAME}. Please pass on my gratitude to Dan Heng and March 7th, also. You greatly assisted the Luofu once more. I fear that this is a debt that Jing Yuan will never be able to repay, haha.

C: 但打过几轮以后我信了。
E: But after playing a few hands with them, I've come to believe in them.

C: 那为啥我们还在加班…
E: So what are we doing working overtime for, then...

C: 是不是散热器坏了…
E: Is this thing overheating...?

C: 你还年轻，免不了要……
E: At your age, it's all part of the process...

C: 爸爸，妈妈也在那里吗？
E: Dad, is Mom there too?

C: 让我再想想吧……
E: I need some time to think about it...

C: 没事，等你以后长大就明白了。
E: It's fine. You'll understand when you're older.

C: 家人之间也必须尊重彼此感受。
E: Family members must also respect each other's feelings.

C: 就像我们会在别人的名字后面加上「教授」、「老师」…等一系列称呼，对话也能建立在「与学者对话」的认知中，它潜移默化但行之有效。
E: Just as we add titles like "Professor" or "Teacher" before someone's name, conversations can be built on the premise of "talking to a scholar." Subtle, yet effective.

C: …是你啊，{NICKNAME}。
E: ...Oh, it's you, {NICKNAME}.

C: …歌耳戈，你知道的，无论哪一世，我都想做一个合格的王…和一位合格的父亲。
E: ...Gorgo, you know, in every life, I've always wanted to be a worthy king... and a worthy father.

C: 所以，「明天见」…其实也是一种自我实现的预言啦！
E: In other words, "see you tomorrow"... is also a self-fulfilling prophecy!

C: 说得我有些感动了…
E: Aww, you're making me feel all emotional...

C: 若是可以，我想与天外的棋士交手，那一定极为有趣。
E: If possible, I'd love to play a game with chess masters from beyond the sky... That would be incredibly fascinating.

C: 我证明！你一天念叨好几回呢。还说等白厄哥回来…一定要让他把这些年的冒险故事全讲给你听！
E: I can vouch for that! You bring him up several times a day. You even said when Phainon comes back... you'll make him tell you all about his adventures from these past years!

C: 哈哈，回家前，总想着能好好歇息一阵子，但很快就会发现有不少事等着去做。
E: Haha, before heading home I thought I could get some good rest, but I quickly found out there's quite a lot to be done.

C: 还有时间写诗吗？
E: Still got time for poetry?

C: 把两者组合起来，你的意思是……
E: Combine the two, you mean...

C: 劳你费心啰，树庭女孩！
E: Thanks, Grove girl!

C: 哈哈…就算是大地兽也拦不住呢，真拿她们没办法。
E: Haha... Even a dromas couldn't stop them. There's just no dealing with them.

C: 这位可是唯一真神大地兽！
E: Behold, the one and only True Dromas God!

C: 但身为君王，我必须承担每步棋的后果，任由自己耽溺在蜜酿之中，只会满盘皆输。所以，我依旧不能喝。
E: But as a king, I must bear the weight of every move on the board. Indulging myself in honey brew would only lead to total defeat. So, I still can't drink it.

C: 这是一口凝结着记忆的喷泉，水波中隐约可见你熟悉的前代泰坦们的身影。
E: This is a fountain crystallized with memories. You can catch faint glimpses of those past Titans in the rippling water.

C: 这证件上的是你么？
E: Is that you on the ID?

C: 没办法，按照流程，入库的物品需要走勘验流程。
E: There's no other way. According to the procedure, any suspicious incoming items need to undergo inspection.

C: 是我。
E: Yes, that's me.

C: 万幸这里既不缺盆栽素材，也不缺时间和耐心，非要说的话，还是缺一样——
E: Thankfully, there isn't a lack of gardening materials here. I also have the time and patience. So honestly, the only thing missing is—

C: 怎么？你也想上台比划两下子？
E: Oh? You wanna go up to the stage to try your martial moves too?

C: 除了特等奖，其他都是滞销货啊。真是正版么？怎么颜色这么糙？
E: They're all unpopular items except the special prize... Are they really official goods? Why are the colors so rough?

C: 你看，现在都是拍幻戏的唱歌，唱歌的说相声，说相声的变戏法，变戏法的当艺人。
E: See, now it's all about immersia actors singing, singers doing crosstalk, crosstalk artists doing magic tricks, and those trained in magic tricks going into acting.

C: 文森特•维塔。
E: Vincent Weta.

C: 不可思议的进化，或将让海螺报恩的故事成为现实
E: An unbelievable evolution that may well make true the tale of the conch repaying its debt.

C: 被封印的半身。
E: A sealed bust.

C: 在不同文明中，设计自动化工程的设计师都有共同的特性——就是懒。自动化设计的初衷都是为了更好地偷懒，所以换句话说，偷懒是科技进步的重要助力。
E: In different civilizations, automation designers all share a common trait — indolence. The objective of automotive design is to do less and more efficiently. In other words, laziness is the key driver of the advancement of technology.

C: 双手叉腰，低头，仰头，向左向右，开始！
E: Hands on hips, lower your head, raise it up, rotate it left and right, let's go!

C: 偷懒的人也调整了自己的动作，看来大家都进入状态了。
E: The slacker has fixed up their movements. Looks like everyone is in shape.

C: 为此次比赛量身打造！
E: Tailored just for this competition!

C: 一幅二手物件交易业务的广告画。尽管仙舟人对旧物没有特殊情感，但二手物件总归是要便宜些的。
E: It is an advertisement that promotes the business of selling second-hand objects. Used goods are always cheaper, though the Xianzhou natives do not have a passion for vintage.

C: 一尊方方正正的玉兆晶石。最好不要把它当作板凳——这可是精密仪器。
E: It is a square jade abacus crystal. Please bear in mind that it is a precise instrument, not a stool.

C: 「曾点燃新伯利恒的太阳，以巨量辐射炙烤其地表，使之玻璃化；曾在亚甸星上掀起巨大的气旋，将其生态系统破坏殆尽……」
E: "He once ignited the sun of New Bethlehem, vitrifying its planetary surface with a huge amount of radiation. He once also created a gigantic vortex on Aedirn, dealing a devastating blow to its ecosystem..."

C: 「星历<unbreak>5000</unbreak>年至今，仙舟联盟陆续治愈沙氏血瘟、晶体肿瘤、黑泉症、共鸣寄生虫感染、返祖衰退症…等三千八百种新生顽疾。」
E: "From <unbreak>5000</unbreak> SC until now, the Xianzhou Alliance has cured <unbreak>3800</unbreak> novel diseases such as Shars Virus, Crystal Cancer, Dark Spring Syndrome, Resonant Parasite Infection, Degeneration Disease, and many others..."

C: 演奏水平也太高了吧。
E: The level of this performance is off the chain!

C: 赶紧回去卖冰淇淋！
E: Come on! Let's go back and sell some ice cream!

C: 它不值得我浪费时间。
E: It is not worth my time.

C: 翻箱子。
E: Check the package.

C: 永不熄灭的丹炉屹立于此，炉心里微蓝的微光，是丹士们在加班时不变的信仰。
E: The elixir crucible with everlasting fire is erected here. The bluish glow in the furnace core motivates the alchemists when they are working overtime.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 这是金人巷的码头工人日夜不停分拣的到港货物，他们会按照货运订单需求装箱发货。
E: These are the incoming goods that are tirelessly sorted day and night by the Aurum Alley port workers. They will pack and deliver goods according to order requests.

C: 「因为人们相信这个箱子中装着『帝弓遗物』，而『信仰』是有质量的。」
E: "This is because people believe that this box contains the Reignbow's Relic. Faith has weight."

C: 「此处乃是金人巷未解之谜：午夜谜箱。」
E: "This is the unsolved mystery of Aurum Alley: The Midnight Mystery Boxes."

C: 要是能被所有人理解，那就不叫艺术了。
E: It would not be art if everyone could understand it.

C: 我想和你…合二为一。
E: I would like us to... two become one.

C: 你相信因果报应吗？
E: Do you believe in karma?

C: 空气里弥漫的都是利益的味道，哎，堕落啊…我前不久听他们在说，说有个什么巷子里，有个无所不能的当铺，号称什么都收。
E: The air reeks of money. Boy, such depravation... Not long ago, I heard the people saying that there's an incredible pawn shop in an alley that buys anything.

C: 悬在头顶的未必是剑，也可以是灯笼。
E: What's hanging above the head may not be a blade. It can also be a lantern.

C: 这块墓碑表面的碑文格外不同，原有的碑文已被毁得面目全非，你仔细辨认，只能勉强认出「爱妻」几个字。
E: The inscription of this tombstone looks different from the others. The original inscription is now indecipherable. On a closer look, you can only see the words, "my beloved wife."

C: 淋浴的水声始终响着，平稳，空洞，没有变化，没有意义，只是…有点吓人。
E: You have heard the sound of a running shower this whole time, steady, empty, unchanging. There is no significance. It's just a little... creepy.

C: 前面的路被拦住了。作为一个礼貌的无名客，你应该知趣地选择掉头。
E: The road ahead is blocked. As a polite Nameless, you should turn back without further prompting.

C: 信用点和苜蓿币皆可支付。
E: Credits and Alfalfa credits accepted.

C: 你移开视线，不再与望远镜大眼瞪小眼。
E: You avert your gaze, no longer meeting the stare of the telescope.

C: 这是一家典当铺，可用珍贵的物品或情绪作抵押。梦中总是有人需要这类服务。
E: This is a pawnshop where precious items or emotions can be used as collateral. There will always be people who need such services in the dream.

C: 「被遗弃…我们…出不去…」细小的嘈杂声，从大脑深处窸窸窣窣地钻出，敲击在脆弱的鼓膜上，「留下来吧…这里太空了…留下吧……」
E: "Abandoned... We... We can't get out..." A soft cacophony, rustling from deep within your mind and knocking on your fragile eardrums. "Stay with us... It's too lonely here... Stay..."

C: 面朝栏杆与高楼，你握紧了拳头……
E: Facing the railings and skyscrapers, you clench your fists...

C: 即使梦境的一滴水珠，落在座位上也是一场湍流。
E: Even a single water drop in the Dreamscape becomes a deluge when dropped on the seat.

C: 每团梦泡里的美梦都足以填满人的脑海——当然，噩梦也是。
E: Every dream in the dream bubbles is enough to fill a person's head — as can the nightmares.

C: 你可以继续上路，也可以提出问题。盛会之梦会响应你的所有诉求。
E: You can continue your journey or ask questions. The Dream of Festivities will respond to all your requests.

C: 是这样的，我们苜蓿草银行信贷中心啊，最近刚推出了一款新型理财产品，特别适合您。
E: Well, our Alfalfa Bank Credit Center has recently launched a new financial product. I think it's a perfect fit for you.

C: 喂，旁边的，站这么近，是想偷听我成功的秘诀吗？告诉你也无妨，反正你做不到。
E: Hey, you there, you're standing too close. Trying to learn the secrets to my success? Lemme tell you then. It doesn't matter, because you won't be able to replicate it.

C: 噢，你也对我刚考的汽水品鉴技能证感兴趣吧？我知道，你肯定想看。
E: Oh, you're interested in the soda appraisal skill certificate I just obtained as well? I know, you want a peek.

C: 嘿嘿，会耐心听我说的，你是第一个！好朋友！
E: Heheh, you're the first one who's ever had the patience to sit through my monologue! You're a good friend!

C: 我是冲着家族来的。
E: I'm here for The Family.

C: 您好呀，这里可真美，不是吗？您瞧，从这里望过去——
E: Hello, it's pretty here, isn't it? Look, out in the distance...

C: 人偶、幻觉、记忆…多好的题材，嗯…下个短篇就叫《人偶之梦》吧，您觉得如何？
E: Puppets, illusions, memories... So many themes. Mm... I'll name my next short chapter A Dream of Puppets. What do you think?

C: 那当然，皮皮西人就是了不起！我们是宇宙中最智慧的种族，也是最勤奋最有活力的人群！聪敏上进，真诚友善，和某些只知道凭身高显摆的生物完全不一样！
E: Because the Pepeshi ARE a great people! We're the most intelligent race in the whole universe, as well as the most hard-working and energetic! Smart, motivated, sincere, friendly — we're completely different from creatures who only know how to show off their height!

C: 好！别忘了你的话！你这无礼之徒，等着被皮皮西勾拳揍得鼻青脸肿吧！
E: Alright, rude! Don't forget what you said! Just wait until you're beaten black and blue by a Pepeshi right hook!

C: 我的东西在你的包里。
E: Something of mine is in your backpack.

C: 和报纸一样，电视新闻最重要的是搞清楚什么能说，什么不能。
E: Like newspapers, the most important thing about TV news is to figure out what can and can't be said...

C: 不管什么时候都蒸蒸日上，不管什么地方都一片祥和。没有需要战胜的敌人，也没有需要担心的明天。
E: Times are prosperous no matter when, and it's peaceful no matter where you are. There are no enemies to fight here, and no tomorrows to ever worry about.

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 乌玛清了清嗓子，整理好衣襟，重新恢复到最得体的模样。
E: Uma clears her throat, straightens out her clothing, and sets up her most appealing look.

C: 但我还能责怪谁呢？这都是我咎由自取……
E: But who can I blame but myself for everything... I brought this upon myself...

C: 男人的脸上露出释怀的表情，好像在一瞬间接受了自己的现状。
E: The man reveals a look of relief. It's as if he has accepted his fate at that moment.

C: 或许我骨子里并不是一个喜欢独立的人。要是真能一辈子待在巢里，那也不赖。
E: Perhaps independence is not my thing. The idea of staying home forever doesn't sound bad to me.

C: 一定是父亲把我保护得太好了。他以前就这样，恨不得把一切都装进瓶子里才行。
E: Dad must have been too protective of me. He's always like this. If possible, he would rather keep me safe in a bottle himself.

C: 之于我，绘画是生命力的涌现和映射。简单如此。
E: For me, painting is an emergence and a mapping of life force. That's it.

C: 如果您之前见过他，那么我非常理解您的好奇心…因为我对他也抱有同样的*好奇*。
E: If you have met him before, then I understand your curiosity very well... as I share the same *curiosity* about him.

C: 当然，这可没有夸大的成分。家族之所以能把梦境打理得井井有条，就是因为各家系能精诚团结，全无冲突与分歧。
E: Of course. That is not hyperbole. The only reason that The Family was able to make sure the Dreamscape runs in such an orderly manner is due to the various families' earnest unity. We are all without conflict or disagreement.

C: 这前前后后我也调研了好几个月了，愣是没找到什么还有开发潜力的贸易口子。
E: I've already surveyed the trends for months — I just can't seem to find any potential breakthrough that's worth developing.

C: 自动乐团怎么你了？
E: What has the automated orchestra done to you?

C: 自动乐团…也是拥有灵魂的演奏者吗？
E: The automated orchestra... do they have souls?

C: 玩得开心，朋友，别让梦境留有遗憾！
E: Have fun, my friend! Don't leave any regrets in the Dreamscape!

C: 我不懂二次元，你教教我吧。
E: I'm not. Tell me about it.

C: 但他们不了解我，也不了解建筑学。我可能…也不够了解他们吧。
E: But they do not understand me, nor architecture. Perhaps... I do not understand them well enough, either.

C: 建筑是一种机器！一切符合生物使用需求的东西，都自然而然是美的，而绝不需要有人去倒果为因，凭空追寻艺术！他们追寻的所谓艺术，无非是「真空中的球形鸡」罢了！
E: Buildings are a type of machine! Something that is completely suited to use by organics is naturally beautiful. There is no need for people to flip the process on its head in a meaningless search for artistic beauty! This "art" that they pursue is merely some unrealistic hypothesis!

C: 好的，请您详述问题内容。
E: Acknowledged. Please provide more details.

C: 随时为您服务，尊贵的客人。
E: I'm always here to assist you, esteemed guest.

C: 下次有机会再聊吧。
E: Catch you again next time.

C: 梦里有什么要注意的？
E: Is there anything I should pay attention to in the Dreamscape?

C: 难道你觉得…我看起来不可爱吗？
E: Don't you think... I look cute?

C: 唔…泥人遇水肯定会化啊。所以一直以来，雨季都是凯尔萨斯星上最大的危险。
E: Well... we do dissolve upon contact with water. That's why the rainy season has always been the greatest hazard on Kalsas.

C: 「师兄，狐人这一生不过短短三百余载…相比那浮华缥缈的剑首名号，你可愿意先陪我走完这转瞬如烟的一辈子？」
E: "Senior frater, the life of a foxian is a fleeting three hundred years... Are you willing to forsake the empty title of 'Sword Champion' and accompany me for the remainder of my fleeting existence?"

C: 叮铃铃——叮铃铃！
E: *ring*... *ring*!

C: 拨通「窥梦电话」。
E: Dial the Dreampeek Call.

C: 广告牌上画着一台超酷的玩具机器人，小孩子和大孩子都没法拒绝。
E: There is an illustration of a cool robot toy on the billboard. Adults and children alike find it irresistible.

C: 所以我先代他完成了！绝不能让公义迟到！哈哈哈哈。
E: Now, I've done the kind deed on his behalf. Justice mustn't be delayed! Hahahaha!

C: 停！一定要把我吃掉吗？或许我们可以和平共处？
E: Stop! Do you really have to eat me? Perhaps, we can get along in peace.

C: 看到你手中梦泡的一瞬间，帕姆「蹭」地一下跳了起来——你从未见过它圆润的双足离开车厢地板如此之远。
E: Pom-Pom jumps the moment they see the dream bubble in your hands. You've never seen their chubby feet making it that far from the ground before.

C: 那么，「至尊幸运儿的黑卡」还请您收下…接下来您想干什么就干什么，我就不打扰您了！
E: Well, please keep the Lucky One's Black Card... Now, you're free to do whatever you want. I'll get out of your hair!

C: 相信您一定见过那样的银河吧。
E: I'm sure you have laid eyes on the cosmos of which I speak?

C: 您知道吗？即使在朝露公馆中，也有许多神秘的「未解之谜」……
E: Did you know that even the Dewlight Pavilion contains mysterious "unexplained riddles..."?

C: 家族的邀请遍及寰宇、明察秋毫，所赠的都是够格之人。而这位告解者德行不佳，才干亦不见长，并没有收到邀请。
E: The Family's invites were sent all over the worlds, and their judgment was keen-sighted — all who received them were worthy. But this penitent's morals and talents were both lacking, which is why he did not receive one.

C: 我想和你聊聊。
E: I want to chat with you.

C: 我知道啊，现实的重力总是会打破一切幻想，把人们从天空拽回地面。我早就知道这个道理，只是无力改变……
E: I know, the gravity of reality always shatters all fantasies, dragging them from the sky back to earth. I knew this a long time ago, but I can't do anything to change it...

C: 加入家族？
E: Join The Family?

C: 之前他们确实派人来邀请过我，那会儿我都以为自己要成功了——结果他们一听我是为了钟表小子才加入家族，就又把我退了回来。
E: They actually did send someone to invite me previously, and I thought I was this close to succeeding... In the end they got wind that I was only joining The Family for Clockie, and rejected me.

C: 我问你，如果有两个选项摆在你面前：要么当个无忧无虑的高级打工人，要么为了自由自在地追求梦想而劳碌奔波，你会选哪个？
E: Lemme ask, if you had two choices in front of you: To be a carefree and highly paid employee, or chase your dream through hardships in the name of freedom. Which would you choose?

C: 眼前的皮皮西正仰头望着半空中的哈努兄弟立牌，面色怅然。他身上有种独特的气质，在这熙攘喧闹的人群中显得格格不入。
E: The Pepeshi before you is looking up at the Hanu sign in midair with a sorrowful face. He has a unique aura that makes him stand out in the cacophonous crowd.

C: 在这朝露公馆以外，尽是谎言与欺骗！
E: The world beyond Dewlight Pavilion is full of lies and deception!

C: 说来话长，从我还是个孩子时起，这套战甲就已然浮现于我身……
E: It's a long story. This mecha had manifested on my body since I was little...

C: 我是火焰，是黑暗骑士，是一切邪恶的终结者！
E: I shall be the blaze and the dark knight that puts all evil to an end!

C: 就先聊到这吧。
E: Let's stop here for now.

C: …当初…退役之后，我没按他们说的，靠过去的名声接广告赚流量，而是为了最喜欢的钟表小子，跑来匹诺康尼当皮套演员。
E: At first... After I retired, I didn't listen to them and didn't use my fame to live off of advertising deals. Instead, I came running straight to Penacony to be a costumed performer for my favorite Clockie.

C: 哎呀，自顾自说了这么多，你都听烦了吧。谢谢你听我抱怨，我现在感觉…好多了。
E: Ah, I've ranted for so long, you must be tired of listening to all this. Thank you for listening to my complaints. I actually feel... a lot better now.

C: 喏，这是汽水先生给我的苏乐达，也分你一瓶吧，滴答！
E: Oh, Mr. Soda gave me these SoulGlad, I'll share one with you, too, tick-tock!

C: 能和他们成为兄弟真是太好了，滴答！
E: I'm so happy I became brothers with them, tick-tock!

C: 哎，我也知道，我就是个逗观众开心的，煽情这套玩不太来。等我学成了再给你表演，等着啊！
E: Ah, I know... I just like to make audiences happy, I'm no good at playing with emotion and stuff like that... Let me learn and I'll put on a proper show for you, you just wait!

C: 至少在故事里，要表现得和人家更亲近点。这样台下的客人们才会感到幸福呢。
E: You have to act a little more intimate with me, at least in the story. That is the only way to make the audience happy.

C: 可惜呀，要是故事的开头太过顺利，整本小说就失去吸引人读下去的动力了，所以请容许我暂且卖个关子，避开这个话题。
E: Unfortunately, if a story begins too smoothly, readers will lose interest in the story. So, I will skip this question for now.

C: 你还有事情没告诉我。
E: There's something you haven't told me.

C: 什么嫌疑？你的任务就是这个？
E: What suspicion? Is this your mission?

C: 到时候，我要你也好好地崇拜我一下。
E: When the time comes, I want you to adore me.

C: 我啊…我是隐夜鸫群中的无名小鸟，一位无足轻重的仆从、家族肆意驱使的家佣。
E: Me...? I'm just a nobody in the Nightingale Family. An insignificant servant, an attendant bound to the every whim of The Family.

C: 哎…虽然说这次「谐乐大典」出了大乱子，可这么隆重的典礼，哪里轮得到我们这种第Ⅵ音级的小虾米露面？
E: *sigh*... Despite all the mess with this year's Charmony Festival, such a grand ceremony as that should make no space for small fries like us at scale degree VI, right?

C: 回见，拜拜。
E: Until next time. Later!

C: 人家做考据攻略你喷背景介绍太多、做玩法攻略又嫌干巴巴没内容，和预想中的不同就是质量不行、自己闯关没过就逮着出攻略的人骂。
E: When you put out a guide with ample research, some people will inevitably think the intro is too long. If you do a gameplay strategy, it's boring and lacking in content. If anything differs from expectations, that's a quality problem — and you'll end up with your head on a stake if someone tries to blitz a map but cannot clear it.

C: 呵呵，那我还是机械飞升之后的梅芙恩•伊里斯呢。少来这套！
E: Ha, sure — and I'm Maeven Ellis after her mechanical ascension. Pull the other one!

C: 加拉赫先生呢？
E: What about Mr. Gallagher?

C: 可惜，现实没有如果。倒是这座梦境给了我个重新尝试的机会…我已经开始享受这种*扮演他人*的感觉了，哈哈。
E: Unfortunately, there are no hypotheticals in the real world. But it was this Dreamscape that actually gave me the chance to start again... And I've come to enjoy the feeling of playing another character... Haha.

C: 但我们在梦中所做的一切，都是为了反哺现实——我们在梦中做好准备，从而在现实中更好地飞翔。
E: However, everything that we do in the dream world is to enrich ourselves in reality... We prepare ourselves in the dream that we may fly higher in the real world.

C: 其实我也是义务劳动。流梦礁不像美梦，想来就来，想走就走，只要不出恶性事件，一切都好说。
E: Honestly, this is a voluntary work. The Dreamflux Reef isn't like the sweet dreams. Here, you can come and go as you please. And as long as you don't cause nasty incidents, you can do whatever you want.

C: 您真是英明神武！但这样做难免有些危险。
E: What a brave and mighty hero! But that could be dangerous.

C: 刚脱离公司控制的监狱世界，自然不太安稳，我就这么跟着「钟表匠」他们。一边走，一边记录，有时也帮忙做些书记工作。
E: As a prison world that broke free from the IPC's grasp, it is only natural that this place ended up becoming unstable. Hence, I followed the Watchmaker and the others. As I wandered, I meticulously recorded my observations and occasionally assisted with clerical tasks.

C: 关于流梦礁。
E: About the Dreamflux Reef.

C: 讲讲你的乐坊吧。
E: Tell me a little about your band.

C: 开个玩笑。若说让人印象最深刻，还是一位从我年轻时就时常光顾这里的老人。一杯咖啡，一块面包，一条老狗，他能待一下午。
E: Just kidding. If you're talking about someone who let an impression: There was this old man who came by regularly back when I was young. A cup of coffee, a loaf of bread, and this old dog: Enough for him to stay the entire afternoon.

C: 唉，人心不古，世风日下啊！
E: *sigh* Public decency nowadays. The world is going to the dogs!

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，<color=#dbc291ff>入口的大厅里不是有很多照片吗？</color>小家伙们总在那儿叽叽喳喳地议论参赛的选手，完全没理解比赛的意义啾。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: <color=#dbc291ff>Aren't there a lot of photos by the entrance lobby?</color> The birds are always hunkered there discussing race contenders — they've completely missed the essence of the competition, tweet.

C: 那就快去把小家伙们找回来吧，啾啾！
E: Hurry and bring the little ones back, tweet tweet!

C: 如果不是在这种时候，人家一定会好好地招待客官，让您毕生难忘的啾。
E: If you had come another time, I'd definitely show you a good time that you wouldn't soon forget, tweet.

C: 让我想想…对了，最近剧场里好像出了大事，<color=#dbc291ff>有个房间被搅得乱七八糟的</color>，有个爱探险的孩子，说不定已经钻进去了啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, it seems like something major has happened at the theater recently. <color=#dbc291ff>There's a room that's been made a mess</color> — an adventurous child might already be rummaging through the clutter, tweet!

C: 多年以来，我们一直坚定不移地将苏乐达推向银河中的各个世界。在这个过程中，因为口味、广告、当地法律等问题，苏乐达的推广一度陷入困境。
E: For many years, we have been unwavering in our promotion of SoulGlad to the various worlds in the cosmos. There were many bumps along the journey, over its taste, commercials, local laws, and other problems.

C: 哼，苏乐达一直被模仿，但从未被超越。销量将会证明一切！
E: Hmph, SoulGlad has always had its fair share of copycats, but none has surpassed us. Our sales will prove it once and for all!

C: 家族宣称他们不是有机生命，只是用梦境材料与情感构造的工具——开什么玩笑，他们有身体，有灵魂，有欲望，这和我们无机生命有什么两样！
E: The Family proclaims that they are not organic lifeforms, but tools constructed from the Dreamscape materials and emotions — Preposterous! They have bodies, souls, and desires! How is that any different from us inorganic beings!

C: 暂时只想说这些。
E: I would like to stop here.

C: 真想让您成为我的模特……
E: I really want you to be my model...

C: 就在这位名为莱斯特的男子一筹莫展之际，他的通讯器突然响起。
E: Just as this man named Lester is about to reach his wit's end, his communicator suddenly begins to ring.

C: 「那是我仍在被孕育时就已经烙下的印记，预示着我这一生，都注定常常流下眼泪。」
E: "I was marked while still in the womb. It means I'm predestined to shed many tears in my lifetime."

C: 当你手头有大把花不完的钞票，全银河最昂贵的牛排就是美食。
E: When you have so much wealth you can't spend it all, the most expensive steak in the cosmos becomes gourmet.

C: 牛肉味，嘎嘣脆，蛋白质是鸡肉的六倍！
E: "It has a beef-like flavor, a crunchy texture, and a protein content six times higher than that of chicken!"

C: 我想了解一下母星的家乡菜。
E: I'd like to know more about the food of your home planet.

C: 这个…可能说来话长了。
E: Well... It's a long story.

C: 我只是个公司里的小职员而已，而且还是偏远星球办事处的…基层员工。别说登上晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号了，如果只靠自己，我连入住匹诺康尼的费用都不太能负担得起……
E: I'm just an ordinary employee at the IPC, an entry-level staff member based at an outpost on a remote planet... Considering my finances, living in Penacony is out of reach, not to mention boarding The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand...

C: 可惜…我这辈子恐怕就到头了。
E: Sadly, it feels like I may be reaching the end of my time.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 好，回头再聊吧。
E: Alright, talk to you later.

C: 当然没问题。
E: Of course!

C: 您还需要点别的什么吗？我在这儿值班，如果你有任何需求，随时喊我就好啦！
E: Is there anything else you need? I'm on duty here, so just call for me if you require anything!

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask...

C: 「并不匹配」的意思是？
E: What do you mean when you say they don't seem to meet the hiring criteria?

C: 在您任命我为大副之后，我注意到他极为注重细节，并且对食物品质有极高要求。因此我将他调往食材的供应链部门，他果然在那里大放异彩。
E: After you appointed me as first mate, I noticed this crew member's keen eye for detail and his tremendously high standards for food quality. For those reasons, I transferred him to work in the supply chain for ingredients, where he naturally became a star employee of the department.

C: 我们皮皮西人对新事物总是充满好奇，永远不怕接受挑战，所以遇到些小麻烦也请您不必太过担心，我们肯定能找到解决办法的。
E: Pepeshi tend to harbor curiosity for all things new and would never back down from a challenge. We'll always find a way out, so don't go worrying over minor problems, yeah?

C: 半个琥珀纪前，我可是学校第一批搞摇滚的学生。那还是爵士乐手当道的年代，男学生被要求穿黑色西装才能上台演出。
E: Half an Amber Era ago, I was among the first group of students to dabble in Rock 'n' Roll. That was during the era when jazz musicians still dominated the music scene. Back then, male students were required to wear black suits in order to perform.

C: 不如…整个大活，像知更鸟小姐那样出道做歌手吧，到时候全银河的派对都会抢着邀请我，区区折纸大学的球笼赛预热派对，我都不稀罕来。
E: I might as well aim higher! Maybe I'll try singing like Miss Robin. Then, all the parties across the cosmos will be clamoring for me, and I wouldn't even glance at a mere Spheroid kick-off party at Paperfold University!

C: 结果我当着哈鲁小姐的面，吐得稀里哗啦，像喷发的苏乐达喷泉，呕吐物洒了一地……
E: Only to see me retching uncontrollably, spewing my stomach contents all over the place like a SoulGlad fountain...

C: 但他们怎么明白？所有朋友都只记得你的家庭，却对你本人的努力与成就不屑一顾，多么悲哀啊。
E: I don't expect them to look past any of that. People around you only bother remembering your background, not your efforts or achievements. Sad, huh?

C: 而那些虚名能带来什么？信用点吗？就连她的应允都买不来……
E: And what can this weighty name bring me? Credits? What use is it when I can't even get her to go out with me...

C: 离开残破的废墟，住进完整结实的建筑…看起来理所当然的事，对我们而言却极为困难。
E: Leaving the dilapidated ruins and moving into a complete and sturdy building... Though it seems like such a simple thing, it was extremely difficult for us.

C: 我以高高在上的视角去评判那些当地居民：我看着他们整日躬耕不辍却收获寥寥，看着他们为猎物分配不均而大打出手，并为此生出虚伪的怜悯。
E: I looked down on them with a sense of superiority and judged the locals: I watched them toiling all day to receive meager harvests and get into disputes over the uneven distribution of game meat. I felt an almost hypocritical pity for them.

C: 嘿嘿，那是当然！在这方面我的鼻子可是比哈贝克人还灵敏。
E: Heh-heh, of course! When it comes to things like this, my nose is sharper than the Harbecks'!

C: 前辈们看现在人气不错，就接了些广告，却引起了不少争议。不说折纸论坛吧，光是我们喜剧社内部也有不少反对的声音，担心过度商业化会影响创作。
E: These seniors realized that they were getting popular and accepted some advertising deals, which actually caused quite a lot of controversy. It wasn't just the Paperfold Forum — Even many of our own club members were growing concerned that over-commercialization could affect our works.

C: 还有人眼红那几个走红的前辈，冷嘲热讽地说了几句，前辈们不服气，反击回去。这一来一回，互相数落对方的，又扯出了不少陈年往事。
E: Some people were also jealous of our popular seniors and made some sassy retorts about them. Our seniors wouldn't stand for this and clapped back. A lot of shade was thrown back and forth, and a lot of old memories were dragged up.

C: 如果仍有疑问，请直接提出，我会尽可能为你解答。
E: If you still have any questions, please do ask. I will answer them as best as I can.

C: 然后我就回母校捐书教学，亲自传授商业经验，到时候什么退学警告，什么成绩，狗屁！学院还要主动倒贴我，追着我发通稿夸我是财富学院第一人！
E: Then I'll return to my alma mater to donate books and lecture, passing down my business experience. By then, who will care about the academic warnings or grades? It's all nonsense! The school should subsidize me and chase after me to issue a press release that lauds me as the top figure of Fortune Academy.

C: 有点印象，但不深。
E: I do recall, but not much.

C: 不对，没有「蕉」了，这口癖真是不好改…{NICKNAME}同学，你可是巨星，你的支持肯定能为我引流不少粉丝过来的！记得关注噢，拜托了！
E: Wait, there's no "bana" anymore. It's really hard to kick bad habits... {NICKNAME}, you're a superstar, and your support will surely bring me lots of fans! Don't forget to follow me, please!

C: 麻烦你就帮我美言几句吧，这样等我毕业的时候也算有个念想。
E: Please say something nice to me. That way, at least I'll have good memories when I graduate.

C: 坦白说，我明白自己的成绩很难顺利毕业。筑梦也好，绘画也好，设计也好——哪怕是工地上的苦力活，我都一窍不通。
E: To be honest, I know it will be hard for me to graduate with my grades. Dreamweaving, drawing, design... and even labor work at the site — I know nothing about any of them.

C: {NICKNAME}同学…我想好了，我以后想当一个甜品师。
E: {NICKNAME}... I've made up my mind. I'm going to become a dessert chef.

C: 关于你的前任主人…
E: About your previous owner...

C: 您似乎听腻了「谐音梗」或其他冷笑话。我这里刚好有一个特殊风格的笑话，请您欣赏一下吧。
E: You seem to be tired of puns and corny jokes. I happen to have a joke with a unique style, please enjoy it.

C: 我的心可还年轻着~
E: I'm still young at heart~

C: 哼，不过如此。
E: Hmph, so what?

C: 那你是怎么赚到钱的呢？
E: So, how did you earn your money?

C: 我追逐着梦想来到这里。
E: I came here to pursue my dream.

C: 抱歉，我是独身主义。
E: Sorry, but I'm not interested in relationships.

C: 我们现在就可以跳舞。
E: We can start dancing right now.

C: …匹诺康尼，说好的能实现每个人的梦想呢？我只是想发点小财而已啊……
E: ...They promised us that everyone could fulfill our dreams in Penacony! I just want to make a small fortune...

C: 本来就连玩个全息游戏都坚持不过十分钟，好不容易来一趟匹诺…唔！
E: I can't play holographic games for more than ten minutes. I've made the effort to come to Pena... Ugh!

C: 你都在这儿站了快十分钟了，到底过还是不过啊？
E: You've been standing here for almost <unbreak>10</unbreak> minutes. Are you crossing the road or not?

C: 真的？太酷了！你怎么做到的？
E: Really? Awesome! How did you get them?

C: …我觉得城市的高空绿化还有进步的空间……
E: ...I think there's still room for improvement in the city's overhead greenery...

C: 又一个有趣的人类…
E: Another interesting human...

C: 奇怪，我听那些侍者的口吻，这船怎么就易主了？变更船长这么大的事我怎么不知道？
E: Strange. Judging from how the servers are talking, how come the ship changed hands? How could I not have known about such a huge matter?

C: 你这损失不算什么，我才是真的惨。
E: You think yours is ruined? I don't even know where to begin for mine.

C: 非常抱歉，尊敬的客人们，谐乐大典的延期给二位带来了不便……
E: We're very sorry, esteemed guests, that the Charmony Festival's unexpected delay has inconvenienced the both of you...

C: 好的，那就拜托了。
E: All right. We'll leave it to you then.

C: 我、我真的没钱了。
E: I... I really don't have any money.

C: 你知道什么内幕吗？
E: You got any inside news?

C: 那里可以满足你的一切心愿。
E: That place can grant your every wish.

C: 上面的房间，以后再来探索吧。
E: How about we explore the rooms ahead of us later?

C: 对，这才是文学社该有的活动，你喜欢普通的生活，不想被卷进那些稀奇古怪的麻烦事中。于是你设定了极其严格的规则，谨慎挑选着部员。
E: Yes, this should be the sort of activity befitting a literature club. You like the ordinary life, not being whisked into those bizarre, life-altering troubles. And so you write up particularly stringent rules and meticulously select club members.

C: 当然不会！成员间的关系非常重要，要是有人欺负你，请随时跟我说！
E: Of course not! Member relations are very important. If someone bullies you, you must let me know!

C: <size=36>吼——我不要——吃——香蕉——猴——吼吼——</size>
E: <size=36>Roaaarrrr, we doooon't want to eaaat bananaaaa monkeyyyys roaarrrrr</size>

C: 撒一个谎需要用无数个谎言来圆，于是你被迫和这位同学聊起了你为数不多的校园经历——当然是在来来往往的众多意味深长的目光下。
E: Well, it seems that one lie begets more lies, which is why you're forced to talk about your limited campus experience with this student under the stares of numerous students as they pass by.

C: 叮铃铃，「讲道德的匹诺康尼派对客」——我得承认，您的笑话确实很有品！
E: *ring* An "ethical partygoer in Penacony"! I must admit that your joke is quite refined!

C: 你难以想象知更鸟在梦醒时的心情，只觉得有股空洞而酸楚的滋味在胸口渐次扩散开来。
E: You can't begin to imagine Robin's feelings when she awakens from the dream, only feeling an empty, heart-wrenching sensation in your chest that is steadily spreads out.

C: 通话在炖菜的沸腾声中悄然结束。你从未想象过波提欧能有如此欢闹的情景——这件事就像他会喝牛奶那样不可思议。
E: The call fizzles amidst the stewing sounds of boiled vegetables. You never knew of a time when Boothill would be so happy — a time just as unfathomable as him drinking milk.

C: 「闭嘴」闻讯赶来，一番折腾后总算修好了电灯——你都不知道它还有这个手艺。
E: Shush rushes in upon hearing the news, and after some fuss, it finally fixes the light — who knew it had such skills?

C: 虽然只是一场梦，醒来还是很感动。
E: Although it was just a dream, waking up still leaves you moved.

C: 只不过…总觉得少了点什么……
E: However... something feels off...

C: …您瞧，此刻{RUBY_B#五大时刻之三}明晰时{RUBY_E#}时光正好，就不提昨日苦闷啦。
E: ...Let's just bask in the bright light of the {RUBY_B#Third of the Five Moments}Lucid Hour{RUBY_E#} and forget the days of sorrow.

C: 哼，说什么「不堪入目的傻大个」…呸呸呸，要是真贪图个好看的皮囊，我自己照镜子不好吗？明明美丽的灵魂才是最重要的！
E: Tsk, all this chatter about being "unattractive and dim-witted"... and blah blah... Heh, if I wanted eye candy, I'd just gaze at myself in the mirror. A beautiful soul is what truly counts!

C: 你屏住呼吸，这次「法吉娜盲盒」生效的感觉似乎慢了一些……
E: You hold your breath. The effects of the "Phagousa Blind Box" seem to kick in slower this time...

C: 相对的，「超我」代表着道德和规范，遵循「完美原则」，经常和「本我」发生冲突。
E: In contrast, the "superego" represents morality and regulations, following the "perfection principle," often in conflict with the "id."

C: 门扉时三刻，我打到一只嘟噜。串成串，一定好吃。问你，盐烤？酱烤？或者……
E: I caught a Dollo at three quints past the Entry Hour, and it would make great skewers. Should I roast it with salt or with sauce? Or...

C: 坏了，等我一下。
E: Oops! Just one moment.

C: 自信点，你挺厉害的。
E: Come on! You're pretty skilled.

C: 我做过的，最失败的菜，刚当上卫兵，炖的粥。
E: My worst dish was when I started as a guard. I made stew.

C: 守城无聊，没有什么能说的。
E: Guarding city is boring. Not much to tell.

C: 希望永远没有能说的。
E: I hope I never get new stories about guarding the city.

C: 教你一招——如果他们非要拉你加入这些仪式，你内心里虽不情愿，但又觉得盛情难却、不知如何是好，那就说自己是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的信徒。包你在所有的迷信场合都能进退自如！
E: Here's a tip: If they try to rope you into their rituals and you're not feeling it, but you're not sure how to decline their passionate offers, just tell them you follow {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}. It's the perfect excuse to sidestep those awkward moments!

C: …开玩笑的。虽然上面的人都对世界被他们拯救之后究竟会如何所言甚少，但在我看来，这本身就是一种答案。
E: ...Just kidding. The higher-ups rarely reveal anything about what will happen after they save the world, but for me, that lack of an answer is already an answer in itself.

C: 您想听些什么？古老黄金裔间的情与爱、黄金战争末期的乱世、沿海百邦的崛起与没落…利波这里应有尽有！
E: What piques your interest? Love amidst the ancient Chrysos Heirs? The aftermath of the Chrysos War's chaos? Or perhaps the rise and fall of those hundred Seaside States...? Lipos is here to serve!

C: 后来就再也没人提起这件事了，但我们保留了付费的渠道——这就是这个会籍的实际意义。所以在入会之后，您会获得来自浴场全体工作人员的敬意！
E: No one ever brought this matter up later on, but we still kept the payment channel — this is the true meaning of the membership. Which is why you will have the respect of all bath staff if you join our membership!

C: 聆听「门径」之颂歌、见证「纷争」之新生、围猎恶徒于悬锋…
E: Listen to the hymns of Passage, witness the rebirth of Strife, and hunt down the wicked in Kremnos...

C: 有的希求黄金的旧影，有的寻觅再创的门扉
E: Some yearn for the golden past of Era Chrysea, while others seek the new dawn of Era Nova.

C: 看来，学习施展「百界门」对于小灰来说还是过于勉强了。不过不要难过，小灰很厉害！不需要「百界门」，也一定能成为翁法罗斯的大英雄！
E: It seems that learning to use the "Century Gate" is a bit too difficult for you now, Gray Hair. But don't be disheartened. You are already amazing! We know that you will become a great hero of Amphoreus even without the power of the "Century Gate"!

C: 也罢。有什么想说的？
E: Fine. What do you wish to say?

C: 每天睡前我都在想，是不是该多给他们一块糖。现在想想，真该给的……
E: Every day before I sleep, I think to myself... Should I have let them have some more candy? I really should have done it...

C: 那你准备好支付代价了吗？
E: Are you ready to pay the price, then?

C: 那我可担待不起。我只是个来自远方的难民，没有任何一技之长，完全靠领救济金过日子哦？
E: I can't take on such a responsibility. I'm just a refugee from afar with no particular skills, completely relying on welfare to get by, you know?

C: 「表现怪怪的」是指什么？
E: What do you mean by "acting out"?

C: 就是…突然出现了一些我从未见过的行为。要知道，我当兽医的年数虽然不算太长，但我家世代专门诊治大地兽，不客气地说，我见过的大地兽恐怕比我认识的朋友还多……
E: Well... They suddenly started behaving in a way they've never done before. You know, I may not have been a vet for very long, but my family has been looking after dromases for generations. To be blunt, I've probably got more of them as friends than I do people...

C: 有一次，他们在检修黄金裔的泉水管道，我在那漏水的地方种下了一株吉奥里亚根。到了第二天，那你猜怎么着？
E: One time when they were fixing a pipe to the Chrysos Heirs' baths, I planted a Georios root where the leak was. Guess what happened the next day?

C: 你好呀！是从外邦来的客人吗？我代表奥赫玛大浴场欢迎你！
E: Hello! Are you a guest from another land? Allow me to welcome you on behalf of the baths of Okhema!

C: 呵，现在的新兵大都只打过竞技场，根本不懂得战场是多么残酷。单挑和围殴可不能一概而论啊。
E: Hah, recruits these days... The majority of them have only ever battled in the coliseum. They know nothing of the cruelty of the battlefield. A one-on-one skirmish cannot be approached with the same logic as a military siege.

C: 战士，最重要的当然是荣耀。悬锋城有句古话：「身可死，荣耀不可弃。」而证明荣耀的最好方式，就是战胜强敌。
E: Glory is of course the most essential for warriors. Castrum Kremnos has an ancient saying: "The body may die, but glory cannot be abandoned." What better way to prove your honor than to topple a formidable foe?

C: 秘酿…秘酿……
E: Ambrosia... Ambrosia...

C: 扎格列斯老爷，多好的泰坦啊，那一帮道德辩手真没人情味。
E: The Great Zagreus is a great Titan, unlike those compassionless mobs with disputed morals.

C: 哎哟，看来客人您对我这独到的商业眼光很是好奇啊。但实话实说，我这铺子开了十年有余，开始是借别人的点子，后来才一步步转了业务。
E: Oho, it appears that you are very curious about my unique business acumen. To be honest, though, this shop has been open for about a decade. This was someone else's idea at first, but I later shifted my business focus.

C: 你打电话求助丹恒——
E: You ring up Dan Heng for help...

C: 奇怪，按往常来说，这时候你们应该已经聊上了，要不要再试试看？
E: Strange, by this time you would normally have started chatting. Maybe give it another try?

C: 勇士。
E: Warrior.

C: 眼睛看不见，手摸不着，难道就是不存在？若是如此，那世间将无物存在，因为所有事物都处在流变当中，我们也无法谈论任何内容。
E: Are you saying that if I can neither see it with my eyes nor feel it with my hands, then it does not exist? If that were the case, nothing would exist in this world, as everything is in a constant state of flux. There would be nothing for us to discuss.

C: 这位朋友，你旁听我们的论辩有段时间了，想必也是位热爱智慧的学者。有兴趣的话，不妨参与到讨论中来，让在场各位都听听你的高见？
E: My friend. You have overheard this dispute for some time. You must be a fellow scholar and lover of wisdom. If you are interested, why not join our discussion? We would all be interested in hearing your view.

C: 这难道不是倒果为因，陷入了无限循环的推论模式吗？
E: Are you not confusing cause and effect and creating an endless loop of inference?

C: 若是有座城邦，远在翁法罗斯的另一头，从未与奥赫玛有过任何通信，按你刚才的论点，那座城邦的人们便全都消失不见了。
E: If there were another city on the other side of Amphoreus that had never had contact with Okhema, then according to your logic, the people of this city would disappear without a trace.

C: 我常常想，如果我能像常人一样看到所有的颜色，还会成为画家吗？也许正是我在视力上的缺陷，才让我能看到这个世界真正的样子。
E: I often wonder if I would still choose to be a painter if I could see all colors like everyone else? Perhaps it's my visual impairment that allows me to perceive the world's true essence.

C: 我还有事，不打扰了。
E: I have things to do, so I'll leave you to it.

C: 鬼鬼祟祟干什么呢！
E: What are you sneaking around for!?

C: 我得再等会儿，看他们什么时候走。哎，都好一阵子没洗澡了。
E: I'll wait a bit longer to see when they leave. Ugh, it's been a while since I've taken a bath.

C: …你说的这「宇宙」是个什么？我不太明白…但恐怕和你想的不太一样，我来给你讲讲。
E: ...What do you mean by "universe"? I don't quite understand... but it's probably not what you think. Let me explain.

C: 先聊到这吧。
E: That's enough chit-chat for now.

C: 有次我与邻居发生了争执，他气急败坏下，说我除了容貌俊俏外一无是处，我当即一个箭步上前拥抱了他。
E: One time, I had an argument with a neighbor. In a fit of anger, he said I was useless except for my good looks. I immediately took a step forward and hugged him.

C: 他们管这叫作「听不懂人话」，这不正是我身为黄金裔独有的缺陷吗？我听不懂人话是因为我的母语是神的语言，但这似乎已经超出了我身边的人的理解能力。
E: They call it "not understanding human language," which is precisely the flaw unique to me as a Chrysos Heir. The reason I can't understand human speech is my native language is that of the gods. However, this seems to be beyond the comprehension of those around me.

C: 下次再聊吧。
E: Let's catch up another time.

C: 真的假的？
E: Are you for real?

C: 即便您这么说，也……
E: Even so...

C: 很好，这样我们就可以省去多余的介绍，直奔主题了——
E: Very good, we'll dispense with the preamble and get straight to business...

C: 对了，差点忘记跟你说——以后你要是想从树庭学点什么，尽管来找我！记住我的话：知识应当是自由且免费的！这才是瑟希斯的精神！
E: Oh yes, almost forgot to tell you — if you want to learn anything from the Grove in the future, just look me up instead! Remember my words: Knowledge should be free of charge! This is what Cerces would want!

C: 拒绝我推销的人很多，但这个理由我还是第一次听。难怪有些人总是领悟不了瑟希斯的精神，我现在有点头绪了。
E: Plenty have turned down my sales pitch, but this reason is a first. No wonder some people fail to grasp the spirit of Cerces — now I'm beginning to see why.

C: 军粮最重要的就是补充体力。我试过许多方法，最后都比不上提高含荤量——加入大块的肉。问题在于肉源从哪里找。
E: The most important thing about supplies is that it replenishes energy. I've tried many ways, but nothing works better than increasing the quantity of meat within, especially adding large pieces of meat. The problem is where to get this meat.

C: 除此以外…工程师还给我加了个唱歌功能…天杀的，这是谁提的需求？
E: Besides that, the engineers gave me a singing function... Seriously, whose idea was that?

C: 以斯帖。
E: Esther.

C: 什——什么人？！竟敢在此口出狂言——哈，一身怪服的异乡客，却想叫卫队捉拿侍奉泰坦的祭司？当真可笑！
E: Wh—Who's there!? How dare you make such outrageous accusations in a place like — hah, an outsider clad in bizarre clothing wishes to summon the guards against a priest of the Titans? Laughable!

C: 所以即便从未远行过、即便怀着满心惶恐畏惧，我还是鼓起勇气，来到这命运泰坦垂迹的圣地，寻求一个解开父亲心结的可能性……
E: So, though I have never made a long journey like this before and my heart was filled with fear, I plucked up the courage to come to the holy land of the Fate Titans and find something that may ease my father's concerns...

C: 刚刚到达雅努萨波利斯时，我其实也感到困惑不解…我曾以为神谕是泰坦赠与我们的、伟大又无私的关爱，而人们为此奉上牺牲则是出于对神明最纯洁的虔诚与敬重。
E: When I had just arrived in Janusopolis, I was actually quite confused and uncertain... I used to think that prophecies were a great and selfless love gifted to us by the Titans, and that the sacrifices people make were out of pure piety and respect.

C: 那么，阁下，我爱莫能助：天底下并无免费的神谕。愿{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}揭示你的路径。
E: Well then, My Lord, I cannot help you. There is no such thing as a free prophecy in this world. May the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} guide your path.

C: 我看瑟希斯和墨涅塔挺亮的。
E: I think Cerces and Mnestia shine pretty bright.

C: 啊呀，今天也是不错的一天呢…你是来参观的客人吧？真不巧，你来得迟了些。
E: Ah, what a splendid day indeed... Are you here to visit? You're a tad late, unfortunately.

C: 不知不觉这么多年过去了，可我感觉这件事仿佛就在昨天发生似的，哎……
E: Years have flown by, but it feels like it all happened just yesterday. Time does fly...

C: 没事，我只是来看看你。
E: It's okay. I just came to check on you.

C: 没事的时候，我会帮忙打扫下附近，比如顺手拔点杂草，刮刮外墙上的青苔什么的。
E: When I have some spare time, I pitch in with tidying up around here — pulling weeds, scraping moss off the walls, and the like.

C: 不过，缇安很骄傲地告诉*我们*，正因为被眷属追赶、不得不反复施放「百界门」的经历，她才能成为*我们*中最娴熟的门匠呢！
E: But Trianne proudly told us that it was precisely because of those experiences — being chased by the Kins and repeatedly forced to use "Century Gate" — that she became the most skilled gatekeeper among us!

C: 好，决定了，*我们*来教你使用百界门，来创造奇迹吧！
E: Alright, it's decided. We will teach you how to use the Century Gate! Let's create some miracles!

C: 纷争世以来的漫长岁月，有无数世人、无数眷属、无数黄金裔与我、与奥赫玛、与泰坦们产生了命运的交织。不知你要问哪些人？
E: Over the many long years since the Era Bellica, there have been countless people, Titankins, and Chrysos Heirs who have formed bonds of destiny with myself, Okhema, and the Titans. Which ones are you referring to?

C: 为了传递神谕，她将身躯化整为零、分散为万千个体，以至自我的边界都逐渐模糊，心智退化为孩童……
E: To deliver the prophecy, she shattered her body into countless pieces, scattering herself into myriad forms, until even the boundaries of her sense of self blurred, and her mind regressed to that of a child...

C: 我刚才提到的事，虽然都确实记录在案，但我跟那些老顽固们不一样，这些事我都打算睁一只眼闭一只眼，没打算找你问责，只是想确认一下你就是那个人罢了——
E: All those things I mentioned are in the records, yes, but unlike the old fossils in the Council, I don't plan to hold you accountable. I just wanted to confirm that you're the person in those records...

C: 没事，我先走了。
E: Well, I'm heading off, then.

C: 哈哈，这你就有所不知了——有些个长老啊、贵族啊，之所以能坐在他们现在的位置上，不过是仰赖祖辈积德，含着金奶嘴生下来的。
E: Haha, let me tell you something — some of these elders and aristocrats only hold their positions because of their ancestors' luck. They were born with a silver spoon in their mouths.

C: 不，我不懂。
E: Nope, still not following.

C: 有缘再见啦，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，正好我手头还有些账目没处理完……
E: Until next time, {F#young lady}{M#young man}. Speaking of which, I've got some ledgers waiting for me...

C: 是「奥凯纳斯运动会」——整个翁法罗斯最著名的运动会！天啊，真的需要我给你解释一遍吗？这翁法罗斯干脆毁灭算了。
E: The Okeanas Games — the most renowned sports event in the entire Amphoreus! Goodness, do I really need to explain it to you again? Amphoreus really is doomed.

C: 作为一名奥凯纳斯人，我的自恋是责任的一部分——通过展示我健美的肉体，让那些不懂竞技精神的人感受其魅力，这便是奥凯纳斯精神。
E: As someone from Okeanas, this narcissism is a part of my duty. The Okeanas spirit is to display my fit body and capture those who don't understand the spirit of competition with its excellence.

C: 「再见，崩坏：星穹铁道！」
E: "Farewell, Honkai: Star Rail!"

C: 我并不了解它们，我只是对此感到好奇罢了。
E: I don't understand them. I'm merely curious about them.

C: 可那些狂妄的学者，尤其是那个阿那克萨戈拉斯…他们竟敢说这些都是无用的形式！他们懂什么？连最基本的敬畏都不懂，也配谈论祭仪？
E: Yet those arrogant scholars, especially that Anaxagoras, have the audacity to claim these rituals to be meaningless formalities! What do they understand? They lack even the most basic reverence for the divine, yet think themselves experts on rituals?

C: 好了，我也该准备新的祷文了。
E: Very well. I must prepare the new prayers now.

C: 嗯，谢谢你。身为医师，看着生命在自己眼前流逝，难免会生出一丝无助感。
E: Thank you. As a healer, watching a life slip away before your eyes inevitably creates a sense of helplessness.

C: 你怎么看待「再创世」？
E: What do you think about the "Era Nova"?

C: 神明？
E: The gods?

C: 你才喝昏头了呢！先天形式不是香皂，吹不出五颜六色的肥皂泡。你要多放点盐，口感才够硬。
E: Yours is pickled! The natural form isn't like soap, it will not produce colorful bubbles. Add more salt to harden your reasoning.

C: 能和我说说发生什么了吗？
E: Can you tell me what happened?

C: 是你啊，贵客…如今阿格莱雅大人已死，其他位置的衣匠们也都进入了自主模式。
E: It's you, honored guest... Now that Lady Aglaea is dead, the other Garmentmakers have gone into autonomous mode.

C: 如果若虫数量再多一些的话，或许她就能成功了…可要去哪儿找这么多若虫呢？
E: If only there were more nymphs, maybe she could have succeeded... but where would we find so many?

C: 抱歉，金丝同一时间只能追觅一只若虫的踪迹。请先将它找到吧。
E: Sorry, the golden thread can only track one nymph's whereabouts at a time. Please find it first.

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: …还真是直白的预言。若说能攥拳的神体，恐怕只有那边的扎格列斯之手了。但所谓的机灵又是什么呢？
E: ...Now that's a straightforward prophecy. If there's any divine form capable of a clenched fist, it must be the Hand of Zagreus over there. But what exactly is this spirit of divine machine?

C: 呀，我可以抓紧你吗…大地兽不会突然跑起来，把人家甩出去吧？
E: Aah! Can I hold on to you...? The dromas won't suddenly jump up and fling me off, will it?

C: 等我长大了，练好了怎么挥剑、怎么搭弓，就去外面找白厄哥，也做个小英雄！
E: Once I'm grown and master swordplay and archery, I'm heading out to find Mr. Phainon. I wanna be a little hero, too!

C: 那必须的！皮西厄斯老师要是有你这么能念叨，我的成绩肯定特别好。
E: Of course! If Professor Pythias nagged like you do, I'd probably be top of the class.

C: 噢，是你啊。难得村子里来了个客人——不错吧，这片田？
E: Oh? It's you. Not every day a guest shows up in this village — Nice field, huh?

C: 来了都是自家人，别见外。这么好的天气，回头等咱家葡萄酿好了，记得和我家孩子一起去麦田里坐坐，晒晒太阳，吹吹风…不是我吹牛，那感觉舒服得很呢！
E: You're one of us now, no need to be shy. With such fine weather, once our grapes have fermented, be sure to take my kids out to the wheat fields. Sit in the sun, feel the breeze... I'm not bragging, it feels great.

C: 呵呵，看你这表情…行李收拾好了？
E: Hehe, look at your expression... got your bags all packed?

C: 孩子们最近怎么样？
E: How are the kids doing lately?

C: 汤汁…溪涧源头的山泉。
E: Soup... drawn from spring water at the mountain's source.

C: 加油——等你们结出果实，我一定会把你们做成整个迷境最美味的菜肴，一口不落地全吃下肚迷！
E: Hang in there! When you bear fruit, I'll turn you into the most delicious dish in the Maze — and eat every last bite, memi!

C: 还以为它们是身上痒。
E: I thought maybe they were just itchy.

C: 嗯…请见谅，贵客。这件物品并不在我的数据库中，我不敢轻易做出解读。
E: Hmm... forgive me, honored guest. This item isn't in my database, and I dare not interpret it without more information.

C: （均匀的呼吸声）
E: (Steady breathing sounds)

C: （伸手搅水）
E: (Reach out to stir the water)

C: 没关系，哀丽秘榭到处都是盛开的鲜花。下次人家会在{NICKNAME}心情更好的时候出现。
E: It's okay. Aedes Elysiae is full of blooming flowers. I'll come back when you're in a better mood.

C: 聊聊你的将来吧。
E: Let's talk about your future.

C: 到那时…先让这翁法罗斯刮上几年暴风雪如何？
E: When that time comes... Mayhaps I'll let Amphoreus experience a few years of snowstorm? How does that sound?

C: 此剑——当斩，泰坦授首！
E: This blade... shall sever the Titan's head!

C: 好！普鲁登蒂亚，你写的太好了，光是这句开头，就足以令所有凯撒的仰慕者叹服哇！你一定是信史追查官中最有文采的一位……
E: Brilliant! Prudentia, your writing is superb. Just this opening line alone is enough to leave all of the Imperator's admirers in awe! You must be the most eloquent among all the History Investigators...

C: 在凯撒大人平息战争后，上一任清洗者——我那固执的老师仍放不下对黄金裔的憎恨，站在了凯撒大人的对立面…真是可悲。
E: After the Great Imperator ended the war, the last Cleaner — my stubborn mentor — clung to hatred, opposing the Great Imperator... It was truly pathetic.

C: 说得好！
E: Well said!

C: 吼呜，让，让开点，本狮有点想吐。
E: Agh, g—get out of the way, I think I'm gonna throw up.

C: 数字是关键嗡。
E: The numbers are key, buzz.

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 所以绿球菜们，加把劲，一定要被选中迷——想象自己在餐盘上，用脆生生的绿叶衬托菜肴…那是多么幸福的情景！
E: So come on, greenie cabbage, step it up and get picked! Picture yourselves on a plate, your bright green leaves making the main dish shine... What a glorious sight that would be!

C: 都来都来，都来看看迷！多来多来，多来尝尝迷！
E: Come one, come all! Take a look, memi! Step right up, step right in, come and taste it, memi!

C: 将菜肴的香气封存进谷物之中，这天才般的想法，是迷路迷境何等的恩赐迷！
E: Locking a dish's aroma inside grains, what a genius idea! Truly a gift from the Membrance Maze, mem!

C: 呵呵…你们在吃南瓜，但却对它的无穷奥妙一无所知迷。
E: Hehe... you're eating pumpkins, but you know nothing about the wonders it holds, mem.

C: 很好，既然你如此有精神，待会儿再多加五组吧。
E: Very well! As you've got the energy to argue, finish another five sets!

C: …啊？你谁啊，我怎么不认——
E: ...Huh? Who are you? I don't know you...

C: 但愿刻法勒保佑我们。
E: May Kephale protect us.

C: 散步有助于思考…
E: Walking is good for thinking...

C: 我还是不打扰你工作了。
E: I shouldn't keep you.

C: 辛克尔那边的消息我刚才回复了，应该得到了审批就可以继续下一步流程。
E: I just replied to Hinkel. We should be able to move forward once it's approved.

C: 不，我已经宣誓，用我的灵魂宣誓——必须踏过我的身体，才可入侵这里的生灵！
E: No, I took my vows. I swore on my soul — If anyone is to harm the creatures here, they'll have to step over my dead body.

C: 哎，生命无常，生死难料。说不定这一次见面，就是我们最后一次呢？
E: *sigh* Life is unpredictable. Who knows if this will be the last time we meet?

C: 毕竟，总不能一直惦记着莱斯莉，对吧？
E: After all, I shouldn't keep thinking about Lesley, should I?

C: 你怎么一副不感兴趣的样子？难道这还不算有意思的事情么？
E: You don't seem very interested. Isn't it interesting to you?

C: 退休之后就不能说自己在忙什么了，一般都说是：最近在玩儿着什么呢。
E: I'm retired, so that might not be an accurate question. We normally just say what we've been playing with.

C: 只抽了一下，就出金了…
E: Just one pull, and I was almost gonna be golden...

C: 嗯…有位织者出现了故障。金丝带来消息，它正漂浮在<color=#dbc291ff>河道中</color>，等待过路之人拯救它呢。
E: Hmm... There's a weaver who has malfunctioned. The golden thread brings tidings: It's floating in the <color=#dbc291ff>river path</color>, waiting to be rescued.

C: 千万不能被「注水」啊！
E: Don't let them water it down!

C: 你凑近聆听，听到了几缕细微的回响。「呼呼欸嘿」是欢欣的声音，「扑簌簌、啪嗒…」是目睹树干断裂，弱小的生命为巨树的毁伤而哀哭的声音。
E: You lean in to listen, catching faint echoes. "Hoo-hoo-hehe" is the sound of joy, while "rustle rustle, plop..." is the sound of witnessing tree trunks breaking, tiny lives weeping for the wounds inflicted upon the giant tree.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，你和斐第斯叔叔果然没有骗我们！呜…伟大的泰坦真的庇佑着我们——爸爸、妈妈、还有大家…都回来了…呜……
E: {F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}, you and Uncle Phedes really weren't lying to us! *sniff* The great Titan truly was watching over us... Dad, Mom, and everyone... they're all back... *sniff*

C: 嗨呀，你就说阿忒这套商业模式好不好用吧！
E: Hey, Aitee's business model is totally working!

C: 嘶——你又买了？不是上周才入了三套彩釉摆件吗？得亏你家阿克蒙来钱快，不然谁养得起你这败家老东西。
E: Tsk... you bought more? Didn't you just get three sets of glazed figurines last week? Lucky for you, your boy Akmonides rakes in the cash, or nobody could afford to keep up with your shopaholic old self.

C: 可拉倒吧，你那堆破烂要是都卖出去，两套房钱都有了。
E: Oh, come off it! If you managed to sell all that junk of yours, you'd have enough for two houses by now.

C: 对对，就是这一招。请您再使一遍给我们看看吧！
E: Yeah yeah, that's the move! Could you show it to us one more time?

C: 我喜欢兵器相碰的声音，叮叮当当的，清脆得像下雨！
E: I love the sound of clashing weapons, all that clanging and clattering. It's as crisp as rainfall!

C: 理解理解，更何况…两位一个敢为难民盗物资，一个敢在神殿取贡品，又何尝不是种意气相投呢？
E: Right, right. And besides... when one of you is brave enough to steal supplies for refugees, while the other dares to take offerings from temples... doesn't that sounds like two birds of a feather?

C: 得了吧，玩弄权势、操纵流言，利用神谕和供奉捞钱。别以为我们不知道你做过什么！
E: Save it! You've been abusing your power, spreading rumors, and using prophecies and offerings for fraud. Don't think we don't know what you've done!

C: 和它抢土吃。
E: Fight with it over soil.

C: 不知受何人撺掇，白厄竟然…又动了「挑些色彩靓丽的衣饰」的念头。
E: Maybe someone had been whispering into his ears, but Phainon had been thinking of... "picking out colorful clothing" again.

C: 自然也对天外的「救世主」开放，你不是已经读过其中几篇了吗？
E: Naturally, it's also open to the Deliverer from beyond the sky. Haven't you already read some of those articles?

C: 这…是谁写的？
E: Who... wrote this?

C: 话说回来，我看到的凯撒大人总是独来独往，海瑟音小姐和四位勋爵举杯共饮的时候，凯撒大人也没有和他们一起。
E: You know, every time I see the Great Imperator, she's by herself. Whenever Miss Hysilens and the four duxes share a toast, she's never with them either.

C: 但是，被我猜中了，她果然不讨厌我这样做吧！
E: But I was right! She doesn't actually mind, does she?

C: 真理和八卦同样重要！
E: Truth and gossip are equally important!

C: *只有声音*「我还没走远呐！我都听得到，灰子。」
E: *voice only* "I haven't gone far yet! I can hear everything, Gray Mystery."

C: 可以挥着菜刀上战场了。
E: Time to charge into battle with a kitchen knife.

C: 嗯…有位织者踌躇满志。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>眺望裂口的高台边缘</color>，期待开启全新的挑战呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's brimming with ambition. The golden thread brings tidings: They're <color=#dbc291ff>at the edge of a platform overlooking some fissures</color>, eager to take on a new challenge.

C: 「半神议院」。
E: The Demigod Council.

C: 「纷争荒墟」。
E: The Strife Ruins.

C: 这次…什么也没发生。难道是缺了什么东西？
E: Nothing happened this time... Could something be missing?

C: 赞达尔？
E: Zandar?

C: 关于星神…
E: About the Aeons...

C: 有惊无险，回家看看。
E: We narrowly averted disaster, and now we're home.

C: 期待确实会让等待变得更长。
E: Expectation does make waiting longer.

C: 哼，我尤利安会的词语可多了，你也多看点儿《冒险鼹鼠队》吧！
E: Hmph, I know a lot of words. You should read more of The Adventurous Moles!

C: 矿头安东尼娜叫我来的。
E: Antonia asked me to come.

C: 请帮我重新布置场地。
E: Yes. Please help me reset the carts.

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Sorry, I have something else to do.

C: 哈，你这{M#小伙子}{F#小姑娘}，够厉害！
E: Ha, {M#m'boy}{F#m'girl} is pretty amazing!

C: 滴、答！滴了个答的，你这个滴滴又嗒嗒的家伙，看个滴答？
E: Tick, tock! What are you tick-ing looking at, you tick-ing tock?

C: 打完一关了。
E: I finished one stage.

C: 我看看…喏，我这里还剩下些小东西…不成协议，请您一定收下！
E: Let me take a look... Here's a few small things... Just a small token of thanks. Go ahead, take it!

C: （按下回车键。）
E: (Press Enter.)

C: 轻轻松松。
E: Piece of cake.

C: 关于你…
E: About you...

C: 我想问你的事…
E: I'd like to ask you about...

C: 吹捧一番。
E: Flatter the painting.

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 哦？手脚挺利索嘛。让我看看……
E: Hmmm? You work pretty fast. Let me have a look-see...

C: …稿件，你懂吧？支付足够的稿费，你就可以成为这幅画的主人。
E: ...It's a commission, get it? That means so long as you pay enough, it can be YOUR commission.

C: {NICKNAME}，我们的大功臣——你知道吗？在你的帮助下，历史文化展馆的布置也顺利完成——这意味着我们的博物馆可以完全对外开放了！
E: {NICKNAME}, you're our big hero. Do you know the History-Culture Hall has also been successfully set up with your help? This means that we can open the whole museum to the public!

C: 不知道要付给那个铁公鸡多少冬城盾，才能疏散观众拍出门可罗雀的搏击俱乐部。
E: You wonder how many shield one has to pay to the bouncer to evacuate the audience and photograph the empty Fight Club.

C: 过去的人们曾借它在黑夜中寻求光明。而后，天外之物驱逐了这里的长夜，却也使他们失去了许多。
E: In the past, people depended on them to shed light in the darkness. Later on, technology of an extraterrestrial nature helped to chase away the long nights, but it also cost them a lot.

C: 它曾被用来承载美丽的饰物，如今则被用来承载逝去的时间。
E: It used to be a receptacle of beautiful accessories, but is now only a receptacle of lost time.

C: 一辆「提灯」型汽车，如今主要用于出租车业务。
E: A Lantern model automobile. It is mostly used as a rented ride vehicle.

C: 一台下层区生产的古典座钟，人们利用它在昏暗的地下数算时间。
E: A classic desk clock made in the Underworld. People use it to calculate time in the lightless underground.

C: 我反对。
E: I disagree.

C: 那可能就是被附身了。
E: Perhaps she is being possessed.

C: （你这家伙问得也太直接了吧！）
E: (Could you be any less indiscreet!?)

C: …在这种时候，我才会回想起寒鸦大人说，岁阳只是被情绪吸引的星火之精。
E: ...Times like this make me recall how Madam Hanya said heliobi are simply starfire essence attracted by emotions.

C: 事已至此，我只想回到以往拍摄的地点补拍一些照片。但数量实在太多了，我一个人根本拍不完……
E: Now I just want to go back to where I took those pics and re-take them, but there are far too many for me to take by myself...

C: …下次别再干这种事了，{NICKNAME}。
E: ...Don't do that again, {NICKNAME}.

C: 嘿嘿，谢谢惠顾~
E: Heehee, you're too kind. Thanks!

C: 这些看电视的机兵挡着你需要拍摄的照片……
E: These automatons watching TV are blocking the photo you need to take...

C: {NICKNAME}，拍照的进展怎么样啦？
E: {NICKNAME}, how are the photos coming along?

C: 好耶！
E: Yay!

C: 来一份「热浮羊奶」。
E: I'll have some steamed puffergoat milk.

C: 仗义执言，真了不起！
E: Standing up for what is right, mad respect!

C: 少在那里阴阳怪气，我们现在就拆。
E: No need to make this difficult. Let's open it.

C: 抱歉，我根本就没有搭上话。
E: Sorry, I should've stepped in.

C: 素裳，你还挺会讲啊！
E: Sushang is kicking your butt, dude.

C: 哎，这得多亏了我呀。
E: Yes, especially thanks to me.

C: 这会长也太死板了。
E: *sigh* This President is kinda stubborn...

C: 接下来，我将担任天舶司司舵。
E: Nope. 'Tis why I'll totally take over the Sky-Faring Commission next.

C: 不过要是化外民的科技，我得看看是哪个世界的。
E: Of course, if it's outworlder technology, it'll depend on the world...

C: （他完全将我们和公司划上等号了……）
E: (He is convinced that the IPC and us are the same...)

C: 你是公司的人？！
E: ...You're with the IPC!?

C: 原本竞标是没有吵架的环节吗？
E: So, debates are not usually required in public bidding?

C: 但是我们要借这个机会把我们的态度展现出来。
E: That said, this is also our chance to make a strong case for ourselves.

C: 你们云骑军要「霍三哥的货」？
E: A Cloud Knight wants "Mr. Huo's goods"?

C: 我讨厌你这种直觉敏锐的快递员。
E: I hate cunning couriers like you.

C: 我知道，你真是来送货的。
E: I know. you're really just here to deliver the "goods."

C: 我已经准备好了。
E: I'm ready.

C: 不好意思呀，我实在很难把这东西当作是食材。一股子腥气，冲是冲的来……
E: Sorry, I just can't serve this to my customers. So gamey, so intrusive...

C: 客人没有点饮料。
E: They didn't order a drink.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>（我们可以用什么证明？）</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>(Do we have any proof?)</color>

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: <color=#dbc291ff>这一点毋庸置疑</color>。
E: Things were better in the old days — <color=#dbc291ff>of that I am certain</color>.

C: 怎么机巧鸟又说话了？
E: This cycrane can talk?

C: 您好，{NICKNAME}大人，我在这里等候您多时了。
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}. I've been waiting for you here for quite a while.

C: 你又站在了这个沙袋的面前…大概是想再试试那本《贝洛伯格古武术残卷》上记载的招式吧？
E: Standing before the punchbag again... Probably wanting to try out those moves again from the "Fragmented Record of Belobog Ancient Martial Arts," right?

C: 算了算了！疑神疑鬼可不是科学的态度。你没事也多看看我的研究笔记，说不定能给我提供点新思路！
E: Never mind. Being suspicious isn't the right attitude for science. You should read my notes more when you have the time. Maybe you can give me some new directions, too!

C: 好了，我这里也赶时间。简单来说：我的「第<unbreak>223</unbreak>号自制感应仪」最近有了反应。
E: Fine, I'm rushing anyway. Simply put, my Homemade Sensor No. <unbreak>223</unbreak> has begun to react recently.

C: 可要是被我们踢坏了，不会需要赔偿吧？我不敢……
E: But if we broke it, they won't want us to repay them, would they? I can't...

C: 感应仪的反应…
E: The sensor's reading...

C: 哎哟，你们年轻人脑子活络懂得多。要玩就随便玩吧！
E: Oh, if that's the case, you youngsters are quicker in thinking, and you know more about this. Up to you, I guess!

C: 还没触碰到，就感觉眼前的帐篷开始剧烈抖动。看来它已经察觉到你的到来了。
E: Before you manage to lay a finger on it, the tent in front of you starts to tremor violently. Looks like it senses you.

C: （这里有不少帐篷，很适合作为藏匿地点，稍微调查一下吧。）
E: (There are plenty of tents suitable to be a hiding place in here, be thorough.)

C: 嗯嗯嗯…讲得太快了，无法理解。
E: Uh huh, uh huh... He's too fast, I can't understand it.

C: 你知道？那你快告诉我！什么是光，什么是粒子，什么是科普，什么是…哎哟，太多了！
E: You know this? Tell me please! What is light, what is a particle, what is basic, what is... oh, I have so many questions!

C: 哎呀，客人你提供的食材量不够呀。
E: Oh dear, it seems you haven't provided enough ingredients.

C: 成功了。
E: Yes.

C: 那就交给我吧。
E: Leave it to me.

C: ——也有，咳，实力。事不宜迟，只要您没意见，我们立刻开始行动吧。
E: ...And, ahem, brawn. Let's not waste time — if you're up for it, we'll move out now.

C: 这片空间里的线索大概都收集完了吧？应该没漏什么东西了。
E: I think we've collected all the clues in this area, right? Looks like that's all of them.

C: 而且…眼下这个情况，电视台的传输信号被干扰了，直播是不可能的。你没看到现在路边的屏幕上放的都是些无限循环的录播画面吗？
E: Also, live broadcasting is currently unavailable due to transmission signal interruption. Haven't you noticed we're playing recorded footage on a loop on the roadside billboards?

C: 直觉。再说了，看中一个人需要理由吗？
E: I just go with my gut. Must I have a reason for that?

C: 这间酒吧的顾客并非匹诺康尼的宾客或逐梦客，而是<color=#dbc291ff>生活在梦境酒店里的怪物。</color>
E: At this lounge, we don't serve the guests or Dreamchaser in Penacony, but the <color=#dbc291ff>monsters staying in the hotel in the dreamscape.</color>

C: 汪！我好心把收音机借给荷官先生玩，没想到…它直接就朝地板上摔了哇！
E: Woof! I lent my radio to the dealer out of kindness, but he smashed it on the ground!

C: 我很快乐。
E: I had a good time.

C: 你的这个梦还挺丰富呀。
E: Your dream is seriously wild.

C: （…至于这么害怕吗？）
E: (...What's making him so scared?)

C: 这件事…呀，要是直说就太丢人了。还是请您耐心点吧~
E: Well... it's really embarrassing to just say it outright. Please, be more patient.

C: …有、有嘛？！这种事情怎么可能……
E: ...R—Really!? But how can that be...?

C: 差点忘了正事！我、我们还是先去找舒翁哇！呜汪…这里气味有点杂……
E: Oh, I almost forgot! L—Let's find Siobhan first! Woof... so many scents mixed up here...

C: 我会撤去对内心的防护，请你用那种神奇的能力，将我的心境彻底展现在所有人面前。
E: I'll remove the protection for my heart. During this time, please use your powers to let everyone know how I'm really feeling.

C: 而且…就算哪天我真的不在了，不是还有愿意把你们当作家人看待的人吗？
E: And... even if I'm gone one day, there's someone else who's willing to treat you all like family, right?

C: 透过你的眼睛，我看到了历史上那些伟大的「无名客」，你一定会回应我的。
E: Looking into your eyes, I can see the incredible Nameless throughout history. I think you'll accept my offer for sure.

C: 没有线索的条件下做到这一点，您果然是一位充满好奇心、观察力敏锐、极具谋略与智慧的选手！
E: You found it without any clues! Surely you're a contestant who has keen curiosity, astute powers of observation, and is full of tactics and intellect!

C: 祝你好运。
E: Good luck.

C: 「钟表匠」要是见到这样的场面，一定会很欣慰的，感谢您的辛苦付出！
E: If the Watchmaker were to witness this, he'd be super glad. Thank you so much for your hard work!

C: 关键时刻——不管会不会，都得顶上。
E: It's a pivotal moment — it doesn't matter anymore, let's roll.

C: （拍摄打戏让它退场）
E: (Shoot the action scene to get it to leave)

C: 汪，汪汪，嗷呜——
E: Arf, arf arf, arrooo...

C: 哼，我不需要这个愿望，这场冒险已经让我的桶满溢智慧了！
E: Hmph, I don't need this wish. This adventure's already filled my can full of wisdom!

C: 咕噜噜，也许是。那位董事长一直与家族不合，肯定看不惯这种被同谐信仰包装出来的大英雄。
E: *gurgle* Maybe. That chairman has always been at odds with The Family. I bet he won't like a great hero packaged up by the Harmony faith.

C: 但后来他遭到公司迫害，被打入大牢，制作苏乐达的「梦见草」也被灭绝——直到艾迪恩先生来到匹诺康尼，才在梦中重新复原了这种口味。
E: But he was persecuted by the IPC and locked up, with the Dreamleaf used for SoulGlad made extinct as well... that is until Mr. Aideen came to Penacony and restored the flavor inside a dream.

C: ——说真的，这样的故事我有点看腻了，一点新意都没有。听说你的《美梦往事》里还有别的反派，我很期待哦。
E: ...To be honest, I'm a little over these kinds of stories. There's nothing innovative about it at all. I heard that your Dreamjoy Memoir is using some other villains and I'm really looking forward to that.

C: 皮斯让我来找你制作外传。
E: Pisce asked me to find you and make the extra stories.

C: 暴政下被处刑的尸体堆积成山，灾害与战争更是不计其数…博物馆中的许多资料都记录了那时的惨状，家族应该也没必要在这方面造假。
E: The executed corpses piled up high as mountains under his cruel regime, with war and disaster ravaging the world... Lots of material in the museum recounted horrors of the time, and there's probably no reason for The Family to have faked any of that.

C: 是吧，这背后的原因可就复杂了……
E: Right? The reasoning behind this is really complicated...

C: 当年「钟表匠」先生就超级喜欢看他的比赛，才把他加进了动画里——简直就是公费追星嘛！
E: Back then, Mr. Watchmaker used to love watching those races so much that he just added him into the animation — it's basically using the company's money to support your idol!

C: 我想你会喜欢这个故事的。
E: I think you're gonna love this story.

C: 「屠龙者终将成龙，沾染禁忌力量的球棒侠也是如此。等到幡然醒悟时，一切早已无法悔改。你遮住自己的面容，将自己与黑暗球棒一同封印在银河的某个角落，等待下一个被欲望侵染的可怜虫出现…」
E: "As the dragonslayer eventually devolves into a dragon, so too does the Galactic Baseballer succumb when they touch upon the forbidden powers. By the time you realize what is happening, there is no longer any path to forgiveness. You cover up your face and seal yourself away in a dark corner of the universe with your dark bat, waiting for the next piteous adventurer who is driven mad by desire to turn up..."

C: 准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: 现在考验的是「肢体语言」…应该不能用台词糊弄过去吧？
E: The test now is about body language... I don't think dialogue is allowed here.

C: 你怎么也在？
E: How come you're here too?

C: 救救，救救啾！要变成烤全鸟了啾！
E: Help, help, tweet! I'm about to end up as a roast dinner, tweet!

C: 加…加…拉……
E: Gal... lag... her...

C: {NICKNAME}
E: {NICKNAME}

C: 艾迪恩
E: Aideen

C: 请问…你是？
E: And... you are?

C: 啊啊啊，其实「我要打十个！」也是幻戏里的台词，不小心就脱口而出了……
E: Oops, that just slipped out. It's actually another line from an immersia...

C: 你看吧？
E: See?

C: 没错，我看过一部幻戏，大侠喝下了烈焰浓茶之后身体摇晃、步履不稳，大侠靠着摇摇晃晃、稀里糊涂的醉剑功夫就将杀父仇人击败了。
E: You got it! I saw this immersia where the hero drank the Flaming Potent Tea and started stumbling and shaking all over the place. But then he managed to defeat his father's murderer with his drunken swordplay.

C: 就算不会「醉剑」，我也学了些其他的本事！
E: Even if I don't know drunken swordplay, I've got other tricks up my sleeve!

C: 这些都将成为你剑术的「养分」。就像是你的云璃师父说过的，「这大千世界，无处不是剑，无处不是剑招」。
E: Those experiences will nourish your sword skills. It's just like Master Yunli said, "Everything can be a sword, and there are endless possibilities for learning swordplay in the vast world."

C: 那你可记好了，千万不要与藿藿为敌哦。
E: Yeah, you'd ought to remember it's best not to make an enemy out of Huohuo.

C: 所以呢？本姑娘会成为下一个目标吗？
E: So? I'll be the next target then?

C: 也要多亏了藿藿，不愧是十王司的判官。
E: Thanks to you too, Huohuo. No wonder you're a Ten-Lords Commission Judge.

C: 你这么说不太对，毕竟我最后应该算是抵挡住了诱惑。
E: That's not really true. I mean, I still resisted it in the end.

C: 你还是拒绝了「工业化学剑」。
E: You also rejected "industrial learning."

C: 这一切都是为了成功。我是斯科特家的骄傲，是一匹合格的「孤狼」，为了走上人生巅峰，我什么都做得出来。
E: It's all about success. I'm the pride of the Skott family, a certified "lone wolf." I'll do whatever it takes to reach the pinnacle of life.

C: 三月小姐这么缺乏自信吗？唔…我本来还等着给公司的人治伤看诊，收三倍诊金呢。
E: Are you really that lacking in confidence, March? Hmm... I was actually looking forward to tripling the fee when the IPC guys came in for treatment.

C: 云骑军某些丹药中也有微量此成分。战阵之上，人人都难免因疼痛而怯懦，所以只要屏蔽疼痛，那自然胜券在握。
E: Actually, some of the Cloud Knights use pellets which contain trace amounts of this ingredient. When you block pain on the battlefield, you have a better chance of beating your opponent and surviving.

C: 你当我不知道吗？你说这话就是想分化瓦解我们和金人巷有识之士之间因共同利益和阶级感情所结成的攻守同盟并以此达成击败我的目的。
E: You think I'm an idiot? Your statement aims to dismantle and fragment the coalition established on the basis of shared interests and class affinities between ourselves and the erudite individuals dwelling in Aurum Alley, with the ultimate goal of defeating me.

C: 不，已经不用去了。
E: No... I don't need to go to the bathroom anymore.

C: 总之，坚持一下！先打倒这个小妮子再说！
E: Just hold on, boys! Let's defeat this little brat first!

C: 对啊，我看三月你就是比斗前紧张了，打两圈牌正好放松放松。
E: Yeah, you just have pre-fight jitters, March. Let's play a couple of rounds to help you relax.

C: 我、我对茶水不感兴趣。
E: But I... I'm not interested in tea.

C: 你有话就说，盯着我算怎么回事。
E: If you have something to say, just say it. Why are you staring at me like that?

C: 当然当然，多谢青雀大师。
E: Of course. Thank you, Master Qingque.

C: …可是我说「三月小姐练功要紧、肯定需要」，于是她就让我带了一瓶给你。
E: ...But I said that Miss March is training, she'll definitely need it, so she had me bring a bottle for you.

C: …没人派你来？
E: ...No one sent you?

C: 这有什么不可信的，银河里的怪事可太多了。直接进入正题吧，那台「金人司阍」呢？
E: What's there not to believe? There are plenty of strange things happening in the cosmos. Let's cut straight to the chase — what about the Aurumaton Gatekeeper?

C: 难道「机械灵魂」是真的存在？
E: Could there really be Mechanical Souls?

C: 需要先念一段指引机械灵魂的祷词…你来念吧，三月七。
E: First, we need to chant the prayers to guide the Mechanical Soul... I'll leave that to you, March 7th.

C: 寻找剑谱？是什么意思呢……
E: You're looking for a sword technique? I don't know what you mean...

C: 剑斗的事情我完全不懂，但你要是想找书，我确实可以帮忙。
E: I don't know a thing about swordfighting, but if it's a book you're after, I can be of some assistance.

C: 难道说，你需要我们的帮忙？
E: You mean... You want us to help you with something?

C: 总之，就像工作一样，只要沾上，横竖都得伤身体。
E: In other words it's like work. As long as you are involved in it, it will harm your body.

C: 他将自己的武学奥义留在书中等待有缘人拾起，我总感觉他期待着我去做些什么……
E: He left his martial arts mastery in these pages waiting for a fated person to come along and pick it up. I just can't help but feel like he wants me to do something...

C: 哈哈哈，很高兴能得到你的认同。
E: Haha, I am happy you approve.

C: 我之前的助手不知染上了什么要命的怪癖，一端起相机就执着于研究构图光影和分镜。蹉跎了半天什么成果也没有。
E: My last assistant had an insatiable quirk. They'd spend so long fiddling with the composition and lighting that when they finally picked up the camera, they weren't able to capture anything!

C: 开始今日拍摄。
E: Let's begin today's shoot.

C: 星穹列车会撞飞所有麻烦！
E: The Astral Express blasts away all troubles!

C: 哎，我也只能睁只眼闭着眼。凑合过吧。
E: Ah, guess I have no choice but to let it slide and make do.

C: 呃啊…这梗还没过啊。
E: Eurgh... You're still running with that joke, huh?

C: 你们在聊什么？
E: What are you two talking about?

C: 放心好了，智械和公司机甲都能参赛，仙舟的演武仪典早就是科技局了。
E: Don't worry. Even Intellitrons and IPC mechs can participate — The Xianzhou's Wardance has essentially become a tech fair.

C: （托帕…公司参赛的代表。其实我谈不上讨厌她。听说就是这位托帕小姐给予了宽限…也许她并不是什么坏人。）
E: (Topaz... the IPC's participating representative. Honestly, I don't really hate her. I heard she was the one who granted the time extension... Maybe she's not so bad after all.)

C: 不止罗浮，还来了不少其他仙舟的我道中人。
E: Not just for those on the Luofu, plenty of our like-minded brethren on other Xianzhou ships have also come.

C: 我宣布，有资格代表贝洛伯格，前往「仙舟联盟•罗浮」参加演武仪典的选手是——卢卡！
E: I hereby announce that the contender who has earned the right to represent Belobog in the Wardance is — Luka!

C: 真拿你们没办法…你们是不是觉得老子特别好用啊？下次老子可要收费了啊。
E: Bah, you people... I bet you think I'm super useful, don't you? I'm charging a fee next time.

C: 那个…卢卡哥哥…我可能不能来看你的下一场比赛了……
E: Umm... Luka... I might not be able to watch your next match...

C: 银枝先生，我真的很感激你的认可。
E: Mr. Argenti, I'm truly grateful for your recognition.

C: 另一位则是…同样来自贝洛伯格的选手——
E: The other contestant... is also from Belobog.

C: 「变量」？
E: Variable?

C: 至于他嘛…他一会儿要去打一场硬仗，给他调一杯…「千古英雄气」吧。
E: As for him... He's about to face a tough battle, so... fix him up a glass of Hero's Spirit.

C: 你好啊，卢卡先生，咱们又见面了。
E: Hi, Mr. Luka. We meet again.

C: 老朋友，你曾经的呼喊已经得到了回应。卢卡就是那个回应。
E: My old friend, your call for help back then has been answered. Luka is the answer.

C: 他们无法出兵。曜青仙舟发来烽火信号，预计未来很快将会有一次仙舟与丰饶民之间的大战。
E: They are unable to send forces. We've received a warning signal from the Yaoqing, meaning a major conflict between the Xianzhou and the Denizens of Abundance is imminent.

C: 你的实力有目共睹，这场比赛本就没什么悬念。顺带说一句，我女儿也很看好你喔！
E: Your strength is witnessed by all, so the outcome of this match was never in doubt. Just a side note, even my daughter thinks you have a high chance to win!

C: 但眼下这两位嫌犯，一个拒不配合调查，另一个更是一言不发。
E: But these two suspects... one refuses to cooperate with the investigation, and the other refuses to even speak.

C: 我是丹轮寺的持戒僧侣，绝不妄言诳语。
E: I'm an ordained monk from Claretwheel Temple. I do not speak deceitful words.

C: 波长调整完毕，更改内存权限，联觉信标同步开始。
E: Wavelength adjustment complete. RAM access permissions altered. Synesthesia Beacon synchronization initiated.

C: 提问：如何获得你们口中的「力量」？
E: Question: How can one obtain this "power" of which you speak?

C: 不可能。
E: Impossible.

C: 歼灭，歼灭，歼灭，歼灭，歼灭，歼灭……
E: Annihilate, annihilate, annihilate, annihilate, annihilate...

C: 失控金人正在缩小包围圈，请求支援，请求——喂？喂！该死，通讯系统也……
E: The out-of-control aurumatons are tightening their encirclement. Requesting reinforcements. Requesting — Hello? Hello! Damnations, even the comms...

C: 善逝已经把他的声音传达到了我们所有人心里。
E: Sugata has already made his voice heard by all of us.

C: 我明白奢摩小姐的心意，我也会全力以赴，这场战斗，是我对所有丹轮寺僧的敬意。
E: I understand Miss Samatha's intentions. I will give my best, for this battle is to show my respect to all the monks of Claretwheel Temple.

C: 这还能有误会？我可看过不少公司针对星核猎手的安全培训视频，跟恐怖片似的，可吓人了！
E: Mistaken!? I've watched plenty of IPC safety training videos on Stellaron Hunters — they're no different from horror flicks! Terrifying!

C: 幸好他们遇到的是卢卡选手，而不是真正的星核猎手，不然恐怕就不是「教训一下」那么简单了。
E: Luckily the one they met was Luka and not a real Stellaron Hunter. Otherwise, they probably wouldn't have gotten away with just a "lesson."

C: 本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是风头正劲的明日之星——「铁臂」卢卡！
E: In this match, the two opposing sides are, the rising star — Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 其实是我们直播间的粉丝说，我们三个身手很好，如果表演「萨姆模仿秀」，一定能成为「先天萨姆圣体」，赚到很多钱……
E: Actually, it was a fan in our live stream who said the three of us have great skills. If we perform a "SAM Impersonation Show," we'll definitely become the innate talent to become SAM and make bank...

C: 目前很多观众都非常关心卢卡选手是否会参加接下来的复活赛，教练能透露一些相关消息吗？
E: Many spectators are very concerned if Luka will participate in the repechage. Can you give us a little insight on this?

C: 如果演武仪典真有公平公正的精神，选手们应当禁止使用武器，完全依靠拳头进行战斗。
E: If the Wardance truly upheld the spirit of fair competition, contestants should be forbidden from using weapons, and rely solely on their fists to fight.

C: 请粉丝们放心，卢卡选手正在积极训练努力恢复，我们教练组也在总结复盘。我们会抓住复活赛的机会，各位等待我们王者归来吧！
E: The fans needn't worry. Luka is already training hard to get back into form, and our coaching team is reflecting on our past missteps. We will treasure the chance in the repechage, so everyone, please wait patiently for the return of our champion!

C: 其实卢卡选手想要战胜波提欧也并非完全不可能，我有一计，请教练细品。
E: Actually, it's not impossible that Luka could defeat Boothill. I have a plan, so please bear with me.

C: 例行的采访环节已经结束，接下来该去办正事了。
E: Now that the routine interview is over, it's time to get down to business.

C: 哈哈，就是就是…喂！你就打算这么糊弄过去啊！
E: Haha, that's right... Hey! You're just gonna gloss over this?

C: …接广告这种事，我好像不知道？真的假的，怎么没人给我说呢？
E: ...Taking on advertisements? I'm not in the know. Is this true? Why hasn't anyone told me?

C: 你待会别走，发布会结束我们俩就去！
E: Don't leave after this is over then. We'll go together right after the press conference ends!

C: 鸣藕糕、貘馍卷、苏打豆汁儿、琼实鸟串、陈婆豆腐、星芋扣肉、油爆飞海葵、糖球炒视肉、红油乱斩牛杂、蒜苗五花肉……
E: Songlotus cake, tuskpir wrap, mung bean soda, berrypheasant skewers, Granny Chen's Tofu, star taro braised pork, deep-fried flying sea anemone, sugarball-fried viscorpi, chili oil beef offal stew, garlic-infused pork...

C: 请记者提下一个问题。
E: Please ask the next question, journalist.

C: 前排左手边第二位。
E: Front row, second from the left.

C: 还赖着不走
E: What are you even doing here?

C: 一段时间后，「星天演武仪典」新闻发布会现场……
E: Some time later, at the venue of the Luminary Wardance press conference...

C: 别走！求你别走！
E: Don't go! I'm begging you!

C: 不需要，我老玩家了。
E: No need, I'm a veteran.

C: 味儿对了！
E: That's my Skott!

C: 原来你也玩枘凿六合啊。
E: I didn't know you played Hexanexus too.

C: 其中，最后的那场演出会是音乐派对的闭幕表演，成为所有人的焦点。
E: Among these, the last show will be the music party's closing performance, which will be the highlight for everyone.

C: 赞成：这部电影是芮克先生的人气新作，其主演登台能带来更多关注。
E: Approval: This film is Mr. Reca's latest popular work, and the appearance of the lead actress on stage will surely attract more attention.

C: 就算是为了增强舞台效果，为什么要把脸遮住？
E: Even if it's to boost our stage presence, why must we cover our faces?

C: 不妙不妙。在下这就开始闭关，潜心创作。若是主公有空，不妨去与诸位音忍聊聊。
E: This is bad, very bad. I will enter recluse and immerse myself in creation. If you aren't busy, you might have a chat with the other sound ninja.

C: 喂，这是经理的故乡吧，莫非你是想说，自己和乱破小姐来自同个地方？
E: Hey, that's where you're from too. Are you telling me you and Ms. Rappa come from the same place?

C: ——乱破小姐最讨厌的东西是？
E: ...What does Ms. Rappa dislike most?

C: 汪呜？
E: Woof?

C: 这真的能成功吗？
E: Will this really work?

C: 对不起，我走错了。
E: Sorry, I've got the wrong place.

C: 辛苦大家！
E: Good work, everyone!

C: （加入折纸小鸟的合奏）
E: (Join the Origami Birds' ensemble)

C: 那位是筑梦学院的高材生，人称皮皮西战舞才子，我们约好了明天要乘飞车出游。
E: This person here is a Dreamweaver Academy top student. People say they're a master of the Pepeshi war dance. We've arranged to go on a flying car trip tomorrow.

C: …经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，很抱歉，先前对你说了那种过分的话。
E: ...{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Manager, I am so sorry. I should not have said those things to you before.

C: 哎呀呀，要是音乐派对的演出最后弄砸了，乐队经理和核心可是难辞其咎啊？
E: Oh no no, if the music party performance ends up being ruined, I reckon the band manager and key members will have to be held responsible, no?

C: 要不…试试？
E: How about... we give it a shot?

C: 没有没有。我就是随便说说，随便说说而已……
E: No no. It was just a passing remark, just a passing remark...

C: 不过，乱破忍首在哪呢？演出结束后好像…就没看到她。
E: But where's Head Ninja Rappa? I... haven't seen her since the show ended.

C: 是啊，课程轻松，生活不愁，时间太多，乐子不够。哪里好玩去哪里。
E: Yeah, classes are easy, life is cushy, we've got too much time, and we can't have enough fun. We go where the entertainment is.

C: 厉害！不愧是我们的经理！选择跟你果然没错，以后要带我见识更好玩的事啊！
E: Awesome! No wonder you're our manager! I was right to follow you. Do bring us along to experience more things in the future!

C: 看到它这个样子，不由得…就会想到自己。
E: Just looking at it, I can't help but... think of myself.

C: 你详细向达凡绮讲述了刚才的见闻，包括那只造物是如何挤占了其余造物的名额。
E: You detail what you saw just now to Dafanchy, including the incident about how that creation wrested a slot from the other creations.

C: 嗯…我是玲可，「机械热潮」乐队的键盘手…也是雪原科考队的队员。
E: Mm... I'm Lynx, the Mechanical Fever's keyboardist... and a member of the Belobog Snow Plains Research Team.

C: （邀请他们来观看演出）
E: (Invite them to the performance)

C: 「芮克先生」
E: "Mr. Reca"

C: 领衔主演
E: Lead Actors

C: 丹恒
E: Dan Heng

C: 就不能自动战斗吗？
E: Isn't there auto-battle?

C: ——新游戏首次测试，走过路过不要错过。
E: ...First beta for a new game. Don't miss out.

C: 排行榜里怎么找不到呢？
E: Why can't I find it on the ranking?

C: 你将那位皮皮西商人的事告诉了他，还不忘极力夸赞对方的游戏究竟有多好玩。
E: You tell him about the Pepeshi merchant, and remember to lavish praise on just how fun his game was.

C: 你这真不是黑店？
E: You sure this isn't a front for something shady?

C: 喂！你怎么擅自跳出来了！
E: Hey! You're not supposed to reveal yourself!

C: 不许再用了帕！
E: No more of this! Ever!

C: 略略修改。
E: Revise the recipes a little.

C: 也就是说，眼镜还留在我的办公桌上！
E: Which also means, I left my glasses on my desk!

C: 嗯？这映射怎么是反的？真别扭啊……
E: Eh? Why is this mapping in reverse? So awkward...

C: 请都别弄丢，谢谢合作。
E: Please don't lose anything. Thank you for your cooperation.

C: 另外，论文还提到，「米格麦角菌」成熟以后，会长出味道非常鲜美的蘑菇。
E: Also, the thesis also mentions that when the Migg Ergot Fungus mature, fragrant mushrooms will grow from them.

C: 丹恒，原来你是这种人！
E: Dan Heng, so this is who you really are!

C: 当然记得啦！哎，超新星爆发明明是自然现象，我们却要买票观赏，公司真是太奸诈了！
E: Of course! Hey, I thought supernova explosions are a natural phenomenon, but we have to buy tickets to see them. The IPC's so scammy!

C: 「乐之宝™奇迹扭蛋星」…唉，公司总是喜欢把旗下的商业专营星球改造成这不伦不类的样子……
E: Baby Joy™ Miracle Capsule Star... *sigh* IPC sure loves turning its commercial franchise stars into bizarre abominations...

C: 好歹也算是一方天灾，却死得像路边的野狗一样。哼，看了感觉真可怜。
