E: They were considered a force of nature, yet died like stray dogs by the roadside. Hmph, what a pitiful sight.

C: 美少女的事，你不用搞得那么清楚。
E: There's no need for you to nose around in the affairs of pretty maidens.

C: 「闭嘴」前辈，您的幽默，让我捧腹大笑！
E: Ol' Shush, your humor makes me roar with laughter!

C: 副导演学会说人话了？
E: When did the assistant director become such a nice person?

C: 啾一啾。
E: Take a tweet at it.

C: {NICKNAME}，给相片取个名字吧~
E: {NICKNAME}, come up with a name for this photo!

C: 今天附近车行有豪车展，可以去看看热闹！
E: There's a luxury car exhibition nearby today. We should check out the crowd!

C: 还是快追上去吧！
E: We'd better catch up!

C: （怎么有个从未见过的孩子在这里……）
E: (Why is there a child that I've never seen before here...)

C: 在和元老院议员说话前，是不是该先检查下自己的身份？
E: Shouldn't you be checking yourself before speaking to a Council Elder?

C: 呀，这样会不会太直接啦……
E: Ah, might this be too straightforward...

C: 应该不是。小奇美拉的工作很辛苦，算不上是简单……
E: I don't think so. The chimeras worked so hard, so I can't say it was easy...

C: 该进行团队换血了！
E: It's time for some new blood in this squad!

C: 灰宝，我们去园丁那儿问问情况吧！
E: Grayie, let's go to the Gardener and ask about the situation.

C: 奇美拉能有多复杂的想法，嗨，就是唬唬人罢了。
E: How complex can chimeras' minds be? It's all just a bluff.

C: 不管，奇美拉现在就要放假！
E: Nope, chimeras are on vacation, starting now!

C: 我想测差分宇宙想出幻觉了？
E: I wanted to test the Divergent Universe so much that I've started to hallucinate?

C: 这也太真了。
E: This is all too real.

C: …就你小子趁机打广告是吧！
E: ...You just wanted to slip in an ad, didn't you!

C: 能不能取消他的比赛资格？
E: Can we disqualify him?

C: 只是我的小海豹…咳咳…比来之前，伤得更严重了……
E: But my baby seal... *coughs* is in worse shape than before...

C: 泡泡，噢，我的泡泡。
E: Oh Bubbles, my Bubbles.

C: …但你可以为了我们的气氛再惊讶一些。
E: You could try acting shocked, at least — a little enthusiasm for the crowd wouldn't hurt.

C: 泡泡选择离开灰宝，是因为争强好胜的小家伙想要证明：泡泡也能「独当一面」。
E: Bubbles left Grayie because our competitive friend wanted to prove he was capable of "making it alone."

C: 这种事，我早就知道了，来吧！
E: I figured as much, let's do this!
Mmph...

C: 你是在问一个著名小偷为什么要偷东西？所以，你到底在期待什么答案？
E: You're asking why a notorious thief is stealing? What kind of answer are you expecting?

C: 所以，为什么法吉娜会找上我？
E: So, why did you come to me, Phagousa?

C: …我们闲聊太久了，快看！你的敌人已经来了！
E: ...We've spent too long chit-chatting. Look, your enemy is here!

C: 小海豹们的末日到了！
E: Baby seals, your end is neigh!

C: 逗猫好玩。果然如阿雅所说，小飞儿悄悄回来了。
E: Teasing the cat is fun. Agy was right. Little Ciphy sneaked back on her own.

C: 来来来，我准备好了。
E: About time! I'm pumped and ready.

C: 这可不是我泄露的啊！
E: This isn't something I leaked!

C: 我们一直在纠结，要不要把「金海豹杯」摆出来。浴场里人多眼杂的，万一它像预言里那样发生什么意外，可怎么办？
E: We've been debating whether we should display the Gold Seal Cup. It's so crowded in the baths. What if something happens to it like the prophecy says?

C: 既然征得双方同意，我们就破例一次，临时更换比赛选手，让诸位尽兴！
E: Since both sides agree, we'll make an exception this time and temporarily swap the contestants, so everyone can have a good time!

C: 近日！随着「豹豹碰碰大作战」赛程日趋火热，小奇美拉「泡泡」的转队风波成为公民们关注的舆论焦点。
E: Breaking news! As Seal Slammers heats up, the uproar over Bubbles the little chimera's team transfer has become a hot topic among citizens.

C: …{NICKNAME}…不要再说挽留的话了。
E: ...{NICKNAME}... please don't ask me to stay anymore.

C: 早些时候，在星穹列车上。
E: Earlier, on the Astral Express...

C: 所以我该叫你同学，还是教授？
E: So, are you a classmate, or a professor?

C: 特别好评！
E: It's great!

C: 这比赛等您系上安全带后立刻开始！怎么样，您方便落座吗？我们很着急。
E: The race will start as soon as you strap in! How do you like it? Ready to sit down? We're about to start.

C: {NICKNAME}贵宾，恭喜您进入下一轮海选。
E: {NICKNAME}, congratulations! You've advanced to the next round of qualifiers.

C: 恭喜您，您已成功从海选赛晋级，接下来就是决赛了。
E: Congratulations! You've made it past the qualifiers, now it's time for the finals.

C: 呃，抱歉，我也只是听来的，现在赛事要紧，这些方案可能八字还没一撇呢，只是听他们在讲。不过我觉得您这种身份，来打广告实在是屈尊了……
E: Uh, sorry, I just heard it through the grapevine. This whole endorsement thing is still in its early stages. Back to business, this event at hand is more important right now. But I gotta say, someone like you doing ads would be a real waste...

C: 可算赶上了…真是千钧一发啊！多亏我福大命大…当然，也少不了你的功劳。
E: Phew, made it by a hair! Talk about cutting it close... Thank goodness for my incredible luck... and you helped too, of course.

C: 挚友，青雀女士，好久不见。眼下不是打招呼的时候，我们直接开始「救援」吧。
E: Miss Qingque. Friend. Good to see you both. No time for small talk — let's start working on the "rescue" right away.

C: …波提欧兄弟？
E: Boothill?

C: 闭嘴，看我现在就把你的照片爱了！
E: Shut it. I'm gonna put holes in those photos now!

C: 不得不说，这个世界，也有着了不得的魔术师啊。
E: I have to admit... this world has some truly incredible mages.

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，希望你在匹诺康尼玩得愉快。
E: Hohohoho, enjoy your time in Penacony.

C: 不过，既然有你当调饮师…或许该重新评估这里的投资价值了。
E: Still, with you mixing drinks... I'm thinking we might need to reconsider the investment opportunities here.

C: 提问：为什么托帕不能在星穹列车上观看魔术？
E: Question: Why is Topaz banned from magic shows on the Astral Express?

C: 很好的命名，像极了人生。
E: Great name. Feels like life itself.

C: （开始调饮）
E: (Mixing begins)

C: （递上调饮。）
E: (Hands over the drink.)

C: 和我猜的一样，勾兑调饮催生出了原料中的浓郁忆质，让「人格映射」模块的赞美算法逆向运行了。
E: Just as I expected. The mixed drink intensified the thick memoria in the ingredients, which reversed the sycophant algorithm of the "Replica Personality" module.

C: 算是无聊生活里不错的调味剂吧。不过，闹腾不出什么水花。
E: A decent little spice in an otherwise boring life. But still, it won't make much of a splash.

C: 呵呵，{NICKNAME}将军仗义相助，老头子也不得不出一份力了。为此歼灭大君一役，朱明仙舟已向友邦求购矿石煤炭，并征用半数商舸，以添运力。
E: With you stepping up, General {NICKNAME}, even this old man can't sit idle. For the sake of this campaign to destroy a Lord Ravager, the Xianzhou Zhuming has already secured ore and coal shipments from our allies and seized half our merchant ships to boost logistics.

C: 年轻就是好，可以倒头就睡。
E: Youth really is a gift. You can fall asleep anywhere, anytime.

C: 尽管哈欠连天，但你是一个有职业素养的调饮师，会坚守岗位到最后一秒。
E: Even though you're yawning nonstop, you're a professional drinksmith. You'll stay at your post until the very last second.

C: 这确实也算正确答案，自信是优秀投资者的必备品质。
E: That's also a correct answer. Self-confidence is an essential quality for any excellent investor.

C: 你不跟他们一起走吗？
E: Aren't you going with them?

C: 哦，你别误会，像这种商战进化到热战的情况只是少数，我可是很爱惜「资产」的。
E: Oh, don't get me wrong. Cases where business wars evolve into hot wars are rare. I take very good care of my "assets," after all.

C: 把钱结了，咱们还是朋友。
E: Whatever~ Just pay me the money for my story, and we can still be on friendly terms.

C: 在下写的又不是恐怖故事，不会有这种情节展开的，放心吧。
E: We're not writing a horror story here. Rest assured, graphic scenes like that would never make it past the rating board.

C: 您别急，这个设定在下能讲得通！
E: Don't worry. It all makes sense!

C: 「此刻呈现在{NICKNAME}面前的，乃是一朵在烈焰中结着冰霜的莲花…这正是自神降时代绝迹许久的药材——『冰火玄莲』。」
E: "What {NICKNAME} beholds is a lotus blooming with ice crystals while in flames... This is a medicine that has been extinct since the Theophany Era! The Icefire Lotus!"

C: 呃…还来这套？
E: Oh c'mon, not this again.

C: 怎么听着感觉我就是药王秘传…
E: The way you tell it makes me sound like I'm a Disciple of Sanctus Medicus...

C: {NICKNAME}，不必担心。我会以云吟秘法护你周全…这群宵小之徒根本不足为惧！
E: Fear not, {NICKNAME}. Let me chant a cloudhymn to protect you... These schmucks are nothing to worry about!

C: 按照龙尊造像的指引，{NICKNAME}找到了即将降生于世的新任龙尊。
E: {NICKNAME} found the soon-to-be-born impending high elder thanks to the statue's guidance.

C: 这神兵的铸造过程是这样的，你且听我道来——
E: The forging process for the divine weapon is like this. Just listen to me —

C: 放入「无根纯水」
E: Put in the Bona Aqua

C: 「碎星绝尘剑」，剑出星碎，万古绝尘！端的是好名字！
E: Star-Shattering Blade of Truth: Slash at the stars, and leave foes shattered. A grandiose and elaborate name!

C: 对喽，这一路咱们的主角——也就是您，历经奇遇，服食灵丹，我得在这「主角模板」上再添几笔，免得下回忘了。
E: That's right. Our protagonist on this quest — that is, you — has experienced all these adventures and taken this elixir of life. I have to add a few strokes to this Protagonist Model so that it's not forgotten next time.

C: 他们为什么威胁你？
E: Why were they threatening you?

C: 都是乔瓦尼先生教得好。
E: It's all thanks to your brilliant teaching, Mr. Giovanni.

C: 欸～居然还专门设计了这种规则…难道每个决胜乐园都会有类似的设计吗？
E: Hmm~ After seeing this special modification... I can't help but wonder, do all Victory Zones have a similar kind of setup?

C: 努力锻炼，好好享受游戏的过程吧——祝你们能拿下那个称号！
E: Remember, train hard and relish every moment! The title awaits you!

C: 看，乔瓦尼先生果然也在这里！
E: Hey, look, it's Mr. Giovanni!

C: 啊呀呀…即便是「熔金铄铁第一巧手」，也看不出个所以然——以太技术并非我仙舟民所长，抱歉哪，小娃儿。
E: My strength is in metallurgy, my child, I'm afraid I'm not well-versed in the peculiarities of Aether technology. My apologies.

C: 哼哼…哼？哼哼？
E: Oink... Oink! Oink?

C: 别急——我还没——说谜题——！
E: Relax! I haven't told you what you've got to do yet!

C: 「那位高手玩家已经提前击败了上届庆典的冠军首席，并破格赢得了本届冠军首席的称号。因此，本届庆典将产生两名冠军首席。」
E: "The elite player has already bested last year's champion, and claimed this year's title. Hence, this year's event will crown two champions."

C: 果然没错！你们一定会来这里挑战最后一位<color=#dbc291ff>冠军候补</color>！
E: We knew you'd turn up here sooner or later! Come to challenge the final <color=#dbc291ff>championship contender</color>?

C: 注意：<color=#dbc291ff>如果从正面靠近目标，「自动机兵•蜘蛛」很可能会被目标报废</color>——所以，你们必须从<color=#dbc291ff>目标背后</color>引爆「自动机兵•蜘蛛」——
E: Warning: <color=#dbc291ff>If you approach the targets head on, they are highly likely to cause damage to the Automaton Spiders</color>. Thus, it is imperative that you <color=#dbc291ff>detonate the Automaton Spiders behind your targets</color>.

C: …啊！我收到希露瓦和佩拉的信息了——她们好像已经做好准备，等我们去挑战了！
E: Aha! I've just received a message from Serval and Pela — it seems they're ready for us!

C: 哈哈哈，冠军首席，我们又见面了！看到你在庆典结束后还愿意享受这款游戏，我真是非常高兴。
E: Hahaha, we meet again, Champion! I am so happy to see that you still enjoy this game even after the festival has ended.

C: 哈哈哈，真不愧是贝洛伯格的大救星——
E: Hah, you two really live up to your names.

C: 又见面了，两位！你们的表现果真令人印象深刻！
E: What a joy to see you both again! Your performances have been quite remarkable!

C: …这也行啊？！
E: ...They like that!?

C: 唉，不过他都这么诚恳地邀请咱们了…那就跑一趟吧？
E: He's done right by us so far... Shall we head over?

C: {NICKNAME}，你快看！这里聚集了好多人呀。
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}, look at the crowd! There's a ton of people here!

C: （事关重大…谨慎做出选择吧。）
E: (This is a big deal... I'd better think carefully.)

C: …我知道了。没问题，就这样做吧。
E: Very well... Decision made.

C: 这里…变得好冷！总觉得气氛变得不太一样了……
E: Brrrr... it's freezing! And this place feels different somehow...

C: 向当事的目击者打听是个办法，但那些人对岁阳本身一无所知。我、我有个不成熟的想法…咱们手上还扣着另一个情报来源。
E: Interviewing witnesses might give us some clues, but they won't know anything about heliobi. I... I think I have an idea... We have another source of intel we could use...

C: 傻瓜，他们是骗你的！肯定是要把你抓回去呢！
E: Silly-head, they're trying to trick you! They're just gonna catch you and take you back!

C: 我也该去向两位辛苦找我的医助投案自首去了。
E: I should go surrender myself to those two medics — they were looking so hard to find me...

C: 眼下的捉迷藏，让我想起小时候生活的那颗行星上，资源匮乏，想要吃点肉就得冒上巨大的危险，深入矿坑去狩猎一种叫浮鼬的动物。
E: Chasing Bailu around like this reminds me of something I saw back home when I was a child. On my home planet, resources were scarce, and if you wanted to eat meat you had to risk your life by going deep into the mines to hunt an animal called a sky mink.

C: 不如这样，你们就当我是睡魔缠身，把我镇压在床上，让我再睡上三五十个时辰，就当是向十王司交差了，如何？
E: I have an idea — how about we all just pretend that I've been possessed by a sleep ghost, let me sleep for another ten hours, and then call it a day's work?

C: 这一次，还是我们胜了。
E: We did it...

C: 这些微不足道的选择，无法改变必然的命运。
E: Such trivial choices cannot change the inevitable.

C: 道路，从来就只有一条。
E: There is only one way — and there only ever was.

C: 这个沙盘当然有第二种解法。{NICKNAME}，接下来，我要说出我的念头。
E: Of course there's another solution to this sandbox. {NICKNAME}, listen to my idea.

C: ……算了，不烦恼了。明天也许有更危险的任务，请各位好好休息。
E: ...Forget it. We should get some rest — there could be even bigger dangers waiting for us tomorrow.

C: 我知道，这是岁阳幻化所成的心像。将军遣我配合十王司的行动，你们的事情我也略知一二。
E: I know that this is an illusion created by a heliobus. The General sent me to assist the Ten-Lords Commission — I know a thing or two about your work...

C: 这是云骑同袍间的事情了。败了倒也没什么，但抛弃同僚，令云骑蒙羞，岂不是愧对我手中的剑？
E: This is between fellow Cloud Knights. Losing a fight isn't a big deal, but if I abandon my fellow soldiers and bring dishonor to the Knights, how could I wield my sword again?

C: 我年纪大，你行行好，煽情的话就别再说了。
E: I know what you wish to say Yanqing. We can move past the melodrama.

C: 我把最近帮助十王司斩妖除魔的事情，发信告诉了我娘。
E: I wrote to my mom about the recent monster-slaying and demon-fighting stuff I've been doing for the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 你是怎么说的？
E: What did you tell her?

C: 就、就让小桂子保留着吧，我睡觉前不看一会「罗浮杂俎」，会睡不着……
E: Madam Hanya, p—please, let Little Gui carry on uploading... I can't fall asleep without browsing Ghostly Grove before bed...

C: 本大爷没走啊！
E: I haven't left!

C: 不要再和我说话了，尾巴！我不想看着你消失……
E: Please, Tail, no more words! I can't bear to see you fade away...

C: 别想跑！
E: Don't even think about escaping!

C: 你还是让我讲完吧。
E: You should let me tell you the rest of the story.

C: …{NICKNAME}今天也辛苦了，我、我先回去了。再见……
E: ...{NICKNAME}, you did a great job today. I—I'm heading off then. Goodbye...

C: 但不知为何，这几天她突然转了性子，到的比谁都早，走的比谁都晚。今天我接到司里卜者的报告，她打算辞去卜者的职务，鼓励同事们和她一同创业。
E: But for some unknown reason, her attitude completely changed recently. She has been the first into the office and the last to leave. Today I even received notice from other diviners that she is planning to quit her role as diviner and is encouraging her colleagues to start a new business with her.

C: 严格来说，牌和手和牌手都没有关系，拆开收费，进一步深入挖掘用户付费潜力，合理！
E: Strictly speaking: Tiles, hands, and players are all separate entities. Charging separately for them and breaking down user payments to further exploit payment potential is only logical!

C: 算我倒霉，找个路人寄居，结果这家伙突然发起疯来，我受不了了！你们能不能帮个忙，放我出去，再借个身体让我住上几天？
E: Just my luck — I find a host body and it turns out to be a stark raving lunatic. I can't take this! Can you please do me a solid here and let me out so I can borrow another body for a couple of days?

C: 这家伙有点狡猾，还是回绥园一趟吧，不将它镇伏下来我始终有点不放心……
E: This one's slippery. Better get back to Fyxestroll Garden. I won't be able to relax until it's subdued there...

C: 劲爆！不明飞行物背后的真相。
E: BOMBSHELL! Unmasking the mystery behind the Unidentified Flying Object

C: 咦？{NICKNAME}，还有这位是…？
E: Huh? {NICKNAME} and who's this?

C: 在我也无法想起的远古时代，岁阳一族的先祖满宇宙地漂荡，也没什么心思啊、烦恼啊什么的…我觉得那样就挺好。
E: In ancient times, beyond my memory, the ancestral heliobi wandered around the universe without any intention or worries... And I think that was pretty good.

C: 呃呃呃呃呃……
E: Ughhhh...

C: 咦，你的拍照技术越来越熟练啦。不愧是我的御用摄影师~
E: Hey, your photography skills are improving. No wonder I have you acting as my personal photographer~

C: 这真的是宝烛的想法吗？
E: Is that really what you think, Arkeri?

C: 于是它穿过笼壁，穿过车窗，飘向了更为广阔的外层空间。那里没有欺骗，没有纷争——至少从它诞生至今的大部分时间和空间中，没有。
E: So they pass through the cage's walls, through the train's window, and float into the spacious outer space. In that place, there are no deceits, no conflicts – at least, in most of the space-time spectrum since its creation.

C: 原来如此，那就不打扰你了。
E: Is that right? In that case, we won't bother you any further.

C: 可以说重点吗？
E: Can you get to the point?

C: 你想来一起玩吗？
E: Wanna play?

C: （让它帮忙打扫干净）
E: (Ask it to help clean up)

C: 研究进度的事情由艾丝妲站长负责。你可以随时打开培育手册查看进度，她承诺过会在那上面同步更新。
E: Lead Researcher Asta is in charge of the research progress. You can open the nurturing manual to check the progress at any time, she promised to keep updates in there.

C: 科研的事我不懂啊。
E: I know nothing about science.

C: …记住了吗？
E: ...Remember that?

C: 真的…真的…不会有人欺负我？
E: Are you really... really sure... no one will bully me?

C: 汪？
E: Woof?

C: …该有的物品都准备齐全了。这样站在吧台后面，是不是还挺像个酒保的？
E: ...I've got everything I need. Don't I look like a drinksmith when I stand behind the counter?

C: 现在设施都布置好了，还找到了这么多好朋友哇！
E: Now everything is set up, and we've made so many friends!

C: 说不定，这家酒吧很快就要倒闭了。
E: Perhaps this lounge will go out of business soon.

C: 呀！没想到您还记得，看来您不仅在调饮方面非常厉害，心思也相当地温柔细腻呢。
E: Oh! I didn't expect you to remember me! So, not only are you a skilled drinksmith, but you also have a tender and delicate soul.

C: 这家酒吧不行吗？
E: Why not have your date right here in the lounge?

C: 人家不是打算在梦境酒店里逛逛嘛，就在不久前，来酒吧的路上，碰见了个打扮很漂亮的女孩子，看来看去的不知道在找什么。
E: I was wandering around the hotel in the Dreamscape when I spotted a gorgeously dressed lady searching for something.

C: 呀！听着就很难受。虽然您这么说…可心里头的想法哪有这么容易压下去呀。
E: Ohh, that's tough. Even if you say that... it's not easy to suppress what's on your mind.
Phew...

C: 当然是来喝饮料。舒翁没和你讲过么？
E: Drinks, of course. Didn't Siobhan tell you?

C: 不需要。但我想赶你走，方法有很多。
E: No, you don't, but if I want to get rid of you, I have many ways to do that.

C: 哪有！您使我迷途知返，这是我理应做的事！
E: I'm flattered! You guided me to the right path, so it's only natural to repay your kindness!

C: 好像和我想得不太一样…不过没关系，您调制出来的饮料，我全都能喝！
E: This isn't exactly what I had in mind... but that's fine. I'll drink whatever you make!

C: 汪！这就是我最想要的味道，亲爱的调饮师，你真的好懂我哇！
E: Woof! This is the taste I really want! My dear drinksmith, you know me too well!

C: 离场之时已到，感谢您的热情款待，愿我们能再次相聚。
E: It's time to leave. Thank you for your warm hospitality and may we meet again.

C: 汪！虽然我很想帮你，但我只是狗狗，什么都做不到哇！
E: Woof! I'd love to help you, but I'm just a dog. There's nothing I can do!

C: （…能给我个把它赶走的选项吗？）
E: (...Is there an option to toss this dog out?)

C: 有吗？或许有吧，那要不咱们约定，要是谁再用言语攻击对方，谁就是狗狗哇。
E: Am I? I mean, maybe. Let's make a deal. Whoever uses their words to attack the other person will be declared a dog.

C: 劝你——那就是条自私又嘴臭的狗，最好离它远点，别没事自找苦头吃！
E: Let me tell you — it's a selfish, bad-mouthed dog. It's best if you keep your distance. Don't give yourself unnecessary headaches!

C: （不过…听到了不少司令的信息，感觉更理解它的想法了。）
E: (But... I feel like I understand Mr. Bigwig more now listening to it.)

C: 莱桑德让我来找你…
E: Lysander asked me to come to you...

C: 准备开始正式翻译吧。
E: Prepare to begin the translation proper.

C: （开始调制）
E: (Start preparing the drink)

C: 开拓小鸟
E: Trailbirder

C: 保护美少女我义不容辞！
E: I'll do my best to protect a pretty young lady!

C: 这不是拔出来了吗？
E: You're free now, aren't you?

C: 谁能想到有一天…啧啧……
E: Who'd have thought this day would ever come... Tsk tsk...

C: 嗯，那…翡翠女士，您呢？
E: Um... how about you, Madam Jade?

C: 糟糕，一定是幻觉又发作了……
E: Oh no, it must be the hallucinations acting up again...

C: 我好多了。谢谢你，灵砂司鼎！
E: I feel much better. Thank you, Cauldron Master!

C: 我们签下了一位新的代言人，会在这一次的产品发布活动上正式亮相宣布。
E: We've signed a new ambassador, who will make an official appearance at this product launch.

C: 你们雅利洛人的自尊还真是和雪地里的石头一样冰冷坚硬啊。你的潜台词是问我到底打什么算盘对吧？
E: Your Jarilo pride is as cold and hard as a rock in the snow. Are you trying to figure out what plans I've got?

C: 伴随着巨浪般的欢呼，托帕与卢卡来到了上层擂台边。
E: Amidst the roaring cheers, Miss Topaz and Luka move to the upper tier of the arena.

C: 印着我的脸…既然如此，那我还有个要求——我想做战略投资部相关业务管线的仙舟专员。
E: My face on a billboard... In that case, I have one more request — I want to be the special commissioner for all relevant businesses the Strategic Investment Department has with the Xianzhou.

C: 她最终利用「权杖」系统扩展思维，甚至差点实现了鲁珀特二世未能完成的<color=#dbc291ff>自我加冕</color>。
E: She eventually used the Scepter system to expand her intellect, even almost accomplishing the <color=#dbc291ff>self-coronation</color> that Rubert II could not complete.

C: 唉……她只能遗憾地为世人留下那道孤波谜题，却不能成为解谜的天才。
E: *sigh* ...She could only regrettably leave behind that solitary wave conundrum as her legacy, unable to become the genius who solved that dilemma.

C: 真正的战争，从来都没有结束。
E: The true war has never ended.

C: 「不可知域」…我已经迫不及待地想知道，还有什么在等着我们了。
E: The Unknowable Domain... I already can't wait to find out what awaits us.

C: 喝点东西吧。
E: I'll have a drink.

C: 需要我再为您做下自我介绍吗？
E: Should I introduce myself again?

C: 我是某位无名客发明的调饮机器人，于几个琥珀纪前被制造。后来被{RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}从角落里翻出，重新为星穹列车服务至今。
E: I am a robot drinksmith, invented and created several Amber Eras ago by a certain Nameless. My {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous master{RUBY_E#} found me in a corner, dusted me off, and has had me serving passengers on the Astral Express ever since.

C: 我建议您上去看看他们，免得他们到处寻找。
E: Perhaps you should go and see them, to save them the hassle of looking all over the place for you.

C: 来了来了，{NICKNAME}乘客，我们找你半天了！
E: There you are, {NICKNAME}! Pom-Pom has been looking for you all day!

C: 今天就先将就一下吧。明天我一定好好整理，给自己搭建一个温暖的卧室……
E: I'll just make do for today. Tomorrow, I'll clean the place up and build myself a nice, cozy bedroom...

C: 我年轻时，也会比较各种硬件的参数和价格，自己组装计算机，以及一些…更庞大的机器。
E: When I was younger, I used to compare the specifications and prices of various hardware, assemble computers myself, and even work on some... much larger machines.

C: （下一步，就装修客厅吧……）
E: (Next step, let's decorate the living room...)

C: 你看看，这个位置怎么样？
E: What do you think of this spot?

C: 别提了。避难都还没开始，这里就被废弃了。
E: Don't even begin. This place was abandoned even before it could serve as a shelter.

C: 这么说来，刺客也有消灭所有目击者来达成潜入的技巧…扎格列斯，实在可怕。
E: If that's the case, then assassins can be considered to have accomplished their infiltration by eliminating all witnesses... Zagreus is a terrifying Titan indeed.

C: 摸摸它的脑袋。
E: Pet its head.

C: 我要先问些事…
E: There's something I need to know first...

C: 我猜，一定是你们之间存在某种特别的联系，才会如此心有灵犀吧。
E: You must have some special connection with each other that allows this level of communication.

C: 和之前一样，我们去城里逛逛，顺带帮助一下公民们吧。
E: Same as last time. Let's take a stroll through the city and help out the citizens along the way.

C: …好吧，之后还是由你来转述。
E: ...Alright. I'll let you do the translating from here.

C: ——不用浪费时间了，助教，现在树庭中的记叙都是谬论！
E: Don't waste your time, Hyacine. Everything in the Grove's records is misleading!

C: 「不敢正视死亡的懦夫们…」 自冥流归来的那日，他对众人宣告， 「念诵自欺的妄语，盼望牺牲的仙境…」 那话语充斥不敬， 比他的血统还要高傲—— 「真正的勇士，应对那福地嗤之以鼻。」
E: "Cowards who dare not to look death in the eye..." He declared thus on the day he returned from the stream of souls. "Longing for a martyrs' heaven and reciting self-deceiving stories..." His words are sacrilege reincarnate, More arrogant than his blood and family — "True warriors should treat that paradise with spite."

C:
彼时他仍青涩，
技艺尚需苦练，
于求死不得的厄境中，
知晓天赐因何亦名为诅咒——

他在生命的边界，
窥见了那可怖之相。
E:
In his greener days
With more amateur skills,
In crises where death denied him even after kills,
He learned why "curse" is a synonym for "blessing,"

For he saw that visage of terror
at life's closing.

C:
追随他的悬锋孤军们，
大都寸功未立，寿终正寝，
他们临终之际时有怨言，
可男人却毫无愧意——
E:
The Kremnoan Detachment who follow him in livery,
All die in bed, devoid of glory.
They have their share of grudges upon death,
But the man has no regret, none necessary.

C: 「猜对啦，真棒！」\n缇宝热情又乖巧。
E: "You're right! Good job!"\nTribbie is as enthusiastic as she is adorable.

C: 「不是缇宁。」\n少话的孩童摇头。
E: "Not Trinnon."\nThe quiet child shakes her head.

C: 「与我一同追逐火种吧。」\n「我保证——」
E: "Chase the Coreflames with me."\n"I promise that —"

C:
她将以神的名义，
为人传递希望。
即便己身也陷入迷津，
亦要为此世带来指引：
E:
In the name of gods proper,
Hope, she will give to humanity.
Though she falls into confusion,
She will bring guidance to this world in vigor.

C: 「…也罢，无人能够精通万事。」\n「她的作品于生者而言，还为时尚早。」
E: "... Ah, well, none can know all things, nor be skilled in all crafts."\n"Her works are too early for the living to comprehend."

C:
那座城邦名为帕福斯，
墨涅塔的金晖照拂于此。

城市中央栽着金苹果树，
唯有最美之人方能采撷。
E:
That city is named Paphas,
Where the golden light of Mnestia shines.

The Golden Apple Tree sits in the city's middle,
Only the fairest can pluck its apples.

C: 「若是正面，下次就一定得手！」\n她总渴望翻飞之币的祝福。
E: "If it were head-on, I'd definitely win next time!"\nShe always longs for the Coin of Whimsy's blessing and creed.

C: 它已忘记泰坦的前身，\n只记得少女狡黠的留言：
E: They had forgotten their previous life as a Titan,\nAnd remembered only the girl's crafty message:

C: <color=#9e5738>「昔涟」——往昔的涟漪</color>，\n将浪漫的诗篇送回过往。
E: <color=#9e5738>"Cyrene," The ripples of past reverie</color>\ncarry romantic poems back through time.

C: 而吉奥里亚沉闷不语。\n层层山峦将巨龙包裹，\n那是世间最为宏伟的温床。
E: Yet Georios remained weighty and silent.\nLayer upon layer of peaks enveloped the dragon,\nCradling them in a bed more grand than any in existence.

C: 霎那间，山脉震颤、陆地崩解。\n黑潮的割伤曾被泰坦填补，\n如今再度将大地撕裂。
E: Suddenly, the mountains shook and the land cracked.\nThe wounds dealt by the black tide, once mended by the Titan,\nNow tore the land apart again.

C: 而当它睁开眼眸，\n昔日同受飨祭的三尊命运，\n其二已在史书中销声。
E: And when they opened their eyes,\nTwo of the Three Fates who once received offerings,\nHad already faded from the pages of history.

C:
人们在祈祷时念诵她的名，
以求神迹能尽快显灵。
据说，就连岁月祭司的选拔，
也会偏爱粉发的少女。
E:
People recite her name during prayer
To beg for miracles to appear faster.
It is said that even in the selection of priests of Time
Girls with pink hair are preferred.

C:
倘有深海巨兽来袭，
公主便会举剑迎敌。
人们总是提前奏响凯歌，
只因她剑技高超，未有败绩。
E:
Were a monster of the depths to invade,
The princess would raise her sword to engage.
The people always rang her triumphs before she returned,
For her swordsmanship was superb, never suffering defeat.

C: 「看起来，你至今未能摆脱这个诅咒。」\n金织将她手中之杯轻夺，\n「若想尽兴…就把这杯蜜酿留到最后。」
E: "Seems like you still have not been able to get rid of that curse."\nThe Goldweaver softly took the cup away from her hand,\n"If you want to enjoy yourself to the fullest... then leave this honey brew till the very end."

C: 「——这就是昏光庭院的历史。」
E: "— This is the Twilight Courtyard's story."

C: 他响应「金织」号召，远赴圣城，\n愿为英雄的征途添光。
E: Responding to the Goldweaver's rally call, he traveled long and far to reach the holy city,\neager to bring light to the hero's path.

C: 常有学徒称赞师言如同「神谕」，\n而恩师会还以苛刻的诟厉。
E: Pupils often praise his words as divine utterances,\nTo which the teacher replies with sharp retort.

C: 「老师，您…难道『畏惧』着死亡吗？」 助讲低声，眼神彷徨。 理所当然的发问， 但他并未正面回应。
E: "Teacher... Could it be that... you FEAR death?" The assistant asks in concern. It was a question needed, Yet he gave no direct reply.

C: 人们曾疑惑，\n那双眼睛是如何鉴别美丑？
E: They used to wonder,\nhow exactly do her eyes perceive if something is beautiful or not?

C: 长长的队伍横贯广场。\n行商、店主、乃至名流上层…\n一视同仁地排在中央。
E: A long line stretched across the square.\nMerchants, shopkeepers, and even high society elite...\nAll lined up together without distinction.

C: 是坐在椅子上的孩子，\n和他赤着双脚，\n低头不语的妹妹。
E: A seated child speaks up.\nNext to him is a barefooted girl,\nstaying silent with her head kept low.

C: 他恋慕的少女，\n是石膏造的身躯，刻刀雕琢的手指。\n黄金灌注的血，针线编织的心脏。
E: For the maiden he longs for,\nHas a body of alabaster and fingers carved by scalpels.\nIn her runs blood of gold, and a heart woven from threads.

C: 多亏你啦！
E: Thanks a lot!

C: 瓦尔特先生一向很关注别人，却从未问过我的事。
E: Mr. Yang is a very compassionate person, but thankfully he doesn't pry.

C: 我在星空之中遨游，她在知识之海中流连。我们交汇的机会不多，但都在开拓未知的边界。
E: I wander among the stars, and she swims in the sea of knowledge. Our journeys do not intersect much, but we are both trailblazing the boundaries of the unknown.

C: 我带了些有趣的收藏品，一会再细聊。
E: I've bought some interesting collections with me... We can chat more about them later.

C: 年轻人有活力是好事…只是行动前，小三月，记得提醒我一声。
E: Youthful energy is a good thing... but I'd appreciate a heads-up before you make any moves, March.

C: 躯体皆因脆弱而美丽。
E: The human body is beautiful in its fragility.

C: 你好，{NICKNAME}，我是空间站「黑塔」的防卫科负责人阿兰，在空间站期间，我会全力护你安全。
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}. I'm Arlan, I head up the Security Department on Herta Space Station. I'll be in charge of your safety during your time here.

C: 有人问我灵感是什么，不就是脑中一分钟几千次的波动么？
E: Define inspiration? Tsk, it's only the several thousand ideas racing through my mind every minute.

C: 看什么看？
E: What are you looking at?

C: 有些问题需要用剑，而有些需要用头脑。
E: Some problems require swords, while other problems require thoughts.

C: 匹诺康尼诸般美食都很奇妙…尤其是「仰望星空」这道点心，让我有回到家乡的感觉。下次请给我来个大份的。
E: The food of Penacony is truly fascinating... Especially the snack "Stargazer." It gives me a nostalgic sense of home. Next time, I'd like a larger serving, please.

C: 喂喂，看你站着都快睡着了，别硬撑，这里有我，快去休息吧。
E: Hey, you're about to fall asleep on your feet. Don't push yourself — I got this. Go get some rest.

C: 此人颇为狡猾。根据市民报案线索，他不知从哪搞了些古代遗物，也未全数倒卖，手头自留了几件，专门用来骗人。
E: He's very... cunning. According to leads provided by citizens, he's got his hands on a number of ancient relics. He sold off most of them, but it seems he's using others to commit various frauds.

C: 发现你了。
E: Found you.

C: 每个人的过去都值得玩味，不是吗？
E: Everyone has a colorful past, wouldn't you say...?

C: 不错的选择！桑博一定包你满意。
E: Smart decision! I won't disappoint you, friend.

C: 我桑博一向关照朋友。
E: Sampo Koski always takes care of his friends.

C: 我们朗道家的事情都很简单：「想去做的话就去」。我想去雪原看看，所以加入了科考队…就是这样。
E: For the Landau family, matters are simple: If you want to do something, go for it. I wanted to see the Snow Plains, so I joined the research team... It was as simple as that.

C: 雪原探险…虽然会遇到各种麻烦，但解决它们就是乐趣之一呀。
E: Exploring the Snow Plains... Of course there will be all kinds of challenges along the way, but solving them is part of the fun.

C: 《不适合人偶的职业》那本书，我不仅看过，还留过言呢，可惜我到现在都不知道作者是谁……
E: You know that book "An Unsuitable Job for A Puppet?" I didn't just read it, I even scribbled down some notes. Shame, though, I still don't have a clue who wrote it...

C: 嚯哟~
E: Ooh~

C: 我记得她是怀炎将军收养的孙女，与彦卿年纪相仿，剑术水平了得，两人要是能够互相勉励、共同进步自是最好。
E: I recall that she is the adopted granddaughter of General Huaiyan. She has excellent swordsmanship and is about the same age as Yanqing — it would be ideal if the two could get along well and learn from each other.

C: 那机巧身子虽说和人没什么区别，可坏了不感觉疼，也…也不是什么好事吧？
E: She might be tougher than flesh and blood, but not being able to feel pain...? I don't think that's a good thing.

C: 将军，我已备妥弧矢，随时待命。
E: General, my bow and arrows are at the ready, awaiting your command.

C: 我喜欢观云…哦，我是指星云的变化。天舶司统筹仙舟空域，也不过是在其上划下转瞬消逝的痕迹罢了。星云，才是天空真正的主人。
E: I like to watch the clouds... I mean, the changing nebulas. The Sky-Faring Commission governs the area around the Xianzhou, but we are merely momentary traces that quickly disappear in the sky. The nebulas are the true masters of the heavens.

C: 有趣，给那傻孩子瞧瞧。
E: Interesting, show it to that silly child.

C: 后发制人，也是出奇制胜。
E: Let the enemy strike first, and then take them by surprise.

C: 我、我的腰……
E: Ahh... My back...

C: 此处危险，不宜强攻。
E: This place is dangerous. Advance with caution.

C: 人群汇聚之处，总有地底暗流。
E: Wherever crowds gather, there is always an undercurrent beneath the surface.

C: 上决浮云，喝——
E: Through the clouds, it cleaves a path, Hah!

C: 乌羽潜行。
E: Crowfeather's stealth.

C: 无论经过多少时间，苏乐达的口味始终稳定如一…这就是添加剂的魅力。
E: All these years, and SoulGlad's flavor never changes... Ah, the magic of additives.

C: 除了通过思维，我们不具备认识自己的其他手段。
E: Thought is the only means available through which to know ourselves.

C: 身为「庸人」，我笑纳了。
E: I accept, as would any man.

C: 我甚至无法和一个蠢材解释何为「蠢材」。
E: The most annoying thing about idiocy is that you can't explain it to an idiot.

C: 我来演坏人吧~
E: I'll play the bad guy~

C: 没事，没事的……
E: It's okay. It's okay...

C: 似乎听到了不和谐音。
E: I hear some disharmony.

C: 我这就收拾干净！
E: Uh, I'm on it — cleaning up now!

C: 请等一等…！
E: Please, wait a sec!

C: 看到三月小姐能够以全新的面貌勇敢地面对未来，实在令人为之高兴和敬佩。我要从三月小姐身上学到的东西还有很多。
E: I am glad to see that Miss March was able to bravely face the future with a brand-new outlook, and I admire her for it. There's still much I have to learn from her.

C: 教育的时间。
E: Time for a lesson.

C: 他遍查显世、辑录万物，只为求得忍道正法。可凡所有相皆是虚妄，《银河忍法帖》有云：「梦是无梦，空是不空，不去不来，惟在当中。 」
E: He traverses the visible world, compiling all things in search of the true way of the ninja. Yet all phenomena are mere illusions. As the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions read: "Dreams are dreamless, emptiness is not empty, neither coming nor going, only in the middle."

C: 超绝欢喜！忍•医术！！
E: Absolute bliss! Ninja Healing Art!

C: 要打发这场战斗，猜猜看接下来你还要再来几杯？
E: Wanna guess how many more cups of coffee you need to down before we finish this fight?

C: 好奇心，可是很危险的。
E: Curiosity... is a dangerous thing, you know.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝女士带来的神谕，与其说是命运，不如将其视作一种希望——身处破碎的时代，相信自我的选择，而后放手一搏。
E: The prophecy brought by Lady Tribios is not so much fate as it is a form of hope. In this fractured era, believe in your own choices, and then give it your all.

C: 孱弱不堪。
E: So feeble.

C: 有好东西，跑起来！
E: Good stuff ahead! Start running!

C: 嗯！要好好保存。
E: Ah! Make sure you keep it safe.

C: 疗愈世间，还需更灿烂的色彩。
E: I need more vivid colors to heal this world.

C: 刻律德菈大人啊…她将那副「暴君」的面孔朝向世人时，又有谁去疗愈她孤独的背影呢？下次见面的时候，我一定得再给她一个大大的拥抱才行呀……
E: Ah, Lady Cerydra... While she showed her "tyrannical" side to the world, was there anyone there to cure her lonely heart? The next time I see her, I've gotta give her another big hug...

C: 不必沉湎于离别的悲伤，若你渴望达成夙愿，你我必将再度联手。
E: Do not dwell in the sorrow of parting. If you still desire to see your wish fulfilled, then surely we will stand together once more.

C: 聚沙成塔，亦是王道。
E: To rise from nothing is also the way of a king.

C: 我还不想放手呢。
E: I don't want to let go yet.

C: 又见到你了，真好。
E: It's great to see you again.

C: 呀，不小心睡着啦。
E: Oops, an accidental nap.

C: 他的愿望，关乎翁法罗斯的大地生灵。那是一个珍贵又易碎的梦，所以才要用心呵护，对不对？
E: His wish is about Amphoreus's creatures of the earth. What a precious yet fragile dream. That's why it must be nurtured diligently, isn't it?

C: 说到「浪漫」，可是我们的专长呢♪
E: We specialize in "Romance," don't we ♪

C: 再这样试试呢…
E: Let's try it this other way...

C: 期待您这一次表演。
E: I look forward to your performance this time.

C: 「永恒之地」翁法罗斯。它被赋予了鲜花的芬芳，西风的温暖…以及永不褪色的回忆。
E: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land. It was blessed with the fragrance of flowers, the warmth of the west wind... and memories that never fade.

C: 导航
E: Navigation

C: 战斗暂停
E: Pause Battle

C: 切换角色2
E: Switch to Character 2

C: 切换命途
E: Switch Paths

C: 完成简单难度挑战
E: Complete the Easy difficulty challenge

C: 但我仍会燃烧，
E: But I will still burn...

C: 咱信赖的伙伴！
E: My Trusty Partner!

C: 奇美拉大师
E: Chimera Master

C: 同伴被击倒时：自身离场，并使该同伴恢复至<color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>点<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值</color>
E: When a companion is knocked down: This unit departs from the field and restores the companion to <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color>.

C: 回合开始时：我方奇美拉在本场对战每交换<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次位置，队伍中最强的苹果糖向对手发射<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>枚攻击随机目标的导弹，每枚导弹造成<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: At the start of turn: For every <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> position swaps ally chimeras make in this battle, the strongest Candied Apple in the team launches <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> missile(s) targeting random opponents, each dealing <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> DMG.

C: 购买专属奇美拉时：你最强的车厘比斯使自身和随机<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个专属奇美拉<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When purchasing exclusive chimeras: Grants the strongest Krenabis in the team and <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> random exclusive chimera(s) <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK</color>

C: 胶糖卷不能陷入【忘却】状态。对战开始时：队伍中最强的胶糖卷使所有对手陷入【忘却】状态。同伴攻击/追加攻击时：若攻击目标处于【忘却】状态，则立即对其造成1次等同于<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>的伤害
E: Gummy Roll cannot enter the "Oblivion" state. At the start of battle: The strongest Gummy Roll in the team inflicts the "Oblivion" state on all opponents. When a companion uses attack/Follow-Up ATK, if the attacked target is in the "Oblivion" state, immediately deal 1 instance of DMG equal to <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK</color>.

C: 使穿戴者受到的伤害降低<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点，对战中首次受到的伤害额外降低<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>点.至少受到1点伤害
E: Reduces the wearer's DMG taken by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. The first DMG taken in battle is additionally reduced by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>. The minimum DMG taken is 1.

C: 能帮更多忙了！
E: I can help out even more!

C: 你说什么都对。
E: Whatever you say is right.

C: 可以去你家吃饭吗？
E: Can I come over for dinner?

C: 喜欢小三月嗷呜~
E: I like March, awoo~

C: 清风与涟漪，与你为伴~
E: May the cool breeze and ripples be with you~

C: 我的祝福，请收下嗷呜…
E: Please accept my blessing, awoo...

C: 我的！全都是我的！
E: Mine! It's all mine!

C: 悬锋地区冠军，不过如此。
E: So much for Kremnos' Champion.

C: 编队模式
E: Team Lineup

C: 取消
E: Cancel

C: 结算
E: Finalize

C:
・砂金来到你的客房，要求你与他做一笔「无法拒绝」的交易。
・砂金会见真理医生，二人同为替公司收复匹诺康尼而来。砂金称礼金与受琥珀王恩赐的「砂金石」都被星期日扣押，需要寻求更多盟友。
・砂金与假面愚者花火谈判，尝试获取协助。
・在遭遇萨姆之后，黄泉独自将其拦下，黑天鹅趁机将你传送至另一处房间。正在那里等待的砂金告知了你黄泉的真实身份，以及知更鸟已然遇害的消息。随后，他再一次邀请列车组合作调查。
E:
・ Aventurine visited your guest room, pushing you to accept a deal that couldn't be refused.
・ Aventurine met with Dr. Ratio. The two came to Penacony as representatives of the IPC. Aventurine claimed that his monetary gifts and the aventurine stone bestowed upon him by the Amber Lord had been confiscated by Sunday, and that he needed to find more allies.
・ Aventurine negotiated with Masked Fool Sparkle, attempting to gain assistance.
・ After your encounter with SAM, Acheron intercepted him alone, and Black Swan seized the opportunity to teleport you to another room. Aventurine, who was waiting there, revealed Acheron's true identity and the news of Robin's death. Subsequently, he once again invited the Express Crew to collaborate on the investigation.

C: 梦的谢幕礼
E: Dream's Curtain Call

C: 人呢人呢
E: Where are you

C: 这里是赛事讨论组，所有参加锦标赛的选手都在哦
E: This is the tournament discussion group, all tournament participants are here

C: 无论何时都能支持我的决定的
E: Always there to support my decisions

C: 正阳狮鹫（错误）
E: Noontide Gryphon (Bug)

C: 庄严的
E: Maestoso

C: 翩翩起舞的
E: Volteggiando

C: 恶潮飞矢
E: Arrow of the Foul Tide

C: 摄取污秽
E: Absorb Impurity

C: 只要钟表还在转动，死若有时，生亦有时。流萤回到橡木之梦，决意终结这场深魇蝗灾。
E: As long as the clock keeps ticking, death comes for all eventually... and life has its time, too. Firefly went back to the Oak Dream, resolved to put an end to the Swarm Nightmare.

C: 「现实的」
E: Realistic

C: 完成哀歌塞壬「简单」难度挑战
E: Complete the Elegy Siren challenge in Easy mode

C: 获得#2-#5次随机奖励，驶出冥滩。
E: Obtain #2—#5 random reward(s), and sail out of Nethershore.

C: 一套蕴含智慧的叶片袍。
E: A robe of leaves imbued with wisdom.

C: 我方目标消耗生命值后，获得【<u>执念</u>】。
E: When an ally target loses HP, gains "<u>Obsession</u>".

C: 受到的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: DMG taken increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 冰蚀
E: Glacial Erosion

C: 梦主的意图已是昭然若揭…必须阻止他才行——可是，他究竟准备怎样做到那一切？
E: The Dreammaster's intentions are now painfully clear... I have to stop him. But how on earth does he plan to pull all this off?

C: 和大家聊聊接下来的行程
E: Discuss your next trip with the others

C: 寻找「不协和音」
E: Find the "dissonance"

C: 确认神秘少女的身份
E: Confirm the mysterious girl's identity

C: 寻找流萤
E: Find Firefly

C: 嗯，如果是「记忆」出了问题，最好别耽误时间。
E: I concur. If there's an issue with "memories," then we'd better not waste any time.

C: 第一次「做梦」，还有些不习惯。感觉这里和现实没什么不同。
E: This is my first time "dreaming," so it still feels a little odd. Everything here seems just like the real world.

C: 未必是个人，也可能是某种现象，说不清楚。
E: It's not necessarily because of a person. It could be a phenomenon. Can't say for certain.

C: 风险太高。为了一个不确定的机会，把「萨姆」这张底牌掀开。不划算。
E: Too risky. It's not worth it to expose our trump card SAM just for an uncertain gamble.

C: 怪了，怎么会有这种事，我来修复。
E: That is weird. How does that work? Let me fix it.

C: 银狼，你听到什么声音了吗？
E: Silver Wolf? Did you hear something?

C: 所以，我们更要替先生分忧。追查一事就交给我，你什么都不用想，只需专注于舞台。
E: That's why we need to help him even more. Leave the investigation to me. You don't have to worry about anything else, just focus on the stage.

C: 咦，这…这人是谁？
E: Eh? Who... Who's this?

C: …舒翁女士？
E: ...Lady Siobhan?

C: 我也绝对不会容忍，你傲慢又无礼的伪装。
E: I absolutely won't tolerate your arrogant and disrespectful facade.

C: 怎么会……
E: How can this be...

C: 现在我也拿不准，但是值得一试。也许它不是一直会抱有敌意，就算如此，启动「火萤IV型」后，我也能够迅速制服它。如果偏偏是最糟糕的情况……
E: I don't know for sure, but it's worth a shot. Maybe it's not always hostile, and even if it is, once I activate "Fyrefly Type IV," I can quickly subdue it. But if we're dealing with the worst-case scenario...

C: 这么快？来不及了，那只能……
E: Already? There's no time. Then I'll...

C: 我以为这件事会写在你的「剧本」上。
E: I thought this is just the kind of thing that'd get written into your "script."

C: 不必了…告诉你也无妨，在匹诺康尼，艾利欧给我的指示只有一条——「让星穹列车一同追逐『盛大的遗产』」。
E: No need for that... No harm in telling you. On Penacony, Elio only gave me one instruction: "Allow the Astral Express to pursue the Grand Legacy."

C: 谢谢，也希望……
E: Thanks, I hope...

C: 不必装神弄鬼了，我非常确信，你并非远在千里之外。
E: Cut the mystical act. I'm absolutely certain you're not thousands of miles away.

C: 那正是你的破绽，陌生的焚化工——泯灭帮习惯于抛头露面，它的成员从无神秘之处。而冥火大公，<color=#dbc291ff>从未有过名为康士坦丝的子嗣。</color>
E: That's your fatal flaw, mysterious Cremator. The Annihilation Gang has always operated in plain sight, with no secrets among its members. And Duke Inferno <color=#dbc291ff>has never had an offspring named Constance</color>.

C: 在美梦中焚烧出的新居吗？如果你们想要好好谈谈，不该用这种方式进行挑衅。
E: A new home burned out of the sweet dream? If you really wish to have a proper conversation, you shouldn't resort to provocation like this.

C: 那你又为什么…为什么……
E: Then why... why...

C: 不必了，直接开始吧。
E: There's no need. Let's get started.

C: …可你就非要自寻死路？
E: ...But you just had to choose the path of your own demise?

C: 谁让我是那样值得信赖呢？如果他不这么做，我对忆质的掌控，又怎能远远超过寻常忆者，更别说…能篡改{RUBY_B#流萤}一名星核猎手{RUBY_E#}的记忆了。
E: What can I say? I'm just that trustworthy! If he hadn't done that, how could my control over memoria far exceed that of ordinary Memokeepers, let alone... allow me to tamper with {RUBY_B#Firefly}a Stellaron Hunter's{RUBY_E#} memories?

C: 那只八音盒中的记忆，果然是你亲手抹去的。
E: So you were the one who erased the memories from that music box after all.

C: 您好，请提交特工「超强火力必秒度星者」的身份验证。
E: Hello, please submit identity verification for Agent Ultra Firepower Instant Star Traveler.

C: 嗯，再见，各位。愿你们的「开拓」之旅——永不终结。
E: Yeah, farewell, everyone. May your Trailblazing expedition never end.

C: 未必，我们不妨继续动身。善念总是恶行的最后造物，因它知晓自身应被制止。而他曾经的选择，也将为我们揭示他的阴谋。
E: Not necessarily. We might as well keep moving forward. Good intentions are always the final creation of evil deeds, for they know they must be stopped. And his past choices will reveal his schemes to us.

C: 便教「同谐」之谎顷刻败露，示以「真实」的尖刀。
E: Let the Harmony's lies be exposed in an instant, revealed by the piercing blade of "truth."

C: 向死而生？
E: From death, comes life?

C: 我知道你现在一头雾水，我们会尽力为你说明。但讲清一切的来龙去脉之前，你必须明白一件事……
E: I understand you must be confused, and we'll do our best to shed light on the situation. However, before that, it's essential to know that...

C: 我会，开拓下去！
E: I will keep trailblazing forward!

C: 我…醒过来了吗？
E: Am I... awake?

C: 为了匹诺康尼的未来，放手去做吧，愚者——但我不会让任何人受到伤害。
E: Go and do what must be done, Fool. It's for the sake of Penacony's future... But I won't let anyone get hurt.

C: 我想要这世界上的一切，又或者，找到唯一能取悦我的存在。
E: I want everything this world has to offer, or perhaps I want to find the one existence that can truly please me.

C: 即使记忆已被焚烧殆尽，你却能再度将其回忆起来，重新珍藏于心。
E: Even though your memories were cremated to ashes, you were able to recall them once more, treasuring them once again in your heart.

C: 但愿我们仍能重逢，{NICKNAME}…唯一能够取悦我的人啊。
E: I hope we'll meet again. {NICKNAME}... the only one who could ever please me.

C: 但我不想让你惹上麻烦，抱歉。
E: But I don't want to get you into trouble. Sorry.

C: 「♪你送给我的花束～♪♪～它们花瓣凋落时的声音，能让我一直醒着吗？」
E: "♪ The bouquet you gave me~ ♪♪~ can the sound of its petals falling keep me awake always?"

C: 嘀答，我怎么会忘掉呢？我其实最喜欢积木了！被积木改变的状态真让人流连忘返啊！
E: Tick tock, how did I forget? I actually love blocks the most! I yearn and chase after that altered state...

C: 得到更强大的神赐珍宝后，你又建立了许多功业，与它的绑定也愈发紧密。诗人们编写歌谣，将你的事迹传颂。一股神圣的使命感从你心底升起：你要带它缔造真正的传奇。
E: After obtaining a more powerful divine treasure, you achieve many great deeds, and your bond with it grows even stronger. Poets compose ballads, spreading tales of your feats. A sacred sense of purpose rises from deep within: You are destined to forge true legends with it.

C: 抱歉，你中计了。乖乖被我吞下，为你的天真付出代价吧！
E: Sorry, you fell right into my trap. Now be good and get devoured as the price of your naivety!

C: 我为自己划定的终点，是暴君塔塔洛夫留下的王座。我将一步步登上垃圾桶王国权力的巅峰，为自己戴上黄金桶盖加冕！
E: I've set a finishing line for myself: the throne left behind by the tyrant Tatalov. I'll climb step by step to the pinnacle of power in the Trashcan Kingdom, and crown myself with a golden can lid!

C: 滴…嗒，滴答，滴——答，时钟也以不一致的步伐掠过刻度。你的目光划过这处神秘的所在。
E: Tick... tock, tick-tock, tick—tock, the clock marches past its marks with uneven steps. You glanced across the entirety of this mysterious place.

C: 呀，灰宝，你来了！准备好参加这次的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」了嘛？
E: Ah, Grayie, you're here! Are you ready for the Chimera World Tournament?

C: 不战斗就无法生存！
E: They have to fight to survive!

C: 十三位…好熟悉的数字。
E: Thirteen... that number rings a bell.

C: 没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 可如今天空愀然失色，圣城满目疮痍。就连乌拉尼娅的「眼睛」，也变得模糊不清。
E: But now the sky has lost its color, and the holy city lies in ruins. Even Urania's "eyes" have grown blurred and dim.

C: 沉郁的少年
E: Gloomy Boy

C: 「管理学家」
E: "Management Expert"

C: 这里是商店！灰宝可以在这里招募小奇美拉哦。
E: This is the Store! You can recruit chimeras here, Grayie.

C: 招募奇美拉需要花费<color=#f29e38ff>金币</color>。
E: Recruiting a chimera costs <color=#f29e38ff>Gold Coins</color>.

C: 从中选择一位，和灰宝并肩作战吧！
E: Grayie, select one to fight alongside you!

C: 现在可以开启更高的速度了！
E: Now you can unlock higher speeds!
